Name: Bertus-Dekker Seafood B.V.
Description:
At Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v. we specialise in top quality flat fish. We are well know for sole and plaice - but we also supply prime turbot and brill. We buy only the best of the Dutch catch. We process it with care. We supply it to customers across Europe and, indeed, the world. And we maintain the tightest quality controls right through the process; from purchase to order filling. 

Based at the Dutch fishing port of IJmuiden, Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v. has roots going back to 1905. Much has changed since then, but not the dedication to quality. The product is checked and double-checked at every stage. It starts with our master-buyers. To win their approval, the fish must be top-class. And we ensure that it reaches our customers on time, as ordered, and as fresh as the moment it left the sea. 

Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v.'s overall processing and logistics operation employs some 80 people. To help them deliver quality, we use the latest processing technology. This is constantly updated. We also train and cherish vital manual skills. Our personnel aren't born champion filleters - but Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v. can teach them how. And they have the satisfaction of working with only the finest flatfish the sea can produce. It all shows in the end-product. Our customers know that they're getting a constant, top-class, bone-free fillet. In fact, the same quality guarantee applies to all products with the Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v. label. 

We process both fresh and frozen products. Alongside fillets, Bertus-Dekker Seafood b.v. also supplies large volumes of whole fish. We are recognised specialists in sole and plaice. The same applies when it comes to freezing to specification. We deliver the finest fish frozen just the way the customer ordered. Right on time, every time. No matter how big or small the order.

Name: DryFish of Norway
Description:
Dryfish of Norway - The cornerstone of Viking culture!

We are a socially responsible company dedicated to preserve and promote the cultural heritage of the world famous Norwegian Stockfish.

Our main business involves production and export of premium Stockfish produced naturally using sustainable wild fish from the Barents and Norwegian sea, all our products are MSC certified and traceable. The fish are caught using long line and hand line methods which has minimum impact on the environment.

Stockfish is easy to preserve and transport and is still produced using the same methods as the Vikings did a 1000 years ago. Stockfish from Lofoten has even been awarded Protected Geographical Classification in the EU, putting it in good company with other national delicacies, such as Prosciutto di Parma and Champagne.

Our business philosophy is to work along with nature by conserving natures resources for future generations. We are committed to supporting traditional fishing methods and cultures, this distinguishes us from our competitors as all our products are produced from only sustainable natural resources.

Dryfish of Norway believes in preserving traditions, culture, history and livelihoods of our fishermen. Our other products are clipfish (Bacalao), salted fish of Atlantic cod, pollock and haddock all produced in Norway with high quality fish using traditional methods.

Our production facilities are mainly spread across the Northern parts of Norway (Lofoten Islands) where we closely work with the fishermen to produce world class stockfish.

We have an excellent supply chain and production infrastructure to ensure our customers demand for supply of top quality products every season. Our main administrative offices are located in Oslo, Norway and Seattle, USA with storage and distribution networks in EMEA, CIS and Asia.

Dryfish of Norway is a registered trademark in Norway, EU, USA, UK and Asia.

Name: Camino Ruiz Agencies- Global Tilapia Limited
Description:
Camino Ruiz Agencies is a pioneering force in the tilapia fish industry, overseeing the complete value chain from sourcing to distribution. Teaming up with Global Tilapia Husbandry Limited, we control every aspect, from fish feed to fingerlings, and from processing to sales. Our operation spans over 210 sustainably farmed cages on Lake Victoria, Kenya, ensuring the highest quality of tilapia. 
Utilizing refrigerated trucks, we transport freshly caught fish from Homa Bay to our processing plant in Nairobi, ensuring end-to-end traceability and quality control. 

Our primary market is Nairobi and its environs, where the demand for fish reaches 500 million kilograms annually. As the premier supplier of freshly farmed fish nationwide, our products are available through our 25 Global Tilapia outlets and over 180 supermarket chains, including Naivas Supermarkets, Carrefour, Chandarana, and Quickmart.
We also  provide affordable and good-quality Tilapia as a source of protein to improve nutrition in low-income areas by supplying fish to "Mama Samaki" or Fish Mamas, who distribute the fish within Nairobi's populous low-income areas where

Camino Ruiz aims to improve livelihoods by creating jobs and providing economic opportunities in the communities we work with. In the last five years, we have worked with over 2000 fish farmers in Homabay and employed over 140 people in our processing factory in Nairobi.

Name: White Panther- die steirische Gebirgsgarnele
Description:
Eine nachhaltige Kreislaufwirtschaft steht für White Panther Produktion GmbH an oberster Stelle.
Unser reines Gebirgsquellwasser  stammt aus dem Almbach.
Die Wärme für unsere Indoor RAS Garnelen Aquakultur bekommen wir durch die Abwärme unseres Holzvergaserkraftwerkes, welches mit Abfallholz aus dem Forstbetrieb gespeist wird.

Unsere Postlarven züchten wir von unseren Muttertieren im eigenen Bruthaus selber und versenden diese in die ganze Welt.

Das implementierte genetische Programm fokussiert auf Indoor-Garnelenzuchten und unterliegt österreichischen Tierschutz-, Qualitäts-, und Hygienestandards.
Jeder Produktionsschritt wird selbstständig und lokal durchgeführt: Konditionierung und Pflege der Elterntiere, Eizellenentnahme, Produktion des Lebendfutters (Salinenkrebse und Algen), Ablaichen, Kommissionierung und Verpackung.

In unserer Aufzuchtstation, der sogenannten Grow Out werden Raumklima, Salzgehalt, Nährstoffe, PH-Wert, Sauerstoffgehalt, Beleuchtung und Temperatur harmonisch der Natur nachempfunden.

In unserer Anlage sind die Garnelen von äußeren Umwelteinflüssen geschützt. Unser reines Quellwasser weist keine Verunreinigungen auf.

Nur so schaffen wir es, dass unsere Gebirgsgarnelen gesund sind und kein Bedarf an Antibiotika, Hormonen oder anderer Chemie besteht.

Unter strengsten Hygienebedingungen wird die steirische Gebirgsgarnele in unserem Produktionsbereich nachhaltig verpackt und versandfertig vorbereitet, um so auf schnellstem Wege zu unseren Kunden zu gelangen.

Die steirischen Gebirgsgarnelen erhalten Sie in unserem Gebirgsgarnelenshop, im Webshop, in der führenden Gastronomie, sowie im gehobenen Lebensmitteleinzelhandel.

Wir bei White Panther sind Fans der steirischen Gebirgsgarnele-
der nachhaltigen Garnele aus der grünen Steiermark!

Name: American Unagi
Description:
American Unagi raises eels in land-based aquaculture system where they are fed a high-quality diet without the use of hormones or antibiotics. With years of experience mastering the art of farming eel, American Unagi is able to consistently deliver a product possessing best- in-class fat content, flavor, and texture. The result is an all-natural, highly nutritious product that is locally sourced, responsible raised, 100% traceable, and truly delicious. 

By working with our variety of live, frozen, refrigerated, and smoked products, you are not only supporting a well-managed glass eel fishery but a coastal Maine community with deep roots in the working waterfront. Since our fishery is managed by the Maine Department of Marine Resources and the Atlantic States Marine Fisheries Commission, you can feel confident that our eels are sourced from a responsibly managed wild stock. We’re proud to be the only premium eel farm in the world with a ‘Good Alternative’ rating by Monterey Bay Aquarium Seafood Watch.

Name: SEAwise
Description:
SEAwise is an international project and dynamic #research programme aimed at understanding the current state-of-play of #fisheries #management and helping implement Ecosystem Based Fisheries Management #EBFM across Europe. The project involves 24 partner institutions, across 12 European countries. Through a targeted programme of interdisciplinary research, together with the input of key fisheries stakeholders, we are working to deliver a fully operational EBFM tool to facilitate practical application of EBFM.

SEAwise’s research is rooted in four regional case studies spanning small- and large-scale #pelagic and #demersal fisheries in the:
 
#MediterraneanSea
#WesternWaters
#NorthSea
#BalticSea

Ecosystem Based Fisheries Management (EBFM): is an approach to fisheries management that recognises the need to consider the social and economic benefits arising from fisheries (such as food provision, employment, and cultural heritage) as well as the impacts they have on the #environment, and seeks to balance these.

While the benefits of EBFM are widely recognised, SEAwise is working to identify and address challenges which currently pose a barrier to its effective uptake across Europe. Combining existing research with a fresh approach and new knowledge base, SEAwise will look to produce relevant, informed, and ready-for uptake advice.

Name: Ittica Zu Pietro
Description:
Ittica Zu Pietro è una realtà leader a livello nazionale nell’ambito del commercio e della lavorazione di prodotti ittici. 
La sua storia affonda le radici nel tempo: eravamo ancora a metà del secolo scorso, quando Andrea Dell’Olio, figlio di Pietro, solcava il mar Adriatico con i suoi motopescherecci alla ricerca del miglior pescato, con la passione che solo i veri marinai nutrono per il mare.
Quella passione e quella tradizione sono state poi tramandante alle nuove generazioni. Da Vincenzo, fino a suo figlio Andrea, sempre nel segno dell’amore per il mare e della cura dei dettagli. 
Di padre in figlio, arriviamo ad Andrea e Laura, attualmente a capo di Ittica Zu Pietro. È con loro che sono implementati spazi e attività, fino ad aggiungere nel 2004 i reparti di lavorazione e confezionamento dei prodotti lavorati. 
Nel 2015 si pone una nuova tappa di questi percorso, con l’avvio della lavorazione di tonno a pinne gialle e pesce spada, prodotti eccellenti dal punto di vista organolettico e apprezzatissimi dai palati più esigenti.
Tutto questo, ponendo lo sguardo su orizzonti vicini e lontani, nel contesto di politiche di qualità e sicurezza alimentare.
Oggi la produzione e commercializzazione di prodotti ittici segue diverse linee: fresco locale, fresco/congelato di importazione, congelato lavorato, cefalopodi lavorati, marinato, tonno a pinne gialle e pesce spada lavorato, tartare.

Name: APPG on Fisheries
Description:
The APPG on Fisheries is a neutral, cross-party forum for debate, discussion and learning within Parliament. The Group was founded by MPs and Peers who want to promote and support the UK fishing industry, whilst exploring key questions for the future of fishing, processing, coastal communities and the marine environment.

We are at the forefront of vital conversations for fishing and associated industries in Parliament. Bringing together expert insight, best practice and case studies from across the UK and further, the APPG facilitates and reports on these conversations, via open Parliamentary seminars, publications and a vibrant online presence. 

Chaired by Alistair Carmichael MP (LibDem) and Melanie Onn MP (Labour), with Seamus Logan MP (SNP) as Vice-Chair and Charlie Dewhirst MP (Conservative) as Treasurer, the APPG currently has 24 parliamentary Members, representing constituents arounds the UK's coasts.

The organic growth of efforts in sustainable seafood has led to inefficiencies and unnecessary complexity in the seafood industry's journey toward greater sustainability. The ability to address inefficiencies and strategic dilemmas in the system is the greatest opportunity to increase the uptake of sustainable practices and ability to address new social and environmental challenges facing seafood.

Name: Innovasea Norway
Description:
From land to open ocean, Innovasea provides aquatic solutions that hold up in the most challenging conditions. And stand up for life. 

This requires more than just delivering the world’s most advanced aquatic technologies. It means continuously applying knowledge in science and engineering, fish tracking and farm operations to develop the ideal systems for each site. It means working shoulder-to-shoulder with customers to cultivate and protect fish populations. And it means consciously designing products and services to give back more to nature than we take. Day in and day out, we are driven by a commitment to make our ocean and freshwater ecosystems sustainable for future generations.

A pioneer in developing end-to-end solutions for aquatic ecosystems, at Innovasea we’re intent on leading and feeding innovation. Today. Tomorrow. For life.

Name: FishEUTrust Malta Living Lab
Description:
AquaBioTech Group is the host of the Maltese Co-Creation Living Lab as part of the FishEUTrust project. The objectives of the Living Lab are:
-Investigate the current status/level of digitalisation regrading traceability and supply chain in the aquaculture sector in the Mediterranean.

-Strengthen the adoption of digital tools to support aquaculture traceability throughout the supply chain in the Mediterranean.

-Investigate how communication among different stakeholders including; public, policy makers, and industry can make aquaculture traceability more effective. Implement events to facilitate this communication.

-Investigate how digitalisation can contribute to the recognition, flexibility, standardisation and availability of local and/or traditional small-scale products.

The Living Lab will showcase the developments of the project, including the digital tools that are being created to ensure greater traceability across the supply chain.

AquaBioTech Group is the proud leader of the Malta Living Lab of the Horizon Europe FishEUTrust Project, which has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon Europe programme under grant agreement no. 101060712.

Name: Stella Polaris AS
Description:
Stella Polaris is one of the world’s leading producers of Coldwater prawns, and supplies cooked, peeled and frozen prawns to retail, foodservice and industries all over the world. Our production plant and head office is located in Kårvikhamn, a small village in the seafood-rich Senja region in Troms. Our sales and logistics department is based in Kystens Hus in Tromsø.
Stella Polaris produces and sells coldwater prawns of the specie Pandalus borealis. Our prawns are caught mainly in the Arctic waters around Svalbard and in the Barents Sea. Prawn fishing in the Barents Sea is certified as sustainable fishing by the Marine Stewardship Council and Krav.

Having acquired new partnership with European suppliers, our company became a benchmark for the supply of high quality fresh products.
The constant prices monitoring and quality research allows us to offer a wide range of products at competitive prices, and at the same time we guarantee efficient and rapid logistic services.

In quality of fresh fish sales agent in Italy, our mission is to be the connection point between the supplier and the Italian wholesaler and large-scale retailer.
In collaboration with the producers, every day our team compares market prices in order to offer our clients quality products at competitive prices.
Furthermore, our efficient logistic service reaches all the Italian regions (except the islands), including all the suppliers on the same-day delivery.

Name: BioMar SAS
Description:
The BioMar group is one of the leading suppliers of high performance fish feed to the aquaculture industry. Our main business areas are feed for salmon and trout in Norway, the United Kingdom, and Chile, and feed for trout, eel, sturgeon, sea-bass, and sea-bream in Continental Europe.
 
Roughly one out of four farmed fish produced in Europe and Chile are fed with BioMar fish feed.
 
Worldwide the BioMar Group supplies feed to around 60 countries and to more than 30 different fish species.
 
BioMar fish feed types cover the full life cycle of the fish including larvae feed, fry feed, smolt feed, grower feed, and brood stock feed.
 
For more info visit www.biomar.com

Name: Quellpark Kundelfingerhof
Description: Der Quellpark Kundelfingerhof besteht aus dem Quell- und Naturpark, der Fischzucht, dem Restaurant, dem Hofladen und dem Angelpark. Wir leben auf unserem Hof im Einklang mit der Natur und legen hohen Wert auf Qualität. Immer nach dem Prinzip die langjährige Tradition mit den aktuellsten Standards einer nachhaltigen Unternehmensführung zu vereinen.

Name: Brown & May Marine Ltd
Description:
Brown & May Marine (BMM) is an RSK Group company specialising in the provision of commercial fisheries consultancy services to the offshore industry. 

We are industry leaders in our field having provided services in connection with over 100 offshore wind farm projects across Europe and globally,

BMM have an extensive track record in the development of successful strategies to minimise interactions and conflict between commercial fishing and offshore activities. We are experienced across all project phases, from early advisory services at the bidding stage to day-to-day management of fisheries issues during the operational phase of projects. 

Our aim is to facilitate co-existence with the fishing industry whilst minimising risks to projects.

Name: Hoopers Island Oyster Co.
Description:
The Hoopers Island Oyster Co. provides new and established oyster growers with precision equipment, expert advice, and custom seed. 

Utilizing sound science, extensive research and proven technologies, we've pioneered equipment designed for low maintenance, high efficiencies and excellent throughput. We believe sharing best practices ensures a thriving industry and are dedicated to helping every farmer and "oysterpreneur" succeed.

Our equipment division is committed to help growers choose the right equipment to maximize yield and reduce labor costs. Manufactured from premium materials, our components are kept in stock and ready for quick assembly and shipping. 

Hoopers Island has developed pathways to help new farmers enter the fast-growing oyster farming field. And, we provide veteran operators with equipment, techniques and supplies to scale their business to the next stage.

When we're not busy spreading the gospel of Hoopers Island methods around the world, we also grow some of the best bivalves on the planet in the beautiful waters of the Chesapeake Bay and her tributaries. Chesapeake Golds, Holy Grail and Wild Cove are three of our delicious oysters. 

Please contact us to learn more or to visit our headquarters on Maryland's Eastern Shore.

Name: Executive Anglers Association
Description: The EAA is professional fishing organization that promotes fellowship in the pursuit of all things fishing. The EAA offers an opportunity for anglers and professionals alike to network and collaborate with other successful members of the community who also share a passion for fishing. The EAA's monthly gatherings will focus on topics ranging from equipment and techniques to education and conservation.

Name: PTEPA - Plataforma Tecnológica Española de la Pesca y la Acuicultura
Description:
La Plataforma Tecnológica Española de la Pesca y la Acuicultura es una asociación sin ánimo de lucro que tiene como fin principal el fomento de la investigación, desarrollo tecnológico y la innovación en el sector pesquero y acuícola, incluyendo la transformación y la comercialización de sus productos.

Desde PTEPA, y gracias al trabajo conjunto de sus miembros, desarrollamos una estrategia nacional común de I++D+i  que sitúe a las entidades nacionales del sector acuícola y pesquero  en una posición competitiva  a nivel global.

https://ptepa.es/

https://www.instagram.com/ptepa_plataformatecnologica/



e-mail de contacto: info@ptepa.es

Name: Fédération de Pêche de l'Ardèche pour la pêche et la protection des milieux aquatiques
Description:
L'Ardèche avec ses 5000 kms de cours d'eau, dont 3500 kms en 1ère catégorie piscicole, vous offre un potentiel halieutique considérable et varié.

Par la diversité de ses paysages et de ses parcours de pêche qui s'échelonnent depuis les (presque toujours) eaux tranquilles du Rhône jusqu'aux torrents de la montagne, l'Ardèche est en mesure d'offrir à toutes et à tous le qui cadre lui convient pour pratiquer son loisir.

Basée sur une gestion respectueuse des ressources piscicoles naturelles, notre action vise notamment à pérenniser les peuplements de truites fario autochtones, à favoriser le retour des grands migrateurs comme l'alose et le saumon, à sauvegarder les populations d'écrevisses à pieds blancs, à protéger l'apron, les zones humides...

L'Ardèche, avec la très grande diversité de ses paysages, de ses parcours de pêche, de ses espèces piscicoles et la qualité de son accueil, vous attend !

Name: Floribbean Seafood

Name: Blue Island Plc
Description:
The main activities of the company are the fish farming of the Mediterranean species Sea Bass and Sea Bream and the trading of fresh fish from open sea fishing. The company was established in 1993 (under the name Blue Island Fish Farming Ltd) as a mariculture unit.                                                            

A turning point for the company has been its conversion in 1999 into a Public Company and its listing in the Cyprus Stock Exchange. This development contributed to the growth of the company both in the field of mariculture and in the field of fresh fish trading.

Name: Pelagic Advisory Council (Pelagic AC)
Description:
The Pelagic Advisory Council prepares and provides advice to the European Commission and relevant Member States on the management of pelagic fish stocks on behalf of the fisheries sector, environmental NGOs, animal welfare NGOs and other stakeholders. It covers the pelagic stocks of the Northeast Atlantic, the North Sea and the Celtic Sea and west of Scotland. 

The Pelagic AC (as a foundation under Dutch law) was inaugurated on 16 August 2005, and consists of a General Assembly, an Executive Committee and three Working Groups. The work is furthermore done in collaboration with observers, for example, from non-EU countries that have an interest in particular stocks or regions covered by the Pelagic AC.

Name: SADSTIA
Description:
SADSTIA is an association of South African trawler owners and operators that catch, process and market Cape hake.

SADSTIA’s members participate in a sustainable and well-managed MSC-certified fishery, produce food, sustain 12 400 jobs and contribute an estimated R8.5 billion to the South African economy each year.

The South African trawl fishery for hake is certified by the Marine Stewardship Council, the world’s leading certification and ecolabelling programme for sustainable, wild-caught seafood.

To maintain its leadership in the fishing industry, Global Fish maintains unwavering focus on sustainability, quality, profitability, and continuous development

Name: COQ MAREE
Description:
Un engagement pour l’excellence et la durabilité.
Chez Coq Marée, nous sommes engagés à maîtriser l'ensemble de la filière, de la pêche jusqu'à l'assiette, en passant par le conditionnement et la commercialisation, tout en réduisant notre empreinte carbone. Cette alliance nous permet d'optimiser chaque étape de production, garantissant une qualité irréprochable, tout en respectant les normes les plus exigeantes et les attentes de nos clients.

Name: PONTOS
Description:
At PONTOS, we are pioneering the future of sustainable fisheries with our cutting-edge interactive software that delivers predictive analytics for the fisheries value chain. 
Our technology equips fishing companies with the insights needed to optimize their operations and production efficiently, minimizing costs and mitigating risks. 
We ensure the integrity and quality of fishing hauls, offering invaluable benefits to fleet managers and captains by identifying prime fishing locations, enabling product traceability, diversifying catches to align with market demands, and facilitating the timely and sustainable landing of catches in line with global Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs).

Our commitment extends to meeting the growing consumer demand for transparency and freshness, providing details about the catch's origin, the fisherman's identity, the fishing techniques used, and the exact fishing locations. 
PONTOS leverages advanced satellite imagery, socio-economic, and oceanographic data to deliver personalized analytics and visualization tools, supporting sustainable fishing practices.

We are dedicated to fostering an information ecosystem that benefits all stakeholders in the professional fishing industry, from boat captains to maritime fleet managers. Recognizing the impact of fishing on biodiversity and the socio-economic landscape, PONTOS is committed to ensuring the fishing sector's resilience against environmental and social challenges.

Our sustainable fishing initiatives are centered around three core pillars:

1. Social: Reducing the volatility associated with unsustainable fishing practices, enabling local fishermen to thrive.
2. Economic: Boosting the local fishing economy and reducing dependency on international imports.
3. Environmental: Empowering fishermen to safeguard the natural ecosystems they operate within, preserving these invaluable resources for future generations.

Name: ESSENTIAL AQUATECH PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Essential Aquatech is building an AquaStack climate-risk intelligence platform to make aquaculture predictable, bankable, and resilient to climate change. We combine FFPO- and VLE-led input provisioning, on-ground services, and data-driven advisory to support freshwater fish farmers.
Our 3AI engine integrates pond identity and history, climate and weather signals, satellite indicators, and field events to deliver early warnings and prescriptive actions. This converts climate and biological uncertainty into underwriting-grade aquaculture intelligence.
By enabling pond-level climate risk scoring, standardized interventions, and verifiable outcomes, Essential Aquatech reduces farm losses while providing lenders and insurers with a clear risk matrix to safely deploy capital in aquaculture.

Name: CAAI

Designed to foster meaningful local and global partnerships, its where applied research, entrepreneurship, and generative innovation converge to create practical models for the future of food from the ocean.

Name: OLSPS Marine
Description:
OLSPS Marine (OLSPS), founded in 1989 by Drs Amos Barkai and Mike Bergh, specialises in fisheries resource analysis, data collection, and management solutions. The company focuses on implementing advanced quantitative and predictive tools for fisheries management and other sectors. OLSPS has developed innovative software solutions and complex stock assessment models, providing consultation and reviews internationally.

OLSPS operates two divisions: Electronic Logbook and Fisheries Management.

The Electronic Logbook division offers an affordable, customisable software tool for recording and reporting all marine and vessel-based data. Key solutions include the OLCatch (Previously OlracDDL) and the OLFleet (Previously DDM), with additional services provided through partnerships with third-party providers.

The Fisheries Management division consists of experts in mathematics, data analysis, and fisheries science, dedicated to developing quantitative tools for fishery management. They have consulted globally on various fisheries projects, including stock assessments and socio-economic studies.

Name: Hookpod
Description:
Hookpod Ltd was created in 2013 but our story started many years earlier. In 2005, Ben Sullivan started working with British brothers and inventors Ben & Pete Kibel to solve one of fishing’s biggest environmental challenges – seabird bycatch in longline fisheries. Working closely with the fishing industry, the team spent the next six years perfecting what fishermen need, a solution that fits seamlessly into the fishing operation, allowing them to catch fish and not birds. 

For further details or to receive FREE samples and an information pack email info@hookpod.com

“Every day, hundreds of albatross die in longline fisheries. But there is a unique and exciting new solution to halt this. It's called a Hookpod. Hookpods stop birds getting caught as they dive for baits. They are effective, easy to use, safe and economic for fishermen. If every pelagic longline fishing fleet used Hookpods, I believe we can stop the accidental death of these magnificent ocean wanderers.”

Sir David Attenborough

Name: Uganda National Women's Fish Organization (UNWFO)
Description:

UNWFO is dedicated to see economically empowered women and youths thriving within a sustainable Fisheries and Aquaculture value chain. We envision a future where gender equality is realized, economic opportunities are accessible to all, and our fisheries sector contributes to the holistic development of communities across Uganda.
At UNWFO, we aim to strengthen the participation of Women, Youths and PWDS in sustainable Fish production and trade. Our organization brings together two million registered members from diverse regions of Uganda, providing a platform for knowledge sharing, capacity building, and advocacy. We believe in the power of collective action to address specific challenges faced by women and youth in fisheries and aquaculture to unlock their full potential.

Name: Marine Fishing
Description:
A Marine foi fundada em 1988 por Takayuki Shibuya, imigrante japonês sobrevivente da bomba atômica de Hiroshima, que veio para o Brasil em 1956.

Quando o Sr. Shibuya chegou ao país, foi para o interior de São Paulo trabalhar em uma fábrica de chá e, após um período, se mudou para a capital, onde começou atuando como vendedor em uma loja de tecidos da Rua 25 de Março. Mesmo sem domínio total da língua portuguesa, foi considerado o melhor vendedor do estabelecimento.

Com espírito empreendedor, Takayuki Shibuya foi ao Paraná para trabalhar com produtos agrícolas. Mas, em busca de um mercado inexplorado, encontrou na pesca, um segmento que já era forte no Japão, um meio de empreender, o que o levou a criar sua própria marca de equipamentos de pesca esportiva no Brasil: a Marine Sports.

Assim, surgiu um novo desafio: fornecer equipamentos de pesca que atendessem a todo o mercado brasileiro. Desde então, a Marine busca o que há de mais inovador no mercado, prezando sempre pela qualidade de seus produtos e possibilitando que os pescadores brasileiros tenham ao seu alcance o equipamento ideal para o seu momento de lazer.

Muito embora a Marine sempre esteja buscando atender às necessidades do mercado brasileiro, hoje os produtos fornecidos pela marca atendem a vários países da América Latina. Hoje a Marine está presente no Paraguai, Argentina, Bolívia, Chile, Colombia, Costa Rica, Equador, Peru, Uruguai, Venezuela e Guiana Francesa.

Além de fornecer produtos de qualidade, a Marine preza pelo o respeito a natureza, e o lema “Pesque e Solte” faz parte da história da marca. A Marine incentiva a preservação do ambiente para que os pescadores pesquem com responsabilidade e, assim, possam continuar pescando sempre.

Name: European Association of fish Producers Organisations (EAPO)
Description:
The European Association of Fish Producers Organisations (EAPO) represents 32 POs from 13 EU Member States, with approximately 10,000 vessels, 3.5 million tonnes of landings and € 3 billion first sale value. EAPO was founded in 1980. Every Fish PO recognized by its EU member state can apply for membership of the association.

EAPO’s objectives are the following:

- To assist the members in fulfilling their key role as a PO to achieve the objectives of the Common Fishery Policy and the Common Market Organisation for Fishery and Aquaculture Products.
 
- To provide advice to the members on the management of their Production and Marketing Plans.
 
- To improve the relationship between European POs by looking for common grounds in addressing the challenges for the European fisheries, particularly in respect of marketing and other specific tasks of the POs.
 
- To address the above with relevant authorities in the Member States, Fisheries Ministers Council, European Parliament and European Commission and to be recognized by these authorities as a European representative body for the fisheries sector.
 
- To influence the rules and regulations affecting fisheries targeting a sustainable production through socio-economic viability with respect for the environment.

Name: International Pacific Halibut Commission
Description:
The International Pacific Halibut Commission (IPHC), originally called the International Fisheries Commission, was established in 1923 by a Convention between the governments of Canada and the United States of America. Its mandate is research on and management of the stocks of Pacific halibut (Hippoglossus stenolepis) within the Convention waters of both nations. The IPHC consists of three government-appointed commissioners for each country who serve their terms at the pleasure of the President of the United States and the Canadian government respectively.

The IPHC, an International Fisheries Organization, receives monies from both the U.S. and Canadian governments to support a Director and staff. Annually, the IPHC meets to conduct the business of the Commission. At this annual meeting the budgets, research plans, biomass estimates, catch recommendations, as well as regulatory proposals are discussed and approved then forwarded to the respective governments for implementation. The IPHC staff and offices are currently located in Seattle, Washington.

The IPHC conducts numerous projects annually to support both major mandates: stock assessment and basic halibut biology. Current projects include standardized stock assessment fishing surveys from northern California to the end of the Aleutian Islands, as well as field sampling in major fishing ports to collect scientific information from the halibut fleet. In conjunction with these ongoing programs, the IPHC conducts numerous biological and scientific experiments to further the understanding and information about Pacific halibut.

The Commission encourages public participation in the management of the resource and regularly seeks advice from its advisory bodies and various State, Provincial, and Federal agencies.

Name: Marativa

Name: OXZO TECHNOLOGIES NORWAY AS
Description:
Om OXZO

OXZO leverer komplette systemer for automatisert egenproduksjon av oksygen og luft, «on-site on demand». I samarbeid med Oxymat, en ledende leverandør av oksygen-generatorer, tilbyr vi nå avanserte løsninger som dekker alle behov – fra produktivitetsforbedring i åpne sjø-merder og lukkede merder til behandlingsanlegg og settefiskanlegg.

Våre anlegg bygges i Europa i henhold til gjeldende regelverk og NS 9415, designet for bruk i den norske havbruksnæringen under tøffe klimatiske forhold. Dette partnerskapet med Oxymat styrker vår evne til å tilby state-of-the-art teknologi og tilpassede løsninger som møter spesifikke behov hos våre kunder.

Vår kundeservice tilbyr fjernovervåkning av anleggene og bistår med å sørge for optimal drift. Vi tilbyr også en 24/7 service for å garantere at våre kunder alltid har støtte når de trenger det. Hvert anlegg leveres med komplette styresystemer, inkludert et fullstendig API som også kan integreres med andre styrings- og kontrollsystemer.

Vårt fiskehelse-team jobber tett sammen med ressurspersoner hos kunden for å utvikle skreddersydde løsninger som optimaliserer drift og øker produktiviteten i akvakulturen.

Our philosophy is to use artisan skills, age-old recipes and the finest fresh ingredients to bring our customers the best Wild, Organic and Superior Irish Smoked Salmon. We carefully select, cure and smoke the finest Atlantic Salmon to produce our Award Winning Wild Organic and Superior Irish Smoked Salmon.

In 1998 Kerryfish started to sell its internationally renowned Wild, Organic and Superior Irish Smoked Salmon via the Internet. From our website you can order a very special gift of Wild, Organic or Superior Irish Smoked Salmon, and we can deliver anywhere in the world.

Name: MFF Ltd
Description:
MFF Ltd, based in Malta, is a leading aquaculture company, with over 20 years of experience, and operates in international markets. The main species produced by MFF Ltd are Gilthead sea bream, European sea bass, and Atlantic Bluefin tuna.

To find out more about MFF Ltd, please visit our website.

Name: Fisheries Society of Nigeria
Description: The Fisheries Society of Nigeria, inaugurated in 1976, is Nigeria's Non- Governmental Apex Organization of all fisheries practitioners in Nigeria.

Name: Viking Fishing
Description:
Viking Fishing's Head office operates out of Cape Town Harbour. Viking operates within the Hake deepsea, Hake inshore, Hake longline, Tuna, small pelagic, lobster and prawn fisheries.

The company is a founder member of the responsible fishers alliance and holds MSC chain of custody certification

Name: FISH Platform
Description:
The FISH Platform is the world-leading group of experts for safety and health in the fishing industry, with over 100 members from 32 countries.  Membership of FISH Platform is free to participants with an interest in the safety and health of fishermen. We host two main meetings and conferences per year and we have active working groups which are delivering real impact in the areas of codes of practice, training syllabi and guidance documents that have been accepted internationally. 
FISH Platform is supporting fishing safety projects around the world through the International Fund For Fishing Safety (IFFS).  See our PROJECTS to find out more about our work or apply for funding to the IFFS.

Name: ACFA
Description: The Atlantic Canada Fishermen's Association (ACFA) is a non-profit organization that represents the interests of independent fishing enterprises in the provinces of New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island, and Newfoundland and Labrador. The ACFA works to promote and protect the rights of its members, who are primarily small-scale, inshore fishermen. The organization's main focus is on issues related to the management and conservation of fish stocks, as well as the economic viability of the fishing industry in Atlantic Canada. The ACFA also works to promote sustainable fishing practices and to improve the safety and working conditions for its members.

Name: Pan Ocean Aquaculture
Description:
Feeding 10 billion people with zero footprint. 

Delicious, nutritious seafood, sustainably farmed in the deep flowing waters of the open ocean. Free range, circular farming with fish thriving in their natural habitat. Seaweed and shellfish taking the nutrients out of the water, drawing down carbon and closing the cycle. This is zero footprint fish farming. 

It all starts with moving farms from the shallow, stagnant coastal waters to exposed offshore locations, made possible by our patented cage design.

Sustainable feed, free from fish and soy, will drive the next major footprint reduction.

Ultimately, offshore Integrated Multitrophic Aquaculture (IMTA) or co-cultivation to multiple species in the vast expanse of the open ocean, could ultimately be the best food production system, ever.

Do you share our vision and do you wish to contribute? Please get in touch through any of our employees.

Name: ColomboSky
Description:
ColomboSky is a company supported by European Space Agency incubation programme. 


ColomboSky developed AquaX, a satellite-based service for the monitoring of water quality everywhere in the World. AquaX allows to increase aquaculture production by improving farming sites performance and reducing losses due to biological and climatological threats. Thanks to precise satellite measurements and customized oceanographic models, AquaX can measure and forecast a wide range of ocean parameters and biological phenomena, such as temperature, salinity, currents, algal blooms and jellyfish blooms over large spatial scales and continuously in time. AquaX is a powerful tool that provide easy and actionable information for an effective management of environmental risks that can impair fish farms productivity.

Our team is composed by elements with experience in marine biology, oceanography, remote sensing and data analysis. ColomboSky team members have deep experience in international projects for Earth Observation and machine learning as well as aerial and drones inspections through image processing. In the last two years, our team has been focusing on the development of AquaX, the most complete water quality monitoring tool on the market.

Name: Keyport LLC
Description:
Keyport LLC is a leading producer and supplier of seafood products from around the world with specialization in King, Snow and Dungeness crab products.

Headquartered in Edmonds, Washington, Keyport is trusted worldwide to deliver sustainably sourced seafood, using the best fisheries management practices. Keyport’s top-selling products include King Crab, Snow Crab, and Dungeness Crab. The company is also expert at bringing new products to market, developing new fisheries and putting systems in place for new ventures.

Keyport has a global reach and scaled production capacity enabled by sustainably harvesting natural resources in Alaska, Norway and Russia. With multiple processing facilities in the United States and Norway, Keyport has the capabilities of a multi-national company with the customer-centric focus of a family-run business.

Name: Coastal Corporation Ltd.
Description:
Coastal Corporation Limited is a leading seafood processing and exporting company in India, specializing in high-quality shrimp products. Founded in 1981, it operates modern facilities in Andhra Pradesh and serves markets in the USA and Europe.

Key Operations:
Coastal offers a wide range of shrimp products like Litopenaeus  vannamei(commonly known as White Leg Shrimp) and Penaeus monodon (Black Tiger) Raw and Cooked in an Individually quick-frozen (IQF) Block in a Plate Freezer option. Shrimp varieties include Breaded butterfly, Popcorn Shrimp, Breaded Nobashi, Tempura, Sushi shrimp, Battered Shrimp, Nobashi, Shrimp Rings(Half-moon, Full moon), PDTOFF, PDTON, EASY PEEL, Cooked in Shell PDTON, PD Block, HLV Block. 

Quality Certifications:
Coastal maintains high-quality standards and holds key certifications such as:

FDA
ASC
BRC
BAP
HACCP
SA8000:2008
Halal
FSSAI

Growth and Expansion:
In December 2024, the company announced a stock split to increase liquidity. Coastal also operates subsidiaries like Continental Fisheries India and Seacrest Seafoods, which help expand its market reach.

Coastal Corporation continues to lead in the seafood industry by focusing on quality, global expansion, and sustainable practices.

Name: BLUELINE FOODS (INDIA) PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:

Name: Sea cucumber Aquacultre Consultancy
Description:
Sea cucumber Consultancy is an international company, which provides commercial technology for the large scale production of sea cucumbers. Our aquaculture consultancy service has more than 30 years of cumulative practical experience in sea cucumber aquaculture in several countries. 
Sea cucumber Consultancy offers the best of world-class expertise and knowledge in, hatchery production of sea cucumber juveniles and farming. The company owes its position as one of the leading Sea cucumber aquaculture consultancy with its commercial hatchery technology in the world to its long-standing research into the biological and physiological aspects of embryo, larval and juvenile development, and its complete understanding of all aspects of the sea cucumber production chain.

Name: Sustainable Blue

Swimming in large tanks that replicate the natural water flow of ocean currents, our salmon fishery is designed to mirror the ocean ecosystem, but on land – protecting wild salmon populations from both disease and overfishing.

Name: Karunya Marine Exports Private Limited
Description:
Located on the West Coast of India, KARUNYA MARINE EXPORTS PVT. LTD. is an ISO 22000:2005 certifed and BRC 'AA' grade company dedicated to deliver world-class products with a vision to be a globally renowned company  known for its truly FRESH quality seafood and also to be a preferred supplier of seafood products thereby achieve a name that would deliver trust, reliability and consistency.
The company was nominated among the top five finalists in 2011 among 50,000 companies in the agro/food/marine sector for the 'Leaders of Tomorrow' award which was conducted by ET NOW - the news channel of "The Economic Times"- a prestigous business daily in India
The plant is strategically located in Ratnagiri, which is south of Mumbai and North of Goa and is surrounded by many small fishing harbours across the Konkan coast, thus ensuring a regular supply chain. These harbours are also unique such that the local boats have one-day fishing cycles, thereby delivering exceptionally fresh seafood. Stringent safety and security norms, superior infrastructure and unrivaled expertise have ensured that KARUNYA is one of the foremost brands in the seafood industry.

Name: Quantidoc AS
Description:
Vi hjelper oppdrettsnæringen med å holde fisken frisk og robust

Å opprettholde fiskens barrierer til gjellene, huden og tarmen robuste og friske er avgjørende for å holde fisken ved god helse. Å holde disse barrierene sterke og lydhør gir god velferd, vekst og overlevelse.

I løpet av det siste tiåret har vi utviklet VERIBARR til å bli den kvantitative industristandarden for å verifisere og opprettholde helsen og robustheten til fiskens frontlinebarrierer (gjeller, hud, tarm). VERIBARR dekker 13 arter over hele verden.

Vi er QUANTIDOC - The Barrier Health Company.

Name: Brixham Trawler Agents Limited

Name: Lo Scoglio Sea Group S.r.l.
Description: Il mare non si racconta, non si immagina, non si descrive. Si vive. E' un universo immenso e puro che si svela a chi sa riconoscerne la voce, il richiamo forte e salmastro che giunge dalle sue profondità. E così, attratti dall'irresistibile fascino del mare, all'alba di ogni giorno i fratellini L'Abbate, seguendo sulla sabbia le orme del nonno, respiravano le note balsamiche marine e apprendevano i segreti per valutare il buon pesce da rivendere nella pescheria di famiglia. Siamo frutto dell'incrocio tra il mare e il progresso!

Name: Nordic Trout
Description:
Nordic Trout is the largest farmer of rainbow trout in Finland and Sweden.
Our main products are fresh gutted rainbow trout, sea trout and rainbow trout roe, ‘red caviar’.
Rainbow trout roe is a valued and tasty delicacy, the roe season is between November and January.
We have 32 production facilities in Mainland Finland, Aland and Sweden.
Annual production is approx. 10 million kilos of rainbow trout. Company turnover was €52 million in 2017.
Nordic Trout is the only fish farming company in Finland that is able to offer fresh rainbow trout to wholesalers, commerce and further processing all year round.

Name: Thoondil Ecosystem
Description:
Thoondil Ecosystem  is India’s first integrated fisheries innovation company, uniting technology, science, and rural empowerment.
We build scalable solutions across fish delivery, real-time digital markets,  traceability, women-led networks, and biomimetic ocean research.

From supply chains to genetic seed verification, our mission is simple:
Transform India’s fisheries sector through transparency, technology, and community-driven growth.

Name: Seafishtrade
Description:
Seafishtrade is a successful trader of frozen fish products in West Africa, Europe and China. We supply Frozen at Sea fish directly from the fishing vessels ensuring that only the best quality products are delivered to our customers at the best price.

WHO WE ARE

After 20 years of working in fishing industry and "Inspired by Ocean" we have brought together experts in the field to combine our assets, knowledge and entrepreneurial drive to do what we love most.

Our passion in fish has evolved into building a successful trading company SeaFish Trade. The presence of strong commercial links and partnerships with the fish producers, processors and customers allow SeaFish Trade constantly supply any quantities of frozen fish products on demand.

Our passion and strategic behaviour has allowed us to become a successful and well trusted player in this buisness. Today our company sells annually more than 150 000 metric tons of frozen fish all around the world.

WHAT WE DO

Main business direction at our company is frozen fish trade. We specialize in direct supply from the fishing vessels, operating both on North and South of the Atlantic Ocean.

SeaFish Trade successfully develop its trade of different species of frozen fish products on the markets of West Africa, Europe and China. Our supply chain goes from Côte d'Ivoire to Namibia bringing best quality frozen fish products to local markets at the most competitive price. We understand the importance of overfishing and preservation fish stocks in the ocean and we are fully committed to source fish for our trading only from trusted suppliers.
 
We always conduct first class quality control to ensure that our clients get only the best products. Our Head Office is located in the northernmost ice-free port of Klaipeda, Lithuania and representatives' offices are available in Ghana and Angola.

F: +370 46 246 662
E: office@sft.lt

Name: Seafood Exchange Pte Ltd
Description:
A sourcinig and marketing company based in Singapore with offices in Canada and UK, we have been the specialist in the business of deep-sea pelagic fish for the past 20 years.

The company has established partnerships with fisheries in Alaska, Indonesia and Taiwan, cooperative in Japan, processing factories in China, Ecuador, Thailand, Peru, and Vietnam for various products for our different markets. All these processing and partnership facilities operate under strict standards and guidelines according to the respective certifications of EU, HACCP, BRC, MSC and Dolphin Safe.

Our office here in Singapore oversees all our procurement and inspections where we have our own team of highly trained QCs to inspect every container prior to shipment . Additionally, we also provide pre-shipment and loading inspection services to customers who need them on other factories, as we believe in providing solutions to our clients.

Name: ACUIPRO

Contamos con más de 1,000 ítems para la acuicultura y realizamos despachamos a provincia.

Name: Norges Sildesalgslag
Description:
Sildelaget er Europas ledende markedsplass for førstehåndssalg av pelagisk fisk. Vi bidrar til at fiskerne får rett pris for sin fangst, og har i snart 100 år bidratt til stor verdiskapning langs hele kysten. 

Sildelaget er også opptatt av en bærekraftig forvaltning av fiskeriressursene og fokuserer sterkt på kontroll av fangstene. Målet er en optimal forvaltning av våre fiskeressurser i et evighetsperspektiv og å trygge Norge som en av de største eksportørene av fisk til hele verden.

Name: Norwegian Shores AS
