Name: INTERSEAFOOD
Description: Notre société est spécialisée dans l’export et la vente de produits de la mer frais et congelés.
Location: Les Sables-d'Olonne, Pays de la Loire

Name: KRUSTASIA FOODS LLC
Description:
KRUSTASIA is one of the region’s leading seafood supplier in FRESH, FROZEN and LIVE seafood. 
 
A little introduction about the company. KRUSTASIA started its journey in 2009 and has become one of the leading fresh and frozen seafood providers in the UAE. KRUSTASIA FOODS, having its corporate office in Dubai, a factory and processing plant in Ajman with LIVE seafood tanks and its own Nile Perch factory in Uganda, is vowed to cater prime quality seafood products to valued partners globally by adhering to stringent statutory fishery quality control program. The whole operation is thoroughly guided and monitored by a team of experts having vast exposure in International marketing as well as hands on experience in food processing
 
CERTIFIED
The HACCP certified processing facilities in Ajman and Uganda are a strong presence and at the sources ensures quality and timely delivery of fresh seafood for each of our valuable clients. We are awaiting our ISO certificate is 4 weeks.

We are also ISO 22000:2005 certified for the activities of Receiving, Processing and Distribution of Fresh and Frozen seafood (shrimp and fish).
 
SUCCESS
Our product focus is built upon the freshness of raw materials, consistency in supply and quality, time and cost efficient logistical solutions and customized product specification and packaging solutions.
With processing facilities and sales under the same roof, efficient and meaningful communication has been the key to our success.
 
WIDE VARIETY
We offer a wild variety of chilled, fresh, frozen, LIVE and value added seafood. Our strength lies in sourcing and delivering a vast array of imported and locally available wild and aquaculture seafood.

Name: Eka Seafood Indonesia
Description:
Eka Seafood Indonesia  is global seafood supplier, trader and fish dealer from Surabaya, Indonesia since 2004. Located at Eastern Indonesian gateway, the home of richness seafood from archipelago country.

We provide wide range seafood across the nation, and from neighboring South East Asian countries such as Malaysia,Vietnam, Thailand and Far east such as China and  Japan .

We deliver frozen, fresh chilled, alive seafood and canned seafood

Name: ICASUR
Description:
Industria Camaronera Del Sur was founded in 1991 and is dedicated to shrimp production (Penaeus Vannamei) in salt water.

With a farm of 157 hectares of salt water ponds which are planted twice a year for a total planted area of 314 hectares a year. Out of the total area 26 hectares are equipped with aeration systems for intensive production, the results are promising and the plan is to convert the whole farm to this new production scheme.

 Annually more than 1.3 million pounds of whole shrimps are produced and all of it is exported to the US and European markets.

We are pioneers in Honduras in raising shrimps without using antibiotics, this allows us to produce a healthier product for consumers and avoid damage to the environment.

Name: The Journal of Zoology Studies
Description:
The Journal of Zoology Studies is a Bi-monthly peer-reviewed scientific journal that publishes research article, review article, book review and other related categories in the field of zoology. We cover almost all major areas of zoology that includes Zoography (also known as descriptive zoology), Comparative anatomy (studies on the structure of animals), Animal physiology, Behavioral ecology, Ethology (studies on animal behavior), Invertebrate zoology, Vertebrate zoology, Soil zoology.

The key feature of this journal is a premium web address on the internet i.e. “www.Journalofzoology.com” which is a sign of authenticity. We strongly recommend to the authors to check the URL/Domain Name before submission of their manuscript on any journal.

Name: Biomasa S.A.
Description:
Es una empresa de servicios, orientada a las necesidades de la industria acuícola, conformada por profesionales de primer nivel, totalmente involucrados en dar soluciones integrales a nuestros clientes, siendo 100% partners en el proceso productivo, logrando resultados Premium en el exigente mercado mundial.
Nuestros servicios son:
• Cosecha in Situ • Servicio de Baño de Cáligus • Extractores de Mortalidad • Sistemas de Aireación y Oxigenación • Servicios de Astilleros e Ingeniería Naval • Arriendo de Naves.

Name: Dewi Laut Aquaculture
Description:
At Dewi Laut, we strive to be at the forefront of the aquaculture industry. To achieve that, we believe not only in the constant development of our technology, but also that perfecting our product also means paying close attention to operational excellence and the growth of the people who run it.

We believe that the exponential growth of aquaculture will continue, and that nations with strong, but underdeveloped, maritime ecosystems will have the most to contribute in the near future.

Indonesia, with its high coast-to-land ratio and tropical climate, has many natural advantages. Add into that mix an abundance of human resources, and you get a winning formula for a scalable industry.

Indonesia is uniquely poised to become a global marine industry powerhouse, and we are excited to contribute to building that future.

Name: VSV Iceland
Description:
We are VSV — a proud fishery located on a small island off the coast of Iceland that goes by the name of Vestmannaeyjar. We’ve been catching, processing and delivering Iceland’s wildest fish since 1946 and we've loved every single moment of it. 

As our island is so close to our fishing grounds, we can catch, process and deliver the highest quality seafood, while ensuring that it’s as fresh as can be. And because we control the whole process, from catch to delivery, we can ensure sustainable and traceable fishing, as well as consistent cooling and reliable delivery, with every single fish.

Here at VSV, we believe that you cannot only taste the wild, but our dedication, responsibility and trust — whether it’s our flaky cod, classic haddock or delicious scampi — in every single bite. Something we call the Pure Taste of Iceland.

Name: Sanlab
Description: Somos un laboratorio de producción y explotación de larvas de camarón

Name: Bristol Bay Regional Seafood Development Association
Description:
The Bristol Bay Regional Seafood Development Association is a
fishermen-funded group with a mission to increase the value of the Bristol Bay fishery through education, quality outreach, and marketing.

Name: ACMS
Description:
ACMS is a specialist aquaculture management consulting company with a focus on Sub Saharan Africa. It draws from the experience of its directors and has sustainable development of the sector-at-large as its core focal point. Aquaculture is an emerging industry in Africa and we view it as a vital component of the continent’s forward development in terms of Food Security, Exports, Foreign Direct Investment and Job Creation.

In order to add real value to the sector, we feel a direct hands-on approach is required in order to leverage our track record and expertise. Our point of difference is in our preference to engage in long term ventures in which we can participate directly in driving the outcomes. Given the inherent complexities of operating projects on the continent we feel it is essential to ‘walk the talk’ rather than to leave a trail of thick reports and failed promise.

ACMS was established in 2014 when the directors noted the need for honest project management and advisory services in the industry from people with direct experience in farming and developing large projects. Furthermore, we identified a requirement to bridge the expectations of entrepreneurial drive with the realities of the corporate financing.

Name: Poseidon Aquatic Resource Management Ltd
Description:
Poseidon are fisheries consultants working globally providing advice in support of sustainable fisheries and aquaculture, marine planning, and blue growth.

Established in 2001, Poseidon has successfully completed more than 300 short- and long-term projects for international and bilateral donor agencies, regional fisheries bodies, national and local governments, the private sector, and NGOs.

Poseidon has completed projects in Europe, the Middle East, Asia, the Pacific, Africa, and the Americas, ranging from short term work on specific issues, to large longer-term multi-disciplinary projects.

Name: United Fisheries Ltd
Description:
United Fisheries is located in Christchurch, the major city of the South Island of New Zealand. The company has grown since 1974 from modest beginnings to become one of the top ten seafood companies in New Zealand. 

United Fisheries is a family owned business with a highly knowledgeable and experienced team of fishing, marine farming, production, marketing and administration personnel and is one of the largest employers in the Christchurch area.

Name: FORO MAREE
Description: Spécialiste de la pêche côtière depuis plus de 30 ans

Name: Skipper Otto
Description:
Skipper Otto’s Community Supported Fishery (CSF) creates a direct connection between local fishermen and consumers with the joint goal of protecting ocean resources and improving our local food system. This partnership fosters the protection of ocean resources while providing premium, wild, fairly-traded, Ocean Wise seafood.

The CSF model ensures that independent, small-scale harvesters can continue to fish using the low impact practices their parents and grandparents used before them and still remain in an industry that is rapidly becoming dominated by big business and aquaculture.

CSF members buy in before the season and receive a share of premium, wild, local, and sustainably caught seafood. Members have boat-to-fork transparency, knowing how, when, where and who caught their fish.

Our primary fisherman, Otto Strobel, has been fishing the British Columbia coast since the 1960s. Since that time the number of independent fishermen like him has been reduced to a skeleton fleet. Skipper Otto’s CSF was started by Otto’s son and daughter-in-law (Shaun and Sonia Strobel) to make it possible for Otto and a few of the hold-out independents to remain fishing. Skipper Otto’s CSF was the first CSF in Canada, and among the first in the world.

The CSF now supports a growing number of fishing families and provides an ever-growing number of sustainable, wild, local seafood products to customers across western Canada.

Name: PescaData
Description: PescaData provides software as a service to small-scale fishers and fishing organizations in Latin America, improving data collection, data-driven decision-making, the implementation of solutions for ocean sustainability and community well-being, and promoting platform interoperability. Fishers are served with a suite of tools including digital catch logs and organizational tools for managing fishers, boats, permits and data. Built-in data aggregators measure the contributions that fishers make to international targets (SDGs/FAO SSF Guidelines), incentivising best practices and creating capital opportunities for investors looking for measurable impacts in sustainable seafood.

Name: Glacier Fish Company/Iquique US
Description: Glacier Fish Company/Iquique US is a fine art company based out of 2320 West Commodore Way #200, Seattle, Washington, United States.

Name: Paramate
Description:
Paramate is an Oslo based start-up which main goal is to solve one of the biggest challenges seen in land based fisheries. 

We are in the process of creating a game changing system that will help fisheries minimize their mortality rates related to Hydrogen Sulfide outbreaks.

Name: Lake Bounty Group
Description:
Located within Lake Victoria catchment area, Lake Bounty is a global player in fish processing, export and preservation of fisheries as a renewable resource. We process and export high quality fresh and frozen fish products. Established in September 2007, Lake Bounty is among the leading fish processors and exporters in Uganda with an installed capacity of 50 tons per day.

The factory is a modern facility equipped with state-of-the-art automated machinery and processing plant. The plant is IFS certified, EU approved (No. U05/96), and FDA certified (No. 10239709186) for export to the European Union, United States, and other world markets. A fully functional and approved HACCP system is in place to ensure product safety. The HACCP system is based on a firm foundation of Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP) and Sanitation Operating Procedures (SOPs) to maintain a high level of hygiene in the processing plant. 

Currently, our products are exported to more than 20 countries. Lake Bounty is poised for growth and has major expansion and diversification plans to achieve its short and long terms goals. The Group has augmented its production capacity at two of its sister concerns, Victoria Perch Ltd. at Mwanza, Tanzania and Lake Eco Fish Processing Ltd. at Entebbe, Uganda, processing 50 tons and 30 tons per day, respectively. Recently, Lake Bounty expanded its footprint in the Middle East and building awareness in the United States at the 2013 International Boston Seafood Show.

Name: Growel Processors Private Limited
Description:
Growel processors Pvt Ltd is located in an area of about 10 acres near Gudivada which is the costal hub for shrimp and fish farming in Andhra Pradesh, India. 
It has the state of art technology and infrastructure facility managed by a group of professionals having more than 25 years of experience in various disciplines like aqua culture health care, nutrition, farming, marketing and finance.
The facility is equipped with latest technologies from USA, Singapore and Denmark.  
The facility has an installed capacity of about 12 thousand tons IQF shrimp and 3000 tons of frozen shrimp.

Name: Serikandi Aquaculture
Description:
Today, aquaculture is one of the fastest growing food production sectors in the world. Through technological development and the needs for food security, the aquaculture industry has opened up many possibilities for sustainable fish production. 
We recognized that Brunei’s coastal line and waterbody potential had yet to be fully realized and that aquaculture could be the country’s next globally competitive sustainable industry. 

VISION: 

To be a regional leader of Blue Revolution in Southeast Asia.

MISSION:

To become a globally integrated and sustainable aquaculture company.


To achieve that, we believe not only in the constant development of our technology, but also that perfecting our product also, means paying close attention to operational excellence and the growth of the people who run it.

Name: BLUEBOOST Project
Description: BLUEBOOST rests on the hypothesis that the increased aquaculture production of a wide range of low trophic species in conjunction with established European aquaculture will boost the production of nutritious food, while reducing the environmental footprint towards carbon-neutrality. The increase of low trophic species aquaculture will: a) increase both the volume, diversity and self-sufficiency of aquaculture production, b) reduce the environmental footprint, c) boost a resource-efficient and profitable economy, d) promote a circular economy, e) develop new nutritious products, f) minimise negative impact of the farms on the ecosystem and g) increase ecosystems resilience against climate change.

Name: The National Fisheries & Aquaculture Authority, Republic of Liberia
Description:
The National Fisheries & Aquaculture Authority (NaFAA) was created by an Act of National Legislation on October 9, 2017. It functions as a fully-fledged autonomous body pursuant to the Public Authorities Law of the Republic of Liberia. NaFAA has its roots in the erstwhile Bureau of National Fisheries, which operated as a unit within the department of Technical services of the Ministry of Agriculture from 1956 to 2017.
Our Goal
The overall fisheries sector goal is: Sustainably managed and economically viable fisheries that generate prosperity for the present and generations yet unborn.
Our Mission
In order to facilitate the attainment of the overarching vision of the sector, the Government, as essential operational actions, will promote an improved institutional and legislative framework for fisheries management; adaptive research; community and stakeholder participation in capture and culture-based fisheries management and development; effective international, regional, sub-regional and bilateral cooperation for fisheries management; enhanced monitoring, control, and surveillance capabilities; and improve fish quality and value addition technologies for enhanced economic returns in fisheries.
Our Vision
To harmonize the varied and numerous long-term expectations of the primary, secondary, and tertiary stakeholders, and recognize the strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats of the fisheries sector, a clear and unambiguous vision statement is crystallized.

Name: Northwest Atlantic Fisheries Organization (NAFO)
Description: NAFO's overall objective is to contribute through consultation and cooperation to the optimum utilization, rational management and conservation of the fishery resources of the Convention Area.

Name: Noordzeevis uit IJmuiden
Description:
IJmuiden ademt vis. Met een eigen visafslag, vloot en tal van handelsbedrijven behoort IJmuiden met recht tot een van Nederlands grootste vissersplaatsen. En dat al sinds het einde van de 19e eeuw.

Een echt streekproduct
Door jarenlange ervaring weten IJmuidense visbedrijven als geen ander een authentiek en kwalitatief hoogwaardig streekproduct te produceren. Vrijwel alle disciplines van vangst tot verwerking zijn in de haven te vinden. IJmuiden heeft een boeiend verhaal te vertellen. Waarin een echt streekproduct, namelijk Noordzeevis, de hoofdrol speelt. 

Kom proeven
Het verhaal van Noordzeevis uit IJmuiden wordt nog te weinig verteld. Maar daar komt vanaf nu verandering in. De ambassadeurs van onze stichting zetten zich graag in om IJmuidense Noordzeevis vaker op de kaart te zetten. En zo een groot publiek te overtuigen naar IJmuiden te komen om vis te beleven en vooral te proeven!

Name: PT. SAY Grow Indonesia
Description: (PT. SAY Grow Indonesia) is a technology company focusing on aquaculture development in Indonesia. As it is stated in our vision "Bringing Indonesia's fisheries and the marine sector as the primary contributor for the national economic growth through digital technology". Jayalah Perikanan Nusantara!

Name: Group Vidinha
Description:
With more than 75 years of experience, Grupo Vidinha, founded in 1945, is dedicated to the industry and trade of fishing products, it is a strong brand, which has gained the trust of its customers and consumers. All this thanks to serious work, focused on the quality of its products and services to satisfy the highest standards of requirements.
The head office is located in the Zona Franca Industrial of the Madeira island, where we have two industrial facilities, a fresh fish unit with more than 1500m², equipped with the latest production technologies and a frozen products unit with more than 1700m², equipped with production lines of frozen fish and storage chambers.
In the Azores, we have been present in the regional fish market for more than 20 years and officially represented in 2011 with the creation of the company Pescaromas, with a fresh fish unit with more than 1500m², in São Miguel and with some logistics centers strategically located in some islands in the archipelago. We also operate at auctions in mainland Portugal.
The commitment to the quality of its products presents itself as a factor of recognition in the fish market.

“For all these reasons, we are sure to have THE BEST WILD FISH.
PROUDLY FROM SUSTAINABLE FISHERY.”

Name: Capitano
Description: A 1ª REDE DE FRANQUIAS DE PEIXARIA DO BRASIL! Comprar Peixes & Frutos do Mar nunca foi tão fácil

Name: Hydro Victoria Africa
Description:
Hydro Victoria Fish Hatchery Farm is a private investment with a lense for Community Empowerment, aimed to fulfill its main agenda in Food Security in Africa. 

Guided by the principles of Regenerative Agri-aquaculture, We provide quality fish fingerlings, sustainable insect-based feeds from black soldier fly farming, adaptive pond and cage aquaculture systems, aquaculture training, and capacity building of local service providers. 

Located at Port Victoria, our farm has branches in Busia town, Funyula within Busia County, Usenge in Siaya County, and Sindo in Homabay County, Kenya.

Name: devi seafoods
Description: the company is invovlved export frozen cooked and raw  products to USA EUROPE AUSTRALIA SOUTHAFRICA AND ASIAN AND MIDDLE EAST COUNTRIES

Name: FURIC MAREE
Description: Créée en 1947, Furic Marée est aujourd'hui un acteur majeur en France du commerce de gros et de détail de poissons et crustacés.

Name: Kwality Feeds Limited
Description:
Kwality Feeds Ltd is established in the year 1993 with the objective of becoming preferred aqua feed supplier to the developing aquaculture industry in India. In the year 2005 it has revolutionized the Indian aquaculture by introducing high performance extruded floating fish feeds.

Our Mission: To provide healthy and sustainable growth for customers by creating innovative feed solutions to develop aquaculture.

Name: PT Melaut Sejahtera Bersama
Description: | IMPACT | FISHERMEN |

Name: Centre for Sustainable Tropical Fisheries and Aquaculture @ JCU
Description:
Tropical regions are grappling with unprecedented challenges due to population growth and increased demand for high-quality seafood. This expansion strains wild fisheries and pushes for greater efficiency in aquaculture. The CSTFA addresses both aquatic systems and the industries and communities they support.

Our multidisciplinary approach enables researchers to tackle significant problems more effectively than individual efforts alone.

Our Vision: To be a global leader in tropical fisheries and aquaculture research,delivering innovative solutions for sustainable food security and ecosystem health.

Our Mission: To be a hub for world-class multi-disciplinary research and collaboration,training future leaders,and engaging with industry and communities to promote hands-on and sustainable practices in tropical fisheries and aquaculture.

Name: Kimpex A/S
Description:
Established in 1986 Kimpex is the experienced and reliable supplier of fish and seafood all over the world.
Through a strong network of high quality production plants, Kimpex is a major supplier of pelagic fish, frozen fish, fresh fish and fish roe.

Name: Aqua Doctor Solutions
Description:
Aqua Doctor Solutions is One of the Most Popular Brand & Consultancy Firm in Aquaculture & Fisheries based at Kolkata, West Bengal received more than 100 no's prestigious awards & recognitions in the field of Fisheries for promoting Aquaprenuership in this sector & for innovative works.  Aqua Doctor Solutions is 5 years Old Company working in PAN India as "One Stop-One Shop Solutions" on Aquaculture & Fisheries connecting more than 10000 no's plus clients. Aqua Doctor Solutions provides all kinds of Inputs related to aquaculture farming, Technical Consultancy, Market Linkages, Training etc. 
Understanding the importance of Digitization in Fisheries, We have developed a App based solutions called as "E-Fish Tutor". E-fish Tutor is the first kind of Online Digital Platform where we can learn all about Aquaculture practices as Tutorial Notes along with it provides E-Commerce platform for Buyers & Sellers and many more services in one platform itself. 
Most importantly E-Fish Tutor have Exclusive Aquaculture Health Management Services called "Doctor's on Call" online & offline mode in this App too. 
This platform will reduce ultimately multilayer middleman involvement in the industry and helping farmers with entrepreneurs for better learning under one roof. 
Near future E-fish Tutor also planning to launch within the same platform itself credit linkage facilities, market linkages support, value chain development, farm to plate tracking etc. 

So, "E-fish Tutor" is one kind solutions platform for All Aqua Farmers, Vendors, Suppliers, Consumers etc. for Better Lives & Better Income.

Name: Pensacola Oyster Cluster
Description: The Pensacola Oyster Cluster is a local industry aggregate of oyster aquaculture farmers and wild harvesters that collaboratively increase production efficiency, maximize business opportunities, and create an interdependent supply chain network that grows the local blue economy.  POC's mission is to provide value-added harvests with the consumer in mind and to meet local, regional, and national demand.  And our philosophy is to grow the US oyster aquaculture industry at the estuary level.

Name: Association Nationale des Organisations de Producteurs
Description:
L'ANOP est une fédération de 7 organisations de producteurs de la pêche maritime françaises. Par la diversité de ses adhérents, nous sommes le reflet vibrant de la richesse et de la diversité de la pêche française, englobant des pêcheurs côtiers aux pêcheurs hauturiers, des petites embarcations aux grands navires. Nous sommes présents sur toutes les façades, représentons tous les métiers, tous les engins et toutes les tailles de navires.

 Nos valeurs fondamentales 

Nous sommes profondément engagés envers la durabilité et la préservation des ressources marines. Notre mission est de promouvoir une pêche responsable qui assure la pérennité des métiers tout en respectant l'écosystème marin.

La pêche est une véritable passion qui unit des individus venant de tous horizons. Elle anime et fait vivre des territoires entiers, et elle permet de nourrir des millions de français. Les pêcheurs sont les agriculteurs en mer. 

Ensemble, nous formons un tissu riche et coloré, tissé de traditions, de cultures et de savoirs uniques. C'est cette diversité qui fait la force et la beauté de notre secteur. C'est cette diversité qui nous permet d'innover, de nous adapter aux défis du présent et de construire un avenir durable pour nos océans et nos communautés de pêcheurs.

 Déconstruire les mythes 

Nous sommes conscients des défis auxquels notre secteur est confronté. Notre secteur essuie régulièrement de nombreuses critiques, qui naissent d’une lecture simplifiée et erronée de nos activités et de notre réalité. Nous prenons ces préoccupations au sérieux et nous nous engageons à promouvoir une pêche responsable tout en contribuant au bien-être de nos communautés. Il en va là de la survie de nos métiers et nos pêcheurs ont à cœur de préserver la ressource qui les fait vivre.

 Co-financé par l'Union européenne

Name: Aquatech Fisheries Ltd.
Description: Aquatech Fisheries is a pioneer in the land-based fish-farming company. The company’s accumulated knowledge and hands-on experience in planning, developing, and managing Recirculating Aquaculture System facilities are catapulting it to become a regional leader in sustainable fish farming. Aquatech’s premier facility is growing annual output of 2,000 tons of barramundi fish literally in the middle of the Negev desert in Israel. The facility is able to supply local distributors and retailers with fresh, high-quality, and affordable fish year-round and 24/7.

Name: Ocean Peace Inc
Description: Controller for a company that owns fishing vessels that operate off the coast of Alaska

Name: Nordward
Description:
Nordward is a coalition of Fisk Idag, Kvalitetsfisk, Fiskerikajen and FSGfoods in Sweden and Denmark working with high quality seafood and Asian colonial.
We buy our seafood directly from the Scandinavian fish auctions, the coastal fishermen and import dry and frozen goods directly from Asia. We are able to provide the leading restaurants with the best products available on the market.

Within our field our ambition is to become the leading service partner in regards to sustainability, product development and customer relations. All four companies have strong local foundations focusing on high customer satisfaction, knowledge, quality and service.

Name: Fisheries Council of Canada
Description: Established in 1915, the Fisheries Council of Canada (FCC) is the voice of Canada’s fish and seafood industry, promoting a healthy resource and prosperous industry playing a vital role in the Canadian economy. Our members include small, medium and larger-sized companies along with Indigenous enterprises that harvest and process fish from Canada’s three oceans. FCC members take pride in being key employers in their communities, providing jobs and creating an economic base for other local businesses.

Name: Ministry of Agriculture and Fisheries, Jamaica
Description: The Ministry of Agriculture, Fisheries and Mining (MoAFM) has been charged with the responsibility of driving the integration of the production of primary agricultural produce along all the stages of the supply chain through to value added and facilitating full commercialization of outputs of the agriculture, manufacturing, and service sectors.

Name: Pure Blue Fish
Description:
Pioneering the Future of Sustainable Seafood

Pure Blue Fish, an Israeli-based innovation enterprise, is solving the $300 billion global seafood crisis caused by ocean depletion and contamination. We don't just farm fish; we deliver a premium, resilient, and ethical product.

Our competitive advantage is rooted in simplicity: total independence from the ocean. While 95% of marine fish are still wild-caught, our Zero Discharge Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS) allow us to build farms on land, anywhere. This means fresh, local, and premium seafood certified clean of mercury and microplastics.

Join us in accelerating the market shift toward a clean protein source!

office@purebluefish.com

Name: Azura Atlantic
Description:
La palourde AZURA ATLANTIC est un mets premium à destination
des grands chefs, des professionnels de la gastronomie et des
métiers de bouche en quête d’excellence et de sens : la grande
nouveauté à suivre !

Name: Bluefin Aquaculture Consultancy
Description: It is a registered aquaculture consultancy company.We provide services for site selection, species selection for culture and technical guidance etc.This company mainly involving to promote and structure the national level aquaculture activities in a professional way..

Name: PT Lautindo Synergy Sejahtera
Description:
PT Lautindo Synergy Sejahtera is based in Muncar, Banyuwangi, East Java, Indonesia. Our operations started in 2021, with gradual capacity expansion over the past three years.


PT LSS's primary activity is the production of Frozen Precooked Tuna Loins, a semi-finished product used by tuna canneries worldwide. The tunas are sourced locally, with production mainly targeted for export to countries such as Thailand, Ecuador, Mexico, Jordan, and Japan. Our factory and office are located in Muncar, Banyuwangi, East Java, Indonesia.

Name: Chilean Salmon Marketing Council
Description: The Chilean Salmon Marketing Council (CSMC) is a U.S.-based entity dedicated to strengthening the reputation of Chilean salmon while increasing value and healthy growth for member companies. Chilean salmon is raised in the pure Antarctic waters of Patagonia, and the producers of Chilean salmon are stewards of that remarkable ecology. As the second-largest salmon producer in the world, the Chilean salmon industry brings a high quality, reliable supply of nutritious fish to market year-round. Chilean salmon producers are committed to the welfare of their salmon and dedicated to the environment.

Name: Selstad
Description: Selstad is an international supplier of competence and equipment for sea-based commerce, with quality, good service and innovation ranking among our main priorities. Having operated for over 60 years means that we can deliver high quality products based on our extensive experience and knowledge within the industry. Selstad’s business sectors include aquaculture and fishing equipment, rope production, safety equipment and equipment for industry and offshore.

Name: Anova Food
Description:
Premium Seafood, Delivered with Integrity

Anova Food is the leading supplier of sushi-grade tuna in North America, recognized for its expertise in the global sourcing of wild-caught and sustainably harvested tuna. With a dedicated quality assurance team of over 45 professionals, Anova ensures that every product meets the highest standards of excellence. Our seafood is produced under rigorous protocols in compliance with BRC (British Retail Consortium) “ready to eat” food safety standards.

At the forefront of innovation, Anova employs advanced preservation technologies to provide frozen seafood that preserves the natural color, flavor, and fresh quality of the product.

Anova’s commitment to sustainability is deeply embedded in our core values. We are proud to lead the industry in promoting responsible sourcing practices that support both environmental stewardship and the long-term health of seafood populations for future generations.

Name: Lucky Fish Co.
Description:
Akdeniz balık türlerinin tam entegre üreticisi olan Lucky Fish (eski adıyla Uğurlu Balık), entegrasyon dahilinde yavru balık üretimi, balık yemi üretimi, açık deniz balık yetiştiriciliği yapmakta ve yetiştirdiği balıkları kendi işleme tesisinde uluslararası BRC, IFS, GLOBAL GAP & HACCP standartlarına uygun olarak işleyip katma değerli ürün olarak İngiltere, Fransa, ABD vb. gelişmiş ekonomilere ihraç etmektedir.

Lucky Fish Co. bağımsız özel sermaye fonu yönetim şirketi olan Mediterra Capital Management Limited iştirakidir.   

Lucky Fish (Ugurlu Balik) is a company with fisherman heritage, set sail to its Aquaculture production of Mediterranean species journey at Muğla Kazıklı bay located near Didim Turkey. 

   Lucky fish was first established by Kopuzmar family in 1986. In years, Lucky Fish added juveniles production, fish feed production, additional caging capacities and processing plant to its activities with a vision to become a vertically integrated supply partner by offering stable pricing policy & product traceability advantages.

   In 2013, Private equity firm Mediterra Capital acquired a 100 percent stake of Lucky Fish.

   Today, Lucky Fish is a group of companies with the head office in Izmir city, facilities in Aydin and Mugla cities, fish cages at 2 different locations of Aegean Sea and processing plant and fish feed production in Aydin city, Turkey with total capacity of 78 million juveniles, 7200 tonnes of fish farming and 25.000 tonnes of feed mill and plans to keep investing in further growth.

Name: JAPOFISH, S.A.
Description:
Nuestra compañía nace en 1997, formada por un grupo de personas experimentadas en el sector, con el propósito de llevar a cabo una labor de calidad, servicio y atención a nuestros clientes. Actualmente nuestro equipo humano asciende a unas 115 personas, aunque seguimos en progresivo crecimiento, con el
fin de consolidar y aumentar nuestra participación en el comercio mayorista de pescado fresco y congelado. JAPOFISH, S.A. es una de las empresas referencia y líder en este sector. Gracias a la sólida base técnica de su equipo, y al respaldo de un gran grupo de empresas por todo el mundo, hemos logrado mantenernos desde el comienzo entre los proveedores más valorados en el sector por los clientes.

Name: COPALIS INDUSTRIE
Description: COPALIS INDUSTRIE is a fishery company based out of 220 RUE DU PETIT PORT, LE PORTEL, France.

Name: MacAlister Elliott & Partners (MEP)
Description:
Founded in 1977, MacAlister Elliott & Partners (MEP) has been at the forefront of fisheries consultancy for over three decades.

Based in the UK, the company has developed an extensive international network of consultants who have the ability to respond rapidly to the needs of our clients across the globe.  Whilst MEP remains a small company in world terms it has a truly global footprint with associates, clients and friends in many countries of the world.

Our vast amount of experience across the marine and fisheries sectors enable us to provide specialised professional advice to all major funding agencies, NGOs, national governments, private companies and individuals.

We strongly believe in the principle of sustainability and strive to ensure that marine ecosystems are not damaged through commercial endeavour, preserving them for future generations.

Name: Geraldton Fishermen's Co-operative
Description:
Established in 1950, Geraldton Fishermen's Co-operative Ltd was founded by passionate fishers dedicated to bringing high-quality lobsters to the world. 
We value innovation, excellence, and sustainability in everything we do, striving to enhance our community of members and staff across Western Australia, as well as our customers worldwide. 
Join us to discover our journey, values, and the stories that shape who we are.

Name: Tamimi Fisheries Company
Description:
Company brief: 

Tamimi Fisheries Company is the leading seafood exporter from Yemen. The company specializes in the processing and export of fresh and frozen seafood products. The company was founded in 2001 in Ash-Sheher City (Hadhramout province – YEMEN). With many years of business, Tamimi Fisheries Company guarantees its clients a reliable long-term business with high level of services.

The company employs around 300 workers and have the capacity of producing 30mt of frozen products and 10mt of fresh products per day. In addition, the company have a storage capacity of 1000mt and a block ice unit with 20mt ice production capacity.


Our mission:

To supply the world with top-quality, healthy, and unpolluted fishery products.
To transform and develop the seafood industry in Yemen through the provision of value-added products.
To support the national economy and provide work opportunities.


Company activities:

We expanded operations across the kingdoms of Saudi Arabia and corporate office in Riyadh. Ever since we have proved to be an extremely successful model in the seafood industry with HACCP certification.
We strive to supply the best quality products, even for the in-demand species of seafood. Be it portions, Fillets, Fresh or Frozen, we can source raw material, process, and distribute any product type to your required specifications.

Name: Red Iberoamericana de Pesca Artesanal de Pequeña Escala
Description:
El pasado mes de mayo se creó la RED IBEROAMERICANA DE PESCA ARTESANAL DE PEQUEÑA ESCALA (RIPAPE), tras un encuentro promovido en España por la Organización de Productores Pesqueros Artesanales Lonja de Conil (OPP72) con motivo del Año Internacional que desde las Naciones Unidas se propició. 

La Creación de la Red Iberoamericana de Pesca Artesanal de Pequeña Escala busca, en el contexto del Año Internacional de la Pesca y la Acuicultura Artesanales (AIPAA) 2022, promover las contribuciones de la pesca artesanal al desarrollo sostenible cumpliendo con los objetivos de desarrollo sostenible incluidos en la Agenda 2030. 

Esta RED IBEROAMERICANA en su constitución estableció como prioridad unos objetivos basados en el marco de los Objetivos de Desarrollo Sostenible de la ONU, del código de conducta voluntario para la pesca responsable de la FAO, de las Directrices Voluntarias para lograr la sostenibilidad de la pesca artesanal de pequeña escala, en el contexto de la seguridad alimentaria y la erradicación de la pobreza y del cumplimiento de convenios internacionales.

Esta nueva Red Iberoamericana de Pesca Artesanal que representa a más de 20 millones de pescadores y pescadoras de toda la región latinoamericana, España y Portugal. Esta pionera iniciativa, liderada por Organización de Productores de Pescadores de Conil (OPP72) y en colaboración con WWF España y Soldecocos, nace para convertirse en un altavoz de la pesca artesanal en foros internacionales y para abordar los numerosos retos que tiene el sector para lograr una pesca sostenible ambiental y socialmente.

Más de 24 organizaciones de pesca artesanal de Iberoamérica se han unido con el objetivo de fortalecer sus capacidades institucionales, como ‘laboratorio’ de intercambio de experiencias y soluciones a los retos que unen a todas estas comunidades: la crisis climática, la pérdida de biodiversidad y la crisis ecosocial.  La Red Iberoamericana trabajará además en políticas de género y relevo generacional.

Name: HAVFISK AS
Description:
HAVFISK er Norges største trålrederi med 10 fartøy og 29,6 trålkonsesjoner for torsk. 

HAVFISK ASA baserer sin virksomhet på naturressursen fisk. HAVFISK er et rendyrket fangstselskap og har 10 trålere. Selskapet fisker i hovesdak torsk, hyse og sei. All fisk blir sløyd og kappet ombord og selskapet kan tilby fersk og frossen fisk hele året. HAVFISK leverer en vesentlig del av fersk fisk til Norway Seafoods. 

HAVFISK har 29,6 kvoter for fiske av torsk og hyse, 31,9 kvoter for fiske av sei, samt kvoter for rekefiske. Det blir også fisket andre fiskeslag, i hovedsak som bifangst. I 2015 ble samlet fangst 58 214 tonn, herav 28 875 tonn torsk, 7 943 tonn med hyse og 9 086 tonn med sei. 

HAVFISK omsatte for 1 131 millioner kroner i 2015 og sysselsetter 380 ansatte. 

HAVFISK ASA har hovedkontor i Ålesund, med rederikontorer i Stamsund og Hammerfest.

Name: Big Fish Maldives
Description: Big Fish is a yellowfin tuna processor based in Himmafushi, Maldives. We supply responsibly caught fresh and frozen sashimi-grade yellowfin to the EU, US and other markets.

Name: Finnforel
Description:
Sustainable and ecological fish farming and production on an industrial scale from Finland. Finnforel is the company behind the amazingly tasty and athletic rainbow trout Saimaan Tuore. 

Our concept are Finnforel gigafactories which deliver amazing tasting fish to consumers 365 days a year. To guarantee our quality standards, we own the whole chain, from the genetics to the fish eggs right through to the end products. Technical solutions are developed by us.

Name: Sea Change Australia
Description:
Sea Change Australia brings together fishers, aquaculture producers, industry, managers, and researchers to facilitate knowledge exchange and co-develop climate-resilient options for strong and healthy fisheries and aquaculture sectors in Australia.

Climate change poses a growing threat to fisheries and aquaculture in Australia. Fisheries and aquaculture stakeholders across Australia need relevant climate information tailored to their changing needs. They also need ways to share how they are currently dealing with climate change and how they could improve their responses.

The Sea Change Australia project works with Australian fisheries and aquaculture sectors to develop ways to prepare for and respond to climate change impacts.

We’ll create a nationwide two-way knowledge exchange between researchers and sector stakeholders. Our main goals are to understand how sectors are already adapting to climate change, identify what’s stopping further adaptation, and co-develop practical, sector-specific options for climate resilience.

This initiative is endorsed by the UN Decade of Ocean Science for Sustainable Development under the FishSCORE2030 Program.

Name: Lihini Sea Foods
Description: We are an award-winning seafood exporter from Sri Lanka serving a global clientele across America, Europe, Asia, Russia, and Oceania. Known for the superior quality and freshness of our seafood, we are a sought-after supplier for specialty cuisines including Japanese fresh cuisine. With two decades of experience in fishing, processing, and exporting along with two generations of expertise in technique and skill, Lihini Seafood Pvt Ltd is one of Sri Lanka’s leading seafood companies.

Name: LE GARREC PECHE ET SERVICES
Description:
𝐔𝐍𝐄 𝐇𝐈𝐒𝐓𝐎𝐈𝐑𝐄, 𝐔𝐍 𝐒𝐀𝐕𝐎𝐈𝐑-𝐅𝐀𝐈𝐑𝐄 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐍𝐔
En 1930, le Capitaine au long cours, ancien Cap-hornier, alors Pilote au Port de Boulogne sur Mer, Paul-Emile LE GARREC fonde à Boulogne sur mer l’𝗮𝗿𝗺𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 𝗮̀ 𝗹𝗮 𝗽𝗲̂𝗰𝗵𝗲 𝗟𝗘 𝗚𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗘𝗖 𝗘𝗧 𝗖𝗜𝗘.
Quatre générations plus tard, le Groupe LE GARREC est devenu un acteur de référence de 𝗹𝗮 𝗳𝗶𝗹𝗶𝗲̀𝗿𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗶𝘁𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗮 𝗺𝗲𝗿. Aujourd’hui, implanté sur plusieurs territoires et zones maritimes à travers le monde, le groupe a su s’adapter et évoluer pour vivre avec son temps.
Au cours de ce siècle d’existence, l’armement Le Garrec aura eu à maîtriser de nombreuses techniques de pêche et ses bateaux auront eu à travailler sur de nombreuses mers et océans du globe :
- 𝗔𝘁𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗡𝗼𝗿𝗱, au large des côtes d’Islande,  des îles Féroés, du Spitzberg, des bancs de Terre Neuve et de Saint Pierre et Miquelon, en mer du Nord et en Manche ainsi que dans les eaux mauritaniennes.
- 𝗔𝘁𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗦𝘂𝗱 dans les eaux de la Namibie.
- 𝗢𝗰𝗲́𝗮𝗻 𝗔𝘁𝗹𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 et 𝗢𝗰𝗲́𝗮𝗻 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗲𝗻, pour la capture du thon tropical aux larges des côtes africaines.
- 𝗢𝗰𝗲́𝗮𝗻 𝗜𝗻𝗱𝗶𝗲𝗻 et 𝗢𝗰𝗲́𝗮𝗻 𝗔𝘂𝘀𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗹 (îles Kerguelen et Crozet) depuis l’Île de la Réunion, pour la pêche à la palangre.
Au fil du temps, 𝗹’𝗮𝗰𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗶𝘁𝗲́ 𝗱𝗲 𝗽𝗲̂𝗰𝗵𝗲 a été complétée avec des services associés tels que le 𝗰𝗼𝗻𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝗻𝗲𝗺𝗲𝗻𝘁 & la 𝘃𝗮𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗶𝘀𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻 et la 𝗹𝗼𝗴𝗶𝘀𝘁𝗶𝗾𝘂𝗲 𝗱𝗲𝘀 𝗽𝗿𝗼𝗱𝘂𝗶𝘁𝘀 𝗱𝗲 𝗹𝗮 𝗺𝗲𝗿.

Name: Aqualife Services Ltd
Description:
Disease in global fish farming costs the aquaculture industry in excess of £6 billion per annum through mortality and reduced growth rates. It leads to increased use of antibiotics.
 
This problem is addressed through the development of effective vaccines and delivery systems which can massively reduce the economic, environmental and welfare impact of disease outbreaks.

Aqualife have been at the forefront of vaccine delivery in fish since 1996. To date we have vaccinated well in excess of one billion fish around the World.

Since 2013, Aqualife have been working on automated solutions for the delivery of vaccine in fish. We now have a dedicated R & D function in-house designing and building exciting new products.

Name: Flosell Farms
Description:
A leading Aquaculture company in Ghana committed to produce good quality and healthy fish for the Ghanaian community and West Africa by bringing together local resources and leading world aquaculture best practices in an environmentally responsible manner.
Founded with a dual social and commercial mandate, Our mission is to make available an abundant supply of affordable protein for the local markets.

Name: Fisheries Committee for the West Central Gulf of Guinea (FCWC/CPCO)
Description: The Fisheries Committee for the West Central Gulf of Guinea (FCWC) was established in 2007 to facilitate cooperation in fisheries management between the member countries: Liberia, Côte d’Ivoire, Ghana, Togo, Benin, and Nigeria. The countries have several shared fish stocks and identified a need for cooperation and shared management of these resources.

Name: Projeto Pacu Aquaculture
Description: The Projeto Pacu Aquaculture Ltd. is a company specialising in developing production and reproduction technologies and feed for native fish of South American watersheds. With the growing demand for new enterprises, it has been acting in the last ten years positively and innovatively in the elaboration of constructive projects for breeding laboratories, production farms, slaughterhouses and feed mills that meet the market needs, as well as in the construction of vertical industrial complexes for fish production. Our industrial projects blend the operational knowledge of 25 years of performance in fish farming with the experience of our highly qualified engineering team, capable of translating these needs into robust and efficient projects, with the necessary scale to ensure the return of the business investment. With national and international operations, we provide services focused on - New Enterprise Planning; - Production and Modernisation Projects; - Engineering and Infrastructure Projects; - Economic Analysis and Business Plans; - Technology Transfer and Training; - Environmental Licensing; - Earthmoving, Construction and Industrial Assembly.

Name: Inter-American Tropical Tuna Commission (IATTC)
Description:
The Inter-American Tropical Tuna Commission (IATTC) is the regional fisheries management organization (RFMO) responsible for the conservation and management of tuna and tuna -like species, associated species and their ecosystems, throughout the Eastern Pacific Ocean, from Canada, in the north, to Chile, in the South. 
Its mandate and competence are therefore much broader that the reference in its name to tropical tunas – inherited from a distant past – would seem to indicate. 
It also provides the Secretariat of the 1998 Agreement on the International Dolphin Conservation Program (AIDCP).

Name: Les Viviers de Noirmoutier Mareyage
Description:
Société de mareyage située en Vendée spécialisée dans le poisson fin à destination du marché national et international.

Chez les Viviers de Noirmoutier, nous nous engageons à fournir le meilleur de la mer ! Chacun met son savoir-faire au service de nos clients. Nous leur assurons ainsi fraîcheur, qualité, traçabilité et éthique. Retrouvez nos produits facilement grâce à nos pin’s, marque de notre engagement au quotidien.

Name: Maronti S.A

Maronti S.A es una empresa familiar dedicada a la extracción, procesamiento y comercialización de productos del mar argentino para el mercado internacional, sus productos principales son el Calamar Illex (Squid), el Langostino Salvaje Argentino (Shrimp) y la Merluza Hubssi (Hake)
Posee una flota de 4 embarcaciones pesqueras, dos dedicadas a la captura y procesamiento de calamar, una a la de merluza y la restante a langostino, sus productos terminados son exportados a la Unión Europea, China y otros mercados.

Location: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province

Name: Sportfiskarna, Sveriges Sportfiske- och Fiskevårdsförbund
Description:
Sveriges Sportfiske- och Fiskevårdsförbund är en demokratiskt uppbyggd ideell organisation. Ända sedan 1919 har vi arbetat för att det ska finnas ett bra fiske i rena vatten med friska fiskbestånd.

Sportfiske är i dag en av Sveriges viktigaste fritidsaktiviteter med två miljoner utövare som varje år lägger mer än fem miljarder kronor på sitt fiske. Sportfiskarna organiserar fler än 70 000 sportfiskare. Bli medlem du också!

Name: Grieg Seafood Finnmark
Description:
Finnmark is in the northernmost part of Continental Europe, where Norway swings eastward. In the midst of wild and majestic scenery with steep mountains and icy fjords, the conditions are ideal for growing healthy fish of exceptional quality.
Operations in Finnmark were established in 1978 by Norwegian fish-farming pioneer Harald Volden. In 2006 the Volden Group merged with Grieg Seafood and was renamed Grieg Seafood Finnmark.

Grieg Seafood Finnmark now includes a smolt hatchery and 24 licensed sites, complete with harvesting and freezing facilities at four clusters in different regions of Western Finnmark. The distance between production clusters forms a natural barrier to the transfer of disease and therefore represents a lower overall biological risk in Finnmark.

Grieg Seafood Finnmark owns and operates the northernmost fish farm in the world, close to the North Cape. Our facilities in Finnmark enjoy the shortest export route to Russia in Norwegian fish farming, including the major cities of Moscow and St. Petersburg. Most of our production is exported to the EU, Russia and Asia.

The company employs about 200 people.

Name: Grupo Almafish
Description:
Somos un grupo empresarial peruano especializado en la comercialización y servicios vinculados al aceite y grasas de origen hidrobiológico y vegetal. Nos hemos consolidado como líderes en la exportación de ácidos grasos, llevando calidad peruana a los principales mercados internacionales y certificación GMP+ Feed Safety Assurance, que garantiza altos estándares de calidad y seguridad.

Atendemos a las industrias de consumo humano y nutrición animal, operando desde una planta propia ubicada estratégicamente en el puerto de Chimbote, que asegura acceso a materia prima, trazabilidad y altos estándares de calidad.

Nuestro grupo se organiza en cuatro líneas de negocio estratégicas:

ALMAFISH INTERNATIONAL S.A.C.
Especializada en la comercialización y exportación de ácidos grasos y aceite crudo de pescado, orientados a los mercados de consumo humano directo e indirecto.

PERUVIAN FISH OIL S.A.C.
Dedicada a la comercialización local de ácidos grasos y aceite de pescado, con enfoque en la industria de consumo animal.

SEDEMAR S.A.C.
Proveedor de servicios para empresas pesqueras locales, incluyendo almacenamiento de aceite, pesaje de unidades, análisis de calidad y procesos de semirrefinado. Contamos con instalaciones especializadas que aseguran soluciones integrales, eficientes y confiables para las empresas del sector.

TRANSPORTES SEDEMAR S.A.C.
Ofrecemos servicios de transporte a granel a nivel nacional, especializados en el traslado de aceite de pescado y ácidos grasos. Garantizamos seguridad, eficiencia y cumplimiento de normativas vigentes en cada operación.

“Nuestro compromiso es brindar calidad, inocuidad y seguridad en cada etapa del proceso: desde la logística y el semirrefinado, hasta el almacenamiento y la distribución de aceites y grasas.”

Name: Guangzhou Original Counting Technology Co., Ltd

The product has won high recognition from customers for its distinctive features - no harm to fish, high throughput count, and excellent accuracy of 99%+. YD-G4 fry counter has been exported to 11 countries, becoming the treasure of the international market. Our team brings together a number of senior algorithm engineers to build a solid technical barrier and provide strong support for the excellent performance of the product. Adhering to the concept of simple, efficient and ultimate corporate culture, we are committed to creating excellent quality of life for aquaculture customers. From the Original intelligence, you will experience the innovation of intelligent counting technology and feel the wonderful integration of business and technology. We are determined to continue to innovate in the field of intelligent counting to bring more value and surprises to our customers.

Name: Fresh Water Farms Europe
Description:
We sell knowledge!

 Fresh Water Farms Europe – Institutional Profile

Fresh Water Farms Europe (Juliana Gadelha Unipessoal LDA) is a Portuguese consultancy focused on sustainable food production systems, including aquaponics, vertical farming, and controlled-environment agriculture (CEA) — both on Earth and in space.

The company works at the intersection of applied research, innovation strategy, and knowledge transfer, collaborating with leading universities, research institutes, and deeptech companies across Europe. It actively participates in EU-funded consortia under programs such as Horizon Europe and EIT Food.

 Key projects:

    AQUALLIANCE (EIT Food): Aquaponics-based circular food systems.

    AQUALEAP – Aquaponics in Space: Led by the University of Vigo, with partners like WUR (Wageningen University & Research), exploring food systems for space missions.

    Ongoing collaborations with CIIMAR, Agroscope (Switzerland), Swiss Food Research, and foodtech startups.

 Our core activities:

    Strategic consulting in agri-food innovation and R&D.

    Professional training in sustainability and emerging agri-tech.

    Market analysis and commercialization of eco-efficient solutions.

    Support for accessing and managing EU innovation funding.

 Differentiators:

    Participation in high-impact, disruptive projects aligned with the UN SDGs.

    Expertise in bioengineering and closed-loop systems.

    Strong network of scientific and technological partners across Europe.

    Multidisciplinary leadership with experience in regulated sectors.

We bridge science, sustainability, and innovation in food systems.

Description: Our mission is to enable leading edge research, innovation, and technology in the Canadian seafood industry. Working with industry partners and global research expertise, we enhance sustainability, safety, and profitability in ways that keep Canada and its seafood companies at the forefront of a burgeoning Blue Economy.

Name: Vikenco AS
Description:
Vikenco AS er en sjømatbedrift på Aukra i Møre og Romsdal. 
Vår visjon er «Quality from the sea» som for oss betyr kvalitet gjennom  lidenskap og engasjement for laks, miljø, kunder og kollegaer. 
Selskapet ble etablert i 1973 og deleid av SalMar som er en av verdens største lakseprodusenter. Vikenco slakter og foredler Atlantisk laks og Atlantisk ørret. Bedriften har om lag 260 ansatte og nytt produksjonsanlegg på 13000 m2 ble ferdigstilt i 2022. Produktene våre er fersk og frossen helfisk, filet og porsjoner. Markedene for våre produkter er Norge, USA, Asia og Europa. Omsetning i 2022 var på over 4 milliarder kroner. Vikenco sitt kvalitetssystem er sertifisert i henhold til HACCP, BRC, Global G.A.P, BAP, Debio/KRAV, ASC/MSC og Kosher.

Name: Alune Aquaculture
Description:
Alune invests in innovative, environmentally conscious Aquaculture production systems in Indonesia and Asia. 

Alune is a fintech-for-good company, revolutionizing how Aquaculture farmers fund their farms. 

Our smart financing solutions help Aquaculture farmers improve sustainability while growing production and profit in an industry vital for food security.

Aquaculture is one of the fastest growing sectors in the world, with demand ever forecast to outstrip supply, the challenges of funding and sustainability continue to increase. 

Our clients are the thousands of shrimp farmers who continue to be failed by banks and other financial institutions while trying to make money for their families and grow food for the world.

Using our mix of capital, expertise, technology, and partnerships, we invest and support these farmers to grow their profit and improve sustainability.

Our investment fund offers chosen investors exposure to the aquaculture farming industry in Asia while maximising the positive social and environmental impact of the fund.

Name: DAKONON GLOBAL ENGINEERING SOLUTIONS
Description:
DAKONON Engineer Solutions es una empresa especializada en soluciones de ingeniería para la industria marítima, naval e industrial. Como astillero tecnológico, impulsamos la innovación, digitalización y sostenibilidad en cada proyecto, desarrollando soluciones a medida para optimizar procesos, mejorar la eficiencia operativa y garantizar altos estándares de calidad y seguridad.

Nos destacamos por combinar experiencia, ingeniería avanzada y compromiso ético para transformar desafíos en oportunidades, aportando valor real a nuestros clientes y al sector.

Áreas clave: Ingeniería naval, construcción y reparación de buques, sistemas industriales, automatización, sostenibilidad, consultoría técnica.

 DAKONON Engineer Solutions is a specialized engineering company serving the maritime, naval, and industrial sectors. As a technology-driven shipyard, we lead innovation, digitalization, and sustainability across every project, delivering tailored solutions to optimize processes, improve operational efficiency, and ensure the highest standards of quality and safety.

We stand out by combining experience, advanced engineering, and ethical commitment to turn challenges into opportunities, creating real value for our clients and the industry.

Core areas: Naval engineering, shipbuilding and repair, industrial systems, automation, sustainability, technical consulting.

Name: TripleNine Group
Description:
Activities in more than 40 countries.
TripleNine comprises a number of production, trading and sales companies in Denmark, Norway and Chile. In total, the activities of the group cover more than 40 countries around the world.
 
Core competencies – 4 main segments.
The core competencies of the companies comprise development, production, marketing and sale of marine ingredients as animal feed ingredient for the following market segments:
 
•	Aquaculture
•	Agriculture
•	Pet food

Some 250 employees from a wide range of nationalities are employed in TripleNine. To the extent possible, local nationals are hired in the respective countries in order to develop the industry in that particular region and create growth in the local community.
 
The headquarters of TripleNine Group A/S are located in Esbjerg, Denmark.

Vision: 
Be a leading and preferred partner in the global marine ingredients business.

Mission:
Adding value to marine resources, responsibly!

We meet the world with high ethic and respect, because through a long term perspective we are aware that our future business relies on the way we behave today. 
Through years of experience we have earned trust by being responsible, honest and always deliver high quality, at the right time. 
We are curious and innovative as we share knowledge and collaborate closely with a wide range of partners in our aim at increasing the standards for the development and production of marine ingredients in a responsible way.

Name: Biofishency Ltd.
Description:
BioFishency Ltd. develops, manufactures and markets disruptive electro-chemical and biological aquaculture water treatment solutions for Recirculated Aquaculture Systems (RAS). BioFishency offers a full conceptual replacement for traditional RAS systems, to overcome the existing challenges of RAS, by delivering fully-controlled water treatment solutions. Based on Big Data analysis and independent of water temperature, the company’s patented technologies enable the production of healthier seafood products, while lowering the carbon footprint, yielding cost and resource savings for its customers around the globe. 

We have been working on aquaculture projects around the world for nearly 20 years. Our extensive experience in growing fish and in aquaculture led us to understand the market’s needs, challenges, and potential. 

During our long years in the field of aquaculture in Israel and around the world, we came to the conclusion that technology was the key to leveraging the potential growth of aquaculture production and identified what we term as a “technology gap”.

On the one hand, the extensive and intensive aquaculture methods which produce relatively low yields, use water and land resources inefficiently, and have had almost no technological innovation during the past decades. On the other hand, the RAS (Recirculating Aquaculture System) growing method which gives very high yields and uses small land and water resources due to very advanced, sophisticated but expensive technology.

For most of the aquaculture in the world which occurs in developing countries, the expensive RAS growing method is irrelevant. Extensive and intensive aquaculture need new technological solutions to make fish farmers more profitable and productive.

Name: AquaOrg Technologies (Smater by AquaOrg)
Description:
AquaOrg Technologies is Nigeria’s trusted aquaculture consultancy, helping fish farmers and 
investors scale profitably through data-driven, climate-smart, and technology-backed solutions

With Smater - Smater is a digital aquaculture management and data intelligence platform developed to improve productivity, transparency, and profitability for fish farmers and aquaculture stakeholders in Nigeria and across Africa. The platform helps farmers move from guesswork to evidence-based decision-making through structured digital records, farm performance dashboards, and production history tracking.

With Smater, fish farmers can document stock input, feed usage, growth performance, mortality, water quality observations, and harvest outputs in one secure system. These records create verifiable data that supports farm planning, cost control, credit scoring, insurance assessment, and regulatory compliance.

Beyond farmers, Smater also enables aquaculture associations, cooperatives, processors, and government agencies to view aggregated farm data, monitor production trends, and support market linkages through demand-driven fish purchase systems. Location mapping and farm profiling improve traceability and supply chain coordination.

Smater integrates capacity building by partnering with training institutions to develop data-literate aquaculture professionals who support farmers on record management and farm optimization.

The platform is designed to scale across small-scale, medium, and commercial fish farms, supporting sustainable aquaculture growth, food security, and youth employment.

Smater is an AquaOrg Technologies Ltd product, committed to using data, technology, and innovation to build a smarter, more profitable aquaculture ecosystem in Africa smater.aquaorg.com

Name: Özsu Balık
Description:
Dünyanın en değerli proteinine sahip olan balığı, tüm insanlar için ulaşılabilir kılmak amacıyla çalışan bir gıda şirketiyiz. 4 kıtada, 50’den fazla ülkede, sofralarına konuk olduğumuz milyonlarca tüketicimizin daha sağlıklı, daha kaliteli, daha lezzetli balık ile beslenmesini sağlamak amacıyla tutkuyla çalışıyoruz. Deniz suyunun temizliği, değerleri ve ısı derecesi bakımından dünyanın en kaliteli levrek ve çipuralarının yetiştiği Urla’da bulunan 94 açık-deniz kafesimizde üretim yapıyoruz. Kuluçkahane tesisimizden, laboratuvarımıza, işleme tesisimizden, paketleme tesisimize Türkiye'nin tek çatı altına toplanmış en gelişmiş tam entegre kültür balıkçılığı markalarından birisiyiz.
Uzman ve dinamik insan kaynağımızla, çevre dostu teknolojilerimizle, uluslararası standartlarda gerçekleştirdiğimiz 6 bin ton kaliteli ve sağlıklı balık üretimimizle, tüm dünyadaki tüketicilerimizin balık ihtiyaçlarını karşılıyoruz. Türkiye’deki şirketimiz dışında grubumuza bağlı, İngiltere’deki Özsu Balık UK ve Hollanda’daki Özsu Balık EU şirketlerimizle yurt dışı operasyonlarımızı yönetiyoruz.
Özsu olarak, yüksek kaliteli bir protein deposu olduğu kadar zengin bir omega-3, vitamin ve mineral kaynağı olan balığı herkes için ulaşılabilir kılıyor, insanların hayatlarına lezzet ve sağlıkla dokunuyoruz. Kültür balıkçılığı sektöründe gelişerek ilerleyen küresel bir oyuncu olma vizyonumuzla, faaliyetlerimizi uluslararası standartlarda kurumsal yönetim, sürdürülebilirlik ve müşteri memnuniyeti anlayışı ile yürütüyor, kurulduğumuz günden bu yana tüm paydaşlarımız için değer yaratmaya devam ediyoruz.

Name: 5DO - Cinq Degrés Ouest
Description:
Cinq Degrés Ouest réussit le pari de proposer une gamme de coquillages et crustacés décortiqués, prêts à consommer. Le procédé consiste à décortiquer à froid les produits avant leur surgélation par cryogénie puis leur conditionnement sous vide. Avec cette méthode utilisant de l'eau de mer, il n'y a ni modification de goût, ni changement de texture.

Que vous soyez à Paris ou Shangaï, retrouvez le goût unique et frais des crustacés et coquillages fraichement sortis des eaux bretonnes !

Cinq Degrés Ouest révolutionne les modes de consommations des produits de la mer et répond à toutes les attentes de la cuisine moderne : qualité, rapidité de préparation, facilité de conservation avec des produits sains et naturels.

Cinq Degrés Ouest bénéficie en effet d'une qualité de produits exceptionnelle grâce à une tradition familiale d'ostréiculteurs reconnue depuis 1895 (huîtres Cadoret).

Parce que le plaisir des coquillages et crustacés se doit d'être partagé par tous, du simple consommateur au grand chef cuisinier.

Name: FishLead Hub
Description:
FishLead Hub is a youth-centered initiative established to raise and empower young leaders in the fields of fisheries and aquaculture in Africa. The idea was born from the observation that a significant percentage of students admitted to study Fisheries and Aquaculture in African tertiary institutions do so without prior interest in the course. As a result, many struggle to find motivation, direction, and purpose within the field.

This initiative seeks to change that narrative by building a supportive community that mentors, guides, and inspires students, helping them discover the rich career opportunities and impact that lie in sustainable fisheries and aquaculture.

Name: Pelagic Freezer Trawler Association
Description:
The Pelagic Freezer Trawler Association represents the interests of 8 European pelagic freezer-trawler companies, which fish for human consumption. PFA members are responsible, family-run companies, mostly going back to the late 19th century, who benefit from several generations of fishing experience, and operate a combined fleet of 23 vessels. The association currently has members in France, Germany, Lithuania, the Netherlands and the UK.

Our aim is to maintain a sustainable fishing industry, both now and in the future.  We believe that the supply of frozen pelagic fish to people all over the world, must be in balance with the harvesting of the pelagic fish stocks. The motto of the PFA is ‘catching with care’. Our oceans are home to a wealth of fish and shellfish, which make a vital contribution towards feeding a world population of 7 billion. Members of the Pelagic Freezer-trawler Association catch fish in a sustainable manner, without causing damage to the seabed, without disturbing the ecological system, and based on effective fish stock management.

Pelagic fisheries | Pelagische visserij | Pêche pélagique | Pelagische Fischerei |

Name: North Atlantic Fishing Company
Description:
NORTH ATLANTIC FISHING COMPANY IN THE UK
 
North Atlantic Fishing Company Limited owns and operates the UK registered Frank Bonefaas; a pelagic freezer trawler fishing the North Sea and North East Atlantic Ocean.
 
North Atlantic Fishing Company is a UK registered company that has been based in the UK since 1984, pays taxes to the UK treasury and has offices in Caterham and Hull.
 
It employs around 62 English fishermen, who are residents in the UK.
 
With a home port of Hull in the North East of England, most of the 90 jobs created by  North Atlantic Fishing Company’s vessels are occupied by British nationals living in UK port communities.
 
North Atlantic Fishing Company continues to look for commercial opportunities in the UK to  land and distribute its catch.
 
Other companies within the North Atlantic (Holdings) Limited UK Group include North Atlantic (Crewing) Limited and Rusbrit Limited.  We also manage North Atlantic Fish Producers Organisation (NAFPO) from our Caterham office.

Name: Redes Mar Adentro
Description:
REDES MAS ADENTRO is a company specialised in the design, development and construction of aquaculture and fishing nets, which includes among its services maintenance, repair, washing and painting. 

Following the guidelines of an experienced and knowledgeable staff, and under the philosophy "Quality and Innovation", the company is able to meet the needs of the most demanding customers, always seeking to offer the best service and respond in the most efficient way. To this end, it complies with the most demanding standards through its policy of continuous improvement. 

To guarantee a quality service, Redes Mar Adentro relies on the certification of quality control and management: ISO 9001; and the certification of the establishment of an environmental management system: ISO 14001. Name: Camanchaca Europe SL
Description:
Camanchaca inició operaciones en Chile el año 1965, con una actividad centrada en la pesca y procesamiento de camarones y langostinos. En 1980, un cambio de dirección en la empresa trajo como resultado una estrategia de diversificación hacia otros productos del mar, incluyendo la acuicultura, lo que impulsó un crecimiento uniforme y constante. En la actualidad, Camanchaca participa en los negocios de pesca extractiva en el norte y sur de Chile, en la acuicultura del Salmón Atlántico y en el cultivo de Mejillones y Abalones. Sus operaciones se desarrollan desde el norte de Chile, en Iquique hasta el sur del país, a lo largo de 6,640 kilómetros de costa. Este crecimiento la ha llevado a un lugar de privilegio en los mercados internacionales, exportando a más de 50 países.

Camanchaca Europe SL es parte de Camanchaca SA, con base en Chile.

Camanchaca began its operations in Chile in 1965, focused on the area of commercial fishing and the processing of langostino and shrimp.  In 1980, a strategic change within the company resulted in a diversification effort toward cultivating other products from the ocean, including a concerted effort towards aquaculture, which fueled consistent growth ever since.  Currently, Camanchaca participates in the extractive fishing business in the north and south of Chile, in the aquaculture of Atlantic salmon, and in the cultivation of mussels and abalone.  Its operations are carried out from the north of Chile, in Inquique, to the south of the country, along 6,640 kilometers of pristine coastline.  This growth has placed Camanchaca in a privileged position in international markets, exporting to more than 50 countries worldwide.  

Camanchaca Europe SL is part of Camanchaca SA, based in Chile.

Name: Blue Wave Aquaculture
Description:
At Blue Wave Aquaculture Pvt Ltd, we’re on a mission to build India’s benchmark for scalable, sustainable trout farming — powered by Recirculating Aquaculture System (RAS) technology.

 Our Goal:

To establish a modern, high-yield trout farm in West Bengal that sets new standards in sustainability, efficiency, and premium fish production.

 Why It Matters:

India faces a rising demand for high-quality, antibiotic-free fish, but cold-water species like rainbow trout remain scarce and seasonal. Using RAS, we can produce premium trout year-round, using 90% less water, with zero discharge and biosecure conditions.

 Our Edge:

- Advanced FREA RAS technology
- 100% water reuse in nearby agriculture
- Renewable energy & temperature-controlled systems
- Scalable, replicable infrastructure
- Transparent operations designed for ESG alignment

 Who We Are:

We’re a team of passionate founders with backgrounds in entrepreneurship, marine biology, aquaculture innovation, and startup execution — backed by strong family values and global education.

We are currently scaling up our production and bringing sustainable trout to Indian and export markets.

- Investors aligned with climate-smart food systems
- HoReCa distributors and D2C seafood brands
- Feed, cold chain, and technology collaborators

 Based in Kolkata, West Bengal — building for India’s aquaculture future.

Name: Z. A. Sea Foods Pvt. Ltd.
Description:
Z.A. Sea Foods Pvt. Ltd. (ZASF) was incorporated under the Companies Act, 1956 on 22/08/2008. The Company has set up a state of art technology and is engaged in the processing and exports of Fish & Fishery products and has got all the necessary approvals and licenses from the respective nodal agencies (E.I.A., E.I.C. and M.P.E.D.A.) at state, central and international level.

The crown of the Group so far as total export value is concerned, is the high-value product "Black Tiger Shrimp". The Natural Black Tiger Shrimps (KOLKATA EBI brand) from the backwaters of Sunderban forests has its own competitive edge over shrimps farmed in other geographical locations. Black Tiger shrimp is farmed in natural environment in West Bengal where direct connection is there between the extensive farms and the estuaries leading to the sea. During the full moon and the new moon the shrimps swims against the current of water created by the tide which comes inside the extensive ponds and gets trapped in the bamboo boxes. Hence, landing of these natural shrimps takes place in West Bengal at the whims of nature only during the full moon and new moon phase. The landing of these natural shrimps from the Sunderban estuarine regions takes place from the beginning of April to the end of October where May to August is taken as the peak period. 

Semi-intensive cultivation mostly in Midnapore area produces Cultured Black Tiger Shrimps (MIZU GOHAN brand). The culture process is same what is followed in other parts of the world, like Thailand, Indonesia & Vietnam & in India in Tuticorin belt. 

Sea material (ZASF SHIRO brand) season usually starts from July end and continues till Mid-January in West Bengal.

Major markets of the Company are Japan, European Union, U.S.A., Middle East countries, South Africa & China.

The Company started its commercial production from 28th March, 2010 onwards.

Name: Fishserve
Description:
Fishserve (or Commercial Fisheries Services Limited) is a seafood industry owned company that provides statutory registry-based services to support the operation of Aotearoa New Zealand’s Quota Management System. Fishserve also provides data-driven solutions to support the sustainability of Aotearoa NZ fisheries.

Protecting these resources has never been more important. And at Fishserve we are dedicated to delivering our vision to ‘Support fishers to feed the world for generations to come- Ka tautoko i ngā kaihao ki te whāngai i te ao hei ngā reanga haere ake nei.  This vision reflects:
• Our passion for those working to provide the best seafood in the world.
• Our respect for the importance of the Quota Management System (QMS) and sustainable fishing practices in maintaining healthy fisheries for the future.

Our purpose as a business is to enable successful and sustainable fisheries through smart information services ; mā ngā ratonga pārongo koi e angitū ai, e toitū ai te haonga ika. This means:
• Using trusted, cost-effective systems to enable the reporting and processing that underpin the QMS and public registries.
• Making better use of data to enable informed decision-making.
• Creating more value from the same investment.

Our strategy is based around the specialist role Fishserve plays. We act as a channel for useful information and data to reach those responsible for sustaining Aotearoa New Zealand’s fisheries. This channel depends on us working together towards a sustainable future.

Name: Haivuong group
Description:
Hai Vuong Group is currently the largest processor and exporter of Tuna and pelagic fish products in Vietnam. 

In a year we export nearly 28,000MT of finished seafood products, including 22,000MT of tuna and pelagic fish products, to more than 50 countries & territories around the world.

With more than 17 years' experience in the tuna/seafood industry, Hai Vuong Group has successfully built good reputation in both international and local business areas. To that aim, we have completed establishing and implementing various food safety management systems including HACCP, BRC, IFS, USDC, HALAL, GLOBAL G.A.P.... for each of the factories

- "Certificate of compliance with food safety regulation on fisheries businees operation" for HaiVuong, Dragonwaves, Nha Trang Bay, annually audited and renewed.

- "HACCP Certificate" for Hai Vuong (1997), Dragonwaves (2004).

- EU Code: Hai Vuong (DL318), Dragonwaves (DL314), Nha Trang Bay (DL 620).

- "BRC Certificate" for Dragonwaves (from 2006), renewed annually.

Con oltre 60 anni di esperienza, siamo fieri di rappresentare un’eccellenza italiana apprezzata sia a livello locale che internazionale. Il nostro obiettivo è continuare a innovare senza mai perdere il legame profondo con il territorio e le persone che lo abitano.

Armanini: la qualità nasce dall'acqua, cresce con la tradizione e vive nella passione.
