Name: Klimakooperation Fischereihafen
Description:
Die Klimakooperation Fischereihafen (Climate Cooperation Fischereihafen – kurz CCF) hat sich zum Ziel gesetzt, den Fischereihafen Bremerhaven bis zum Jahr 2030 CO2-neutral zu machen und ist im März 2023 auf Initiative der Unternehmen FRoSTA, Frozen Fish International/Iglo, Deutsche See, NordCeram und Holz Cordes ins Leben gerufen worden. 

Mit über 450 Hektar Fläche, rund 9.000 Beschäftigten und etwa 400 Unternehmen ist der Fischereihafen Bremerhaven eines der größten Gewerbegebiete der Region. Die Klimakooperation ist das erste Klimaschutzvorhaben für ein komplettes Gewerbegebiet dieser Größenordnung in Deutschland und gilt als eine der größten firmenübergreifenden Klimaschutz-Initiativen in der deutschen Wirtschaft. 

Die Fischereihafen-Betriebsgesellschaft mbH (FBG) koordiniert als unabhängiger Partner die Arbeit der Kooperation. Die FBG unterstützt unter anderem bei der Bereitstellung von Fördermitteln für konkrete Vorhaben zum Beispiel aus den Klimaschutz-Programmen des Landes Bremen. Unterstützt wird die Klimakooperation außerdem von der Senatorin für Wirtschaft, Häfen und Transformation sowie dem Oberbürgermeister der Stadt Bremerhaven. Auch die BIS Bremerhaven, bremenports, die Hochschule Bremerhaven sowie das Technologie-Transfer-Zentrum ttz Bremerhaven unterstützen das Projekt.

Die Klimakooperation arbeitet in sieben Arbeitsgruppen (Photovoltaik/Windenergie, ÖPNV/Mobilität, Wasserstoff, Wärme, Logistik, Öffentlichkeitsarbeit und Administration) an ihrem selbstgesetzten Ziel einer autarken Energieversorgung des Fischereihafens mit Strom aus Windenergie und Photovoltaik sowie mit zum Beispiel synthetischem Gas aus „grünem“, vor Ort produzierten, Wasserstoff.

Name: German Association of Fish Processing and Wholesale
Description:
The German Association of Fish Processing and Wholesale (Bundesverband der deutschen Fischindustrie und des Fischgroßhandels e.V., BVFi) was founded on September 16, 1903 in Hamburg-Altona. It represents 126 member companies, 47 of which are fish processing companies and 57 fish import and fish wholesale companies (as of 01.01.23). In the field of processing, BVFI achieves coverage of 95% for companies with more than 50 employees and 84% when considering companies with 20 employees and more.

The production turnover generated by the members amounted to between €1.53 billion and €1.75 billion in 2021. According to the German Federal Statistical Office, fish and fish products worth €1.99 billion were produced in Germany in 2021. Statistical information on the fish wholesale trade is not available. BVFI estimates a coverage rate of approx. 80%, based on the pure fish wholesale trade. Further data and facts can be found in the annual report.

BVFI  is the point of contact for ministries and authorities at federal and state level for questions relating to fish processing and fish wholesale. Various contacts exist with the individual departments of the Federal Ministry of Food (BMEL) and the Federal Office for Nutrition (BLE). The focus of work changes depending on the topics, which are essentially specified by the European institutions. A main area is the communication and commenting on special legal regulations within the framework of EU fisheries policy and the EU control regulation. Another focus is the legal framework of food law. In addition to supporting legislative initiatives and informing members, BVFI answers to specific inquiries from members. This involves the mediation of interpretation instructions, since the Federal Association is not permitted to provide a service in the sense of legal advice.

Name: Namsu Su Ürünleri Tic. San. A.Ş
Description:
Namsu Su Ürünleri Ticaret ve Sanayi A.Ş, 2010 yılında Ordu’nun Fatsa ilçesinde kurulmuştur. Firmamız 4000 m2’lik kapalı alanda ve ayrıca Fatsa organize sanayi bölgesinde bulunan şubesiyle 300 den fazla aile bireyi, 8 adet -40 °C şoklama odası ve 10 adet -18 °C muhafaza odası ile somon, alabalık, hamsi, deniz kabukluları vb. deniz ürünlerini işleme, şoklama ve paketleme alanında hizmet vermektedir.  
Firmamızın ilkesi; İnsanların sağlıklı bir hayat sürmesi için önemli olan su ürünleri gıda maddelerini hijyenik koşullarda güvenilir ürünler haline getirip halka sunmaktır.

Name: FineFish AS
Description: A leading supplier of fish and seafood from Norway

Name: Neeltje Jans Mosselen
Description:
Schaal en schelpdier specialist van A tot en met Z, van mosselzaad, kweek, verwerking, verpakking, transport, bij consument op bord!

Neeltje Jans Mosselen is een dynamisch mosselkweekbedrijf uit Zeeland. Gelegen aan de Stormvloedkering, vlakbij Vrouwenpolder, kweekt het bedrijf hang- en bodemcultuur mosselen van topkwaliteit. Ervaring met de mosselteelt wordt bij ons bedrijf van generatie op generatie doorgegeven.

Neeltje Jans beschikt over voedselrijke mosselpercelen in de Oosterschelde en de Waddenzee en is eigenaar van de grootste hangmosselkwekerij van Nederland. De hangmosselen hangen hoog in voedselrijk water aan lange touwen.

De kwekerij, ooit gestart als experiment van een ervaren bodemmosselvisser is inmiddels uitgegroeid tot een innovatief werkend bedrijf.

Neeltje Jans Mosselen wil voldoen aan de vraag naar een subliem product. 
Daarom houden wij de hele productieketen in eigen hand: van het mosselzaad, de teeltmethoden, het oogsten van de mosselen, de verwatertechnieken tot en met het verpakken en het transport. Daarnaast investeert Viskwekerij Neeltje Jans voortdurend in nieuwe, zelfontwikkelde technieken.

Mosselen moeten altijd vers zijn. Wij kunnen u een versheidsgarantie geven omdat wij over eigen transport beschikken. De mosselen komen rechtstreeks vanuit de viskwekerij naar u toe.

Name: CTAQUA Centro Tecnológico de Acuicultura
Description:
La Fundación Centro Tecnológico de Acuicultura de Andalucía, CTAQUA, se constituye como fundación sin ánimo de lucro, de carácter privado.

El objetivo de CTAQUA es fomentar la innovación competitiva de las empresas, en respuesta a las necesidades empresariales del sector acuícola, así como el desarrollo de una investigación aplicada a los distintos procesos productivos.

CTAQUA se ubica en El Puerto de Santa María. Localidad de la provincia de Cádiz que cuenta con una posición estratégica, ventaja que facilita el desarrollo de las actividades de la Fundación a nivel regional.
Location: El Puerto de Santa Maria, Cádiz

Name: Abad Fisheries Pvt Ltd
Description: Being one of the oldest Seafood export houses established in 1931, Abad Fisheries was found by Usman Hashim, gave us the opportunity to sense the changing market from canned Shrimp to frozen Seafood in the 60's or moving from contemporary block freezing technique to IQF product in the early '80's, to the construction of fully panellised & air conditioned factories with in house pre-processing facilities in the early 90's, we were the 1st to move towards newer technology but keeping the old values of quality & trust. Presents brands include Abad Food Service (abadfoods.com) Sea Sparkle (seasparkle.in) & Wild Fish (wildfish.in)

Name: Primar S.A.
Description:
Somos una Compañía Chilena en operaciones desde 2007.
Contamos con instalaciones en Puerto Montt de primer nivel para atender a nuestros clientes, con estándares altos en calidad y Certificadas en diferentes normativas para procesar salmón/trucha fresco, congelado y ahumado.

Procesos en grandes volúmenes de salmón.
Control de calidad en todas las etapas.
Control de producción y servicio al cliente.

Name: SPF Shrimp Feeds
Description: SPF Shrimp Feeds is an aquaculture feed supplier which focuses exclusively on live, fresh, and natural SPF feeds for shrimp larvae production.  All of our products are tested and certified SPF by the University of Arizona in the United States.  To achieve the best shrimp larvae quality, we believe live, fresh and natural feeds are a necessary component for all shrimp larvae rearing protocols.  SPF Shrimp Feeds aims to bring completely biosecure, premium natural shrimp feeds to the aquaculture market. We offer our customers biosecurity protocol advisory for handling live feeds.  Please contact us to learn more about our company and products at info@SPFshrimpfeeds.com.

Name: Yalelo Uganda
Description: We grow tilapia fish in the open waters and stunning beauty of Lake Victoria. Our pens are the largest in Africa, providing an open environment to swim far and deep against natural lake currents. This environment produces a fish that is stronger and leaner, with a taste our customers have come to love over generations. We never use antibiotics, chemicals or growth hormones. Our fish enjoy a diet based on soy, maize and wheat. They don’t eat mud, waste or algae that can be found at the bottom of fish ponds. Because our fish eat only the high-quality balanced diet we provide them there’s no mystery about what is on your plate. Using only the best local fish food keeps our fish healthy and gives a great clean taste! Tilapia is an excellent part of a healthy diet. It is a natural source of protein and calcium while being low in fat and cholesterol. Yalelo’s professional local production is lowering the cost tilapia, making animal protein more affordable and presenting a strong value proposition relative to chicken, pork and beef. We place our fish on ice from the moment of harvest and deliver nation-wide using our own fleet of refrigerated trucks. This reliable cold-chain provides customers with a traceable quality they can depend on. Yalelo, from the local Ugandan word “today”, reminds our customers daily that we’re Uganda’s favourite fresh local fish!

Name: Carapitanga Indústria de Pescados
Description: Há mais de 20 anos, a Carapitanga se dedica exclusivamente à criação, processamento e fornecimento de camarão marinho. Com uma produção anual de mais de 5 mil toneladas de camarão, produzidos numa área de 2.100 hectares, os mais de 500 viveiros estão instalados em 14 fazendas, localizadas no Nordeste brasileiro e dedicadas exclusivamente à carcinicultura.

Name: Texcumar S.A.
Description:
Texcumar S.A. es un centro de reproducción y mejoramiento genético de camarón. 

Desde 1999 empezamos a trabajar con el objetivo de contribuir al desarrollo del sector camaronero ecuatoriano mediante la producción de nauplios y larvas de excelente calidad y la implementación de nuevas estrategias y tecnologías en cada una de las etapas de la cadena productiva.

Name: Costa Sul Pescados
Description:
A Costa Sul atua há 35 anos no mercado de pescados e vem investindo constantemente em qualidade, tecnologia e recursos humanos. Diariamente são manipulados diversos tipos de pescados em seu parque industrial localizado em Navegantes, Santa Catarina.

Suas instalações compreendem 15.506m² de área construída, de alta tecnologia e seguidos de investimentos em seu parque industrial. Dotadas de cais próprio, por onde chega toda a matéria-prima. Os peixes, crustáceos e moluscos são lavados, inspecionados e passam por um processo rigoroso de seleção.

Name: Camlı Yem Besicilik
Description:
Çamlı Yem Besicilik, Yaşar Grubu’nun entegrasyon felsefesi ile oluşturulmuş, yem üretiminden hindi ve büyükbaş besiciliğine, bitki besleme işinden kültür balığı üretimi ve işlenmiş balık ürünlerine kadar çok geniş bir yelpazede faaliyet gösteren tarım şirketidir. Türkiye’nin 500 büyük sanayi kuruluşu içerisinde yer alan Çamlı, yenilikçi ve üretken kimliğiyle Yaşar Grubu gıda değer zincirinin çok önemli bir parçasıdır.

Vizyon

Hayvanların kaliteli, sağlıklı ve içeriği garanti edilmiş yemlerle beslenmesi ve iyi yetiştirilmesi konusunda öncü olan, ürettiği ürünler ve verdiği hizmetler ile sektörde üreticinin en çok yanında yer alan pazar lideri yem firması olmak. Firmanın tüm paydaşlarıyla uzun vadeli başarılı ve karlı ilişkiler sürdürmek. Müşterilerimizin başarılı olmasını ve bizimle beraber sürekli gelişmesini hedefliyoruz. Müşterilerimize sürdürülebilir gelişme ve uzun soluklu bir beraberlik vaad ediyoruz.

Misyon

Sağlıklı gıda üretimi için hayvanların kaliteli ve güvenilir yemlerle beslenmesini ve sağlıklı koşullarda yetiştirilmesini hedefleyen; üreticinin her türlü ihtiyacına yönelik, yüksek kaliteli ve katma değerli ürün ve hizmet sunan, üreticiyi ve gelecek nesilleri en çok düşünen tarım firmasıyız. Faaliyetlerimizi yürütürken çevreye duyarlı bir biçimde ve sosyal sorumluluk bilinci ile hareket ediyoruz.

Name: Minapoli
Description:
Minapoli is Indonesia’s first fully integrated marketplace for the aquaculture industry. Launched in November 2018, our platform and infrastructure are designed to empower all stakeholders in the industry by way of enhancing accessibility to market and streamlining the supply chain process.

Our Mission
Empower Indonesia’s aquaculture industry by vertically integrating access to key products and services. 

Our Vision
To be the leading platform for aquaculture solutions in the Asia Pacific region.

Name: Kementerian Kelautan dan Perikanan Republik Indonesia
Description: Akselerasi Pembangunan Kelautan dan Perikanan Menuju Terwujudnya Ekonomi Biru

Name: Santa Priscila Company
Description: We bring to ypur table the best catch of the day taking care of nature, always giving back everything it gives us, respecting it with processes that do not harm the ecosystem and that contribute to the environment. We are the only ones that cold pack the same day we fish, to take care of the quality and freshness of our food, for the families of Ecuador and the world.

Name: PRODUMAR
Description: PRODUMAR es una compañía que forma parte de El Grupo Profand, especializada en producción, procesamiento y ventas de productos hidrobiológicos de alta calidad, certificados bajo los más exigentes estándares internacionales. Somos un grupo humano enfocado en el desarrollo e innovación de productos congelados de alta calidad para el consumo humano directo en los más exigentes mercados internacionales.

Name: Aquaculture Association of Canada
Description: Incorporated in 1984 "to foster the development of the Canadian Aquaculture sector, the Aquaculture Association of Canada (AAC) is a non-profit with a mandate to transfer information among the various sectors of the aquaculture community - gov't, research, students, and industry. It does this by organizing workshops and conferences on topical issues, publishing the proceedings of these events, and supporting students through scholarships, travel bursaries, and best-paper awards. Publications are available freely on the website www.aquacultureassociation.ca

Name: Inland Fisheries Ireland
Description: Inland Fisheries Ireland is a statutory body operating under the aegis of the Department of Communications, Climate Action and Environment (DCCAE) and was established under the Fisheries Act on 1st July 2010. Its principal function is the protection and conservation of the inland fisheries resource. Inland Fisheries Ireland promotes supports, facilitates and advises the Minister on the conservation, protection, management, development and improvement of inland fisheries, including sea angling. Inland Fisheries Ireland also develops policy and national strategies relating to inland fisheries and sea angling and advises the Minister on same.

Name: Institut National de Recherche Halieutique (INRH)
Description:
Missions     
- Réalisations de diagnostics sur les ressources halieutiques et leurs systèmes d'exploitation.
- Etude du fonctionnement des écosystèmes marins et littoraux.
- Surveillance de la qualité et de la salubrité du milieu marin.
- Réalisation des essais de nouvelles techniques de pêche et valorisation des produits de la mer.
- Evaluation des potentialités aquacoleset contribution au développement de l’aquaculture.

Name: Cia.Pesquera Camanchaca S.A.
Description:
Company leader in seafood products.
Is one of Chile`s main producers of "Ocean Raisers" farmers salmon and a leader in a farming and processing of scallops and abalone.
Canned mackarel is also an important product for Camanchaca and is produced for both national and international markets.
In the area of fishmeal, Camanchaca s focussed on the top quality segments  of premium and super premium fishmeal.
Camanchaca Fishing Compañy was established in 1965.
The scope and diversity of its products makes Camanchaca one of the leading seafood companies in Chile.

Name: Silver Bay Seafoods, LLC
Description:
Silver Bay Seafoods is an integrated processor of frozen, headed and gutted salmon for domestic and export markets. We began in 2007 as a single salmon processing facility in Sitka, Alaska. Today, Silver Bay is one of the largest seafoods companies in Alaska, operating five domestic processing facilities throughout Alaska and the West Coast.  Our Alaska operations include Craig, Ketchikan, Kodiak, False Pass, Naknek, Sitka and Valdez.

Silver Bay's primary strength is in its combination of having a state of the art processing plant and favorable logistics to support its operations; competent management and key personnel; an established fish buying system; and ownership by fishermen who represent over 80% of the committed fishing effort.

Through sound management, innovation, teamwork and vision, provide member fishermen and other strategic partners with the “Silver Bay experience” that is predicated on exceptional and unparalleled performance that is second to none; simultaneously promoting the growth and sustained profitability of the company.

Silver Bay Seafoods was born from the passion of hard working and dedicated fishers, many of which have been very successful. Collectively, they believe in the dream that there is always a better option for their fishing efforts.

The company is molded to fit that vision. While salmon and herring production has been the primary focus during its first four years, Silver Bay will continue to explore areas where we will be able to offer more value-added products to our swiftly growing customer base.

Name: Landing Aquaculture BV
Description:
Our mission is to provide the world-wide aquaculture sector with a high-quality, affordable and transparent engineering and consultancy service for recirculating aquaculture projects and other aquaculture ventures.

LandIng Aquaculture is an engineering and consultancy company with international experience in aquaculture and Recirculating Aquaculture Systems. LandIng Aquaculture is also widely connected to a vast network of companies, professionals, universities and scientific researchers which gives us and our clients access to a great amount of aquaculture know-how.

Name: AquaRech LTD
Description:
We are a social enterprise targeting rural based small-scale fish farmers to improve their productivity, increase income and develop an inclusive community based aquaculture value chain. Aquarech App is a centralized database system that links key actors in the fish value chain namely; farmers, trader and input suppliers. The innovation monitors growth of fish from the time of stocking to the time of sale. It provides vital production data such as the quantity of feed fed, average daily growth, FCR, fish price, feed cost. Further to this the innovation has an inbuilt feeding regime that calculates automatically for the farmer the exact amount of feed to be fed based on water temperature, size of fish and quantity of fish.
Our Objectives :
To improve fish production through better data recording practices utilizing the App within the first year of operation

To connect farmers and traders through a streamlined online trading platform based on the App 

To connect input suppliers and farmers through a customized central database hosted on the App within six months

To reduce/eliminate fish for sex trade by enabling women fish traders to access fish through a verified platform free of any manipulated data or circumstances within the first harvest.

Name: Vinh Hoan Corporation
Description:
Founded in 1997, Vinh Hoan is an international aquaculture company. 
Aquaculture is the fastest growing segment of the global food industry. Today, over half the seafood consumed globally is the product of aquaculture. This, in turn, contributes to global food security as well as to the world’s environment and economy. 
Vinh Hoan is a pioneer in this industry. We are on a mission to advance the application of sustainable aquaculture around the world. Meeting this challenge is the goal of every employee at Vinh Hoan and is the focus of our work and innovation across each of our three divisions.
- Vinh Foods - Providing premium seafood from sustainable aquaculture
- Vinh Aquaculture - Helping advance sustainable tropical aquaculture with a combination of research, development, education, and on-site training 
- Vinh Wellness - Providing premium wellness products derived from sustainable aquaculture
Location: Cao Lanh City, Dong Thap Province

Name: GRUPO EMPRESARIAL ROJAS
Description: Somos una organización de producción acuícola, que garantiza el bienestar de nuestros colaboradores con procesos sostenibles.

Name: Peixe BR
Description:
A piscicultura brasileira enfrenta enormes desafios e gargalos em nosso país. A Associação Brasileira da Piscicultura (PEIXE BR), entidade de âmbito nacional, foi criada para ser o porta-voz oficial da atividade.

A PEIXE BR resulta da fusão da Associação Brasileira da Indústria de Processamento de Tilápia (AB Tilápia) e da Associação Brasileira dos Produtores de Tilápia e concentra suas atividades na atividade de peixes cultivados.

A PEIXE BR começa as atividades com as maiores empresas do negócio e entidades de âmbito regional. Os parceiros estão localizados nos principais estados produtores de pescado. Nestes estados estão mais de 80% do negócio de peixes cultivados no Brasil. Paralelamente, a entidade realiza trabalho de atração de novas empresas para ampliar ainda mais sua representatividade.

Hoje, a atividade movimenta cerca de R$ 4 bilhões/ano, gera 1 milhão de empregos diretos e indiretos e cresce a taxas superiores a 10% ao ano. A produção é estimada pela PEIXE BR em 638 mil toneladas anuais, sendo 301 mil/ton/ano de tilápia, 265 mil/ton/ano de “Peixes Redondos” e 72 mil/ton/ano de outras espécies.

Name: Group Sagun
Description:
GROUP SAGUN, bünyesinde 8 farklı şirket bulunduran, Türkiye’nin farklı
noktalarında 11 üretim tesisi olan, deniz ürünleri yetiştiriciliği, üretimi, ihracatı ve ithalatı alanlarında faaliyet gösteren, hem iç hem dış piyasada bilinirliği güçlü markalarıyla perakende ve toptan market zincirlerine ve satış noktalarına tüketime hazır ürünler sağlayan, bünyesinde Avrupa’nın ve Türkiye’nin ilk özel balık hali ve 25 balıkçı gemisi bulunduran; günümüzde Dördüncü kuşak tarafından yönetilen bir Şirketler Topluluğudur.

Name: The Waterbase Limited
Description:
The Waterbase Ltd., incorporated in 1987, is a fully integrated aquaculture company offering world-class products/services for shrimp culture in India. Being a pioneer in the industry, Waterbase is committed towards developing new technologies and imparting best practices for the growth of aquaculture in India.
We offer high-quality seed, feed, healthcare & processed shrimp. Not to mention the technical expertise that comes along with it to equip the farmers with the best-in-class farming practices to cater the whims of the evolving consumers.
In our 37 years of commitment, we have been focusing on sustainability and delivering quality products. Towards this, all our operations are carried out with greater emphasis on protecting the environment, being socially responsible and offering the best in animal feed and nutrition to meet the growing demand in the world. Present across the value chain to offer value and quality at every touch point.

Name: Sanford Limited
Description: Sanford is New Zealand’s oldest and largest seafood company - we farm salmon and mussels and hold 19.7% of New Zealand commercial fishing quota. Sanford has been listed on the New Zealand stock market since 1924. We are focused on sustainability and on maximising the value of the resources we gather from our oceans, enabling long term value creation from oceans teeming with life. Sanford sites can be found in 13 locations around New Zealand and we are a team of 1,400 staff and sharefishers across the country. We are committed to innovation: our scientists are on a mission to find new ways to make the most of the life-enhancing properties of seafood, from antiinflammatory supplements to skin-nurturing collagen.

Name: Cromaris d.d.
Description:
Cromaris is a company that specializes in growing, processing and sale of indigenous Adriatic fish and shellfish. We were established in 2009 through merger of Croatian and European aquaculture pioneers. Our fish is present in the European market for over 35 years.

Today, by its production, Cromaris is a leading company on Adriatic sea in farming, processing and marketing of fresh and processed fish. Our core products are the highest native quality white fish species - sea bream, sea bass, meagre, dentex - as well as their processed products which facilitate consumers purchase, preparation and consumption of fish. All of our products feature superb freshness and contain no preservatives or GMO ingredients.

Our mission is to develop and spread a culture of healthy and balanced diet and consumption of fish, fish products and shellfish as an extremely healthy food, taking care of the environmental impact.

Our goal is to become leading company in the european market of white fish - recognized as a leader in quality.

This LinkedIn Page is co-funded by the European Maritime and Fisheries Fund of the European Union

Name: Norway Royal Salmon ASA
Description: Norway Royal Salmon ASA (NRS) er et oppdrettsselskap med to forretningsområder innen oppdrett og salg- og markedsarbeid. NRS er notert på Oslo børs, og eier 4 oppdrettsselskaper som til sammen har 35 matfiskkonsesjoner hvor aktiviteten er i Finnmark, Troms, Hordaland og Rogaland. Selskapet har i tillegg minoritetsandeler i 3 oppdrettsselskaper med til sammen 10 konsesjoner. NRS er involvert i de fleste ledd i verdikjeden fra smoltproduksjon, matfiskproduksjon, slakterivirksomhet og salgs- og markedsarbeid. Hovedkontoret er lokalisert i Trondheim.

Name: Shinkei
Description: Fishing automation for sustainability and deliciousness at scale.

Name: RAStech Magazine
Description:
RAStech is the media source for owners and operators of Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS) around the world. 

Whether it’s a system for raising fish juveniles, larger smolt, full harvest size fish, aquaponics or research, RAStech delivers relevant content to its target audience via four information-packed print and digital editions per year, virtual and in-person events, webinars, podcasts and a weekly e-newsletter.

As the land-based fish farming sector continues to expand, and technology advances, RAStech's media channels are here to keep industry professionals both well informed and well connected.

RAStech magazine is delivered to all readers of its sister media, Hatchery International and Aquaculture North America. Subscribe today for industry updates.

Name: Aqua Bridge Holding
Description:
Aqua Bridge Group is a UAE based group, envisioned to provide holistic solutions harnessing adaptive aquaculture and fisheries services along with farm management services.  Strong in the diversity and expertise of its distinguished services, backstopped with research and partnerships support capability where ever in need of, we progressively extend the breadth of our expertise from core conception to project development and Operations. The provision of company services encompass aquaculture planning, feasibility, development & operations, fisheries policy development & sustainable management. 

Under the umbrella of parent group, ‘Aqua Bridge Group’ has been formed and given mandate to provide services for ‘Aquaculture, Fisheries & Environment sectors.  Optimizing the use of key resources such as water, energy and space stands the firm ‘leitmotif’ of this consulting initiative.  Group specialize in three major consulting sectors viz., Aquaculture & Fisheries Consulting & Operations; Capacity Building for Private and Public Sector; Environmental Consulting Studies. 


“Aqua Bridge” with its competent experts for Biological economies, has implemented a long score of complex projects round the globe, in Europe, the Mediterranean basin, peninsular Middle East and Africa. Our geopolitical professional network with multi-seas exposure allows us to reflect upon our clientele the best of hard-bred peripheral experiences, values and knowledge. Our organized specialists are passionately capable of assuring tailored solutions aimed primarily at giving clientele a competitive edge sustainable over other consulting school of thoughts and or competitive peers.

Name: Rio Fish Ltd
Description: Rio Fish is a for profit organization that focuses on sustainable fish farming for the empowerment of youth and women and the elimination of the sex for fish vice.

Name: fish international – Germany's fish fair
Description:
The Fish Fair in Germany | February 22–24, 2026

In 2024, 326 exhibitors from 30 countries showcased their products across fish production, processing, fresh fish, delicacies, and research and development. The event attracted 13,729 trade visitors representing the seafood industry, retail, and catering sectors – a key platform for networking, insights, and innovation.  

fish international…
- Provides a platform to explore the latest developments in the German market and gain a comprehensive overview of the fish industry.  
- Inspires traders with a diverse and tailored assortment of fish, offering ideas for improved market positioning.  
- Features an extensive display of machinery, technical aids, and appliances tailored to SMEs.  
- Unveils unique counter concepts for fishmongers and mobile vendors – exclusively in Bremen.  
- Offers equipment solutions and expert exchange for fish farming, with a focus on pond farming and recirculating aquaculture systems.  
- Creates time and space for meaningful conversations within the fish industry to refine everyday operations and strategies.  

Join us in Bremen from February 22–24, 2026!

Name: Hatchery International
Description:
Hatchery International is the only trade newspaper focused exclusively on the early rearing (hatchery) side of  the aquaculture industry, fisheries enhancement and re-circulation  technology. Six times a year we offer our readers the latest technical  articles, product information and research from around the world. Each issue is packed with articles on a variety of topics, including:

- Hatchery Profiles
- Innovative Recirc Systems
- New species developments
- Marine and freshwater species
- New technology and equipment
- Fish health/nutrition and feeds

Name: Fábrica de Conservas "A Poveira"
Description:
Founded in 1938, "A Poveira" produces top-quality canned fish products, namely Sardines, Tuna, Mackerel, Cod and other specialties.

Still preserving the best practices in tradicional methods, ensuring the unique quality of its products, "A Poveira" is today on the most demanding markets, exporting to more than 25 countries worldwide. 

With over 7 brands and 50 recipes, amongst which its flagship "Minerva", it is recognized for quality, excellence and traditional manufacturing.

Name: Spring Genetics
Description: Spring Genetics operates an advanced family based breeding program for Nile tilapia, with breeding nucleus operations in Miami, Florida, USA. The Spring Genetics stock has been selected for key traits such as fast growth, survivability and yield, and more recently for increased resistance to Streptococcus iniae and S. agalactiae Ib, Francisella and TilV. Selection of disease resistance is based on controlled challenge testing of nucleus families. Additional key traits such as resistance to other pathogens, improved feed conversion efficiency, tolerance to salinity and high/low temperatures are currently assessed for implementation. Benchmark Genetics Tilapia is distributing genetically improved, high performing materials to integrated companies and affiliated multiplication hatcheries throughout the Americas and Asia .

Name: Atlantic Canada Seafood Group
Description:
At Atlantic Canada Seafood Group, we are dedicated to providing our customers with the highest quality seafood products from the cold, pristine waters of Atlantic Canada. We represent a group of independent fishing enterprises and seafood processors from the provinces of New Brunswick, Nova Scotia, Prince Edward Island, and Newfoundland and Labrador.

Our focus is on responsible and sustainable fishing practices, and we work closely with our members to ensure they adhere to strict environmental standards and regulations. We are committed to providing our customers with seafood that is not only delicious but also responsibly sourced.

We operate a state-of-the-art processing facility, which allows us to provide a wide range of fresh, frozen, and value-added seafood products. Our dedicated team of experts ensures that every product that leaves our facility meets our high standards of quality and freshness.

We pride ourselves on our commitment to quality and customer satisfaction, and we strive to build long-term relationships with our customers. Whether you're a restaurant, grocery store, or seafood distributor, we're here to help you find the perfect seafood products for your business.

Phone: +1(604)862-1076
Email: info@atlanticcanadaseafood.ca

Name: Noronha Pescados
Description:
Situada em Pernambuco, Brasil, a Noronha Pescados está há mais de 50 anos no mercado, distribuindo pescados de altíssima qualidade para todo o país. 

Nossos produtos atendem ao mercado de peixes frescos e congelados, tanto de água doce como salgada, além de moluscos e crustáceos em geral. A nossa rede nacional de clientes, constituída por mais de 3.000 nomes em carteira, abrange grandes, médias e pequenas redes de supermercados, hotéis, hospitais, indústrias, cozinha industrial, restaurantes e bares, que recebem os pescados no dia e hora encomendados. 

Graças à grande diversidade de produtos da nossa lista, a Noronha Pescados está preparada para atender às mais variadas demandas. Para tanto, dispomos de vendedores e representantes em várias partes do Brasil, o que garante uma assistência permanente. O nosso pessoal de vendas está capacitado a sugerir produtos que atendam os cardápios desde os mais simples aos mais elaborados, sempre com excelente qualidade e perfeita adequação. 

A Noronha Pescados, cuja matriz é em Recife, tem representantes no Sudeste e no Nordeste nos estados da Bahia, Ceará, Alagoas, Sergipe, Rio Grande do Norte e Paraíba.

Name: Nordic Aquafarms
Description: Nordic Aquafarms AS has emerged as a leading international player in the international land-based (RAS) segment of seafood farming, with headquarters in Norway. The company currently has tree farms in operations with production of yellowtail kingfish, with additional projects in the pipeline. We are dedicated to quality and sustainability in everything we pursue to create great products for the demanding seafood lover.

Name: Jeelani Marine Products
Description:
M/s Jeelani Marine Products is based in scenic and picturesque west coast of India, “Ratnagiri”. We are one of the leading supplier of quality Sea-Caught & Aquaculture material in India. We cater to domestic and international market requirement.

Our Company has a good strong backward linkage with the Fishermen, Farmers, Self-help Groups, Fishermen Co-Operative Society and different Farming Groups. In Seafood Processing industry, the input as well as Output products are perishable. So this effective links add value to our brand and thus results in superior quality of products as well as Improved Efficiency and makes operations economical.

We have vast network for sourcing all over India. We procure fish from Fishing Harbors in Gujarat, Maharashtra, Goa, Karnataka, Tamilnadu, Andhra Pradesh and Kerala, wherein we have our own collection centers equipped with all necessary infrastructure and trained Workforce for selection of Quality material and Online Inspection at the Fishing harbor or Farm Gate. We have aquaculture farming contracts in Andhra Pradesh, Maharashtra and Gujarat. We have state of the art pre-processing center which facilitates fish cleaning and cutting in Ratnagiri, Maharashtra.

We produce 200 MT of ice per day in our Two block Ice units in located in Ratnagiri MIDC Area, further we supply this to our Contract Fishing Boats in Ratnagiri so that the quality of catch is not degraded. All the necessary nutrients are safe guarded. Hence fish procured from us is healthy, nutritious, fresh and offers value for your hard earned money

We have our State of the Art Fish Processing Unit Located at Ratnagiri Industrial Development Area with all the necessary infrastructure needed for processing quality products at the least possible time. Our Factory is HACCP Certified, EU Approved & USFDA Certified. Our facility adheres to different International Quality Norms in all processes so as to maintain a high Quality Standard

Name: Aquaculture North America
Description: An industry publication for aquaculture professionals in the United States, Canada and Mexico.

Name: Global Sustainable Seafood Initiative (GSSI)
Description: The Global Sustainable Seafood Initiative (GSSI) is a public-private partnership working together on a common purpose: turn seafood into a driver for good to preserve oceans for future generations and drive forward more sustainable seafood for everyone. As one of the largest precompetitive collaborations in the world aligning businesses, NGOs, governments, and international organizations representing the full seafood value chain – the GSSI Global Partnership invites seafood sustainability leaders to join and become part of the solution.

Name: ONP Office National des Pêches
Description:
L’ONP, en tant que gestionnaire des marchés de première vente des produits de la mer, se trouve à un croisement inéluctable de rencontres de tous les acteurs de la filière. Il est de ce fait, l’outil d'intervention au sein de la filière au service de la politique nationale de promotion et de développement de la pêche côtière et artisanale.
Créé en 1969, l’ONP a fait l’objet d’une redéfinition de son rôle en 1996. Ce repositionnement stratégique avait pour objectif de recentrer la mission de l’Office autour de son métier de base et accompagner le secteur de la pêche côtière et artisanale dans sa nécessaire restructuration et sa modernisation.
Le rôle de l’ONP s’articule désormais autour de deux missions principales :
*  L’organisation de la commercialisation des produits de la pêche maritime
*  Le développement de la pêche côtière et artisanale
A cet effet, l’ONP est chargé de :
*   Mettre en œuvre les programmes de promotion et de modernisation de la flotte de pêche côtière et artisanale
*   Promouvoir la consommation interne des produits de la pêche maritime
*   Gérer et organiser les marchés de vente en gros du poisson conformément aux normes garantissant la salubrité et la qualité des produits
*   Agréer le poisson industriel destiné à l’approvisionnement des usines de traitement à terre

Name: Grupo Ricardo Fuentes
Description:
Somos un grupo empresarial familiar impulsado por el compromiso con la excelencia, la innovación y la sostenibilidad.

Nuestras raíces mediterráneas nos definen y nuestra visión global nos permite estar hoy presentes en más de 40 países.

El mar es nuestro origen y nuestro medio de vida. Producimos y distribuimos atún rojo y salazones bajo un enfoque responsable que equilibra desarrollo económico, bienestar social y respeto por el entorno.

Nuestro modelo se apoya en la seguridad alimentaria, la trazabilidad y las personas, garantizando un futuro sostenible para las generaciones que vienen.

Creemos en la innovación como motor de futuro y en la responsabilidad como principio que guía cada una de nuestras decisiones.

Name: Global Tuna Alliance
Description: The Global Tuna Alliance is an independent group of retailers and supply-chain companies, working to ensure that tuna ultimately meets the highest standards of environmental performance and social responsibility.

Name: Cornelis Vrolijk
Description:
Cornelis Vrolijk - Fishers of tomorrow

We catch, farm and process high-quality fish and shrimp every day. We do so responsibly and sensibly, so that we can provide millions of people around the world with healthy and affordable food every day. 

In 1880, Frank Vrolijk set up a herring business in Scheveningen, which became the foundation for our family enterprise. The fifth generation of the family is at the helm today. Over the past few decades, the organisation has grown into a family of businesses centred around fishermen and professionals.

Every day, we get the best out of the sea together and process it into the nicest fish products. All, of course, in a sensible way, so that future generations can continue to fish.

Name: Ministère de la Pêche et de l’Economie Maritime Guinée
Grupo Veraz
Description:
Grupo Veraz is a leading company group dedicated to the extraction, production, and marketing of high-quality Argentine seafood products, with a primary focus on shrimp (Pleoticus muelleri) and hubbsi hake. Operating with a fleet of 7 vessels and 3 strategically located production plants in Mar del Plata (Bs.As.), Rawson (Chubut), and Puerto Deseado (Sta. Cruz), Veraz Group leverages its deep understanding of Argentine marine ecosystems to deliver exceptional products to a global clientele.

At Grupo Veraz we are committed to responsible fishing practices. Our dedication to sustainability is reflected in our active involvement in various Fishery Improvement Projects (FIPs), which are collaborative initiatives aimed at enhancing the sustainability and MSC certification of specific fisheries. 

We are also proud to hold certifications for both BRCGS, a leading global standard for food safety, and SMETA, a rigorous social responsibility audit. These certifications demonstrate our commitment to ethical sourcing practices, ensuring fair treatment of our workforce and responsible procurement throughout our supply chain.

Our commitment to quality extends from the pristine waters of the Argentine coast to our state-of-the-art processing facilities. We employ rigorous quality control measures throughout the entire production process, ensuring that our seafood products consistently meet the highest international standards.

Veraz Group's products are renowned for their freshness, flavor, and consistency, earning us a loyal customer base world wide, being USA, Spain, Russia and Japan our most important markets. We also supply the domestic market, bringing the taste of Argentine seafood to our fellow citizens.

Our success is driven by our team of approximately 600 skilled and passionate individuals. Their expertise, commitment to quality, and unwavering work ethic are essential to our operations.

Name: Comité National Des Pêches Maritimes et des Élevages Marins (CNPMEM)
Description:
Le Comité National des Pêches Maritimes et des Élevages Marins (CNPMEM) est un organisme professionnel de droit privé chargé de missions de service public.

Regroupant l’ensemble des professions du secteur de la pêche et des élevages marins, il représente et assure la défense des intérêts généraux des pêcheurs auprès des pouvoirs publics nationaux et communautaires. Il participe à la gestion des ressources halieutiques dans le cadre d’une pêche responsable et d’un développement durable.
Ainsi, le CNPMEM est consulté sur les mesures règlementaires de gestion des ressources halieutiques (poissons, coquillages, végétaux marins) ou adopte lui-même sa propre réglementation pour encadrer certaines pêcheries. Ces décisions s’imposent alors à l’ensemble des professionnels concernés.

Name: Austral
Description:
Austral Fisheries is one of Australia’s largest integrated commercial fishing companies with interests in both deep-sea fishing and at-sea prawning.  

We are proud to be recognised for our responsible fishing practices and continuous efforts to maintain our environmentally conscious, sustainable fishing methods. All of the Commonwealth-managed fisheries we operate in are independently certified as sustainable and well managed by the Marine Stewardship Council (MSC).

In 2016, Austral also became the first seafood business in the world to be certified as carbon neutral under the Australian Government's 'Climate Active' Carbon Neutral Program.

Austral Fisheries’ deep-sea fishing activities involve the operation of 2 longline vessels, including a dual-purpose longline-trawl vessel. Each of these vessels is equipped to survive the world’s harshest weather conditions as experienced in Australia’s sub-Antarctic zones. These vessels specialise in catching Patagonian Toothfish and Mackerel Icefish.

Austral Fisheries’ prawning component involves the operation of a fleet of 11 prawn trawlers in the Northern Prawn Fishery off the coast of northern Australia catching Banana, Tiger and Endeavour Prawns.  The fishery was established in the late 1960s and is Australia’s most valuable fishery managed by the Australian Commonwealth Government.

Austral's operation out of Darwin was established in 2017 via investment in the Timor Reef Fishery. This fishery operates in the remote offshore waters of the Northern Territory. Here we are growing towards operating four trap-fishing vessels, primarily targeting Goldband Snapper, Saddletail Snapper, Red Emperor and Mixed Cod species.

Name: Magalarva
Description: Magalarva (MGV) is a purpose driven, Indonesia based insect protein producer company that bio-converts pre-consumer organic sidestreams into protein and organic fertilizer using Black Soldier Fly larvae. MGV aims to provide insect protein as a sustainable substitute for fish meal in animal feed and pet food, while also reducing organic sidestream from ending up at landfills.

Name: AKVA group Land Based A/S
Description:
Aquatec Solutions operates world-wide in supplying fish farming solutions for both salt and fresh water fish. We cover the range from turn-key fish farming systems to high quality fish farming equipment and components. In fish farming solutions we go all the way from development and design to project management and installation supervision. When in operation, Aquatec Solutions follow up with supervision and support.

Aquatec Solutions A/S is a part of AKVA Group.

Name: Cooke España
Description:
En Cooke España (antes Grupo Culmarex), somos expertos en acuicultura, con más de 30 años de experiencia en la crianza y comercialización de lubina (Dicentrarchus labrax), dorada (Sparus aurata) y corvina (Argyrosomus regius), cultivadas en el mediterráneo español.

Ello nos lleva a formar parte de uno de los grupos empresariales lideres en la producción de proteína de origen acuático a nivel internacional: Cooke Inc.

Con nuestras principales marcas de producto, Culmarex (España y Europa) y Bandera (EEUU), y nuestros productos estrella de tallas grandes, la Lubina Imperial y la Lubina Real, hacemos accesible para los consumidores el pescado fresco, de alto valor nutricional y con garantía de suministro y calidad.

Así mismo, tenemos el firme propósito de cultivar el mar con cuidado, nutrir al mundo, mantener a nuestras familias y desarrollar comunidades más fuertes. 

Estos son los pilares sobre los que se construye nuestra actividad:
•	Pertenencia a una familia más grande.
•	Respeto a las personas y a su duro trabajo.
•	Diversidad y aceptación de todas las personas.
•	Mejora de las personas y las comunidades.
•	Responsabilidad en la tierra y el mar.

¿Nuestra visión? Ser la máxima referencia a nivel nacional e internacional por la calidad de nuestros productos y la excelencia de nuestro servicio.

Recibe nuestros productos totalmente frescos, gracias a nuestra pesca bajo demanda

Name: PT Dua Putra Utama Makmur Tbk
Description: We are instinctively, Indonesia, born, raised and matured in coastal area. our journey as a company rest on the wisdom of our oceans, the fisherman and the community.

Name: Pedro Moscuzza e Hijos SA
Description:
En Moscuzza somos pioneros del sector pesquero industrial argentino. 

Desarrollamos con recursos humanos y materiales propios, la totalidad de las funciones de extracción, procesado e industrialización, como así también, la comercialización y distribución de frutos de mar, tanto frescos como congelados.

Desde Mar del Plata, principal puerto pesquero argentino, procesamos materias primas de la más alta calidad, destinadas a satisfacer las exigentes demandas de los mercados de los cinco continentes, sin dejar de lado el mercado local.
Location: Mar del Plata, Buenos Aires Province

Name: CFTO - Compagnie Française du Thon Océanique sas
Description:
THE LEADING TROPICAL TUNA FISHING COMPANY IN FRANCE

Descendants of the pioneers of French tropical fishing, CFTO operates in the Atlantic Ocean and Indian Oceans from its hubs in Abidjan (Ivory Coast) and in Port-Victoria (Seychelles).
CFTO is part of P&P Group (Parlevliet & van der Plas).

Established expertise:
With 14 purse-seiners vessels and 1 support vessel at the forefront of technology, our Company is the largest in France, with an annual production of more 70,000 T of tropical tuna, including approximately 60 % of large yellowfin tuna.

From Africa to Europe, from Asia to Latin America, canneries around the World  appreciate the high quality of our tuna, the regular delivery and the independence of our Company.

Sustainability: 
In accordance with national and European regulations, as well as recommendations from Regional Fisheries Management Organisations (ICCAT and CTOI), our crew work in complete transparency according to the principles of responsible and sustainable fishing (MSC certify), independently from processing industry.

Our main concern is the sustainability of marine resources :
-by targeting as a priority, large matured yellowfin in free-swimming schools
-by actively limiting the number of beacons and deploying only non-entangling fish aggregating devices (FADs), thus helping to reduce by-catch.
-by working together with scientists to improve understanding of tropical tuna.

Name: Kawan Perikanan Official
Description: Kawan Perikanan merupakan suatu platform yang menyediakan informasi lowongan pekerjaan bidang perikanan, kelautan, budidaya, riset, dan akuakultur. Visi kami adalah menjadi platform penyedia informasi lowongan pekerjaan yang aktual, faktual, dan profesional

Name: Invermar S.A.
Description:
INVERMAR inicia sus actividades en 1988, teniendo como primer objetivo desarrollar, producir y elaborar productos en base a salmón, los cuales estarían destinados al consumidor final. Debido a esto último, se enfoca en canales de distribución masivos tales como supermercados, restaurantes y hoteles.
En el año 2008, INVERMAR  consigue duplicar la capacidad productiva de la compañía. El hito más relevante fue la finalización de la eco piscicultura de recirculación de Lago Verde. Esta piscicultura permite controlar el entorno de desarrollo del salmón con la finalidad de asegurarnos que los peces que ingresen al mar estarán en las mejores condiciones posibles.
El 2010 la compañía lleva a cabo un aumento de capital mediante una oferta pública de colocación de 56.000.000 de acciones de pago, cuya recaudación tenía como destino el crecimiento futuro, en especial la siembra de los próximos dos años.
El año 2012, la compañía superó las 31.000 toneladas de cosecha y alcanzó una facturación consolidada histórica por sobre los US$147 millones.

Name: Fish Expo
Description: Fish Expo is coming up in 2025

Name: Sjovik Morocco
Description:
Sjovik operate an international fishing enterprise from our base in Midsund, on the North West coast close to Aalesund. We have established a worldwide sales organization through our network of companies and international partners. Besides operating our own vessels, we also perform vessel operation, vessel management for and processing of frozen fish for clients.
Sjøvik AS is operating a pelagic trawler through the subsidiary company Sjovik Morocco S.A. The vessel is called F/V "Ocean Venture". The vessel is well maintained and are known for bringing on shore first class fish products.

Name: Ocean Outcomes
Description:
Ocean Outcomes works across seafood supply chains, with governments, and alongside fishing communities to improve high-risk fisheries. We specialize in delivering context-appropriate solutions that are built to reflect real-world complexity and deliver measurable results on the water.

Through initiatives grounded in trust, science, and local context, we help partners apply globally recognized best practices—advancing environmental performance, improving labor conditions, and strengthening long-term sustainability.

For the latest: http://bit.ly/O2-News

Name: Slade Gorton & Co, Inc.
Description:
Slade Gorton is dedicated to making great seafood accessible to everyone with a mission to bring wholesome, nutritious, and sustainable seafood from around the world to America’s table. Founded in 1928, Slade Gorton is an importer and distributor of over 800 premium fresh and frozen seafood products sourced from over 25 countries and sold broadly across retail and foodservice channels throughout North America. In 2023, Slade Gorton joined the Cooke family of companies, enabling it to now offer its customers the benefits of sustainable and transparent vertical integration across 25 seafood species from 12 countries.

Call us at 1-800-225-1573 to speak with our expert sales staff to place your seafood order today!

Name: Action For Ocean
Description: ACTION FOR OCEAN Action for Ocean (AFO) is a youth-led Tanzanian non-profit dedicated to protecting marine ecosystems while strengthening the resilience of coastal communities. Founded in 2016, AFO blends science, innovation, and indigenous knowledge to restore critical habitats, promote sustainable fisheries, and expand ocean-based livelihoods. The organization has restored over 70 hectares of marine habitat, engaged 13,000+ community members, and established Marine Managed Areas through participatory governance. With flagship initiatives like the Africa Fair Seaweed Finance Facility(AFSFF) and Community-led models including Coastal Livelihood Entreprenuership for Adaptation and Resilience (CLEAR) Model and the MATUMBAWE HAI Model, AFO is shaping a future where healthy oceans support thriving communities across East Africa.

Name: Sürsan Su Ürünleri
Description:
Today, with its 42 year experience, Sürsan plays a salient role in aquaculture industry producing sea bass and sea bream that targets premium quality fish demand across Europe.

Due to its fully integrated model, Sürsan control mechanism ensures the highest standards of quality, food safety and freshness at all levels of production from fishmeal and fish oil to the fish feed that is consumed by Sürsan’s nutritious sea bass and sea bream.

In order to satisfy the need for farmed fish that is a true alternative to its wild counterpart, Sürsan has dedicated itself to quality in aquaculture industry strictly following the procedures anticipated by the company’s certifications.

Name: Atlantic Aqua Farms Ltd.
Description: Atlantic Aqua Farms is a successful and growing mussel and oyster aquaculture business primarily based in Prince Edward Island, Canada. Committed to customer service and quality products for 35 years, Atlantic Aqua Farms has established itself as North America’s number one grower and processor of the widely recognized, high quality Prince Edward Island Mussels, under the brand name Canadian Cove. The company also farms some of the finest quality oysters from Prince Edward Island, Maine, and Virginia.

Name: Rendalli
Description:
Rendalli LTD is a leading aquaculture company in Africa specializing in Tilapia cage farming on the pristine waters of Lake Victoria. We are committed to delivering premium quality fresh tilapia across East Africa ,including Uganda ,Kenya and Rwanda. 
With a focus on sustainability and responsible aquaculture ,we control the entire value chain - from farming to retail ensuring that our customers receive the freshest most nutritious fish directly from Lake To Plate.
In addition to providing whole fresh tilapia ,we are proud to offer value-added tilapia products ,such as premium tilapia fillets, processed to meet the highest standards.
Our advanced facilities in Kenya enable us to handle fillet production ,ensuring our products retain their quality, taste and nutritional value. 
As one of the most trusted Tilapia companies in Africa, we are dedicated to growing the continent's aquaculture sector while meeting the rising demand for sustainable fish protein.
Whether you are a consumer looking for fresh tilapia or a business seeking reliable suppliers of fresh tilapia and tilapia products ,we are your go to partner in the East Africa Region.
Partner with us and experience the difference in quality ,sustainability and responsible fish farming.
Better Fish ,Better Lives -that's our promise
Kenya
Uganda
Drc Congo
Rwanda

Name: PROEXPO, Procesadora y Exportadora de Mariscos S.A.
Description:
We export more than 20,000 tons of Ecuadorian shrimp of the highest quality in America, Europe and Asia.

With more than 30 years of experience and deep knowledge, we guarantee quality and safety to millions of families around the world.

Name: Tri Marine Group
Description:
Tri Marine has been in the fish business since 1972, building a wealth of knowledge, relationships and experience. Our team of dedicated industry experts combined with strategically located sources of supply and offices worldwide provide customers with both diversified and optimized supply chain solutions. We do this with integrity and respect for the resources and our employees for long-term success.

For inquiries about career opportunities, please email your CV to the following:

For all positions:  CorpHR@trimarinegroup.com

Name: AQ1 Systems
Description:
We are innovators who collaborate to continuously improve the performance and sustainability of pond-based aquaculture through technology. We specialize in sonic and optical solutions, providing feeding control and biomass estimation solutions for shrimp and fish farmers, government agencies, and researchers across 44 countries. For over 30 years we have been committed to developing innovative and robust technology that drives farm productivity and profitability. Our technologies are proven at scale and have become industry standards around the world. 

The Sonic Feeding System, developed by AQ1, is the world’s first sensor-based feeding system for shrimp aquaculture. This system has become an industry standard, used by farmers to feed more than 700,000 tonnes of shrimp annually. It is a complete ecosystem of industry-leading technology solutions, consisting of hardware (smart hydrophone, smart feeder, environmental sensors, sonic feeding and aeration controllers) and software (Analytics - a powerful platform offering shrimp feed management with real-time data, AI-driven decisions, and comprehensive insights for optimised efficiency and production). The system constantly monitors shrimp feeding activity, allowing the Sonic Feeding Algorithm to make real-time feeding decisions for the pond. Our solutions focus on feeding the animal, not the pond, ensuring that every bit of feed is utilised efficiently. 

The AM100, developed by AQ1, is an innovative optical solution for faster, AI-powered underwater measurements, designed to maximise efficiency. This system enables non-invasive, rapid, and accurate measurement and counting of fish. Enhanced with AI, the AM100 delivers precise results swiftly. The system uses a marine-grade stereoscopic camera in an underwater housing, linked to a ruggedized laptop, for footage analysis with AQ1 Analyser software to perform single or multiple point-to-point measurements for direct comparison or modeling mass/surface area.

Name: Kona Bay Shrimp
Description: Kona Bay is a leading shrimp genetics company, based in Kauai, Hawaii. We breed and supply specific-pathogen-free shrimp broodstock, that yield high performance in the hatchery and farm. They are selected for fast growth, strong resistance to multiple pathogens, high nauplii production, and efficient feed utilization.

Name: ABC Salmonicultura Chilena
Description: Buscamos informar sobre el clúster del salmón a través de sus actividades vinculadas en los ámbitos social, ambiental, económico, innovación y tecnología.

Name: Noordzee Su Ürünleri A.Ş.
Description:
Noordzee Su Ürünleri A.Ş.  çipura ve levrek üretiminde Türkiye’nin öncü kuruluşları arasında yer almaktadır.

Ege ve Akdeniz’in sağlıklı sularında bulunan, % 100’ü açık deniz (off shore) balık çiftlikleri, Türkiye’nin ilkleri arasında yer alan işleme ve paketleme tesisi, ekstruder teknolojisi ile üretim yapan modern yem fabrikası ve Hollanda merkezli ACV B.V yurt dışı satış ve pazarlama firması ile Noordzee, dünya standartlarında üretim ve hizmet gerçekleştirmektedir.

Yıllık 8.000 tona ulaşan üretim kapasitesi, son teknolojiye sahip tesisleri, modern hizmet anlayışı ve profesyonel kadrosu ile Noordzee, Ege Denizi’nin tadına doyulmaz lezzetlerini Avrupa başta olmak üzere dünyanın birçok ülkesine ihraç etmektedir.

Name: UniSea, Inc.
Description:
UniSea produces an impressive variety of finished seafood products that are distributed throughout the world. Our parent company, Nissui, headquartered in Japan, claims UniSea among its largest subsidiaries.

UniSea operates state-of-the-art processing facilities in Dutch Harbor, Alaska, where pollock for surimi and our ever-popular fillet blocks are produced. UniSea also processes snow crab, king crab, cod, halibut, yellowfin sole and herring.

UniSea’s hospitality operations consist of the Grand Aleutian Hotel and the Harbor View Inn, along with a variety of food and beverage outlets in Dutch Harbor.

UniSea’s cold storage operation in Redmond, Washington provides convenient, cost-effective cold storage for company products as well as commercial cold storage for a variety of goods. The facility provides UniSea the ability to reprocess frozen seafood products per customer specifications.

Name: Seafood Buyer
Description: Seafood Buyer, Seafood Buyer Mandate and Seafood Consultant professional services.

Name: CatchCam Technologies
Description:
Underwater monitoring solutions for commercial fishing and marine research.

At CatchCam Technologies, we engineer durable camera systems and advanced sensors for reliable data collection in harsh underwater environments.
Visit www.catchcam.tech

COLLABORATIVE SOLUTIONS FOR MARINE DATA CHALLENGES
We believe in solving problems through collaboration. Whether you’re a commercial operator, scientist, or conservationist, we work closely with you to understand your unique challenges and develop tailored solutions.

Name: PRODUMAR - EXPORTADORA DE PRODUTOS DO MAR
Description: A PRODUMAR, localizada em Natal/RN e fundada em 1970 , tem como foco principal a exportação de pescados para mais de 11 países em 5 continentes e a importação insumos de diversos países, além da venda em atacado no mercado nacional e uma loja para atender o varejo local.

Name: Sincere Aqua
Description:
At Sincere Aqua, we specialize in providing shrimp farmers with complete biomass insights. Our goal is to empower shrimp farmers with the data and insights they need to improve their yields, increase efficiency, and reduce costs. With our solution, farmers can make informed decisions that lead to more sustainable and profitable shrimp farming operations.

Our innovative products are designed to be easy to install and require minimal maintenance, utilizing technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Computer Vision, and Machine Learning. The solution is specifically engineered to gather data on the biomass, from nursery until harvest, allowing for 24/7 monitoring throughout the entire grow-out cycle. This provides invaluable real-time data, enabling farmers to receive early warnings, accurate survival rates, and the optimal time for harvest. Join us in optimizing the aquaculture industry through precision farming and data-driven decision making

Name: GUAYATUNA S.A
Description: Proveemos un atún de calidad al consumidor. Nuestros barcos pescan atún listado, atún de aleta amarilla y atún patudo, en los océanos Atlántico, Índico y Pacífico.

Name: Mar & Rio Pescados
Description: Fundada em 2003, a Mar & Rio enxergou na crescente demanda mundial, a oportunidade de se tornar uma empresa importadora e distribuidora rio-pretense de alcance global. Por isso, todo mês, importa de diversos países uma grande variedade de produtos e, de São José do Rio Preto, distribui para todo o Brasil.
Location: São José do Rio Preto, SP

Name: Fish Farm Forum
Description: Fish Farm Forum is an independent website delivering news, insights and analysis to support sustainable aquaculture. Covering topics ranging from health, welfare and feed to equipment, technology and infrastructure, Fish Farm Forum seeks to highlight both the opportunities and the challenges facing the world’s fastest-growing food production sector.

Name: Taprobane Seafoods (Pvt) Ltd
Description:
Taprobane Seafood is a leading seafood company in Sri Lanka. Established in 2010, the company has 15 processing facilities, employing over 2500 direct employees throughout the North-Western and Northern Provinces. Taprobane Seafood Group, one of Sri Lanka’s most significant and pioneering raw, processed and value-added seafood exports, began its success story with the committed and visionary leadership of Timothy O’Reilly and Dilan Fernando. 

Our uniqueness stems from the fact that all our employees who work in the processing plants in the North are women, some war widows, all of them realizing that they are the breadwinners for their families. Our employees in the North, from the security guard to the manager to the supervisor and the employee, are all women. Women who are passionate about their job and take pride in a job well done every day.

Name: Moana New Zealand
Description:
Moana New Zealand is 100% Iwi owned; we are true guardians of the world’s most pristine and sustainably managed fisheries.

As guardians of Maori fishing assets, we are dedicated to contributing to the wellbeing of future generations and have a deep sense of responsibility to our people and respect for kaimoana.

We connect the world to the true taste and rare magic of New Zealand’s best kaimoana.

Name: Petuna Aquaculture
Description: Petuna Aquaculture farms Petuna Ocean Trout and Atlantic salmon, in the pristine waters of Tasmania, for consumers across Australia and the world.

Name: Coast Seafood AS
Description:
Coast exports Norwegian seafood to the world. We are a seafood company that challenges its surroundings 360 degrees in order to create value all the way from the producers of raw materials to the consumers.

Changes in the seafood industry and its markets happen quickly. Sustainable value creation is dependent on the expertise and flexibility of those who are in the middle, between the producer and the global market.  Coast is in the middle.
Our employees are knowledgeable, and have their feet firmly planted on the ground. Coast exports 100 000 tonnes of seafood per year to 80 markets. We have 400 customers globally, and are continuously building new markets for Norwegian seafood. Coast has its head office in Måløy on the Norwegian west coast. The company was founded in 1994.

Name: Aqua-Farms Organization - AFO
Description: Aqua-Farms Organization promotes environmentally friendly and economically competitive aquaculture, conserving the aquatic environment and fisheries stock enhancement, supporting research on sustainable exploitation of aquatic resources and aquaculture, improving lacustrine and coastal community health communities, and empowering the youth and women in the utilization of aquatic resources and aquaculture to Tanzania mainland.

Name: CTLE Seafood, Inc.
Description:
CTLE Seafood, Inc., is a Canadian company established in 2005,  however, seafood business goes back several decades from early 1970’s which included processing, fishing and trading with operations ranging from Central America to South Asia. 

Today CTLE Seafood, Inc. is a full time frozen seafood trading company which has established partners in Iceland and Western Canada, close cooperations in Norway, North and South America, China and our own representatives in South Asia.  This provides us the ability to supply a wide selection of frozen seafood products to our customers in Asia, Europe and North America only through our own trusted partners.

如需中文服务，请通过以下方式联系：邮箱：sarah.sun@ctle-seafood.com，手机： +1-647-806-1382， 或微信：sunying8028。

Name: ABALOBI
Description:
Earthshot Prize Finalist 2023 | Zayed Sustainability Prize Finalist 2025 | WEF-UpLink Top Innovator

ABALOBI – meaning fisher in the isiXhosa language – is a South African-based organisation with global reach. Through our world-first fisheries improvement technologies and programmes, we strive to poise small-scale fisheries for ecological, economic and social sustainability. Our intent is to develop thriving, equitable, resilient and sustainable small-scale fishing communities through the application of data and Technology For Good within fisheries rebuilding and social entrepreneurship frameworks. We are a fisher-led enabler, development intermediary and accelerator.

Name: Docapesca - Portos e Lotas, S.A.
Description:
A Docapesca é a empresa do Setor Empresarial do Estado que tem a seu cargo o serviço público da 1ª Venda de Pescado em lota e o apoio ao Setor da Pesca em Portugal continental.

Sediada em Lisboa, gere todos os portos de pesca do território continental português, desde Vila Praia de Âncora até Vila Real de Santo António. Está estruturada em Direções, que compreendem 23 lotas e 36 postos, sendo estes de menor dimensão inseridas em pequenas comunidades piscatórias.

Name: Azerbaijan Fish Farm
Description:
“Azerbaijan Fish Farm” MMC Azərbaycanın balıq sənayesinin ən böyük sərmayəçisidir. Onun layihələri ölkəmizin balıqçılıq irsinin dirçəldilməsinə və yeni təsərüfatların yaradılmasına yönəldilib. Biz Azərbaycan ərazisində nərə balığının növlərinin, forelin yetişdirilməsi, eləcə də, nərə balığı kürüsü istehsalı üçün müasir texnologiyalarda bir yenilikçisiyik. Bütün məhsullar ətraf mühitə qayğı və beynəlxalq keyfiyyət standartlarına uyğun istehsal olunur. Şirkət aşağdaki genişmiqyaslı istehsal layihələrini özündə ehtiva edir:
Neftçala rayonunun Yenikənd qəsəbəsində nərəkimilərin yetişdirilməsi ferması və Xəzər sahilində bu müəssisəyə inteqrasiya olunmuş istehsal təsərrüfatı. Məhz burada Bankə qəsəbəsində 1954-cü ildə Azərbaycanda ilk təcrübi nərə balığı yetişdirmə zavodu tikilib. Şirkət ən son müasir texnologiyadan istifadə edərək bu zavodu təkmilləşdirib və modernləşdirib
Zaqatala, Qəbələ və Mingəçevir rayonlarında forel və Xəzər qızılbalığı yetişdirilməsi üzrə yetişdirmə təsərrüfatları 
Nərə balığı, sevruga və ağ balıq kimi balıq növlərindən “BakuCaviar” brendi adı altında qara kürü istehsalı və satışı. Bu brend ölkəmizə beynəlxalq aləmdə qara kürünün vətəni şöhrətini qaytarmışdır. BakuCaviarBoutique-ən yaxşı kürü və balıq delikateslərinin satışı
“XəzərinSahilində” brendi adı altında balıq məhsullarının istehsalı və satışı;
Şirkətin əsas prioriteti Xəzər dənizinin qiymətli balıq növlərinin populyasiyasının qorunub saxlanılması və bərpasıdır. Şirkət Azərbaycan iqtisadiyyatının balıqçılıq seqmentində balıq istehsalı və emalı sahəsində yeni beynəlxalq standartlar tətbiq edərək, yüksək keyfiyyətli geniş çeşiddə və hər kəs üçün əlçatan məhsul istehsal edərək ölkəmiz üçün bu vacib sənayenin inkişafını sürətləndirməkdədir. 
Yuxarıda qeyd edilənlərin hamısı həmçinin yüksək keyfiyyətli və qüsursuz xidmət, hər zaman təzə balıq, zərif qara kürü və müstəsna qastronomiyanın etibarlı tədarükçüsü olan #AzerbaijanFishFarm Azərbaycanda öz sahəsinin ən yaxşısı olduğunu daim təsdiqləyir.

Description: Azərbaycanda yerli balıq istehsalçısı, tədarükçüsü və balıq sənayesinin ən böyük sərmayəçisidir.

Name: Dutch Aquaculture Experts
Description:
The DAE (Dutch Aquaculture Experts) is a partnership between the most qualified and sophisticated aquaculture companies and research institutes in the Netherlands. The DAE can tackle international and multidisciplinary projects, from feasibility studies to complete project management, from farm design to realization.
Through this unique knowledge and business platform, all aquaculture enterprises can make use of Dutch expertise in all disciplines of the aquaculture chain. A “one-stop-shop” for the international aquaculture sector.

Name: Mainstream Aquaculture Group
Description:
MainStream was founded in 2001 with a vision to build a “business for the future” by becoming the world’s leading provider of recirculating aquaculture seafood products. Over two decades of innovation, MainStream Aquaculture has developed proprietary technology that has enabled its growth. MainStream has become one of the largest Barramundi producers and suppliers in the world and has developed a vision to become the world’s leading supplier of premium white fish.

MainStream Aquaculture operates the world’s largest aquaculture system of its type in Melbourne, Australia, as well as multiple award-winning pond farms in Far North Queensland.

MainStream’s production facilities are supported by an advanced selective breeding program conducted in the world’s largest Barramundi hatchery in Melbourne, Australia, along with its research centres in Townsville, Australia. This program underpins MainStream’s farm operations through the supply of high quality juvenile Barramundi that demonstrate rapid growth, low growth variance, high fillet yield and disease resistance.

MainStream’s vertically integrated business supplies premium table fish into the Australian and USA markets and exports seed stock from its breeding program into 25 countries across 5 continents.

Description: Fedeacua es una organización gremial de orden nacional que representa a los productores de semilla, engorde, cadena de custodia, planta de proceso y comercialización de la Piscicultura Continental en Colombia. Description:
Especialistas en Oxigeno. Distribución de O2, arriendo de equipos criogénicos. Venta y arriendo de plantas generadoras de O2, para uso en tierra y en el mar.

Name: FALFISH LIMITED
Description: Falfish Ltd is a Cornish family business established in 1979. A leading supplier of Chilled and Frozen Fish and Shellfish.

Name: Fremantle Octopus Group
Description:
Fremantle Octopus is Australia’s leading Octopus fishing, processing, distribution and export company.

We produce the highest-quality Octopus in the world, which can only be sourced in the clear pristine waters off the Western Australia coastline.

Established in 2000, Fremantle Octopus has grown stronger with each passing season. We have built an environment that never rests – always challenging, evolving and innovating to continually exceed expectations.

Fremantle Octopus adheres to the highest sustainability standards and achieved MSC (Marine Stewardship Council) accreditation in 2019. 

Our iconic product has gone on to grace the plates of millions of people, including some of the most renowned restaurants in Australia and around the world.

Enriching the lives of those who appreciate quality.

Name: Jaime Soriano S.A
Description:
Jaime Soriano, S. A., a whole group of enterprises fully devoted to fishery, purchase, manufacturing and sale of fish and seafood. 

The enterprises belonging to the group operate in a hundred of ports all over the world with Offices in Spain, Scotland, Honduras and England.
