Name: Lestena - wholesale trade of frozen fish
Description:
”JSC Lestena“ specializes in import and wholesale trade in frozen fish.

Fish is imported from Argentina, Chile, Ecuador, New Zealand, Norway, Iceland, Portugal and other European countries.

We are working with reliable partners, so we can always guarantee the delivery of high-quality fish, good prices and fast delivery because for us the most important thing is customer satisfaction.

Name: ONG Pesca Sustentable
Description: Pesca Sustentable es una ONG que nace con el fin de promover mejoras continuas en la pesca para lograr una actividad ecológicamente sostenible, socialmente aceptable y económicamente viable. Su objetivo es fortalecer el manejo pesquero basada en ciencia y contribuir al desarrollo del consumo responsable.

Name: NUSATUNA (PT. Berkat Kelautan Nusantara)
Description:
PT Berkat Kelautan Nusantara was founded in January of 2023. BKN is managed by a group of industry veterans and talented newcomers from different industries who share the same vision. Our vision is to produce sustainable, carbon-neutral, superior quality Indonesian handline tuna, and finished goods such as steak and saku for export to the US and other world markets. 

Our Mission is to be the leader in Indonesia in new and innovative approaches to the seafood supply chain. We focus on reducing climate change by reducing carbon emissions in the seafood supply chain as our livelihood and millions of fishermen depend on healthy oceans.

We will work towards carbon neutrality in the seafood supply chain emphasizing systems to reduce CO emissions in both fishing and processing operations and, utilizing solar energy and small-scale electric fishing vessels. Although this will be costly in the short term, our goal is ‘to be the change we wish to see in our world’ and enable the development of sustainable carbon-neutral fisheries and create long-term profitable change.

Name: Alvarez & Alvarez
Description:
Somos una planta de procesadora de salmones de 5.500 mts.2 ubicada en la ciudad de Puerto Natales, región de Magallanes, 100% comprometida con el crecimiento de tu empresa.

Nos caracterizamos por nuestra alma joven, innovadora y el afán por la tecnología, la cual utilizamos para tener procesos controlados y eficientes en toda la línea productiva garantizando un producto final de alta calidad y con mayor vida útil.

Nuestra Visión: 

Es ser un procesador líder de la industria salmonera en Chile y ser valorado por nuestros clientes tanto por los indicadores de eficiencia que alcanzamos, gracias a las constantes innovaciones y tecnología que integramos en los procesos, como por la calidad, trazabilidad e inocuidad de los productos resultantes.

Nuestra misión: 

Es desarrollar y ofrecer una proteína saludable, de alta calidad desde una amplia, moderna y automatizada infraestructura con procesos controlados y tecnológicos que alcanzan la máxima eficiencia y mediante profesionales experimentados y capacitados para adaptarse con flexibilidad a tus requerimientos e innovando continuamente para generarte valor agregado. 

Nuestro propósito:

Es ser tu socio estratégico y contribuir al crecimiento y excelencia de tu empresa, a través de nuestro servicio moderno y automatizado de procesamiento de salmones, garantizándote así un producto de la más alta calidad e inocuidad.

Name: fair-fish (english)
Description:
The aim of the fair-fish international association is to contribute to the international breakthrough of animal welfare for fish, in particular food fish. At the same time it takes the criteria of sustainability and fair trade into account.
The association is the holder of the fair-fish name and brand. It defines the guidelines that authorise the use of the fair-fish label.
The association provides information to the public and cooperates with interested experts, marketers and organisations with related objectives.
The association pursues neither profit-making nor self-help purposes.
The association’s tasks are
• Developing guidelines for fishing and fish-farming
• Conclusion of license agreements
• Assignment of certification and control agencies
• Proclamation and protection of the fair-fish name and brand within the scope
of the means available
• Laying the groundwork, in terms of content, for the activity of fair-fish
associations in the context of defined projects, and relieving these associations by taking on individual tasks within the scope of the means available.

Name: DanFish International | 07-09 October 2025 | Aalborg, Denmark
Description:
Welcome to the official LinkedIn Page of DanFish International

Name: Blumar USA
Description:
Blumar is one of Chile’s largest seafood producers and is has earned a reputation for consistently supplying high quality products and developing strong partnerships.  

Blumar is recognized as a leader in developing Sustainable Salmon aquaculture  in Chile and one of only two GAA BAP 4 Star producers and with ASC Certified farms also in development.  

A truly vertically integrated company, Blumar maintains ownership of their salmon production from egg to thier customer’s dock doors. Other assets include majority ownership of Chile’s largest mussel producer and a fleet of modern purse seiners that harvest Chile’s abundant pelagic resources for fish meal and fish oil production. 

With offices on four continents, Blumar provides direct support to customers worldwide.

Name: Akvatek Aquaculture
Description: Raised in deep water, off-shore cages in Turkey. The cold water, superior feed, and artisan farming techniques, yield perfect gastronomic characteristics, the ultimate dining experience.

Name: Blue Star Foods
Description: Blue Star Foods produces and sells premium quality and responsibly sourced crab meat. We proudly work to improve oceans and fishing communities. Learn more at www.bluestarfoods.com

Name: Parlevliet & Van der Plas
Description: PP Groep is een succesvolle familieonderneming met ruim 10.000 medewerkers. Het bedrijf, met een hoofdkantoor in de gemeente Katwijk (Zuid-Holland), is de laatste jaren sterk gegroeid. Samen met onze dochterondernemingen zijn we nu het grootste visverwerkende bedrijf van West-Europa en we behoren wereldwijd tot de top-25. Het motto van PP Groep luidt: het kapitaal laten we in zee, maar onze klanten mogen genieten van de rente.

Name: Grupo Jogá
Description: Grupo Jogá é uma empresa atuante no mercado brasileiro há 20 anos com 4 marcas próprias (Saint / Jogá / Crown / Voxxi) no segmento de pesca e lazer e 4 marcas no mercado do ciclismo, sendo 2 delas marcas próprias (Vultro / Voxxi) e 2 com representação e distribuição no Brasil (Xplova / Navihood).

Name: Pine Island Redfish
Description:
After closure of the commercial fishery, redfish became one of the most prized recreational catches, a delicacy only available to those who go out to catch it themselves. Considered one of the “Big Three” sportfish in Florida, the “Fishing Capital of the World”, saltwater sportfishing is a $9.2 billion industry supporting over 88,000 jobs. Preservation of the wild fish has paid off environmentally AND economically.

Pairing a well understood biological culture process with Recirculating Aquaculture Systems (RAS) technology, we can have the best of both worlds. Our goal is to bring highly prized fish back to the menu with no compromise of wild stock.

Name: Low Impact Fishers of Europe - LIFE
Description:
The Low Impact Fishers of Europe is an umbrella organisation run by fishers for fishers.

The aim of LIFE is to provide a clear and coherent voice at EU level for the previously mainly silent majority of European fishers who are smaller scale and who use low impact fishing gears and methods but have historically lacked dedicated and effective representation in Brussels and at Member State level.

Name: Presteve Foods Ltd.
Description:
Presteve Foods Limited is a fish processing and distribution plant located in Wheatley, Ontario. Presteve Foods prides itself in the distribution of a large variety of fish, fresh or frozen. Our plant is located right off of the Wheatley Harbour, where our fish is caught daily and processed immediately, from Lake Erie. Presteve Foods also supplies fish from ALL the Great Lakes. Our markets include Canada, the United States, and Europe.

We also have a retail store, located on site. We sell fresh and frozen fish along with seafood. Stop in today!

Name: SeaFlower Group Of Companies
Description:
National Fishing Corporation of Namibia (FISHCOR) was established on the 27th of December 1991 in terms of the National Fishing Corporation of Namibia Act, 1991 (act 28 of 1991) of the National Assembly which paved the way for the establishment of strategic partnerships.

Seaflower Lobster Corporation Limited (SLC) became a wholly owned subsidiary of the National Fishing Corporation of Namibia Limited on the 7th of April 1993. The company owns and operates a processing facility as well as Six (6) lobster vessels in Luderitz. Lobster Products are packed and marketed through the NAMROCK brand which is 66% owned by SLC.

In 1994, FISHCOR entered into a Joint Venture Agreement with Nordic Partners, which resulted in the establishment of Seaflower Whitefish Corporation Limited (SWC) that owns and operates a wet fish processing facility in Luderitz. In addition to wet fish, SWC is also allocated a hake freezer quota.

SEACOPE was established in 2004 to jointly manage and utilize the Hake freezer which operates the marine trawler Pemba Bay.

Name: United States Seafoods
Description:
United States Seafoods is a leading producer in Alaska’s multispecies groundfish fisheries.  The company owns a fleet of two factory trawlers and four trawl catcher vessels, including the largest head and gut factory trawler in the United States.  
This year we are currently fishing the following vessels: F/T Seafreeze America, F/T Seafreeze Alaska, C/V Alaska Endeavor, C/V Alaska Knight, C/V Alaska Provider, and C/V Alaska Chieftain.  US Seafoods fishes in the Bering Sea, Aleutian Islands, and Gulf of Alaska for flatfish, rockfish, Pacific cod, and Atka mackerel under a number of management programs including the Amendment 80 and Gulf of Alaska rockfish catch share programs, license limitation program, and the Community Development Quota (CDQ) program. The company’s breadth of operations in Alaska fisheries is unique. 

US Seafoods employs approximately 350 people on an annual basis, including Wheelhouse crew, deck crew, engineering staff, factory management, galley, fish processors, office management and administrative personnel.    Our vessels operate in Alaska approximately 10 months a year.  They return to Seattle each year for a 2 month shipyard period for regular repairs and maintenance.

United States Seafoods has a significant presence in the Seattle maritime community through its recent acquisition of the NOAA Eastlake facility with almost one-half mile of pier face for moorage of large vessels. USS operations also extend to marine services, as it has taken a leading role in the groundfish surveys of the North Pacific, including the groundfish surveys for the Eastern Bering Sea shelf, Gulf of Alaska, Aleutian Islands, and Chukchi Sea.

Name: Machlibazaar.com
Description: Machlibazaar.com delivers same day caught fish at your doorstep in Mumbai, Navi Mumbai and Thane. We have many Cloud Outlets located all around the Mumbai Metropolitan Region and we deliver in Mumbai, Navi Mumbai and Thane. We take orders online/offline. You can reach out to us at +91 7666959081 for placing your orders.

Name: tambakudang.com
Description:
Potensi dunia perikanan di Indonesia cukup besar dan menjanjikan. Indonesia dikenal sebagai negara kepulauan terbesar di dunia, dengan luas laut sekitar 5,8 juta km2 dan memiliki panjang garis pantai lebih dari 81.000 km, Indonesia memiliki sumber daya hayati yang berlimpah. Sayangnya potensi tersebut belum dapat dimanfaatkan secara maksimal.

Pada 5 tahun terakhir ini, salah satu potensi budidaya perikanan yang berkembang dengan pesat adalah budidaya tambak udang. Pada periode 2012-2015 terdapat peningkatan sebesar 12,35% per tahunnya. Bahkan Indonesia menjadi negara pengekspor udang terbesar mengalahkan India dan Vietnam. Namun pada akhir tahun 2016, tercatat bahwa ekspor udang Indonesia ke negara Amerika Serikat dan Jepang hanya mengalami peningkatan sedikit dibandingkan dengan tahun sebelumnya. Kondisi ini disebabkan ditutupnya sejumlah tambak di daerah sentra tambak udang yang sebagiann besar disebabkan terserang penyakit udang, terutama White Feces Disease (WFD).

Evaluasi terhadap teknis budidaya, ketersediaan informasi dan data mengenai penyakit, serta manajemennya diperlukan oleh para penambak untuk meningkatkan produksi. Website tambakudang.com hadir memberikan informasi terkini mengenai manajemen budidaya, manajemen kesehatan dan penyakit serta beragam informasi yang diperlukan oleh petambak Indonesia.

Name: SEALAND SEAFROZEN FISH EXPORT CO.BANGLADESH
Description: We are exporting mainly seafood like sardine, Catfish, Yellow Tail, Gray Mullet, Loligo, Squid, Cuttlefish , Shrimp, to Asia and Europe as well as USA MARKET

Name: ESEAFOOD EXPORTS

Name: Aquaknowledge Chile
Description:
Somos una organización orientada a abordar y resolver aspectos productivos y ambientales en el campo del recurso agua. Las demandas productivas, sociales y ambientales, a nivel local y global, hacen que este recurso sea cada vez más escaso y valioso.

En este contexto, Aquaknowledge, sustentada en su conocimiento y experiencia, es una organización que está enfocada al desarrollo y obtención de mejoras en procesos productivos por la vía de la racionalización y optimización del uso de este recurso. Sin embargo, el aporte a la creación de valor (en el amplio sentido del concepto), en las organizaciones modernas, no solo se circunscribe a la mejora de procesos productivos, sino también a su capacidad de realizar una gestión del recurso agua, tal que bajo una condición y/o carga sin efectos adversos sobre el ambiente y el hombre se establezca sustentabilidad.

Consecuentemente nuestro equipo está conformado por profesionales del área científica, Biológicas y Naturales y Ciencias Políticas.

En este marco Aquaknowledge, ejecuta sus servicios adaptándose a las necesidades de la organización demandante, o proyecto, abordando los problemas bajo una mirada global o específica e incorporando optimización de procesos y/o levantamiento y caracterización de condición actual para activar planes de acción. En nuestros estudios consideramos aspectos productivo-ambientales como también de recurso humano.

Nuestros servicios no solo se enfocan en iniciativas actuales o nuevas, sino también en procesos y estados de condición que requieren de mitigación dadas actividades históricas de origen social y/o productiva.

El análisis de antecedentes históricos, además de la aplicación de tecnología y métodos de análisis ad hoc, entre otros, son herramienta fundamental para la ejecución de las actividades abordadas por nuestra organización.

La experiencia y conocimiento de Aquaknowledge nace como resultados de necesidades de la industria acuícola para optimizar sus procesos productivos.

The company owes its position as one of the world leaders in its field to having a strong long-standing research base in the areas of: commercial hatchery technology, biological and physiological aspects of embryo, larval and juvenile development, and its complete understanding of all aspects of the sea cucumber production chain.

“SCC” with its competent experts for Biological economies, has implemented a long score of complex projects, in Asia and Middle East and in the process of implementing projects in Europe. Our team have the passion to innovate hatchery technology through research and development programs, that enabled us to understand the whole process. Our geopolitical professional network with multi-seas exposure allows us to reflect upon our clientele the best of hard-bred peripheral experiences, values and knowledge. Our organized specialists are passionately capable of assuring tailored solutions aimed primarily at giving clientele a competitive edge sustainably over other consulting school of thoughts and or competitive peers.

Consistency is our key, which is achieved by right genetics from the egg and fertilisation through to the farm gate and then plate to exceed the experience the consumer is seeking. We calculate breeding values to design breeding plans and develop all 'Standard Operating Procedures' (SOP's) to control all the environmental and biological variables.

Description:
Hudson Valley Fisheries (HVF), a 160,000 square foot indoor aquaculture facility in Hudson, New York, uses the latest recirculating aquaculture system (RAS) technology to raise nutrient-rich steelhead trout. With complete egg to plate transparency, the facility serves customers in the Northeast, offering delivery of head-on, gutted and filleted steelhead along with artisanal cold- and hot-smoked varieties. Steelhead is a species of salmonid native to cold-water tributaries in the Pacific.

Name: IMCOPESC Comércio e Importação de Pescados Ltda.
Description:
A IMCOPESC Comércio e Importação de Pescados Ltda. está presente a trinta anos no mercado, somos uma das principais empresas importadoras e distribuidoras de peixes e frutos do mar do país. 

A empresa iniciou suas atividades captando pescados frescos na região sul do país e fornecendo para grandes distribuidores, supermercados e feirantes. 

A IMCOPESC optou por uma estratégia de crescimento gradativo e ampliou a sua área de atuação, passando a comercializar também congelados, pescados, crustáceos e moluscos. 

Nossa política de qualidade envolve o excelente cuidado em uma avaliação precisa e confiável dos produtos adquiridos, seja congelados ou frescos, passando por todas as etapas de pesca, manejo, transporte e logística. Temos uma equipe comprometida sempre com o objetivo de assegurar que o produto chegue ao consumidor com total eficiência e qualidade. 

Especialização é uma palavra-chave para a IMCOPESC. A empresa atua também na área de importação, somente no segmento de pesca. Desta forma, nossos clientes sabem que podem confiar em ter acesso aos melhores produtos, no prazo contratado e com a qualidade que só a IMCOPESC pode garantir.
Missão: Comercializar e distribuir peixes e frutos do mar do país com total eficiência e qualidade oferecendo garantia, respeito e credibilidade a nossos clientes, parceiros e colaboradores. 

Visão: Ser a melhor empresa distribuidora de peixes e pescados, referência no mercado em que atua. 

Valores: 
Satisfação do cliente
Qualidade e eficiência
Valorização e respeito às pessoas
Responsabilidade e respeito ao meio ambiente

Name: Seafood Partners - Norway
Description:
E-mail: sales@seafoodpartners.no

Seafood Partners AS is an independent, family owned seafood business in Norway operating since the 1990s.

We work with fishermen and shipowners of more than 60 Norwegian Trawlers and Long Liners that supply us Frozen at Sea raw material products. We receive new catch at 15 cold store terminals in Norway daily and arrange logistics by truck and reefers to 25 countries. We trade more than 4 000 tons of sea frozen goods to customers in Europe, North America and Asia every year. All our suppliers are vetted and the goods we export are quality assured.

We combine decades of experience in seafood and trading with an ambition to every day delivery our customers the best service in terms of reliability, quality and price.

Name: Flying Sharks
Description:
Established in 2006 Flying Sharks has been flying live marine animals to public aquaria all over the World, from Japan to the USA, Turkey to Dubai, Germany to Spain, and many other locations. We mostly focus on large aircraft transports but we also regularly supply ornamental fish, and invertebrates, in smaller shipments.

All animals are collected by our staff, often in cooperation with commercial fishermen, none of them using environmentally destructive techniques, such as trawling, drift gill-netting or chemicals of any sort. The vast majority of animals are hand collected individually, while some swim passively into traps or get caught by barbless, easily removable, hooks.

Flying Sharks is also proud to boast a predominantly scientific team and fervourously supports research conducted both inhouse or by our "Flying Sharks Research Fund" recipients. All our results (both the good and the not-so-good) are published on peer reviewed journals (check them out in the “Literature” section on our website) and disseminated in scientific meetings all over the Globe.

Feel free to get to know us better by touring our "Missions"  and don't miss our "Research Fund" area also.

Name: Hidee Aquaculture
Description:
Over the past 25-years, we have been steadily developing our experience within the marine industry. Today, we are an established one-stop industrial supply chain operations of fishing breeding grounds, effective aquatic processing and global sales.

Our main products include sea bass, gold pomfret, yellow croaker, seasoning packets, crayfish, and other marine products. Our products are HACCP certified for food safety and quality, and has also passed the EU’s BRC, ACC and U.S. FDA, among other certifications. Our fishery, which covers an area of more than 3,000 acres, is certified by the international BAP certification. This makes it one of the world’s best aquaculture practices, and has an annual output of more than 20,000 tons. Live fish, frozen seafood, cooked food and other products are exported to more than 50 countries worldwide. 

 We have established meaningful partnerships across a diverse range of companies. We directly supply to Walmart, Sam’s Club supermarkets, American Home Storage, Carrefour, and other supermarkets. Also, we have close collaborations with Air China and Hong Kong’s Cathay Pacific. We also serve F&B partners such as Haidilao and Guangzhou Restaurant, while having direct stores and distributors in many cities and regions. Our company has established proprietary cold storage units in Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Malaysia and the United States, which enables us to create the full “Fishery to Table” supply chain traceability.

Name: Kumbatia Seafood
Description:
Proudly partnered with Simple Life Processing & Services Ltd.

Kumbatia offers East Africa’s finest artisanally-sourced seafood. Sushi-grade, sustainable, traceable, and food safe, all our fishers are paid a premium for adhering to our company’s high standards. Our seafood is then processed in a state-of-the-art facility with FDA, EU, KEBS, GSA, and HACCP certifications. All of our products can be packed and value-added according to the client’s request and exported fresh or blast frozen anywhere across the world via sea or air freight. 

Our Model: 

The Challenge: For most communities on the Swahili Coast, market access is minimal, seafood buying prices are low, input costs are high, and destructive fishing practices are common. While artisanal harvesters have demonstrated a willingness to fish more responsibly, interventions aimed at increasing sustainability have historically led to unchanged or even diminished income for fishers. As a result, harmful fishing practices persist and coastal poverty rates in countries such as Kenya remain above 60%.

The Opportunity: By training on industry-best fish handling methods, financing and reducing fishing trip expenses, and implementing an efficient off-grid cold chain from boat to processing facility, Kumbatia empowers its network of fishers by giving them the skills and resources required to produce traceable and sustainable seafood of world-class quality. Seafood of this caliber has much higher demand and value than that which has historically been harvested from East Africa’s waters, meaning sustainability and quality compliant fishers are able to greatly increase their earnings and reduce their expenses by working with Kumbatia. This unique training, financing, logistics, and market-based conservation model creates an environment and incentive structure that results in world-class seafood, enhanced marine conservation, and improved livelihoods for artisanal fishing communities along East Africa’s Swahili coast.

Description:

Slam fra merdene samles opp og tas på land for å nyttes til gjødsel og bioenergi. Ekstra sikring mot rømming forhindrer ytterligere påvirkning på biologisk mangfold fra vår produksjon. 

Akvafuture AS har kontorer i Brønnøysund sentrum. Laksen skal selges og markedsføres under varemerkene Miljølaks og Megasmolt.

Name: Centre for Applied Ocean Technology (CTec)
Description:
Our oceans are home to vast and largely untapped resources, carry over 90% of global trade and sustain life on earth through regulation of climate. As global population and commerce continue to grow, the demand to know our oceans is stronger than ever.

At the Centre for Applied Ocean Technology (CTec) we collaborate with industry and others on the development and application of technology for the practical benefit of all sectors of the maritime community.

CTec undertakes applied research and development in two key areas:

Ocean Mapping
Ocean Observing Systems

The guiding principles of our applied research and development efforts are to:

respond to the evolving technology needs of key ocean industries such as fisheries, shipping, offshore oil and gas
wherever possible and practical, work collaboratively with the ocean technology industry in Canada
provide work experience and employment opportunities for students and graduates of programs

Our goal is to enhance the safety, efficiency, sustainability and profitability of maritime pursuits through the application of technology. Our technologies and expertise are helping to bridge the gap between ‘knowing' and ‘doing.'

2005 yılında kurulan mezzeMarin markasıyla, işlenmiş ve dondurulmuş deniz ürünlerinde güçlü bir marka yapısı oluşturmuştur. mezzeMarin, üretim tesislerinde kalite, gıda güvenliği ve sürdürülebilirlik odaklı yaklaşımıyla pratik ve güvenilir ürünler sunar.

Bugün mezzeMarin ürünleri, Türkiye genelinde 20.000+ satış noktasında yer almakta ve 16 ülkeye ihracat ile Pakyürek A.Ş.’nin uluslararası gücünü temsil etmektedir.

“Türkiye balık yesin” vizyonuyla hareket eden Pakyürek A.Ş., sağlıklı ve kaliteli deniz ürünlerini sofralara ulaştırmaya devam etmektedir.

______________________

Founded in 1975, Pakyürek A.Ş. is one of Türkiye’s leading and well-established companies in frozen seafood.

With the launch of its mezzeMarin brand in 2005, the company built a strong presence in processed and frozen seafood. Produced with a focus on quality, food safety, and sustainability, mezzeMarin products offer practical and reliable solutions for everyday life.

Name: Partner Seafood, Inc.
Description:
How We Work

We partner with our fishermen and processors; supporting their businesses. This is how we got our name. 

Partner Seafood can work as a complete supply chain, setting up programs to ensure clients have access to product when they need.  This also allows for the best possible price all while managing and controlling quality & traceability from dock to door.

Who We Are

Partner Seafood, Inc.  is privately owned company built on the mission and values of our owner; who has over 20 years experience in the industry.
From humble beginnings, Partner Seafood has grown to be a trusted, responsible provider of the ocean's harvest for 9+ years. Over that time we have exported products to over 40 countries around the world.
Our growth as yielded two value-added brands, and a secondary processing line. As well, we have recently constructed a of a state-of-the-art facility with a large staging area, cold storage facility and warehouse.
We are confident that we will keep growing by continuing to deliver consistently and changing to best meet the needs of partner-clients and our fishermen.

Mission & Core Values

Our mission is to feed the world food from our oceans. This comes with a lot of responsibility. That means that everything we do in business has to feel good or right.
We want to remain a leader in our business, but that doesn't mean from the bottom line. We are committed to innovation and progress in the industry. Our team is committed to providing the best product, to the best companies with integrity.

Name: Local Ocean, LLC
Description:
Local Ocean is the first Zero Discharge Recirculating Aquaculture System in its kind.

The patented aerobic/anaerobic microbiology filtering technology allows the growth of freshwater and saltwater shellfish, fin-fish and algae in a completely closed water circuit, totally independent from natural sources of water with absolutely no generation of waste.

The crop produced using this method is completely free from chemicals or heavy metals.

This independence from water sources or climates allows the continuous production of fish grown locally. The fish is delivered within a 5-hour range of its production site, assuring freshness and reliable supply.

Name: Norwegian Fish Farms AS
Description:
Norwegian Fish Farms is build on a vision of rejuvenating the aquaculture industry through production where zero waste is the ultimate goal. Our fish, technology and bio-fuel are all fueling each other creating a closed loop where input equals exponential output!

Technological advancements within the sector makes it possible to produce fish in a circular economy. Our ambition is to be a leading producer of fish. Through employing sustainable technology by developing RAS technology for water treatment and by processing and using waste as bio fuel without sacrificing fish welfare or quality.

Name: Oilfield Outkasts Charters LLC
Description:
When the oil and gas industry laid us off, it left only one “reel” option – offshore fishing!  We love to fish and it shows on every trip.  While we’ve added some crew members that aren’t from the oilfield, they have that crew mentality that we do!

Captain Rodney Harper is USCG licensed and has fished the gulf waters since he was a kid and knows them well. His passion is taking kids fishing and teaching them that there is more to life than video games and social media.  He also believes in the cohesive affect that fishing can have on corporate team building.  Rodney is also a Certified Weighmaster and Tournament Director in the State of Texas. While the oilfield may have let him down, the salt water never does!

Captain Matt Monclova has fished these waters since he was a teenager, starting as a first mate way back when. As a USCG licensed Captain, he lives to see the joy that fishing brings to others. If Matt takes you fishing, ask him for his business card and tell him what you think.

Captain Marshall Booker joined us in 2018 to add a little flair to the team.  It’s even possible that he may have taken you fishing before with a different guide service.  He grew up as a first mate, helping his dad who was a Captain on the Gulf for years. He is an avid surfer, surf fisher and spearfisher.

Captain Steven Gremillion (Grem) is a licensed USCG 50 ton Master’s Captain and has guided fishing and hunting adventures on 4 different continents.  Steven is also a Texas Certified Weighmaster and Tournament Director in Texas. Captain Steven runs his own guide service in the bays of the Galveston area. GoWithGrem

Captain JoJo McIntyre recently earning her 50 Ton Near Coastal Captain’s license, JoJo is a locally raised water rat and PADI Divemaster, who surfs and fishes the 3rd coast.  She loves everything about the outdoors, so you probably won’t see her fishing with us during hunting season!  #jojoonthegogo

Name: Bid on Seafood
Description:
Bid on Seafood is a seafood and caviar online based broker with a fully integrated global logistics service. We specialize in connecting fisherman, fish farms, producers, manufacturers, distributors, importers and retailers together. 

Bid on Seafood offers a wide spectrum of services aimed at facilitating the process of moving any type of seafood products from point A to point B, connecting sellers and buyers anonymously. Our online brokerage platform gives the flexibility for sellers to promote their products but also to liquidate lots using our fixed price or bid price options (not an absolute bidding, therefore seller can refuse a bid).

Bid on Seafood also offers the possibility for fisherman, fish farms, manufacturers and producers to sell their used or unwanted equipment through our "used equipment" section. Once again connecting everyone in the fishing industry under one roof. From small equipment to entire plants to fishing vessels, Bid on Seafood will help you sell your unwanted assets through our global outreach.

To close the loop, Bid on Seafood through its logistics department, can take care of all your shipping needs around the world whether by Air, Sea or Land.

Bid on Seafood has clients on all continents working actively with China, Japan, Singapore, Australia, South Africa, Israel, Turkey, United Arab Emirates, the European Union, Norway, the United Kingdom, Iceland, Canada, the United States and Chile. We ship to all destination by Sea, Land and Air.

Name: Alicante Aquaculture
Description:
Alicante Aquaculture, fundada en 2019, proyecta la construcción de una planta de acuicultura para la producción de Seriola Dumerili (también conocida como Lechola o Pez Limón) en tierra en la ciudad de Alicante, en la Comunidad Valenciana, España. 
La producción de Seriola Dumerili se realizará en un sistema de circuito cerrado de recirculación de agua (Recirculating Aquaculture System), lo cual permite el multi-engorde de pescado en tierra, en piscinas, donde las condiciones están perfectamente controladas garantizando el mejor y más rápido crecimiento del pescado.
Alicante Aquaculture ha dado comienzo a los trabajos de obra en Noviembre de 2023 y se proyecta la puesta en marcha de la granja en Enero de 2025.

Namibia's fishing industry is well known for its world class capabilities, in handling, distributing, and marketing of fish products.

Ministry's Mission 

Our mission is to strengthen Namibia's position as a leading fishing nation and contribute towards the achievement of our economic, social and conservation goals for the benefit of all Namibians. 

Ministry's Objectives 

Promote and regulate the optimal sustainable utilisation of living marine resources within the context of conserving marine ecosystems. 
Establish a conducive environment in which the fishing industry can prosper and derive optimal income from marine resources. 
Further Namibia's interest within the international fishing sector. 
Provide professional, responsive and customer focused services. 
Deliver our services efficiently and effectively providing best value for money. 
Continuously invest in human resource development

Name: EM4Fish
Description:
The field of fisheries management is undergoing fundamental change as emerging technologies enable new methods for acquiring, sharing, analyzing, and utilizing data. EM4Fish is a knowledge base and community of practice for the people driving this change. It is made possible through support from Kingfisher Foundation, National Fish & Wildlife Foundation’s Electronic Monitoring and Reporting Grant Program, and Net Gains Alliance. 

Visit our website to learn more, join our community, contribute a blog post, and more!

Name: SDC AGRO-VET (INDIA) PVT. LTD.,
Description: SDC is one of the leader in the field of high performance Feed supplements, Water management products and Biosecurity products for Aquaculture, Poultry and Veterinary sectors.

Name: Fishing Vessel Owners' Association
Description: FVOA is a trade association of longline fishing vessels that was started in 1914. It's mission is to promote safety at sea, ensure competitive pricing, and promote habitat friendly gear with minimum by-catch.

Name: Waive AS
Description: Full control of your biomass with our sonar-based solution

Name: NOE Aquaculture Consultants
Description:
International hub of consultants specialized in tropical aquaculture and based in Brussels – Belgium and Guayaquil - Ecuador.  Noe Aquaculture has the knowledge and experience for project formulation both for commercial venture and for strategic governmental development. Our core business is feasibility study and technical management of aquaculture project (mainly shrimp and tilapia farming for both commercial and rural development projects).

We have experience in implementing standards for quality, food safety and environmental sustainability in aquaculture like A.B. label (Agriculture Biologique from France) and ACC (Aquaculture Certification Council) or GlobalGAP  standards.
Noé Aquaculture Consultants is part of a large expertise network and can quickly form a multidisciplinary team.

Starting an aquaculture project is a complex matter and must be done with rigor to avoid mistakes.
We speak English, French and Spanish and are open to any kind of cooperation depending on our availabilities. We normally charge fees by day but the amount can vary depending on complexity of tasks and duration of the contract.

Name: C Robotics AS
Description:
Driven by a deep commitment to the ocean and marine life, we have developed advanced, efficient, and environmentally responsible technologies for the industrial harvesting of marine species from the seabed. Our innovative solutions represent a sustainable alternative to traditional methods, which often cause significant damage to the seabed, marine habitats, and the surrounding ecosystem.

By combining cutting-edge engineering with a strong focus on environmental stewardship, our scalable systems enable precise, low-impact harvesting while preserving marine biodiversity. In addition, our technology can be effectively utilized to manage and control invasive or unwanted marine species, providing an important tool in addressing some of today’s most pressing ecological challenges.

We are currently engaged in several international projects focused on both sustainable commercial harvesting and the removal of invasive species, where our technology has been recognized as a preferred and reliable solution for a cleaner and more resilient ocean environment.

Name: asmak fish
Description: We are a Mauritanian fish export company, frozen and fresh. We have many varieties of fish with high quality and quantity. we are looking for serious customers to collaborate together.

Name: Aquagrow International
Description: We focus on sustainable aquaculture to increase farm profitability, contribute to global food security and protect the environment. We take an aquaculture-biotechnology-driven business approach, backed by our team of industry experts, to increase farm yields.

Name: Glofii
Description: Our company journey started in 2017 from Niwai, District-Tonk (Rajasthan) where we opened our first farm. This farm is our laboratory where we have learned and gained experience on how to successfully breed different species of fish, agriculture and animal husbandry, etc. Through this form, not only did we gain valuable experience and capital, but it also inspired us to take forward the business of integrated farming in Rajasthan.

Name: Simply Shrimps
Description:
At Simply Shrimps, we take great pride in our commitment to the highest standards of aquaculture practices. We believe in sustainability as a way of life, which is why our shrimp are raised with care and dedication, ensuring both the well-being of our environment and the superior quality of our products.

Our journey begins in the pristine waters of our aquaculture farms, where we nurture shrimp with love and expertise. We harness the power of nature to provide you with the freshest, most flavorful shrimp you can find. From our farms to your plate, we guarantee a delectable experience that not only tantalizes your taste buds but also upholds our planet's delicate balance.

When you choose Simply Shrimps, you're not just enjoying delicious shrimp; you're contributing to a sustainable future. Join us in our mission to redefine aquaculture for a better world, one succulent bite at a time.

Name: Aqua Tech Fishery
Description: We help fish farmers to upgrade from extensive to intensive aquaculture, reducing land usage and water consumption and increasing yields. We help NGO'S to build sustainable fish farming network

Name: Acuicultura Cadiz
Description:
Acuicultura Cádiz S.L. is a modern land-based aquaculture company located in Puerto de Santa María, Spain.
We produce high-quality Amberjack (Seriola dumerili) using advanced RAS technology.
The company is part of Kingfish Norway Group, together with Futuna Blue S.L., specializing in broodstock and juvenile production.
Our mission is to deliver sustainable, locally grown seafood with exceptional quality and traceability.
Location: El Puerto de Santa Maria, Cadiz, Cadiz

Name: oxus caviar
Description:
Oxus Caviar is a premium brand dedicated to delivering the finest, most luxurious caviar to customers worldwide. Rooted in the rich Persian heritage of excellence and sophistication, we combine traditional expertise with modern innovation to craft exceptional caviar products that redefine gourmet experiences.

Our mission is to bring unparalleled quality, sustainability, and elegance to every table, creating moments of indulgence for discerning palates. Whether for exclusive events, fine dining, or gifting, Oxus Caviar represents the ultimate in luxury and taste.

Join us as we celebrate the art of caviar, connecting cultures and creating unforgettable culinary experiences globally.

Name: PT SyAqua Indonesia
Description: Combining high-end genetics program with precise early nutrition for optimal aquaculture performance

Name: Wild 'n Zilt
Description:
Iedereen vindt dat de visserij moet verduurzamen. Maar investeren in duurzaamheid loont op dit moment niet. De missie van Wild 'n Zilt is om de visliefhebber verse vis met een goed verhaal te brengen. Zo laten wij zien dat investeren in de toekomst loont en inspireren wij ze om te gaan voor vooruitgang.

Volg ons avontuur op instagram! > wildnzilt

Name: Fedora Sea Foods Pvt Ltd
Description:
Fedora Sea Foods was founded in 2011 with a commitment to excellence and promoting sustainability in the aquaculture industry. By 2021 we had established ourselves as a fully backward integrated aquaculture company.

Our infrastructure now includes processing and exports of frozen shrimp, manufacturing shrimp feeds, shrimp culture and bio secured hatcheries.

Name: Statt Torsk AS
Description: Statt Torsk AS er et oppdrettsselskap som produserer torsk med to produksjonsanlegg i Vanylvsfjorden.

Name: Faisal Abdulla Seafood Processing LLC
Description: We are the number one importer as well as the largest distributor of seafood in the United Arab Emirates. Our humble journey began in 2012 and since then has emerged as the market leader when it comes to delivering high-quality seafood and related products. As of now, we have close to a hundred well-qualified and trained employees and a transport fleet of over thirty vehicles to deliver our products across the Emirates. We also have approvals from concerned authorities to deliver our products throughout the country (all seven Emirates). The firm has a 5,000 sq.ft factory with HACCP/ISO approvals. Well-experienced staff for quality checking, processing, and fish packing is our special strength. The firm has in place sophisticated machines to pack fish stocks while ensuring 100 percent safety.

Name: PromerOcéan
Description:
PromerOcéan, est le référent de la distribution Produits de la Mer et Marée Fraîche sur le grand quart nord de la France. 
Toute notre équipe s’engage pour nos consommateurs en encourageant les approvisionnements quotidiens, en privilégiant les pêches de proximité et en connaissant les bateaux et les pêcheurs.
En Picardie, en Normandie, en Nord-Pas de Calais comme en Île de France en Champagne ou dans les Ardennes nous accompagnons nos plus de 500 professionnels partenaires de la Restauration Collective, de la Restauration Commerciale et de la Distribution (GMS, PMS, Spécialistes). 
Produits Français, Pêche Durable, Animation des Points de Ventes, Expertise des Saisons, Maîtrise des Coûts Portions, … Notre approche Personnalisée sur chacun de vos métiers contribue à la création d’un service global de qualité pour lequel, les femmes et les hommes de PromerOcéan s’engagent.

Name: BIO-BLUE INDONESIA -Global Aquaculture-
Description: Aquaculture, Engineer, Technology

Name: Blue Harvest
Description:
Blue Harvest is an Australian specialist seafood sales and marketing agency. We work with the best domestic and international seafood producers to consolidate supply, sell and market premium quality seafood products to major Australian seafood wholesalers and corporate retailers. 
We act as the conduit between our producer clients and the market, with an emphasis on streamlining collaboration and communication to ensure efficiency for all parties involved.

Name: Assentoft Aqua ApS
Description:
Assentoft Aqua’s core competency is to design and supply landbased sustainable RAS fish farms.

We take pride in supplying a RAS fish farming facility which;

○ Produces the quantity of fish it was planned and designed for.

○ Are designed and dimensioned based on many years of practical RAS fish farming experience – built on proven and reliable RAS technologies.

○ Are designed with the utmost attention to production safety – with no possibility of stagnant water and accumulation of sludge (to avoid sulphur hydrogen formation).

○ Include sustainable solutions which are environmentally friendly, and does not pollute our nature.

○ Are delivered efficiently in close cooperating with our experienced project partner – Assentoft Silo.

For inquiries, please contact Peter Damgaard Nielsen at <pdn@assentoftaqua.dk>

Name: Sidat Labas (PT. Laju Banyu Semesta)
Description:
We are expertise on eel farming, consultant, and training. We strive to help eel farmers to grow their business and reach their optimum production. 

Our company is trying to solve the biggest problem from the most important and fastest growing industry in the world, it's called aquaculture.

Name: Fishes Brazil
Description: A Fishes Brazil atua no segmento de comércio e beneficiamento de Pescados. Com mais de 30 anos de experiência, entendemos que ser especialista em produtos do mar é mais do que um compromisso com a qualidade do alimento, é cuidar também da saúde de quem os consome. Para tanto, nossa empresa é fundamentada em valores éticos e morais que nos posicionam como referência no Estado do Espírito Santo em desenvolvimento de processos produtivos sustentáveis e no compromisso de produzir de alimentos de qualidade.

Name: Aquacopia Venture Partners, LLC
Description:
Aquacopia was the first and only true aquaculture venture capital firm, now fully invested and terminated. It uniquely invested in seafood value chain innovation: from feed technology, to new species domestication and fish farms, to equipment, distribution, and marketing companies.

It was pivotal in creating a wave of important aquaculture value chain companies. Among them were Open Blue, InnovaSea, and Nutrinsic, a trio that has put over $200 million in capital to work.

Name: Louisbourg Seafoods
Description:
Louisbourg Seafoods is a family operated seafood business. James Nathen Kennedy and his wife Lori started their company in 1984.

Former National Sea workers and Jim a former fisherman, both have deep family roots dating back hundreds of years to Newfoundland and St. Pierre & Miquelon, France. This rich history and experience passed down from generation to generation gives the company inherent knowledge in producing a seafood product with superior quality and excellence.

Family and community are our core company foundations transferred from hundreds of years in culture and tradition. Currently, both Jim, Lori, and three of their six children work together in the family business. Activities such as supporting our youth with school programs, partnerships with Cape Breton University in pursuit of knowledge, and working with all communities including our First Nations validate our family-community relationships - just one of our many company values.

Name: ERBA SEAFOOD
Description:
CALLUT Seafood is established in 1999 due to the market’s need of high quality fish products and the desire of an improved diet among people’s habits and ERBA Seafood is the foreign trade company of CALLUT Seafood in Turkey. 

ERBA Seafood is one of the leading seafood companies in aquaculture sector and one of the biggest suppliers in Turkey. ERBA Seafood provides all kinds of fish in conformity with BRC (British Retail Consortium), IFS (International Food Standards), GLOBALGAP, ISO14001, ISO9000, ISO22000 and HACCP (Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Point) with its customer focused resolutions, enviroment friendly  production policies. 

Through significant investment in technology, ERBA Seafood provides the consumers quality through one of the most high-tech processing and packaging lines. ERBA Seafood combines the love for natural and fresh food with modern technology, the whole production processes being made under HACCP system. 
CALLUT Seafood provides fresh and processed fish to chain of supermarkets , educational institutions,  armed services, metropolitan municipalities, industrial plants all over the country with its own  vehicles. CALLUT Seafood became one of the leading fish producers of Turkey with its experienced staff of production and distribution and 
modern manufacturing plant.

To have the processing and packaging  facility at Konya, which is supposed to be the center of Turkey  geographically is a big advantage for easy supply chain management and supply of goods. Office of foreign commerce  is located in Izmir which makes ERBA strong as Izmir is one the biggest port, seaboard cities of Turkey. ERBA Seafood aims to be a leader at the foreign markets within  CALLUT Seafood. Fish either whole , gutted or fillet, can be provided as fresh and frozen in styrofoam  boxes or frozen cartoon boxes. We may also provide private-labelling and customized packaging for our clients.

Name: Stratos S.A.
Description:
The main object of STRATOS S.A. company is the production and trade of fresh Mediterranean fishes (bream - sea bass - meagre etc.) 

The company consists from family members with experience in the sector of fishery since 1984 when the pioneer founder of the company established the first fish farm in Evia island and among the first in Greece.

Name: Guldhaven Pelagiska
Description:
The local fish is our passion
We are specialised in seafood production of the wild fish from local fishery. Our most important product is the Kalix vendace caviar, Kalix löjrom. Other delicate products are made of perch, herring, wild salmon, pike, whitefish and cyprinids.

It is important for us that the local fishery is doing well and developing. We provide a way for local fishermen to get their catch from the sea to the plates of the customers.

You can find our both fresh and frozen products throughout Sweden and in some other countries

Name: Geo Marine Fish Trading L.L.C
Description: Our business mostly includes export and import of frozen, chilled and fresh seafood items from Midle East. We have our own processing plant with office located in Ajman New Industrial Area. For more information get into touch with us!

Name: Precision Seafood Harvesting
Description: FloMo will change the way the world fishes for the better, allowing our industry, our oceans and their fish stocks to thrive

Name: Parigi Aquakultura Prima
Description: Established in 2017, we have the vision to become a national pride on a global scale in the aquaculture industry. We have successfully harvested more than 20 cycles with average productivity of no less than 60 tonnes per hectare pond across our 3 active locations. Our success is derived from the scientific and systematic approach that we apply.

Name: NATLUK SA
Description:
Natluk is a processor and exporter of ecuadorian seafood , specializing mainly wild caught shrimp . Jumbo pacific white s working with artisanal fisheries and titi shrimp pud leading a fishery improvement project published on fishery progress .  Also of course farm raised shrimp in every presentarlo .
Women led company 
60% women labor 
Sustainability committed 
Commercially committed
Social responsability programs
People driven 

We care!

Name: AFRIOCEAN SARL
Description: Créé en 2013 AFRIOCEAN SARL est une usine de traitement et d'exportation de produits halieutiques frais et congelés basée à Diamniadio, SENEGAL.

Name: Lobster Trap Co.
Description:
As an industry leader in seafood, the Lobster Trap is dedicated to sourcing the highest quality products available, with an unwavering commitment to our customers, and to the sea. 

Lobster Trap is headquartered on Cape Cod, MA with additional facilities in Machiasport and Steuben, Maine. We are a proud member of the Maine Lobster Institute, National Fisheries Institute, and a supporter of the U.S. Coast Guard Fisheries Training Center.

The Lobster Trap has been in business since 1972 and is proud to be the second-largest wholesaler of Maine lobster in the world. Our lobsters are shipped live from our headquarters on Cape Cod, with three additional facilities located in Machiasport, Addison, and Steuben, Maine.

We began as a retail fish shanty, with our founder Logan selling sea scallops, swordfish, and lobsters. Today, each of our operating locations has over 100,000 open water holding tanks, lobster pounds, and dedicated teams. Our high-volume operation has allowed us to achieve an international reach.

The Lobster Trap is not only HACCP-approved and federally inspected, but also a TSA-approved certified cargo screening facility. With these certifications, we're able to ship products across the globe safely and in a timely manner.

Name: National Fish Habitat Partnership
Description:
The National Fish Habitat Partnership is all about — locally-driven efforts that build private and public partnerships to improve fish habitat.

Fish Habitat Action Plan partnerships are self-identified, self-organized, and self-directed communities of interest formed around geographic areas, keystone species, or system types.

For more information:
http://fishhabitat.org/ 
http://www.facebook.com/NFHAP
https://twitter.com/FishHabitat

Name: Fishing Partnership Support Services
Description: Fishing Partnership is a non-profit support services organization dedicated to improving the health, safety and economic security of commercial fishermen and their families. Founded in 1997, we bring critical support services and programs to more than 20,000 New England fishing families. With 4 offices in Gloucester, New Bedford, Plymouth and Chatham, we deliver Health and Wellness, Safety at Sea and Economic Security support services in the communities where fishing families live.

Name: Pa Chikaya Fisheries
Description: Established in 2019, Pa Chikaya Fisheries specializes in the production of high quality fish Fingerlings (seed). Having grown within the aquaculture sector, our company is client driven and has identified possible challenges affecting the growth and sustainability of the Aquaculture sector and expanded its product offering to include: Extension services, aquaculture training, fish farming business management as well as feed production training.

Name: W. van der Zwan en Zn. B.V.
Description:
Vanaf haar oprichting in 1888 is W. van der Zwan & Zn altijd een familiebedrijf gebleven. We voorzien onze internationale klanten van gezonde, voedzame en goede kwaliteit vis. Dit doen we door op een efficiënte, duurzame en verantwoordelijke wijze pelagische vis te vangen, te verwerken en de distribueren. Met respect voor de omgeving waarin we opereren. Daarmee biedt W. van der Zwan & Zonen een antwoord op de wereldwijd groeiende vraag naar duurzame en betaalbare dierlijke eiwitten. Tegenwoordig voorzien wij wereldwijd dagelijks ruim een miljoen mensen van betaalbaar eiwitrijk voedsel. De meeste consumenten wonen in Afrika en Azië.
Vloot
De uiterst geavanceerde diepvrieshektrawlers van W. Van der Zwan & Zonen beschikken over ‘state-of-the-art’ apparatuur op het gebied van opsporen, vangen, conserveren en verpakken van vis voor menselijke consumptie. Elk schip is bemand met uiterst toegewijde en goed getrainde opvarenden en is uitgerust met moderne vriesinstallaties. Dankzij die combinatie van vakmanschap en hoogstaande technologie garandeert W. van der Zwan & Zn een duurzame wijze van vissen en een constante hoogwaardige kwaliteit.
Vrieshuizen
In verband met het doorlopend in stand houden van een hoge kwaliteit vis, beschikt W. van der Zwan & Zn over moderne vrieshuizen in de havens van Scheveningen en Velsen voor de tijdelijke opslag van de diepgevroren visproducten. Dankzij deze faciliteiten is er gedurende het hele jaar een constante aanvoer van topkwaliteit vis.
Ook heeft W. van der Zwan in diverse Afrikaanse landen vrieshuizen gebouwd die de opslag en distributie van diepgevroren vis mogelijk maken. Vanuit deze vrieshuizen wordt de vis tot ver in de binnenlanden getransporteerd. Zo is onze haring en makreel voor iedereen bereikbaar. Het is bovendien de goedkoopste bron van eiwitten die voorhanden is. Het dagelijks menu voor miljoenen mensen in Afrika bestaat uit rijst met een pelagisch visje.

Rederij W. van der Zwan en Zn. is een erkend leerbedrijf

Name: Megabass Inc.
Description:
We are one of the best Japanese fishing tackle manufacturers. Recently highly evaluated all over the world, mainly in USA, Russia, UK, France, and Asia. Megabass was founded in the late 80s by Yuki Ito when he was in his 20s. It has located in Hamamatsu, Japan, where Mr. Ito is originally from. We are doing business with many countries such as the US, Australia, UK, Germany, France, Italy, Singapore, Malaysia, Taiwan, Indonesia and etc.

Please check our latest information.

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/megabass.inc

Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/user/mbky0777

Name: Fjord Miljø AS
Description:
Sidan 2017 har Fjord Miljø AS utvikla og seld miljøløysingar til oppdrettsnæringa. Vi jobbar hovudsakleg med optimalisering av merdmiljø, fiskevelferd og tilvekst i opne anlegg i sjø.

Fjord Miljø AS har utvikla ei patentert løysing for utskifting av vatn i oppdrettsmerdar i kombinasjon med bruk av luseskjørt.

Name: Local Catch Network
Description: The Local Catch Network is a community-of-practice made up of fisherman, organizers, researchers, and consumers from across North America that are committed to providing local, healthful, low-impact seafood via community supported fisheries and direct marketing arrangements in order to support healthy fisheries and the communities that depend on them.

Name: UdangX
Description: UdangX is a rising shrimp urban aquaculture startup whose mission is to bring Indonesia’s urban shrimp farming to its optimum productivity while ensuring the ecosystem's sustainability by using deep water quality analysis and recirculating aquaculture system engineering.

Name: ASAKUA Aquaculture
Description:
We are offering turnkey solutions for offshore aquaculture projects including site survey, bankable feasibility study, equipment supply, on-site installation, and training. 



In consultation with you create tailored solutions that best fit your wishes. Our total service approach and years of experience in the industry allow us to offer the most complete service available today.

Name: ADRIATIC SEA INTERNATIONAL
Description:
L'“Adriatic Sea International” é un'Azienda prima in Europa e leader in tutto il mondo nella progettazione, costruzione, installazione e manutenzione di impianti per mantenimento di crostacei vivi (Astici, Aragoste, Granchi, ecc), Pesci e Molluschi, impianti di depurazione per Molluschi eduli con approvazione del Ministero della Sanità.
Con oltre 35 anni di esperienza maturata nel settore, l' Azienda vanta più di 5.000 impianti installati in Europa ed in tutto il mondo pari a oltre 2.000.000 (due milioni) di kg in quanto a capacità di stoccaggio.

L'Adriatic Sea ogni anno importa e distribuisce oltre 5.000 tonnellate di prodotti tecnici e trasforma 7.000m di Titanio; in Azienda opera un qualificato e collaudato team tecnico costituito da uno staff di professionisti del settore la cui esperienza ultratrentennale rappresenta una ulteriore garanzia per la qualità dei prodotti e dispone di un proprio parco automezzi e di supporti tecnici avanzati come ad esempio un moderno sistema di computers archivianti una biblioteca tecnica di notevoli dimensioni.

L'Adriatic Sea partecipa alle più importanti e rappresentative esposizioni fieristiche specializzate in Europa. Non esitate a contattarci per prenotare una Vostra visita in Azienda, sarete nostri graditi ospiti e vedrete da vicino ed in funzione gli impianti di Vostro interesse.

"Adriatic Sea International" is a Company first in Europe and a leader in the world in the design, construction, installation and maintenance of units for the maintenance of live crustaceans (Lobster, Lobster, Crabs, etc.), Fish and Molluscs, depuration systems for edible Molluscs with the approval of the Ministry of Health. With over 35 years of experience in the sector, the company boasts more than 5,000 plants installed in Europe and worldwide, totaling over 2,000,000 (two million) kgs of storage capacity.

Name: Aglia
Description: Depuis sa création en 1988, l’objectif de l’Aglia est de promouvoir les activités liées aux cultures marines et à la pêche du golfe de Gascogne. Elle s’est dès le départ distinguée par sa composition originale, mêlant les acteurs professionnels et les Conseils Régionaux sur un espace maritime et littoral homogène et spécifique qu’est le littoral Atlantique. Elle reste aujourd’hui la seule association de ce type en France, reconnue pour la pertinence de ses actions.

Name: CITEacuícola UPCH
Description: El Centro de Innovación Productiva y Transferencia Tecnológica Acuícola Privado de la Universidad Peruana Cayetano Heredia (CITEacuícola UPCH) es una empresa de base tecnológica orientada a los sectores acuícola y pesquero, que opera en el marco del Centro de Investigación para el Desarrollo Integral y Sostenible (CIDIS) de la Universidad Peruana Cayetano Heredia.

Name: MarineCatch Africa
Description: MarineCatch Africa is a technology startup in active development, supporting the evolution of Africa’s fisheries sector. Recognized as one of the Presidential Innovation Award 2023/2024 projects by the Kenya National Innovation Agency (KeNIA), we empower small-scale and artisanal fishermen with digital tools to boost productivity, explore financial inclusion, and promote responsible sourcing. Our platform, explores blockchain and IoT for traceability and transparency, developing eco-labelling and certification processes with initial testing underway. We’re designing embedded finance features—digital payments, credit access, and micro-insurance—to unlock capital and reduce risks, alongside a marketplace (in design/testing) connecting fishermen to hotels, restaurants, processors, retailers, and distributors for a fairer trade environment. We engage in policy advocacy to align with blue economy strategies. Early features in development include real-time data recording, interactive dashboards, capacity-building resources, blockchain-based eco-labelling, and embedded finance pathways. Collaboration is key. We’re seeking partnerships with fishermen, businesses, financial institutions, sustainability organizations, and policymakers, with initial engagements underway. Our vision: merge technology with traditional practices for a transparent, sustainable, inclusive seafood industry across Africa. Targeting pilot results by Q1 2026, we aim for meaningful impact as we scale. Connect to explore opportunities for positive change!

Name: VINSOTEL S.A.
Description: Nos caracterizamos por estar dedicados exclusivamente a la comerceialización de insumos acuícolas, es así que nuestra oferta la comprenden productos cuya efectividad ha sido comprobada mediante pruebas que realizamos en conjunto con nuestros clientes.

Name: ECO-CATCH
Description:
ECO-CATCH will make 10 promising technologies ready for commercial uptake to empower fishers in their efforts to minimize bycatch of juvenile fishes and Endangered, Threatened, and Protected species and to protect habitats in the North Sea and the Baltic.

The project brings together a consortium of 14 partners from across the seafood value chain, including leading scientists, industry innovators, and certification bodies. We will collaborate over five years to refine and demonstrate the innovations at sea, address legal and social barriers to their adoption, and enable them to be recognized in certification assessments – rewarding trailblazer fisheries for their sustainability efforts.

ECO-CATCH is coordinated by DTU Aqua and funded by the European Union (Grant 101213692) with a total grant of €8.5 million over the project’s lifespan.

Further information, including our website, will be available soon.

Name: DALGA SEAFOOD LTD
Description:
Dalga Seafood Ltd. was established in 2015 in Athens Greece. Ιt represents within the European Union market, Gümüşdoğa A.Ş., one of the leading Turkish companies in the aquaculture sector.
Through an efficient distribution network, Dalga Seafood delivers top quality fresh andfrozen Sea Bream (Sparus aurata) and Sea Bass (Dicentrarchus labrax) products across all European destinations.

Name: Şahin Balıkçılık
Description: 1991 yılından bu yana balıkçılık sektöründe birçok alanda hizmet veren Mehmet Şahin ÇAKAN, 2005 yılında kendisine ait nakliye firmasını kurdu. Böylelikle teknelerin tedarik ettiği balıkları kendi filosu üzerinden taşımaya başladı. 2007 yılında Mehmet Şahin Çakan Balıkçılık Ltd. Şti.’ni kurarak 1 balıkçı gemisiyle başlamış olduğu faaliyetine 52 teknelik balıkçı filosuyla devam etmektedir.

Name: Mustad Autoline AS
Description:
Mustad Autoline develops and supplies technology to the world's line Fishing fleet. 

The Mustad Autoline System is a mechanized system for longlining. Today the system handles the entire process from baiting the hooks, setting the line, hauling the line, hook cleaning and storage of the line and hooks. The system provides for less labor-intensive operations on board and gives catches of excellent quality. 

Autolining is a passive and sustainable fishing method. The seabed is not damaged and the impact on the eco system is minimal. We at Mustad Autoline are continuously working on new and innovative solutions, so that more fish can be caught by hook and line.

Mustad Autoline - A better way to fish!

Name: Magnum Group Of Companies

Being the largest archipelagic country globally, with more than thirteen thousand islands, Indonesia is rich in marine resources. Indonesia scores among the top five of fishery and aquaculture producers in the world. With our extensive network of fisherman and aquaculture, we are able to provide variety of sea caught and farm raised fish. As well as the support of our established fish processing plants, we are able to provide not only freshly caught whole fish, but also value added and processed fish.

South Georgia Toothfish is a cod-like benthopelagic fish found in cold deep water at depths of up to 2000 metres. Our Toothfish is MSC certified and WWF-listed.

Name: How's Ya Tackle
Description:
How’s Ya Tackle was established with a simple vision to change the way we fish in Australia and provide affordable access to bait and tackle.  After years of testing new innovation, researching new concepts and finding solutions for outdated fishing products, we are pleased to introduce our range of Bait & Tackle vending machines powered by How’s Ya Tackle. These machines are the world’s first outdoor dual zone bait vending machine. Built for Australian climate and locations specifically.

Fishermen ourselves we fully understand the requirements of using the right bait and tackle for catching that “Elusive fish”. We and our partner How’s Ya Tackle have put in extensive research of the bait industry, which confirmed a major lack of quality bait available after hours from the early morning rising fisherman to the late night fisherman, even that last minute recreational fisher!.

Our products in the machines make for easy access to quality bait & tackle available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days of the year. With our no fuss, and competitive pricing. This means you can take that last minute recreational fishing trip or enjoy your early morning fishing outing without the worry of finding quality bait. Imagine getting the ‘catch of the day’ every day.

The How’s Ya Tackle team’s main focus is to fill the current void in fishing by taking “convenience” to the next level for quality bait & tackle. Our aim is to “freshen up” the Australian fishing industry through our combination of cutting-edge technology and design, manufacturing and our expertise in Australian fishing. We know that our “world first” live and frozen bait vending machines have revolutionised fishing in Australia.

Aboard the 42-foot Lucky Dove our family fishes the pristine waters of the Bering Sea near False Pass, Alaska. Throughout the year we catch premium salmon, halibut, and cod. We take great pride in the quality, health benefits and sustainability of our region’s seafood and we want to share it with you. 

Wild Alaska seafood is good for you, good for the people that catch it, and good for the planet. Together we can create the connection between you and the independent fishermen providing your seafood. Wild Alaska seafood is rich in complete protein, Omega-3 fatty acids, and Vitamin D, leading to a healthy heart, bones, and brain. 

After our summer fishing season we deliver sockeye salmon, halibut, and cod to your home or local food-hub.

Name: Southeast Aquatic Resources Partnership (SARP)
Description:
The Southeast Aquatic Resources Partnership, or SARP, is a nationally-recognized leader that is successfully addressing problems affecting fish and the places where they live in 14 states in the Southeast. 

For more than a decade, SARP has worked together with state and federal agencies, non-profit organizations, and private interests to develop science-based resources to assess the health of rivers and coastal habitats and to put cost-effective conservation projects in place where they are needed most, from cold mountain streams and warm water rivers, to the sea. 

SARP’s unique regional perspective, cutting edge science and connections to decision-makers is strengthening the management of aquatic resources and ensuring the conservation of precious waters, fish and wildlife for future generations.  

SARP’s approach:

Together with our partners, we are supporting and facilitating on-the-ground and in-the-water science-based action to improve and protect aquatic habitats and resources.

We are conducting focused habitat assessments and restoring, monitoring and evaluating of some of the nation’s most economically and socially significant aquatic habitats.

SARP's mission: 

SARP will, with partners, protect, conserve and restore aquatic resources including habitats throughout the Southeast for the continuing benefit, use and enjoyment of the American people.

Name: Prizefish - Interreg Italy - Croatia
Description:
PRIZEFISH aims to make Italian and Croatian Adriatic SMEs and Producer Organizations (POs), dedicated to fishing and commercializing fishery products, to be more competitive in the Member State and International food markets than present day. 

This aim will be achieved by developing and piloting innovative fish products with added-value given by ecolabels fulfilling requirements of environmental, economic and social sustainability. The socio-economically relevant overall aim of PRIZEFISH is accomplished by improving the framework conditions of Adriatic fishery (SO1), fish processing (SO2) and marketing eco-labelled of fishery products (SO3).

The overall aim pairs to the ambitious territorial challenge to develop cross-border fishery supply-chain and value-chain and to capitalize such cross-border innovation for increasing the potential of long-term economic, environmental and social sustainability in the Adriatic coastal territories.

Name: FishCode
Description:
Os oceanos e os rios nos oferecem mais de 10.000 espécies de peixes e pescados, porém devido a falta de informação e conhecimento, o brasileiro consome muito pouco peixe no seu dia a dia. 
Além de concentramos o nosso consumo em pouquíssimas espécies. Algumas delas não nativas, como o exemplo o salmão. 
Um país com mais de 8.000 km de litoral, Amazônia e Pantanal formando a maior reserva de água doce do planeta e com espécies nativas fomentando a economia local. 
O Brasil consome menos da metade da média mundial de consumo de peixes.
A pesca em pequena escala e a aquicultura empregam mais de 200 milhões de pessoas em todo o mundo, gerando renda e alimento com alto valor nutricional.
Já é unanime entre os especialistas que a proteína aquática, é única Climate Friendly dentre as proteínas animais. 
A Revolução Azul está acontecendo. 
Conheça  FishCode.

Name: Stuart M Grant Limited
Description:
Stuart M Grant Ltd (SMG) is the oldest and largest ornamental fish export business in Malawi. As a market leader, the company is determined to maintain its market position by improving its already existing high standards. The company's clients are all based in the US, Europe, Asia and the Far East. Germany and China currently represent the largest markets. 

The company exports live fish from Lake Malawi to Cichlid enthusiasts all around the world. According to Ad Konings in his book titled, Malawi Cichlids In Their Natural Habitat, 4th Edition, "No lake in the world contains such a diversified and distinctive community of cichlid fishes as Lake Malawi. The total number of cichlid species in the lake is now estimated at about 1000, and there is every indication that still more remain to be discovered". The farm facilities house about 150 to 250 species of these fishes at any given time. 

The fish farm located at Kambiri Point, South Senga Bay, Salima district has 212 glass aquariums and 30 fish ponds, located in the main fish house and 366 fish ponds located outside the fish house under shade netting.

The registered capital of company is 51.88 million Yuan, total area of company is 72500 square meters including with processing area more than 20000 square meters, refrigerated area about 25000 square meters, cold storage about 50,000 MT.The average number of employees are more than 6 hundreds. Total assets of company is 300 million yuan，annual sales revenue is over 500 million yuan. 

We own 7 distant fishing vessels, 14 sea-frozen processing vessels, the annual processing of various types of aquatic products amounted to 100,000 tons. The company main engaged in sea frozen mackerel, sea frozen tuna, sea frozen bonito, also focus on the canned fish, fish loin and octopus etc.

“Detail decides quality,  Sincerity makes prosperity”. Our company has always attached great importance to product quality and food safety. We now have passed HACCP、BIC、OU、HALAL and other food safety management system certification, and we also have got some export registration of USA, EU, Russia,  Korea, Indonesia, and Vietnam etc. The volume of foreign exchange earned by export is about 30 million USD, the amount of total export volume are more than 30000 tons. As a result of our excellent product quality, they are very popular all over the world. 

R & D and innovation is the focus of modern enterprise, so we have established cooperative relationship with some famous universities like Zhejiang University of Technology and Shanghai Ocean University and so on.

We will always strive to create more delicious, natural and safer marine health food.

Name: Beken Food and Seafood
Description:
Üç tarafı denizlerle çevrili olan ülkemizde su ürünleri sektörünün daha ileride olması gerektiği düşüncesiyle yola çıkan şirketimiz, ülkemizde su ürünlerine olan ilginin hızla artmasını göz önünde bulundurarak, artan talepleri karşılamak ve sağlıklı, hijyenik koşullar da kaliteli ve güven içerikli hizmet vermeyi kendine görev edinmiştir.

2006 yılı itibariyle Sayın; Mehmet BEKEN tarafından kurularak ticari faaliyetine başlayan “Beken Gıda ve Su Ürünleri Akaryakıt San Tic Ltd Şti.” 2008 yılında çalışmalarına kendi tesisini kurarak devam etmiştir. Halen çalışmalarına aynı tesislerde devam eden şirketimiz dondurulmuş su ürünleri üretimi konusunda profosyonel bir çalışma grubuyla gün geçtikçe kendisini geliştirmeye devam etmektedir.

2009 yılında TRİTON BEKEN GIDA adı ile markalaşan şirketimiz gün geçtikçe ürün yelpazesini de genişletmektedir. Bilimsel veriler ışığında su ürünleri ile beslenmenin önemli olduğunu sürekli ve sıkılmadan yineleyen şirketimiz bu konuda gereken her türlü titizliği ve çabayı göstermektedir.

Misyonumuz, insan sağlığı için çok önemli olan su ürünlerini hijyenik koşullarda ve uluslararası kalite standartlarına uygun olarak hazırlayarak, en uygun fiyatla sunmaktır.

Şirket olarak vizyonumuz balıkçılık sektöründeki güvenirliliğimiz,titizliğimiz ve kalitemizle birleştirerek kendini sürekli yenileyen bir Dünya firması olmaktır.
