Name: Vighneshwara Enterprise( VIGHNET )
Description:
Welcome to Vighneshwara Enterprise: Your Trusted Seafood Trading Partner!

At Vighneshwara Enterprise, we take pride in being a leading trading company specializing in the sourcing and distribution of fresh and frozen seafood. Based in the vibrant coastal city of Cochin, South India, we have swiftly emerged as a reliable name in the seafood industry.

**Our Expertise:**
Backed by a dedicated team of experienced professionals, we have mastered the art of seafood trading. With a relentless commitment to quality and excellence, we have earned the trust of a discerning global clientele within Eight years of our inception.

**Our Partnerships:**
Our success story is intertwined with the relationships we've nurtured. We have strategically partnered with esteemed suppliers both in India and abroad. These partnerships are built on a foundation of trust, quality consciousness, and dedication to delivering the finest seafood products. Our suppliers boast coveted EU approvals and hold internationally recognized food safety certifications, including ISO 22000, BRC, and the esteemed Dolphin Safe Certification of EII.

**What Sets Us Apart:**
- **Global Reach:** We cater to elite customers worldwide, ensuring seamless deliveries and unparalleled service across borders.
- **Quality Assurance:** Our commitment to sourcing only the freshest and highest quality seafood products is unwavering.
- **Certified Excellence:** We exclusively collaborate with suppliers who meet stringent international standards, guaranteeing the safety and quality of our offerings.

**Join Us in Redefining Seafood Excellence:**
Whether you're a seafood enthusiast, a discerning customer, or a valued supplier, Vighneshwara Enterprise welcomes you to experience the epitome of seafood excellence. Connect with us for premium seafood products, exceptional service, and lasting partnerships.

Name: The Scottish White Fish Producers Association
Description:
Formed in 1943, SWFPA is the largest fishing association in Scotland – and in Europe. We represent around 200 vessels and 1,400 fishermen who contribute a collective £158 million to Scotland’s economy.
We are the political voice of our members. This means we continually speak to our fishermen – hearing their experiences, concerns, and insights – and then relay those messages to policymakers and other relevant industry figures. This helps facilitate a sustainable fishing sector which works for the environment, for consumers, and for the fishermen.

Name: Pacific Dream Seafoods
Description:
At Pacific Dream Seafoods, we strive to deliver highest quality sustainable seafood products. This means we carefully and deliberately work to develop the loyal business relationships needed to source and supply our seafood. Loyalty among our customers as well as our suppliers has been built on trust, and a genuine commitment to providing the absolute freshest and highest quality seafood available. We live up to the commitments we make and stand behind the products we sell. We strive to be transparent in all that we do. 

Our Team

We are a privately-owned family business that started in 2003 with a mission to deliver the highest-quality seafood products to our customers. With a deep passion for our oceans, we're committed to discovering, developing and supporting sustainable fishing practices. 

Our Commitment to Sustainability

Long before we founded Pacific Dream Seafoods, we were fisherman. We've shared a passion for fishing and crabbing since we were young kids. Throughout the years, we've developed a deep appreciation for the ocean and our environment and know that the only way to preserve it for future generations is to develop, adopt and enforce responsible fishing and aquaculture policies. We believe the future is in sustainable seafood and are optimistic that by working together this will become a reality.

Name: MARPESCA Group s.r.l.
Description:
La MARPESCA Group s.r.l. nasce da un'antica tradizione tramandata da padre in figlio, a garanzia della qualità e della sicurezza, nel selezionare i prodotti del mare della Calabria: terra di sole, di mare generoso, ricco ed incontaminato, in cui la varietà dei fondali favorisce la presenza di molteplici specie ittiche.

Una tradizione continuamente messa in atto in ogni fase della storia dei Ceravolo per motivare le scelte e guidare le tendenze. I nostri vecchi dicevano che "da morza veni a forza", in altre parole la forza e la salute derivano dal buon nutrimento.

Da ciò deriva la nostra filosofia che, mettendo al centro l'importanza del prodotto ittico per la nostra salute, mira a difendere il valore del pescato calabrese che si distingue per un'elevata qualità e garanzia di indiscutibile freschezza. Noi diamo al pescato calabrese un valore aggiunto in più, portando direttamente sulle tavole delle famiglie il miglior pesce possibile:

NOI LO PESCHIAMO, lo selezioniamo e lo commercializziamo. Rigorosità nella scelta e qualità dei prodotti guidano le nostre azioni quotidianamente.

Name: Clark's Harbour Seafood Limited
Description:
Clark's Harbour Seafood Ltd. is a lobster wholesale facility located in the Lobster Capital of Canada.

We specialize in succulent sea-kissed frozen raw and frozen cooked lobster meat and fresh, wild caught, live lobster caught deep in the cold pristine waters of the North Atlantic Ocean, untouched by man until landed on the boat.

Founded by local families, our company has a long history, a legacy that goes back generations. We are proud to continue this legacy and are proud of the community we live and operate in.

We specialize in shipping live lobster to numerous markets, including Europe, Asia, mainland China, Hong Kong, Japan, the United States and Canada and and so we are able to provide our customers with a quality product all year round. Our live lobster is part of a sustainable fishing industry, and as a Canadian Food Inspection Agency approved plant, our experienced staff can ensure both the quality and safe handling of our products.

We are able to ship in a variety of containers for export by air, using a number of types of cardboard boxes of various sizes to meet your needs.

Name: Dunkeld Trout Hatchery
Description:
Situated in the “trout capital of Africa”, the picturesque Dullstroom Highlands of the Mpumalanga province in South Africa, we’re the Southern Hemisphere's leading supplier of certified disease-free trout eggs. Sourced from selectively bred and naturally spawning stock during the Northern Hemisphere's spring and summer months.

Dunkeld Trout Hatcheries is a privately owned aquaculture company backed by the Touch Down Corporation. We are registered as an approved export facility with the Department of Agriculture, Forestry and Fisheries. Our focused team of experts, with over 75 years combined experience, are driven to provide our clientele with not only the highest quality eggs but also fish that perform in a variety of conditions.

The aquaculture sector is experiencing tremendous growth worldwide. Through the supply of naturally spawning and selectively bred disease free eggs, Dunkeld Trout Hatcheries ensures that trout farmers around the world can maximise their aquaculture potential and together, we are making a sustainable contribution to food production for a rapidly growing global population.

Name: Musholm A/S
Description:
Musholm A/S is an aquaculture company based out of Denmark.

Musholm is specialized in sea farming of trout of the species Oncorhynchus mykiss. Our production is vertically integrated as we cover the entire life cycle of the fish from egg and smolt to large fish reared in sea farms.

Musholm has a modern processing plant and a computerized traceability system for complete tracking of all its products.  Our head office is situated in the port of Reersoe approx. 110 km west of Copenhagen. Our hatcheries and smolt farms are situated in Jutland and our sea farms in the Great Belt. Fresh trout from Musholm is available during the harvesting season from October until the end of December. The remaining part of the year, we primarily sell frozen trout.

At 2-3 years of age the trout is harvested and has attained sizes ranging from 1 to 5 kg with the majority between 2-4 kg. We calibrate (size grade) the fish in intervals of 500 g, but different sizes are available upon request. We grade the trout according to meat color on the Roche scale in 13-1 4/R, 14-15/R and 15-16/R. In addition to whole trout, Musholm offers a range of value added trout products such as fillets, steaks and portions for reprocessing, catering and retail – for private label or Musholm brand. Musholm also produces trout roe into various products, e.g. Sujiko and Ikura for the Japanese market, – and fresh and frozen trout eggs (caviar), lightly salted, pasteurized in jars or naturel in special packings for food-service and retailers.

Name: Les Sirènes Boulonnaises
Description:
Les Sirènes Boulonnaises, c’est avant tout une histoire de famille et de passion pour la mer qui traverse les générations. Fondée en 1957 par Louise Marcotte à Boulogne-sur-Mer, au cœur du premier port de pêche de France, notre entreprise incarne l’âme du mareyage artisanal et local.

Avec une équipe de 40 collaborateurs, nous perpétuons un savoir-faire transmis avec fierté. Chaque jour, nous sélectionnons avec exigence les meilleurs produits de la mer, issus en majorité de la pêche locale et artisanale. Derrière chaque poisson, chaque coquillage, il y a une histoire, un pêcheur, une criée, un lien humain que nous entretenons avec soin.

Nous croyons en une alimentation plus responsable, plus proche des producteurs, plus ancrée dans les saisons. C’est pourquoi nous privilégions les circuits courts et travaillons en transparence, dans le respect de la fraîcheur, de la traçabilité et des normes de qualité les plus rigoureuses.

Au-delà du produit, nous cultivons un lien fort avec nos clients : restaurateurs, poissonniers, particuliers. Grâce à notre boutique en ligne et notre service de retrait sur site, nous rendons la mer accessible à tous, sans jamais sacrifier l’authenticité.

Les Sirènes Boulonnaises, c’est une entreprise engagée, chaleureuse et fidèle à ses racines, qui continue d’avancer en restant à l’écoute de ceux qui la font vivre.

Name: Glidden Point Oyster Farms
Description:
Established in 1987, Glidden Point Oyster Farm is located in Edgecomb, Maine, producing premium Maine oysters. We pride ourselves on exceptional quality, consistent size, and a reliable supply.

Glidden Point Oysters are grown slowly, and in the nutrient-rich depths of the Damariscotta River, a world class growing environment. Our oysters are renowned for their heavy shell, and beautiful appearance. We start from seed and grow them in upwellers and floating bags on the surface of the river until they reach the appropriate size to be harvested. 

Servicing our community of wholesalers, chefs, and retail customers.

All Glidden Point oysters are harvested by hand, and often by scuba diver. We touch our oysters every step of the way, and it's the care we take, whether it's grading seed, diving, or culling, that produces a premium oyster we're proud to share with you, and proud to call our own.

Name: REFEST EU Project
Description:
REFEST: Retrofitting of fishing fleets with low payback time and easy-to-deploy solutions for footprint and GHG emissions reduction. 

Call: HORIZON-MISS-2023-OCEAN-01
Granting Authority: European Climate, Infrastructure and Environment Executive Agency (CINEA)
Start date/Duration: May 2024 - 36  months

This European-funded project is focused on the most promising scalable technologies, easy to deploy and suitable to be installed in a broad range of traditional fishing ships to provide hydrodynamics, electrical power management, alternative propellers, solar electricity generation and propulsion (batteries), sensoring and digitalization, hull appendages and air lubrication. 

REFEST aims to achieve procedures and technologies to secure the reduction of fuel consumption and GHG emissions up to 40% reduction compared to the original design. 

The solutions proposed will be designed to ready to deploy in a broad range of small fishing vessels. Ensuring upscaling of the proposed solutions after project implementation till 2029. 

https://research-and-innovation.ec.europa.eu/funding/funding-opportunities/funding-programmes-and-open-calls/horizon-europe/eu-missions-horizon-europe/restore-our-ocean-and-waters_en

Description:

Fabricamos monofilamento de nylon para Palangre - Pesca Anzol - MonCad (desde 0,50 mm até 4,00 mm) e Redes em Monofilamento (desde 0,30 mm até 0,90 mm), multifilamento Alta Tenacidade (210/6 até 210/72) e multimonofilamento de nylon (0,20mmx4 até 0,20mmx16fios).
O monofilamento pode ser utilizado para pesca à linha (ex. cherne), para palangre de fundo (ex. pescada) e palangre de superfície (ex. atum, espadarte). Os panos de redes, são fabricados para artes de emalhar, transmalho e arte de cerco.
Temos uma larga experiência na fabricação destes artigos, mais de 85% da nossa produção é para exportação, principalmente para Espanha, França, Irlanda, UK, Noruega, Itália, Marrocos, Mauritânia, Senegal, Cabo Verde, Angola, Uruguai e Peru.
Todos os produtos por nós fabricados têm uma excelente relação qualidade / preço, apostando em rápidos prazos de entrega, pequenas quantidades por pedido, produtos personalizados a cada cliente e serviço profissional e eficiente.

Name: STARFISH 4.0 SSF
Description: STARFISH 4.0 (Demonstration of a solar-powered Vessel Monitoring System (VMS) and digital tools for the safety of artisanal fishermen and sustainable management of small-scale fisheries) is a 2-year project (2020-2021), funded by the European Commission’s European Maritime and Fisheries Fund as part of its Sustainable Blue Economy grant. Small-scale fisheries play an important role in the European Union from a biological, economic and social perspective, amounting to 85% of all fishing vessels. But SSF are not currently monitored as large, industrial fishing vessels are; we do not know where they fish, nor how much, which creates significant challenges for sustainable resource management. The STARFISH 4.0 project demo trials a tracking system for small-scale fishers in real operational conditions at sea. The general goal is to refine the product through user feedback and improve stakeholder engagement in order to speed up market uptake by one year after the end of the project.

Name: SEARCULAR
Description:
SEARCULAR is an international research and innovation project involving 13 industry specialists and research organisations across Europe. The project is coordinated by Spanish research institute AZTI and aims to work with fishermen and women, netmakers and ports to reduce marine litter generated by #fishing gear at source. 

By testing and refining four circular solutions to plastic waste, SEARCULAR is helping to support sustainable livelihoods and healthy marine ecosystems. Three solutions use more sustainable materials as alternatives to the traditional plastics used in fishing gear, and one solution helps ports to recycle fishing gear after use. 

Together, these holistic approaches can give gear a new lease of life and enhance sustainability in the fishing industry.

Our aim? To reduce marine litter and microplastics generated by European fisheries, and facilitate a circular economy for fishing gear. We hope to achieve this by sharing, reusing, repairing, refurbishing and recycling products and materials in a loop. We will work directly with the fishing industry to build acceptance and promote uptake of innovative, smart and sustainable fishing gear solutions.

Email us at: info@searcular.eu

SEARCULAR is funded by the European Union. The project has also received funding from UK Research and Innovation (UKRI). Views and opinions expressed are however those of the author(s) only and do not necessarily reflect those of the European Union, the European Climate, Infrastructure and Environment Executive Agency or UKRI. Neither the European Union, the granting authority nor UKRI can be held responsible for them.

Name: Triskell Seafood Ltd
Description:
Triskell Seafood Ltd. was founded in 1999 by Marie-Aude Danguy, a native of Brittany on the west coast of France. 
In business now for over 20 years, Triskell Seafood Ltd was originally set up to sell oysters and clams to France and has since expanded its activity right across Europe.

Name: Nutriee Fish
Description:
Samaki Stop | Nutriee Fish is not just a business; it is a bold reimagination of what fish processing and market aggregation should look like in Africa. Every year, countless fish go to waste while communities struggle with malnutrition. The problem is not scarcity but inefficiency, and that is where we step in—not to play by the old rules, but to rewrite them entirely.

We transform fish into high-value, nutrient-rich products—fish powder, pastes, biscuits, and ready-to-eat meals—designed for both affordability and impact. We are not stopping at just adding value; we are building an ecosystem where market aggregation meets sustainable processing. Solar-powered processing facilities? Check. Traceable supply chains? Absolutely. A circular economy where nothing goes to waste? That is the heartbeat of our model.

We are redefining fish consumption beyond the fresh or fried status quo. Think of fish in a school feeding program, as a protein-rich supplement in food aid initiatives, or in a busy professional’s grab-and-go snack. This is the future we are crafting—one where small-scale fishers, traders, and processors are empowered with better incomes, where food security is not an abstract policy but a tangible reality.

The best part? This is just the beginning. Samaki Stop | Nutriee Fish is not waiting for solutions; we are creating them. And we are not thinking inside the box or outside it—we are building a whole new container.

Name: Recreational Fishing Alliance
Description:
Anti-fishing groups and radical environmental interests are pushing an agenda on marine fisheries issues affecting America’s saltwater anglers. At the Recreational Fishing Alliance (RFA), we’re pushing back to protect your right to fish!

Incorporated in 1996 as a 501(c)(4) national, grassroots political action organization, RFA is in the trenches, lobbying, educating decision-makers, and ensuring that the interests of America’s coastal anglers are being heard loud and clear. Click here to learn more about what we’re up against, and why joining the Recreational Fishing Alliance (RFA) is so important when it comes to protecting your right to fish.

As your watchdog, RFA understands what recreational fishing is worth to you – we were founded specifically to represent recreational fishermen and the recreational fishing industry on marine fisheries issues on every coast, with state chapters established to spearhead the regional issues while building local support for the overall RFA mission:

“To safeguard the rights of saltwater anglers, protect marine, boat and tackle industry jobs and ensure the long-term sustainability of U.S. saltwater fisheries.”

Our organization also has its own dockyard and cold storage facilities to maintain our own vessels and products. Name: Fisher Piscicultura
Description:
A Fisher Piscicultura SA foi criada em agosto de 2011 com foco na realização de investimentos em piscicultura, tendo em vista a experiência dos membros da equipe tanto na concepção, implantação e operação de Unidade Integrada de Produção, quanto em técnicas de administração e gestão de projetos.

No segundo semestre de 2012, a Fisher iniciou os estudos para desenvolvimento do projeto do TRGV – Tanque Rede de Grande Volume,  visando o ganho de escala na atividade de piscicultura e a correção das deficiências dos equipamentos importados para a realidade brasileira.

O TRGV, inovação criada pela Fisher, teve seu projeto básico finalizado em abril 2013 e o pedido de patente foi protocolado em julho 2013 sob o número BR 10 2013 018094. Em outubro de 2013, o projeto executivo foi finalizado e em dezembro iniciou-se a construção do protótipo, finalizada em julho de 2014. Todo o desenvolvimento de P, D & I relativo ao TRGV foi custeado com recursos próprios.

Nossa missão é produzir e comercializar produtos de peixe com elevado padrão de qualidade, de maneira rentável e segura, com responsabilidade social e ambiental gerando desenvolvimento nos mercados onde atua. A Fisher acredita que o caminho para atingir sua missão é através da profissionalização da gestão da piscicultura e do desenvolvimento tecnológico. Por este motivo a empresa já nasceu de maneira organizada e investindo em inovação
A Fisher é parte do portfolio da Aqua Spark – Fundo de investimento focado em aquacultura sustentável ao redor do mundo.

Name: Polski Karp Sp. z o.o. - Organizacja Producentów
Description:
Spółka Polski Karp powstała w 2012 roku. Jej powstanie było odpowiedzią na zapotrzebowanie rynku na najwyżej jakości karpia, wyhodowanego zgodnie z wielowiekową tradycją i dobrostanem. W roku 2016, decyzją Ministra Gospodarki Morskiej i Żeglugi Śródlądowej, spółka Polski Karp została formalnie uznaną Organizacją Producentów. Obecnie zrzeszamy ponad 75 profesjonalnych podmiotów akwakultury, specjalizujących się w hodowli i przetwórstwie karpia. W naszej ofercie dostępne są również gatunki ryb słodkowodnych, takie jak amur, tołpyga, sum, jesiotr, karaś, lin, szczupak. Dzięki współpracy z najlepszymi polskimi hodowcami, sprawdzonym systemom hodowli, nadzorowi lekarzy weterynarii oraz doświadczonym handlowcom, jesteśmy w stanie zagwarantować stałą dostępność karpia, nie tylko w okresie Świąt Bożego Narodzenia.

Naszym celem jest propagowanie polskiego karpia oraz optymalizacja efektywności jego hodowli i sprzedaży w kraju. W swojej grupie posiadamy gospodarstwa o silnej marce lokalnej, m.in. Karp Zatorski, Karp z Przyborowa, Karp z Siemienia. Spółka sprzedaje zarówno żywą rybę, jak i świeżo pakowaną oraz organizuje szkolenia i warsztaty edukacyjne dla znanych w Polsce sieci sprzedaży, m.in. Tesco, Carrefour, Makro Polska.

Name: KNOTT ALONE-HOLD FAST
Description: Providing support to Veterans battling effects from service while helping prevent suicide through the use of immersive, hands-on commercial fishing (Waterman) activities combined with traditional and alternative therapeutic programs.  Waterman activities can include crabbing (primary), oystering, fishing, aquaculture, and living shoreline construction.  All aspects of these activities will incorporate educational and research programs focused on coastal ocean and estuary habitats to increase awareness on responsible and sustainable fishing and the growing array of environmental concerns.  Additionally, the program will include apprenticeship opportunities to provide a pathway for advanced skill development and potential licensure to enter the commercial fishing workforce.

Description:
GSA - Grenada Sustainable Aquaculture is pleased to provide this project for zero-water exchange sustainable organic shrimp farm. GSA has been founded and endorsed by the Government of Grenada as an approved Citizenship by Investment (CBI) Project. The GSA operation will utilize the latest, high-tech and proven methodology to grow premier Pacific White Shrimp, or Litopenaeus vannamei. Our environmentally friendly approach to aquaculture can offer signiﬁcant economic growth in a new industry that will diversify the economy. Our goal for this project at maturity is to add more than 9% to the Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of Grenada while creating more than 400 new local jobs. 

Grenada Sustainable Aquaculture offers a unique program backed with investor buy-back protection. Combining the latest high technology equipment/methods with Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (“IMTA”), the investor benefits from the ever increasing worldwide demand for sustainable shrimp. The worldwide market is estimated to be USD $430 billion by 2018.

GSA Team boasts a senior international staff with over 150 years of business building and management experience. The product development team hails from senior management positions in the top companies in Europe and the United States. Their ability to implement product development and distribution utilising cost efﬁcient solutions is unsurpassed in the industry.

Name: Boston Fisheries Foundation
Description:
Celebrating 100 Years of the Boston Fish Pier!

The Boston Fisheries Foundation was created by some Boston fish guys with the simple goal of celebrating seafood. This party became the first-ever Boston Seafood Festival and Seafood Gala, taking place in October of 2012 at the Bank of America Pavilion. Both events were a tremendous success, and were repeated in 2013 on an even grander scale. 

After two successful festivals, the concept behind the BFF evolved as members wanted to do more to share their passion for healthy, delicious seafood with the world. The fish guys put their heads together and filed for 501(c)3 non-profit status in 2013. The BFF's mission now includes initiatives to educate the public about the benefits of sustainably harvested seafood in order to support and expand the fisheries; and to preserve the role of fishermen and fishing communities as a vibrant part of New England's heritage. 

Perhaps the most ambitious goal of the BFF is to start The Boston Fisheries Museum, an endeavor spearheaded by BFF members to preserve maritime artifacts and history for future generations to enjoy. Additionally, members are developing materials to educate the public about issues facing the industry, and to introduce many of the delicious, lesser-known seafood varieties and encourage their preparation at home. 

Learn more at www.bostonseafoodfestival.org 

Celebrate seafood!

Name: Ètablissement Portuaire de la Baie du Repos  ميناء خليج الراحة
Mordecai Farms
Description:
At Mordecai Farms we operate an innovative and sustainable catfish and vegetable farm using a recirculating aquaculture system (RAS). We use effluent to grow vegetables and are powered by solar energy.

Our integrated approach is designed to maximise resource efficiency, minimise waste, and ensure consistent, high-quality production all year round. By closing the loop between aquaculture and crop cultivation, we significantly reduce water use, energy demand, and overall environmental impact while maintaining optimal growing conditions.

This model, which is still uncommon in Ghana, positions Mordecai Farms at the forefront of sustainable aquaculture and agribusiness innovation, demonstrating how climate-conscious systems can scale without compromising productivity or quality.

In recognition of this work, Mordecai Farms was awarded Best Aquaculture Farm, 2025 (Eastern Region for) at the recent National Farmers’ Day celebration, reaffirming our commitment to excellence, innovation, and responsible food production in Ghana.

Name: VRFish
Description:
As the peak body representing a community of over 838,000 Victorians, the Victorian Recreational Fishing Peak Body (VRFish) works to consult broadly and communicate with the Victorian recreational fishing community, represent and advocate the views of recreational fishers to Government and their agencies and ensure full access to a diverse and healthy Victorian recreational fishery. VRFish provides support through facilitation, advocacy, education strategies and policy development.

VRFish is a not for profit organisation established in 1995 and is funded by Victorian Recreational Fishing Licence (RFL) revenue. VRFish commenced operations after a joint Parliamentary Committee recommended to the then Minister for Natural Resources that a Peak Body be set up to represent the interests of recreational fishers in Victoria.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

VRFish Charter: To consult broadly with the recreational fishing community to represent the views of recreational fishers in an accurate and timely manner to Government and their agencies, as well as communicate effectively with the recreational fishers of Victoria.

VRFish Vision: To ensure full access to a diverse and healthy Victorian recreational fishery. 

VRFish Mission: To represent and advocate the interests of the Victorian recreational fishing community.

Name: Virginia Fly Fishing & Wine Festival
Description:
The Virginia Fly Fishing & Wine Festival is the largest event of its kind in the country and attracts fly anglers from across the United States and the Mid-Atlantic in particular. Nowhere else can anglers learn about the quiet sport in such a beginner-friendly environment. Our unique event combines fine wine tasting, microbrewery beer, and everything you ever wanted to know about fly fishing but were afraid to ask.

The mission of the Virginia Fly Fishing & Wine Festival is to introduce as many people to the sport of fly fishing as possible, and to raise the level of awareness to the many pressing conservation issues facing Virginia. We do this believing that people, who are connected to the outdoors in their recreational activities, are more inclined to protect the natural resources they enjoy.  #VAFlyFishingFestival www.vaflyfishingfestival.com 

Bring your family, relax, take a casting class, and pick up a new sport that the entire family can enjoy.

The Virginia Fly Fishing & Wine Festival is held at The Meadow Events Park, just a few miles outside of Richmond, Virginia.

The festival — the largest event of its kind in the country, drawing fly anglers from as far away as New York and Georgia — appeals to anglers of all ages and stages.

Festival attendees listen to lectures from various experts and practice hands-on skills at the two-day, family-friendly event. Several wineries from throughout the Old Dominion provide free wine tastings for those 21 and older.

Last year’s festival enjoyed record turnout, and the event was flooded with children. Be sure to check out our expanded kayak demonstration area. Yes, you can try before you buy on our kayak/SUPB demo pond.

Those who have enjoyed the outdoor festival environment for years can rest easy: Although the new facility will enable all vendors to be under roof, the events center is surrounded by extensive grounds suitable for outdoor classes and wine tastings.

Name: Northeast Seafood Coalition
Description:
The Northeast Seafood Coalition ("NSC" or "Coalition") is a non-profit 501(c)(6) membership organization that represents commercial fishing businesses.  NSC members are small, independent, entrepreneurial businesses that fish for – and support fishing for – cod, haddock, flounders, and other groundfish species along the northeast coast.  NSC’s fishing business members fish from small and large ports all along the northeast coast.  They fish small, medium, and large vessels, and they utilize, among them, all groundfish gear types (trawl, longline, gillnet, and others).   The number of fishing business members in NSC is approximately 255.

NSC’s mission is to work for the long term health of fishery resources, fishing communities, and the fishing industry throughout the northeast.  Since 2002, NSC has worked in the policy process in efforts to help develop rules to rebuild the northeast groundfish fishery.  NSC works for rules that embody real solutions to complex fishery problems.

Also known as The Trout People, service delivery is our motto. We offer the full range and value chain of trout products, we deliver an extensive range of processed trout products to restaurants and the hospitality industry throughout South Africa

Name: Nordenfjeldske Development Services AS
Description:
NFDS has been operating since 1982. In 1991 it was incorporated as a fully independent Norwegian Public Company. Our head office is in Trondheim, Norway, we have an African Office in Gaborone, Botswana and a satellite office in Mozambique. The offices are run by a core team of dedicated technical and administrative personnel. NFDS also has staff deployed in various countries on long-term projects and a range of associated consultants and institutional partners that work with us on specific projects.

NFDS offers a variety of services related to fisheries, natural resource management and vessel operations. Our experience is based on a long history of project management and implementation, mainly in the developing world. Our expertise is anchored in the Norwegian philosophy of fisheries and natural resource management where sustainable utilisation of the resource and protection of the environment are vital elements of a holistic approach to ocean governance.  NFDS applies a comprehensive project and personnel management system based on Det Norske Veritas (DNV) certification and the EN ISO 9001 standard. Our quality assurance system has been implemented successfully and to a high standard in all our projects.

NFDS has gained a name for quality fisheries work in developing country situations.  The experience of the company started in the maritime and vessel management field but over the last decades has expanded into fisheries management, MCS, IUU fishing research, fisheries research and overall governance.

NFDS has worked extensively with governments and inter-governmental bodies and has a solid understanding of many of the issues that this work will need to cover. NFDS has experience across Africa, within individual countries, African Regional Fisheries Management Organisations (RFMO) and Regional Fisheries Bodies (RFB) as well as the Regional Economic Communities (RECs).

Name: Artico S.R.L. - Canne da Pesca
Description:
Esperienza, tecnologia e grande tradizione contraddistinguono le canne da pesca realizzate da Artico, una fra le primissime famiglie che si sono dedicate a questo settore. 
La vasta gamma proposta sul mercato nasce dall'utilizzo di materiali affidabili e sofisticati, nonchè dalla valida collaborazione dei più prestigiosi campioni delle varie tecniche di pesca.
Le continue ricerche volte al perfezionamento della produzione e il costante interesse all'evoluzione dei materiali dall'impiego, caratterizzano la filosofia e il successo di questa azienda, secondo cui ogni canna viene concepita con le caratteristiche tecniche necessarie per rispondere a specifiche esigenze.
A supportare l'immagine della ditta Artico, esiste una capillare rete di punti vendita che garantisce a tutti i pescatori una valida consulenza e assistenza.

公司的高管团队由畜牧水产技术专家、农业行业的资深专家、中间件软件专家、IT行业连锁管理软件开发专家、财务专家、投资专家等能力互补的人才构成。公司还拥有一支大专以上、经受过专业培训且年轻、充满活力的服务团队。渔愉鱼立足水产行业，于2010年4月率先在广东、广西发展水产服务连锁经营模式，现在渔愉鱼1000多个连锁店遍布华南、华中、华东及西南十多个省。
公司分布：无锡、佛山、深圳、成都、武汉、常德、天津、龙岩、南宁、沈阳。
Location: 无锡市南长区, 江苏省

Name: AquaTech Perú
Description:
Technology Aquaculture Perú. Empresa peruana comprometida en el desarrollo de la acuicultura continental  desde hace más de 10 años, experiencia que nos permite tener una óptica  integral   para afrontar los grandes desafíos en el cultivo de especies acuícolas. La dedicación profesional y el trabajo conjunto con nuestros clientes a lo largo de todos estos años ubicándonos como la principal empresa peruana en el abastecimiento de ovas, estructuras, equipos y insumos.
Hoy que nos orientamos a nuevos  retos y grandes desafíos  te invitamos a ser parte de este gran equipo y juntos  optimizar los estándares de calidad de los productos que ofrecemos, mediante un proceso permanente de innovación tecnológica.

Name: Fish Technologies 2014 SL
Description:
Fish Technologies nace con la idea de satisfacer una demanda de calidad, creciente en el sector de la acuariofilia.
Queremos tener presencia en el  máximo número de comercios profesionales, que compartan nuestra filosofía, tanto en el ámbito nacional como internacional.
Nuestra meta es proveer a nuestros colaboradores de peces de extrema calidad, libres de patologías, una buena coloración y un tamaño que permita admirar a cada pez en su plenitud. 
Para ello, con la máxima rigurosidad, seleccionamos a nuestros proveedores entre los mejores, escogiendo a aquellos que se preocupan por la selección genética y el bienestar de los peces. Nuestros técnicos se desplazan hasta los criaderos de origen, para asegurarnos que cumplen nuestros requerimientos y asesorarles en los puntos necesarios. 
Todo ello apoyado por las más modernas instalaciones de Europa, y con el equipo de expertos más cualificado en cada área de trabajo.
Nuestro compromiso con la calidad, va más allá de la venta, disponemos  también de:
Zona de reproducción, para asegurar un stock permanente de las variedades más sensibles y especiales, sin los problemas de transporte desde origen. Desde esta zona apostamos por la recuperación de variedades antiguas que, pese a su belleza, han desaparecido del circuito comercial. Nuestro principal objetivo es el desarrollo de líneas genéticas y variedades propias. 
Área de I+D+i, donde se estudian protocolos de actuación, embalaje, nutrición y tratamientos inocuos para el medio ambiente.
Servicio post venta de consultoría y formación para nuestros clientes.
En definitiva, trabajamos para que ustedes puedan contar con los peces y complementos de la más alta calidad, para ayudarles a optimizar su negocio,

Name: Manatee Holdings Ltd.
Description:
Manatee Holdings Ltd. helped pioneer the wild Geoduck Clam Fishery in British Columbia (BC), Canada. Manatee also spear headed the Geoduck Clam Culture Industry in BC. Our company harvests Geoduck clams and sea cucumbers from the wild fisheries with a 75% profit margin. It also owns its own shellfish hatchery and has substantial sub tidal aquaculture tenures. Our fishery licenses are worth in excess of $4 million. Our aquaculture holdings have a present value of about $20 million but could be expanded upon to well in excess of $100 million with the right financing.

The market for Geoduck clams and sea cucumbers is expanding far beyond the industry’s  ability to satisfy. This has created an opportunity for investment into the aquaculture of both species. Manatee is in a unique position in British Columbia to capitalize on this situation.

Name: Kadıoğlu Balıkçılık
Description:
Biz, İstanbul Su Ürünleri Hali’nde faaliyet gösteren bir toptan balık satıcısıyız. Amacımız, taze ve kaliteli balık ürünlerini müşterilerimize sunarak mutfaklarınıza lezzet katmaktır.

Sahip olduğumuz deneyim ve uzmanlıkla, her tür balığı en taze şekilde temin ediyor ve müşterilerimize sunuyoruz. Müşteri memnuniyeti bizim için en büyük önceliktir ve her siparişi titizlikle hazırlarız.

Taze deniz ürünlerine olan bağlılığımızı ve kaliteli hizmet anlayışımızı her gün sürdürmek için buradayız. Eğer taze balık ihtiyacınız varsa, bizimle iletişime geçmekten çekinmeyin. Sizlere en iyi balık deneyimini sunmak için sabırsızlanıyoruz.

#ToptanBalıkSatışı #İstanbulSuÜrünleriHali #TazeBalık #KaliteliHizmet

Name: THE TOP JEWEL LLC
Description:
Established in 2012, The Top Jewel LLC specializes in fishing, freezing, and exporting high-quality fresh and frozen seafood. Our mission is to deliver the finest seafood products to our customers while maintaining a strong focus on quality, hygiene, and compliance with international health standards. From pristine marine environments, we carefully source and process a wide range of seafood to ensure freshness and quality. Our product range includes species such as Mackerel, Horse Mackerel, Sardines, Grey Mullet, Mahi Mahi, Bonito, Hilsa, Squid, Cuttlefish, Red Seabream, Barracuda, Ribbonfish, Emperor, Grouper, and Tuna. Additionally, we produce a variety of value-added seafood products tailored to meet diverse customer needs.

Commitment to Sustainability:
At Top Jewel LLC, sustainability is at the core of our operations. We prioritize environmental responsibility and adhere strictly to global quality standards to ensure our products meet the highest international benchmarks. Guided by principles of integrity and transparency, we build trust with stakeholders and drive our continuous growth in the global seafood industry.

Vision and Values:
Our vision is to become a globally recognized leader in the seafood sector, renowned for innovation, sustainability, and exceptional quality. We aim to set new industry benchmarks, support our communities, and continually improve our processes. By fostering trust and loyalty among our partners and clients worldwide, we strive to contribute positively to

Description: Le Groupement des Armateurs et Industriels de la Pêche au Sénégal (GAIPES) rassemble les principaux acteurs de la pêche industrielle au Sénégal. Il compte une vingtaine de membres actifs. Au plan national, le GAIPES collabore avec la pêche artisanale et l’Administration de tutelle afin de veiller à ce que soit mis en place un cadre réglementaire adapté à l’évolution socio-économique de notre secteur. Au plan sous-régional, le GAIPES accompagne l’Administration sénégalaise dans établissement de protocoles de pêche avec les différents pays frontaliers.

Name: Arsala Seafoods
Description: ASF specializes in frozen seafood and aquatic products from Pakistan, meeting top export quality. We continuously improve and diversify offerings to meet market demands, complying with food safety regulations. Our strategic location, abundant resources, professional team, and visionary leadership guarantee delivering the most valuable products to our customers.

Name: Newalla Fish Company
Description:
Welcome to Newalla Fish Company! Our mission is to provide private pond and lake owners with an exciting sport fish experience by offering top-quality pond-ready fingerlings that are raised specially for private waters. Our unique approach involves maintaining focus on creating pond-ready hybrid striped bass and domesticated striped bass, allowing us to produce a true pond-ready sport fish with exceptional performance without risk of invasive effects, disease or bacterial contamination.

At Newalla Fish Company, we don't deal in multiple species like giant fish farms do, because we believe in the value of focused discipline. Instead, we use state-of-the-art recirculating aquaculture systems to create the most powerful and sought-after sport fish fingerlings on the market. We carefully tune their performance to ensure they are ready to thrive in private waters, even in the smallest ponds. Our fish are incredibly powerful from the start, and our customers enjoy lasting success through effective communication and support.

Name: Distretto della Pesca e Crescita Blu
Description:
Coinvolge oltre centotrenta imprese della filiera della pesca, dalla cantieristica alla trasformazione e conservazione del pescato. L’obiettivo primario è quello di privilegiare un territorio, quello costiero siciliano, da sempre “vocato” alla pesca, per definire le strategie e gli interventi di rilancio del sistema economico, favorire i percorsi di sviluppo e di valorizzazione del sistema produttivo isolano, aumentare la competitività e la produttività attraverso il miglioramento delle condizioni strutturali e socio-istituzionali.

Oltre alle aziende della filiera, il Distretto comprende Enti Pubblici e di Ricerca, Associazioni di categoria e Consorzi di produttori.

Tra gli Enti il Comune di Mazara del Vallo, la Provincia e la Camera di Commercio di Trapani, il CNR, il Parco Scientifico e Tecnologico della Sicilia, l’Università di Palermo, l’ISPRA (ex ICRAM), l’Istituto Zooprofilattico della Sicilia. L’operatività del Distretto Produttivo “Cosvap” è definita nel “Patto per lo Sviluppo del Distretto Produttivo della Pesca Industriale del Mediterraneo”, sottoscritto ufficialmente il 25 marzo 2006 e rinnovato nel giugno 2011, pubblicato sul sito web del Distretto (www.distrettopescaecrescitablu.it).

Name: Guangdong Universal Aquatic Food Co.,LTD
Description:
Established in 2001 in Guangdong province in China, Guangdong Universal is an aquatic products enterprises which focuses on the R&D, production and processing , domestic and foreign trade of the tilapia, shrimp, golden pompano and other sea products. 

GDUS had taken “High quality, safe, healthy food” as their own duty since it’s foundation in 2001, established and implemented a comprehensive traceability HACCP quality management system from the beginning of breading bases, production process, storage to the sales.

Throughout the development of 24 years, GDUS had obtained BRCGS,BAP,Kosher and more. We have customers from all over the world and expand domestic distribution channel in Haikou, Guangzhou ,Shenzhen, Shanghai, Hangzhou, Wuhan, Zhengzhou, Shijiazhuang and other cites.

For more information, visit http://gdus.cc/

Global Fishing Company est une startup senegalese spécialisée dans le développement de solutions numériques pour les acteurs de la pêche. notre mission est de favoriser l'utilisation des nouvelles technologies dans la gestion des affaires maritimes.
Nous intervenons dans toute la chaine de management qui va de l'administration, la gestion de l'environnement, la production et dans la commercialisation des produits halieutiques.
La premiere solution lancée est Aywajieune (www.aywajieune.com), la première plateforme spécialisée dans la distribution des produits halieutiques. 
D'autres produits, dans le domaine de la digitalisation des services des différentes structures privées et publiques, sont en cours de réalisation et verront le jour très prochainement.

Name: Double Threat Fishing Charters
Description:
Whether you have years of experience on the water or desire a tranquil family outing, Double Threat Fishing Charters will suit your needs. Sportfishing is always met with different variables. Winds, currents, and weather patterns are constantly changing. Our South Florida fishing charters take these variables into account while simultaneously considering customer preference.

What sets us apart from other Miami fishing charters is our flexibility. We offer many different packages from the flats to the Gulf Stream that consider the preference, experience level, and budget of our clientele. With extensive knowledge of inshore and offshore fisheries coupled with experience targetting every gamefish in Miami, we will find the bite. We pride ourselves by offering more flexibility and better customer service than any other fishing charter in Miami. Our crew will make every trip a special one. We don't count down seconds until we retutn to port, we spare no expense and pursue the fish of a lifetime on every trip. If the bite is slow offshore we might go inshore and target another species. Tight travelling schedule? We will find a way to get you on the water. Our accomodations will ensure a quality experience and they begin from the moment you contact us. Our charter service is fully licensed and provides everything necessary for a safe and memorable day on the water. While gazing at the skyline of Miami Beach, Downtown Miami, and Key Biscayne during the run back to port, you'll fully understand the addiction of sport fishing. Join us for an unforgettable day of tournament-style fishing and make sure to bring a camera.

Name: JALA FISH
Description:
Our JALA fishery products come from the pristine, untouched waters of Indonesia’s Talaud island in Sulawesi. Our fishery works to achieve the highest standards in international best practices to manage the quality of the catch and support the livelihoods of artisanal fishing communities. Their traditional fishing methods, have the lowest impact on the environment, and is thus very sustainable. 

At JALA, we are dedicated to sourcing only high-quality fish for your palate that, in turn, return greater value to the fishing communities. To achieve this promise, we provide ongoing coaching to our fishermen on how to improve the handling process, and equipment. We then facilitate the access that they need to premium markets - such as Australia - so the fishing communities can directly benefit from their high-quality products and strive after their highest potential.

Name: Quality Custom Packing, Inc.
Description: Quality Custom Packing is a seafood supplier with an expertise in scallops. We are headquartered in New Bedford, Massachusetts; home to the most valuable commercial fishing port in the world.  Founded in 2000, Quality Custom Packing sources, packs and helps to market scallops. QCP can source fresh product from local boats, or from all ends of the globe. We are the infrastructure for you to begin or to retool your scallop program. Our clients benefit from our knowledge and experience regarding scallops. Our DoD approved, BRC certified, state-of-the-art facilities, located on the historic waterfront of New Bedford, Massachusetts, encompasses over 25,000 square feet of space. Our Quality Control Department is staffed by FDA and USDC/NOAA certified technicians, who completely oversee all production. We offer a 100% traceable, fully sustainable product. We are superb at forecasting prices and emerging trends in the industry. QCP is focused on consistent customer satisfaction that exceeds normal standards previously held by other New Bedford scallop suppliers. We are your scallop experts and we will show you how to use your position in the market to increase revenue. Our goal is to achieve long lasting business relationships that are beneficial to all.

Name: Observatorio Español de la Merluza
Description:
La merluza, es sus múltiples tipos (merluza europea, merluza hubsi, merluza negra, merluza del cabo,…) representa una especie fundamental para nuestra flota pesquera. Pescada con artes tradicionales como el pincho, el arrastre, la volanta,… es una de las especies objetivo más importante de los caladeros europeos y en todo el océano atlántico, aunque tiene presencia en otros océanos.

Se trata de la especie de pescado capturado de modo salvaje más consumida por las familias españoles y cuenta además con una gran tradición gastronómica en nuestro país con especialidades muy diversas en todo el litoral español. 

Desde el Observatorio Español de la Merluza trabajamos en la difusión de noticias sobre la pesca de esta especie, el estado biológico, la gobernanza y en noticias sobre la gastronomía / salud relacionados con ella. También trabajaremos en aclarar algunas fake news y desinformaciones interesadas sobre ella desde puntos de vista científicos y de sostenibilidad ambiental, económica y social.

Name: VanLandschoot & Sons Fish Market

Name: CENTERFISH Pesquisa e Consultoria Ambiental
Description:
A CENTERFISH Pesquisa e Consultoria Ambiental é uma empresa direcionada ao desenvolvimento de soluções ambientais e de produção no setor aquícola, oferecendo assessoria na articulação de projetos científicos e técnicos integrados de carácter multi e interdisciplinar nas áreas de aquicultura e conservação de ambientes aquáticos naturais.  

A empresa conta com uma equipe de profissionais qualificados e habilitados nas diversas áreas do conhecimento em Biologia, Engenharia de Pesca, Medicina Veterinária, Zootecnia, entre outros.

Name: Sawfish Conservation Society
Description:
The Sawfish Conservation Society is a 501 (c)(3) not-for-profit charity. The SCS is an international group that is based in Florida, USA.

The SCS practices a multifaceted approach to sawfish conservation by providing outreach materials and hosting events to support sawfish education, providing sawfish researchers with tools and platforms to help them pursue their studies and promote collaboration, and assisting with enforcement of protective legislation.

The motto of the SCS is “conservation through collaboration”, as we believe that sawfish conservation can only be accomplished through collaboration of all stakeholders including the general public. This is shown in the diversity of the SCS members, which consist of sawfish researchers, aquarists, managers, fishers, and sawfish enthusiasts from around the world. While the SCS is guided by its board, the society’s strengths come from its members. The SCS has also partnered with various NGO’s, government organizations, and aquariums to further sawfish conservation.

Name: Taino Aqua Ferme SA
Description:
Who Are We:

Taino Aqua Ferme (TAF) is the market leader in commercial aquaculture in Haiti. Our goal to establish a local aqua farming industry provides nutritious and delicious fish at an affordable price. In doing so, we positively impact economic development through direct employment for many, indirect employment opportunities for many more, and adding our membership to the vital cadre of local growers in Haiti.

Our Products:

Healthy and delicious. Our fresh and 100% All-Natural Salt Water Tilapia are some of the best quality on the planet. Raised in a pristine salt water lake, our fish are incredibly versatile, delicious, and boast a firm, flaky flesh.  Since TAF fish are raised in large floating sea nets, our fish do not eat algae, mud, or waste at the bottom of shallow ponds. We believe that the very best fish are served fresh and we work hard to ensure the freshness of our Tilapia, from our farm to your table. Our Tilapia is hand-cut, trimmed, uniform in size and packed ready to prepare.

Our Approach:

Responsibly Raised. No Chemicals, Growth Hormones, Mercury Or Other Contaminants. We understand, respect and agree that you only want to serve the best food to your family. Our rigorous processes ensure purity.  We know that our fish are safe for all consumers, including pregnant or nursing women and young children. 

Our Tilapia have an advantage over fish caught in the wild. They only eat the nutritious floating vegetable-based food we provide. This controlled diet allows them to grow healthy and strong. We use only the best fish food which contributes to the fresh, clean taste of our Tilapia. We are committed to growing our fish in a healthy way. It makes a difference in fish health—and, ultimately, our customer’s health. 

Peace of mind for you is simply business as usual for us.

Name: Rooney Fish Ltd
Description:
Rooney Fish is a proud family-run business with over four decades of experience delivering the finest Irish sea shellfish to discerning customers across the UK and beyond. Since 1975, we have built a reputation for exceptional quality, sustainable sourcing, and a deep passion for seafood that is reflected in every product we offer.

Based in the heart of Ireland, Rooney Fish specializes in premium shellfish including langoustines, crabs, lobsters, oysters, and more. Our unique access to some of the cleanest and richest waters around Ireland allows us to supply shellfish of unparalleled freshness and flavour. We work closely with local fishermen and trusted suppliers to ensure that every catch meets our rigorous standards of quality and sustainability.

Our commitment to sustainability means we carefully select our sources and work in harmony with the environment to protect marine life for future generations. We believe in responsible harvesting practices that support the ecosystem while delivering top-tier products to our customers.

At Rooney Fish, customer satisfaction is at the core of what we do. Whether supplying high-end restaurants, retailers, or seafood wholesalers, we strive to exceed expectations with reliable service, consistent quality, and expert knowledge. Our team is passionate about sharing the incredible taste of Irish seafood and helping our clients bring authentic, fresh, and sustainable shellfish to their menus and shelves.

We pride ourselves not only on our premium product range but also on the heritage and values that have guided us for nearly 50 years. As a family business, we understand the importance of trust, integrity, and personal relationships — qualities that resonate through our business partnerships and customer interactions.

Explore the world of Irish shellfish with Rooney Fish, where tradition meets quality, and every bite tells a story of the sea.

Name: Buriman Pesca & Camping

Contamos com mais de 5 anos de experiência no mercado da pesca esportiva e somos um grupo sólido com o melhor relacionamento possível entre cliente final, fornecedores e prestadores de serviços.

 Buriman Pesca & Camping é administrada por uma nova escola de “empresários pescadores”, a Buriman segue as seguintes vertentes de inspiração:

Visão: Propor ao pescador brasileiro conforto e satisfação durante suas pescarias, fornecendo equipamentos adequados de acordo com cada categoria e intenção de pesca.

Missão: Gerar empregos no ramo da pesca com fundamentos de valores morais e empresariais. Logo ser referência como uma loja diferenciada pela alegria de exercer um atendimento personalizado, apresentando com propriedade e transparência produtos de qualidade.

Valores: Cada colaborador interno, fornecedores, parceiros e clientes são essenciais para a Buriman.

O tratamento com respeito, transparência e amigável são fundamentais para alavancar vendas e propor satisfação ao cliente pescador.

Filosofia: Equipe interna da Buriman só pode ser composta por pescadores, propondo assim atendimento personalizado, comodidade e garantir satisfação ao cliente no ato da compra e respectivamente na pescaria.

Name: Tindagat PH (Jasconius Technologies Inc)
Description:

We also help remedy the income inequality for fishers by advancing sustainability on sea-to-table consumption for the Philippines. Currently, our Top SeaCrate Subscription Package in NCR+ is helping fishers in the Lubang community of Mindoro with the support of our subscribers. 

VISION
By 2030, partner and develop 200,000 professional small-scale fishers to increase their income and improve their families’ quality of life while enabling a healthier Philippine society and environment.

MISSION
To uplift fishing communities by creating opportunities and an enabling environment so that fishers and their families lead better lives, and to enable the Filipino consumer to take pride and enjoy the benefits of high quality and responsibly sourced seafood.  

ACCOMPLISHMENTS
• Leadership for Climate-Resilient Fisheries Fellowship (2021)
• Sustainable Ocean Alliance Microgrant Awardee (2021)
• Top 10 BPI Sinag Spark Finalist (2021)

VALUES
At Jasconius Technologies, we apply key values in delivering our products and services to our partners and consumers.
• Community: co-creation of solutions with our partners to deliver beyond our customer’s expectations
• Sustainability: ensuring that the products and practices of our organization and our partner communities are highly compliant to sustainability standards

Name: GUSTO GIDA
Description:
Yüksek kalite ve standart Gusto Gıda için en önemli prensiptir.
2007 yılında yerli ve ithal dondurulmuş deniz ürünlerinin satış ve pazarlaması amacıyla İstanbul’da kurulan GUSTO GIDA İTHALAT LTD. ŞTİ. Türkiye’nin çeşitli bölgelerinden toplatıp işlettiği ve başta Asya olmak üzere dünyanın dört bir yanından ithal ettiği yüksek kalitedeki deniz ürünlerini tecrübeli ve uzman çalışanlarıyla müşterilerine sunar. Yedi yılı aşkın bilgi, birikim ve uzmanlığı ile balık ürünleri skalasına kurutulmuş domates, peynir dolgulu biber, pancar, enginar ve mantar gibi doğa ürünlerinin satış ve pazarlamasını da ekleyen GUSTO GIDA İTHALAT LTD. ŞTİ. gıda sektöründe sağlam adımlarla ilerlemektedir. 

Kavacık merkez ofisteki 300 m2, 30 ton kapasiteli ana soğuk hava deposu ve Yeni Sahra’daki 500 m2, 50 ton kapasiteli ek soğuk hava deposu ile ürünlerimizi Gıda Güvenliği Yönetim Sistemine ve Türk Standartlar Enstitüsü Helal Gıda Yönetmeliğine uygun sağlıklı ve güvenli bir şekilde muhafaza etmekteyiz. En yeni ve gelişmiş teknoloji ürünü olan bu soğuk hava depoları iç ısılarını, sürekli kayıt eden ve istenmeyen ısı derecelerinde alarm veren data-logger sistemi ile donatılmıştır. Bununla birlikte ithal ettiğimiz ve yerel üreticiden tedarik ettiğimiz ürün sevkiyatlarında aynı sistemi kullanan frigofrik lojistik firmaları ile çalışmakta, GUSTO GIDA olarak da İstanbul ve çevresinde seçkin otel, lokanta, kafe ve şarküterilere satışı yapılıp siparişi alınan ürünlerin frigofrik araç filomuzla aynı gün içinde sevkiyatını gerçekleştirmekteyiz.

Bizim en önemli değerimiz müşteri memnuniyetini işte bu şekilde, sürekli teknolojik ve lojistik yatırımlar yaparak, sektör odaklı şirket içi eğitime önem vererek, güvenli gıda saklama, taşıma, kritik anlarda müdahale yöntemleri ve süreç takip sistemleri uygulayarak korumaktayız. GUSTO GIDA İTHALAT LTD. ŞTİ. olarak müşterilerimize Türkiye ve dünyanın alanlarında en iyi tedarikçilerinden en kaliteli ürünleri en kısa ve güvenli şekilde ulaştırmaya devam edeceğiz.

The Ultimate Louisiana Fishing Adventure for Anglers of All Ages!

New Orleans Louisiana, Home of Jazz, Great Food, Southern Hospitality and one of the world's most popular fishing destinations. Louisiana is called "Sportsman's Paradise" and for good reason. Our rich ecosystem provides ideal habitats for some of the most sought after fresh and saltwater species of fish, birds, alligators and serves as a breeding ground for all. Come on down and get an amazing up close and personal look at Louisiana wildlife. Located just outside New Orleans, Delacroix Louisiana is one of, if not the best location for in-shore saltwater Redfish fishing.
Let's Go Fish!

Want to catch some Redfish? The explosive hit on tackle followed by the immediate scream of the fishing reel, is the signature mark of the Red Drum species and here at Louisiana Fishing Charters we don't go fishing, we go catching! Our waterways are packed full of some of the most popular fresh and saltwater species including the hard fighting Redfish, Speckled trout, Sheephead and more. 

Our friendly, professional fishing guides will have you out on the water and filling up the ice chest in no-time! We are having a record year and just recently netted the Largest Redfish ever caught aboard one of our charter boats, the big bull redfish measured in at 42 inches weighing over 30 pounds!

If you're ready for the ultimate outdoor fishing experience give us a call and book your trip today!

Name: Pro Lake Management, LLC
Description: Texas Pro Lake Management located in Comanche Texas specializes in aeration and fountain installations, lake stocking, and lake management throughout Texas. Texas Pro Lake Management is owned by fisheries biologist Steven Bardin. In 2005 I started working on a Bachelors degree in Freshwater Biology from Tarleton State University in Stephenville, Texas. Soon thereafter, I began working for Harrell Arms at Arms Bait Co. and Fish Farm Inc. in Proctor. Working for Harrell was the most rewarding and educational experience of my life. I truly owe much of what I know about fish and pond management to Harrell and his 50 year experience he was willing to share with me. In 2009, I completed my Bachelors degree and began pursuing a Masters degree in Fisheries Science under Dr. Masser at Texas A&M University. I am currently a member of the Texas Aquaculture Society, the Texas Aquatic Plant Management Society, and the Texas Chapter of the American Fisheries Society. Texas Pro Lake Management is the result of my knowledge from Harrell Arms, my formal education at various universities (Tarleton State University, Texas A&M University, and Kentucky State University), continuing training with Aquatic Eco Systems in lake aeration, and my own experiences managing private lakes throughout Texas.

Name: Fundación Mi Caleta
Description:
MiCaleta es una organización sin fines de lucro que comercializa productos del mar de Chile. Buscamos poner en valor la pesca artesanal en Chile, reconstruyendo un vínculo con nuestro mar y su gente, visibilizando los sectores y recursos tradicionales de la economía popular Chilena y la cultura local de las caletas. Desarrollamos un modelo de negocios que garantiza a diversos tipos de cliente una pesca y un servicio de calidad, acortando la cadena de comercialización, y redistribuyendo de manera más justa el valor en la misma. 
Responsables en lo social, ambiental, y solidario, potenciamos nuevos canales de demanda y optimizamos un modelo que beneficia al océano, la economía de las comunidades involucradas, y la seguridad alimentaria de la población.

Name: Westport Aquaculture - The finest oysters in the world.
Description: Six hundred acres of oyster beds in Long Island Sound and a short journey to New York City make a combination full of promise for Westport Aquaculture LLC, formed early in 2010 to market shellfish, particularly oysters, to restaurants in the city.  A family-owned property in Westport, Connecticut, since 1857, the beds are maintained by natural methods that meet the National Organics Standards Board’s criteria for “organic” aquaculture. Today’s result is an endless supply of very fine oysters due to sustainable techniques applied to a superb breeding ground.  The equally superb oysters have for years been eagerly sought by a number of restaurants that regard them as the finest available. Now, in introducing this appeal to high-end New York restaurants, Westport Aquaculture has met with enthusiastic acceptance by leading chefs.

Name: Pan African Fisheries
Description:
Pan Africa fisheries is a new fish farming business in Zambia and was registered on 23rd January 2019 as a limited company by shares. The farm is situated on a fertile arable farm land with water availability all year round from the Kafue river and adjacent Milyashi stream, it is  set between Chingola and Chililabombwe, making it a prime location for a robust fish farm and training center for fish farming and integrated bio-intensive general agriculture. The property is strategically located close to the Kasumbalesa border post. 
The Zambian Integrated Property Border Crossing Company (ZIPBCC), the company jointly managing the Kasumbalesa border post with Government, is staking US$20 million to build additional facilities at the boundary with the Democratic Republic of Congo (DRC) to improve traffic flow and increase revenue collection. ZIPBCC is proposing to build 10 warehouses, a trans-shipping centre and a dual carriageway from Chililabombwe to the border at Kasumbalesa. 
PAF was brought into this world in order to achieve. The targeted achievements are as ambitious as they are necessary. There is an unbelievable gap between the need and the availability of fish in Zambia and central Africa. PAF will strive to eradicate this gap and thrive in developing Zambia from net importer to net exporter of fish related protein. This will be done by employing cutting edge fish farming methods whilst keeping the environmental impact to an absolute minimum. In combination with the newest available and suitable technology we shall utilize new marketing methods that will make a serious impact for the farming poor in Zambia through supplying them with income that is both higher and more stable than their present methods. PAF aims to make a sustainable return for the investors whilst positively engaging with all stakeholders in the shape of local authorities, local farmers, nutritionists and nature preservationists.

Name: Haliburton Highlands Outdoors Association
Description:
The Haliburton Highlands Outdoors Association (HHOA) is a non-profit organization founded in 1993.  Supported by our active membership and volunteers, the HHOA is comprised of a diverse group of permanent and seasonal residents of the Haliburton Highlands who come from across the province of Ontario and the United States.  This dynamic group of people is committed to the sustainable management of natural resources.

In 1997, the HHOA entered into a partnership with the Ministry of Natural Resources and the Ontario Federation of Anglers and Hunters in the development and implementation of the Haliburton Lake Trout Project.The largest project undertaken by the HHOA, the Haliburton Fish Hatchery officially opened in April 2000 and since then has raised and stocked over 460,000 fish.  An initiative driven by the community, local anglers, businesses and organizations, the hatchery specifically focuses on enhancing naturally reproducing lake trout populations by stocking local native lake trout strains in Crown water bodies.   Raising the Haliburton Gold, the HHOA is helping to preserve one of the oldest and purest strains of lake trout in the world.  The HHOA also hosts a number of other programs and projects including an archery program, resource centre, wetlands studies, lake access point clean-up, shoal-spawning and stream restoration, emergency deer feeding program, wildlife seeding program and public/youth education and outreach.

Name: Plumfin
Description:
Plumfin is an aquatech firm that focuses on revolutionizing production. Based in India, it aims to disrupt the aquaculture market through the use of smart technology that provides predictive maintenance to farms. 
What started off in a garage in a 1000sqm tank became a 2 acre farm and now is evolving to a service that will address the pain points of all farmers engaged in Aquaculture. 
Transformative change in production isn't just essential for today's farmers; it's crucial for the entire world. With edible protein becoming increasingly expensive and unsustainable, at Plumfin, we're striving to change this using innovative aquaculture technology. Picture a production system that treats wastewater entirely, returning it directly to its source, and yields 100% organic produce in economically viable quantities. This is the vision we aim to bring to farmers everywhere.
Our technology will be data-driven, employing pond sensors to monitor animal health and feeding patterns. This approach will boost yields and strengthen disease resistance, all while maintaining organic practices.

Name: Sturgeon Industry Alliance of America - SIAA
Description:
Protecting US and International Sturgeon industry interests. While working to enhance traceability and sustainable practices to safeguard wild sturgeon populations. 

The SIAA was established in May, 2022 to provide a unified response opposing the USFWS proposed bans of numerous sturgeon species that would remove the vast majority of available sustainably farm-raised sturgeon from commercialization within the U.S.A. In addition to the vast decline of farmed supply the sturgeon industry would experience, the bans would put additional stress on the wild populations the bans intend to protect, as well as have the potential ripple effects on any similar species.

If you are an interested party and would like to contact us to discuss the SIAA’s ongoing efforts, please reach out via info@siaausa.com or on our website below !

Name: Ozark Fisheries
Description:
Ozark Fisheries is a 4th generation family owned and operated ornamental goldfish and koi farm. Founded in 1926, Ozark Fisheries has been raising and selling quality goldfish and koi throughout North America for over 97 years. 

With two locations to better serve our customers, our headquarters is located near Stoutland, Missouri. In 1970, Ozark Fisheries purchased a second farm in Martinsville, Indiana. Originally established in 1899 as Grassyfork Fisheries, our Indiana location is the oldest, continuously operated private fish farm in the United States. 

We raise feeder goldfish, rosy red minnows, and several varieties of ornamental fancy goldfish including red fantails, calico fantails, pond comets, shubunkins, and sarasa comets. We also raise and sell both standard fin and butterfly koi, as well as bullfrog tadpoles, trapdoor snails, and crayfish.

Name: ArtesanalPesca
Description:
ArtesanalPesca é uma cooperativa de produtores de Pesca, com o objetivo de valorizar os produtos do mar capturados pelos pescadores de Sesimbra.

A cooperativa marca a diferença em dois pontos chave: na forma como captura o pescado, através da pesca artesanal, e através de um comércio justo.

A ArtesanalPesca comercializa directamente o pescado capturado pelos barcos dos seus associados. 
A união e centralização das suas capturas permite um posicionamento no mercado, uma escala e segurança na defesa dos armadores e pescadores, que de outra forma seria difícil obter. 
Isto permite eliminar intermediários e logo a cadeia de comercialização é mais curta, e consequentemente mais justa, o que também beneficia o consumidor.

A implementação da nossa estratégia representou uma revolução no sector da pesca nacional e possibilitou uma forma mais justa e sustentável de comercialização do pescado dos nossos associados. 

Comprar peixe à ArtesanalPesca equivale a adquirir peixe directamente ao pescador, garantindo assim os máximos níveis de frescura e qualidade.

OBJECTIF
Établir une ferme de référence et un centre d’excellence sur le site des Symphonies Naturelles avec des étangs et des écloseries capables de produire et de fournir des alevins, des géniteurs et du poisson à manger de qualité aux pisciculteurs et à toutes les couches de la population de Kinshasa et de la RDC

Être capable de produire dans le même contexte la meilleure qualité d’aliments pour poissons

S’appuyer sur la collaboration et le transfert de savoir-faire de nos partenaires : FIDA, IITA et World Fish

Développer les 2 principales espèces de poissons : Tilapia Nilotica (souche améliorée comme les GIFT) et Clarias Gariepinus

Name: Aguirrebarrena Mareyeur
Description:
En 1984, M. Aguirrebarrena a commencé comme pêcheur de civelles, anguilles, lamproies, saumons et aloses dans l’Adour. Après quelques années de pêche, en 1993, M. Aguirrebarrena a décidé de créer sa propre entreprise de mareyage de poissons d’eau douce en commençant par la transformation et vente de sa propre pêche.

Aujourd’hui, la société est dirigée par son fils qui a décidé de reprendre le flambeau.

En tant que mareyeur, nous commercialisons l'anguille, la civelle, la lamproie, l'Alose, le Saumon, la Crevette et autres produits de la pêche artisanale d'estuaires et de nos rivières françaises sont aussi disponibles selon les saisons.

Les pêches artisanales, proviennent de notre réseau de 350 pêcheurs professionnels réunis autour de nos viviers comme point stockage. Leurs captures sont durables, respectent l'environnement par des techniques de pèches artisanales sélectives et des quotas rigoureux sur ces espèces très spécifiques dont certaines font partie de programmes de repeuplement auquel notre groupe participe. Ces pêches artisanales ne passent pas par les criées et sont négociées avec chaque pécheur à chaque pèche et pour vous proposer ces produits en direct au meilleur ratio qualité prix.

Ces pêches sont collectées et centralisées sur nos viviers puis sur nos plates-formes grâce à notre propre flotte de camions viviers et de camions frigos.

L’ensemble de nos approvisionnements sont tracés depuis le pêcheur jusqu’à votre livraison et facturation.

Notre objectif est de préparer avec soin et manuellement ces poissons et crustacés, pour vous les livrer selon vos besoins vivants, frais sous glace, cuits, fumés, en conserves.

Notre service de mareyeur est tourné vers les grossistes en Marée et les poissonniers indépendants.

Les restaurateurs et les traiteurs peuvent avoir accès à un service sur mesure.

Les transformateurs, conserveurs et fumeurs pourront aussi compter sur nous pour des espèces comme l’Anguille sauvage et la lamproie.

Name: Gold River Seafood Ltd.
Description:
Gold River is a privately held, Canadian-founded, owned, and operated seafood company, founded and managed by Walter Simpson, a leader with a 50-year history in the seafood industry.

The company’s seafood products are available fresh or frozen and include: albacore tuna; pacific halibut; black cod; pacific ocean perch; wild salmon; dover sole; and more. gold river believes that quality begins with the method of capture. All fish are individually caught and handled, allowing Gold River to implement onboard protocols that mean the fish maintain their superior quality from the moment they surface from the water.

Gold River has also created a 7-Point Signature System that is followed through boarding, unloading and processing. They work with off loaders and processers to ensure the aesthetic quality of their fish remains intact – fish are never dropped or thrown. When the fish reach the grading table, each individual fish is unloaded by hand, graded, and carefully placed into a tote under Gold River’s supervision. All products have guaranteed traceability.

he company makes the environment a priority throughout their operations, from using sustainable fishing practices at harvest to minimizing resource usage. Gold River is a member of a number of organizations focused on sustainability, including the Canadian Pacific Sustainable Fisheries Society and the Marine Stewardship Council. They have received SCS Global Certification for their sustainability efforts.

Name: Sunugal Poissonnerie

Name: The Company ONE
Description:
The Company One is a private company that operates a state-of-the-art tropical finfish breeding facility in Cairns, Queensland, Australia.
The breeding facility is capable of commercially breeding a range of grouper species with a current focus on production of fingerlings of 3 species from the Grouper family: (i) Queensland Groper (Giant Grouper), (ii) Blue Speckled Grouper and (iii) Coral Trout.
The facility’s controlled environment contains unique systems and processes that allow the adult broodstock fish to spawn naturally, every month producing over 300 million fertilised eggs per annum. These are nurtured through a delicate hatchery process to produce healthy fingerlings (baby fish) that are free of common pathogens and diseases.
Our fingerlings are supplied to aquaculture facilities in Australia to on-grow the grouper to a market size. Fingerlings are also exported to our sister companies in Hong Kong (Aquaculture Technologies Asia) and Taiwan (Epic) and other facilities in SE Asia and beyond.

Name: Torne Valley Dipnet Culture
Description:
The project consists of four work packages, which include activities ranging from developing a safeguarding strategy to a mobile exhibition, VR tools, and applications. The goal is to increase awareness of the cross-border dipnet fishing culture through e.g. events, podcasts, and marketing materials. A key part of the project is the transmission of knowledge to younger generations. Tradition practitioners, fishing communities, municipalities, organizations, and other stakeholders are involved in the sustainable conservation work within the project. 

The Torne Valley Dipnet Culture project is a collaboration between the City of Tornio (lead partner), the City of Haparanda, the Norrbotten Museum/Region Norrbotten, and Novia University of Applied Sciences. The umbrella organization ProSiika ry is an official partner of the project and represents the traditional communities and associations on both sides of the border. The Torne Valley Museum is responsible for project administration.

Implementation period: 01.08.2024 – 28.2.2027

Project manager: Merja Stenberg, merja.stenberg@tornio.fi
