Name: Eastern IFCA
Description:
Eastern IFCA is one of 10 Inshore Fisheries and Conservation Authorities (IFCAs), which protect the marine inshore environment around the coasts of England. 

The Eastern IFCA District boundaries stretch from Haile Sand Fort in the north to Felixstowe in the south, encompassing the counties of Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Suffolk and extending a further six nautical miles from their coastlines. IFCAs were created under the Marine and Coastal Access Act (2009) as a means of modernising the function and powers of the Sea Fisheries Committees, reflecting a greater responsibility for the conservation of the marine environment in conjunction with fisheries management and enforcement duties. 

Our vision: 'Inshore Fisheries and Conservation Authorities will lead, champion and manage a sustainable marine environment and inshore fisheries, by successfully securing the right balance between social, environmental and economic benefits to ensure healthy seas, sustainable fisheries and a viable industry.'

Since their inception in 2011, the IFCAs have demonstrated a “can do” attitude and sought to deliver value for money by managing stakeholder led decisions to support local communities. At the same time the IFCAs are working towards the UK Governments commitments to deliver a well-managed network of Marine Protected Areas to help achieve the “Blue Belt” around the coast of Great Britain.

Name: Bucksnort Trout Ranch
Description:
Bucksnort Trout Ranch offers a truly one of a kind locally sourced opportunity for Nashville area restaurants and caterers. Our water source sets us apart and we back that up with our framing practices. 
Our facility is fed by a 2.5 million gallon a day spring that is 100% contained on our property, which means no concerns about run-off from flowing through farm fields or along roadways. This water, which pours from the ground at a chilly 56° year round flows directly into our trout grow-out raceways were we simulate a natural stream environment. Everything is single pass gravity fed, which means no electricity consumed pumping our water. We never utilize chemicals in our grow-out process and even do all our aquatic weed control by hand.
We deliver fresh trout into the Greater Nashville Area every Monday and Thursday and it arrives at your door within 4 hours of leaving our crystal clear spring water. We deliver on ice in coolers which are unloaded at the customer, so we generate zero packaging waste. Our ice is made with our spring water, so our trout arrive having never even touched a chlorinated ice cube. You simply can not find a fresher or more environmentally friendly fish option in the Nashville area.

To obtain a free sample or inquire about being added to our ever expanding delivery route, call (615) 920-3183. 
Current customers include such Nashville landmarks as:
The City House
Rolf and Daughters
Husk
Liberty Common
Union Common 
Green Pheasant
Makeready Libations 
Bourbon Steakhouse
Oak Steakhouse
Old School Cafe
Stay Golden
Bucksnort trout is also available at Little's Fish Company and at the Turnip Truck Grocery Stores.
We even supply trout to the Nashville Zoo and to Friends of Radnor Lake for their injured Eagle program.


Contact us soon for your spot on the delivery route.

Após este procedimento o pescado é acondicionado em água do mar e gelo. Aplicamos esta técnica em todos os peixes do mar dos Açores.

A nossa fábrica dispõe de várias salas e câmaras climatizadas para o correto tratamento e acondicionamento do pescado. Os nossos colaboradores recebem formação, para que possamos entregar o pescado com o corte pretendido pelos nossos clientes.

A fim de satisfazer as vossas encomendas, elaboramos todas as semanas um menu de peixes com base nos dados de captura da Lota. Desta forma, poderá efetuar a sua encomenda de peixe, antes deste ser capturado, garantindo assim a frescura máxima do nosso pescado.

Name: T.Buck Suzuki Environmental Foundation
Description:
The T. Buck Suzuki Environmental Foundation, founded in 1981 by commercial fishermen, is named after Tatsuro "Buck" Suzuki, a Japanese-Canadian fisherman and an early environmental activist. Born on a float house on Don Island in the Fraser River, Suzuki began commercial fishing with his father on the river during the 1920s. Throughout his life, he was devoted to the preservation of fish habitat and frequently spoke out against the dumping of sewage and industrial waste into the Fraser River. He was a passionate advocate for the protection of the river and its environment long before the term "environmentalist" became familiar to most Canadians. 

Fish habitat protection, pollution prevention and sustainability of fisheries have been at the core of T. Buck Suzuki Foundation's mandate since its inception over three decades ago. We have taken action to protect habitats from the Lower Fraser River estuary to the Skeena watershed, we have helped develop provincial, national and international regulations toprevent pollutions (air, land and water), and we have been involved in multiple projects to support sustainable fisheries. We support and participate in fisheries research, multiple integrated marine planning and marine protected area processes.

Melihat potensi laut Indonesia timur yang sangat luar biasa, IBI mengambil langkah untuk bergerak di bidang perikanan, dimulai dengan sisi Operasioanal IBI memiliki armada untuk pancing sendiri, didukung oleh SDM para Nelayan yang sudah berpengalaman, IBI menjadikan ikan ikan dasar untuk target penangkapan utama, Kakap merah contoh nya. 

Dengan demikian, IBI dapat mengontrol penuh proses penangkapan ikan mulai dari laut, penyimpanan, hingga di distribusikan pada supplier, Sehingga kualitas Ikan akan sangat terjaga hingga di tangan pelanggan.

Metode penangkapan ikan dengan cara memancing yang ramah lingkungan, IBI turut mendukung dan mensupport untuk menjaga ekosistem biota laut.

IBI terbuka dan siap bekerja secara profesional terhadap mitra manapun yang ingin berkolaborasi bersama kami.

Name: Van der Endt-Louwerse
Description:
Rond 1920 is het bedrijf in Yerseke ontstaan. Grootvader Van der Endt is begonnen met het verzamelen van schelpengrit op het dijktalud aan de overkant waar het huidige bedrijf, nog steeds, gevestigd is. Hier werd het schelpengrit aan de lucht gedroogd en verpakt. Met paard en wagen bracht men in de omgeving de calciumbron aan huis bij de pluimveehouders. In de jaren 50 is men het grootser gaan aanpakken. Er werd een eigen schip gekocht dat de schelpen van de schelpenbanken kon opzuigen. De grotere aanvoer en innovatie zorgde ervoor dat Van der Endt zich steeds meer is gaan specialiseren in andere toepassingen voor schelpen. “Ostrea” is van oudsher de merknaam waaronder de producten op de markt gebracht worden.

In 2005 heeft men de productie en het merk ØTA (Oyta) overgenomen uit Denemarken. Zij bedienden tot 2004 met zeeschelpen hoofdzakelijk de Scandinavische en de exportmarkt vanaf een oever aan het Roskilde Fjord. Met het produceren zijn ze moeten stoppen, nadat het fjord waar hun schelpen uit gewonnen werden verklaard werd tot beschermd vogelgebied. De oestergrit haalde men daarna uit Noorwegen, gedroogd en gezeefd. Na steeds terug-komende aanvoer problemen heeft de toenmalige directeur Laust Dahlgaard besloten het merk ØTA (Oyta) te verkopen aan Van der Endt-Louwerse, Europees de grootste leverancier.

Onze activiteiten zijn onder andere:

Winning van grondstoffen met ons huidige schip de “Eemshorn”
Produceren van allerlei soorten grit voor de mengvoederindustrie
Produceren van diverse aanvullende voeders en bodembedekkers
Het verpakken van verschillende private labels
Het aanvoeren en wassen van schelpen voor isolatiemateriaal
Verkoop van schelpen voor onder andere drainage, waterzuivering, luchtfilters en als halfverharding voor paden en tuinen.

Name: ГК "БАЛТИЙСКИЙ БЕРЕГ"
Description:
Группа компаний «БАЛТИЙСКИЙ БЕРЕГ» является одним из лидеров на российском рынке производства и реализации рыбной продукции и рыборазведения атлантического лосося.

    Группа компаний была создана в 2000 году путем объединения усилий нескольких профессионалов рыбной отрасли. Штаб-квартира находится в Санкт-Петербурге.
    В состав ГК «БАЛТИЙСКИЙ БЕРЕГ» входят 15 компаний рыбной отрасли, осуществляющих закупку, выращивание, производство, упаковку, реализацию продукции по РФ и странам Ближнего зарубежья, и предоставляющие прочие услуги.
    Основные активы Группы – ЗАО «БАЛТИЙСКИЙ БЕРЕГ» и ГК «Русский Лосось».

ЗАО «БАЛТИЙСКИЙ БЕРЕГ» занимает лидирующие позиции на рынке пресервов из филе сельди, морепродуктов и морской капусты. Компания производит более 150 наименований продукции, основными из которых являются продукты из филе сельди и семги.

Производственные мощности представлены двумя производственными площадками в Санкт-Петербурге и Ленинградской области, оснащенными современным оборудованием и техникой, аккредитованной лабораторией по контролю сырья, полуфабрикатов и готовой продукции.

Компания поставляет продукцию по всей территории России: сформирована собственная региональная сеть дилеров (в городах от 100 тыс. чел.); осуществляется сотрудничество с федеральными и региональными ритейлерами, в т. ч. выпуск продукции под их брендами.

 ЗАО «Русский Лосось» – стратегический проект Группы по разведению атлантического лосося на прибрежной акватории Баренцева моря. Первая товарная продукция была получена в декабре 2009 года. На данный момент действует семь садковых хозяйств с производственными мощностями в 18 тыс. тонн товарного лосося. В 2011 г. Компания объявлена победителем в тендере на право водопользования до 2022 года прибрежными акваториями Баренцева моря, что гарантирует ее стабильное развитие.

This environment ensures the shellfish develop an outstanding quality and taste profile.

The clams are harvested in a non-invasive manner, using a system which mimics a naturally occurring storm event, which has a minimal impact on the environment. The Friend of the Sea certification confirms our efforts and

Cloudy Bay Clams have a delicious mouth-filling flavour and provide a unique dining experience. The clams can be enjoyed raw or cooked.

Name: IWI COLLECTIVE PARTNERSHIP
Description:
Iwi Collective Partnership is a collaboration of 19 like-minded Maori fishing entities from throughout the North Island of New Zealand. Managing 16,000 metric tonnes of annual commercial fishing rights to 123 New Zealand fish species, Iwi Collective Partnership is New Zealand’s largest tribal collective.

While you might be surprised at the reference to "traditional commercial fisheries", it's a little known fact that our tribes have traded seafood for over 200 years, a fact recorded in the diaries of Captain James Cook (1773).

Established in 2010, the collective operates via commercial partnerships with like-minded fishing companies. Through the partner brands of Moana New Zealand, Sealord, Port Nicholson Fisheries & Pelco NZ, seafood products derived from our quota are exported to premium global markets. Premium products include lobster (crayfish), scampi, paua (abalone) as well as an extensive range of white flesh fish.

Iwi Collective Partnership is 100% tribally owned, governed & managed. All proceeds are directed exclusively to social, cultural & health initiatives for the well-being of tribal communities.

Our 15 Iwi tribal members are Ngā Rauru Kiitahi, Ngāi Te Rangi, Ngāti Awa, Ngāti Manawa, Ngāti Porou, Ngāti Ruanui, Taranaki Iwi, Ngāitai, Te Rarawa, Ngāti Tuwharetoa, Whakatohea, Te Arawa, Rongowhakaata, Te Aitanga a Mahaki & Ngāti Whare.

Name: Living Waters Aquatic Management
Description:
Locally established & operated since 2007. We are families who serve businesses, communities and families. Similar to a living tree, Living Waters Aquatic Management has a philosophy of structure & growth. We call this integrated philosophy the 3 disciplines. Our 3 disciplines are: Biological, Chemical & Mechanical maintenance.

Our mission is to provide the best service to our clients and implement sustainable environmental practices. Our specialty is maintenance, cleaning and installs. We are leaders in water quality field-analysis. For neighborhood ponds & lakes, we are certified weed control applicators. But chemical maintenance with algaecides and herbicides is just one of our disciplines.

Our integrated disciplines include the mechanical aspects of your pond. We reduce chemical costs with aeration systems and erosion control management. Not only do we install subsurface aeration, but we also repair fountains, waterfall pumps and plumbing.

Thirdly, our aquatic maintenance technicians are well-trained in aquatic biology.  We are skilled at native and invasive plant identification, fish husbandry and more. This interdisciplinary work is known as Integrated Management.

Owner/operator Gerard Wellemeyer began with over 10-years experience in aquaculture. His vision for the company was simple: a focus on aquatic maintenance. The year of the startup was complicated by the subprime mortgage crisis. Wellemeyer navigated the company to success with relationship marketing and by delivering consistent results. We established in 2011 as a corporation in the State of Kansas. And with providence, humble work has led us to dynamic skill development.

We manage hundreds of fishing ponds, stormwater retention basins and aquatic systems, including watergardens, freshwater and saltwater fishtank and filter systems complete with koi, tropical fish, coral reefs, live aquatic plants, or goldfish.

Let’s create a lasting partnership to enhance your home or business.

Dry fish is increasingly becoming a vital factor in providing high-quality proteins, healthy fats (including long-chain omega-3 fatty acids like eicosatetraenoic acid (EPA) and docosahexaenoic acid (DHA)), The main results showed that dried fish was a very rich source of proteins, containing 80-85% protein.

In 1978, U.S. Marine purchased Master Marine, Inc. in Bayou La Batre, Alabama. Master Marine operates shipbuilding and ship repair facilities and has constructed over 320 commercial vessels of all types, including fishing trawlers, tug boats, pushboats, barges, passenger ferries and specialty watercraft up to 670 tons and 250 feet in length. Description: At Velocity Aqua, we are focused on helping aquaculture businesses succeed and remain viable by providing third party aquaculture solutions. We help entrepreneurs develop their concept, review their business plan, as well as provide third party investment readiness reviews for entrepreneurs seeking capital. Established businesses look to our network for support with specialized projects. Instead of pulling staff away from their duties for an important but time-consuming project, Velocity Aqua provides short-term solutions for projects like industry research, grant writing, feasibility analysis, staff training and media creation. Our network includes some of the best and most skilled aquaculture professionals in North America and we work to match our client’s project with the right professionals with the right skills.

Name: World Seafood Congress 2019
Description:
The World Seafood Congress (WSC) 2019 is a biannual global event owned by the International Association of Fish Inspectors (IAFI). It is scheduled to be held for the first time in Asia since its inception on 9-11 September, 2019 in Penang, Malaysia. 

The conference will be featuring keynote, oral and poster presentations as well as exhibitions.

With the theme “Seafood Supply Chains of the Future”, the conference unites a distinctive and world-class blend of scientists, researchers and leaders both from the scholarly community and industry to trade their information, experiences and research advancements on fish inspection, quality management and technological developments in the seafood sector. It will also address existing and evolving conditions that are critical for the sustainability of fisheries, aquaculture and ocean ecosystems, and demonstrate new innovations and solutions to these challenges.

Name: EAqau Farm Enterprise & Consultancy Services
Description:
EAqua Farm Enterprise & Consultancy Services is a fully operational aquaculture enterprise and professional consultancy firm headquartered in Uganda, with operational reach across Africa and selected international markets. The company is actively engaged in commercial fish farming, as well as the aggregation, processing, and marketing of high-quality Tilapia, Catfish, and Mukene fish products, supplied in fresh, frozen, smoked, and dried forms to meet diverse consumer, institutional, and export market requirements.

As a commercial fish farm, EAqua Farm Enterprise & Consultancy Services is actively producing Tilapia, applying extensive and semi-intensive production systems that emphasize fish health, feed efficiency, water quality management, and environmental sustainability. Our production operations are guided by Good Aquaculture Practices (GAP) to ensure consistent quality, food safety, and market-ready fish.

Beyond production and trade, EAqua Farm Enterprise & Consultancy Services delivers specialized aquaculture consultancy and technical advisory services to fish farmers, cooperatives, private investors, development programs, NGOs, and institutions. Our consultancy work focuses on the establishment, improvement, and scaling of commercially viable, environmentally responsible, and legally compliant aquaculture enterprises, particularly within freshwater pond and cage farming systems.

Our team applies evidence-based production approaches, combining hands-on farm experience with technical expertise to achieve optimal fish growth, high survival rates, reduced production risks, food safety compliance, and long-term business profitability.

Vision:
To be a leading producer of high-quality fish while providing trusted and professional aquaculture consultancy services globally.

Mission:
To produce high-quality fish and provide practical, transparent aquaculture consultancy that supports sustainable and profitable fish farming.

Name: Savitri Aquamonk
Description:
At Savitri Aquamonk, we believe in technology led solutions to aquaculture farming, especially for monitoring the L. Vannamei shrimp culture. 

As aquaculture farmers ourselves, our team witnessed the difficulties and problems faced in the shrimp industry. We suffered losses, craved for solutions, and looked for advice. The scarcity of reliable products and information sources have hampered our expansion plans.

We took the first step. Within our farming operations, we have adopted data driven approaches to track, measure, predict and address some of these key issues. We believed in advanced technology led solutions, and utilized them to  stem our losses and increase productivity in farming operations.

Deployed across 1,500 acres our farm management software has captured data of over 580 crop cycles, generating traceability reports for over 2,300 Tonnes of Vannamei in the calendar year 2019. Pond tagging, water quality and weather conditions monitoring solutions have been used across 140 acres, as an incremental induction along with the software. Trade and industry analytics solutions are an extension service we offer to the stakeholders within the industry.

Farm Management Software:
- Daily Operations Tracking
- Traceability Reports for Produce
- Warehouse and Supply Chain Management
- Cost Accounting and Financial Analysis
- Data Analytics Tools

Water Quality and Weather Conditions:
- pH, DO, Temperature, ORP
- Temperature, Humidity, Pressure, Rainfall, Wind

Industry Insights:
- Bi-lateral Shrimp Trade
- Exporter-Buyer Dependency Matrix
- Broodstock Import Data
- US Rejections Data

Name: Visserij-innovatiecentrum Zuidwest-Nederland B.V.
Description:
Het Nederlands visserijbeleid richt zich op verduurzaming van de visserijsector. De visserijsector, de overheid en de Europese Unie (EU) doen allemaal continue onderzoek naar nieuwe visserijtechnieken en aanpassingen aan vistuigen en netwerk.

Voordat nieuwe ontwikkelingen aan vistuigen en netwerk door visserijbedrijven op zee kunnen worden getest en zo efficiënt mogelijk kunnen worden ingezet, is het belangrijk het materiaal in een zo realistisch mogelijke omgeving te testen. Bij het innovatiecentrum is het mogelijk om inzicht te krijgen in het gedrag en gebruik van (aanpassingen aan) visnetten en –tuigen en dit zichtbaar te maken. Het Visserij-innovatiecentrum Zuidwest-Nederland B.V. biedt een unieke testfaciliteit voor het testen van netwerk en vistuigen in een bassin met zandbodem en zout water.

Description:
SuyogAqua, has been a leading business conglomerate having its business diversified in agro commodities processing & exports, marine products processing and exports,  aquaculture shrimp farming, trading of water aeration equipment and healthcare products for aquatic animals. 

We, at SuyogAqua, have created an impressive track record of value creation in all our businesses that compares well with their respective industry peers. "Faith in innovative and organized growth" works as the guiding principle behind every business of SuyogAqua and keeps us committed to enhancing operational excellence through greater focus on innovation and efficient resource utilization.

We are the leading manufacturers of Aquaculture Adsorbents, Feed Additives & Probiotics. Our core business helps to improve aquatic animal health and performance by adding nutritional value to feed, naturally, through SuyogAqua’s innovative use of yeast fermentation, enzyme technology, algae and nutrigenomics, which studies the impact of nutrition at the genetic level. Our technologies and support programs enable farmers to realize greater efficiency, profitability and sustainability on their farms. Also, we are focused on the design, manufacture and distribution of aquaculture machinery. 

Our products are distributed globally through many more independent dealers and distributed in more than 9 countries worldwide. Our diverse product line, global reach and technological solutions help our customers not only to survive in today's changing landscape, but to also grow and prosper.

Aquaculture in India is a massive market which is growing faster than India's GDP. India enjoys a status of being the 2nd largest aquaculture producer globally. Under the PMMSY India's Blue Revolution scheme, it is envisaged to increase the aquaculture export earnings from Rs 58,500 cr (2021-22) to Rs 1,00,000 cr (2024-25).

Both products are MSC certified and exclusively wild caught at the Chilean coastline (FAO 087), deriving from the purest and coldest waters of the entire world. All entrepreneurs who create outstanding technologies for the seafood sector are invited to participate and to connect with future business partners.
The competition is open for innovations developed for the entire supply chain of the industry, including aquaculture and wild catch, processing, distribution, final client and cross-channel technologies.
Fishtech Awards will take place in China - the world’s biggest seafood market, on the 8th of November 2018. This certification is the way to shows the world that we are moving in the right direction and supporting the fish and livelihood sustainability in Indonesia.

O objetivo desta página e divulgar e difundir conhecimento científico e técnico relacionado a biologia, conservação e produção de peixes. 

Nosso conteúdo será cuidadosamente preparado para todos os tipos de públicos,  desde os colegas pesquisadores, alunos de pós-graduação,  graduação,  técnicos, produtores rurais, apreciadores do cultivo de peixes e o público em geral.

Sou Bióloga (Unilavras), Mestre em Ciências Veterinárias (UFLA), Doutora em Zootecnia (UFLA), Pós-doutorada em Fisiologia de Peixes (UFLA) e atualmente sou Pós-doutoranda em Ecologia de Peixes e Pesquisadora da Universidade Federal de Lavras. 

Tenho experiência em trabalho de monitoramento da população de peixes em empreendimentos hidrelétricos,  Sistema de Transposição para Peixes - STP, biotecnologia da reprodução de peixes nativos de água doce em pisciculturas de produção e conservacionista, e estudos da biologia repdutiva de peixes nativos em ambientes naturais.

Name: MIGUEL MEDICIS S.A.
Description:
Miguel Médicis S.A es una de las principales empresas de pescado congelado en nuestro país.

Durante 50 años controlamos el origen de la pesca en los caladeros más importantes del mundo, entre ellos       Marruecos donde obtenemos la mejor calidad de los productos.

Nuestros cefalópodos son pescados en barcos frigoríficos donde se congela el producto y llega a puerto en las   mejores condiciones. El producto es transportado en camiones frigoríficos o containers marítimos hasta nuestras instalaciones en donde introducimos el producto en las distintas cámaras frigoríficas, quedando en riguroso orden de  almacenamiento y etiquetado. Todo sin perder la cadena de frío. 

Tus productos congelados de siempre, con una calidad como nunca.

Name: Texas Tarpon Fishing
Description:
Welcome to Texas Tarpon Fishing Charters!

Cast your line for a truly memorable experience when you sail with internationally recognized fishing guide Captain Carl Christoph aboard his Stars & Bars or on the Free Bird in the Gulf this season. State of the art electronics and a lifetime of experience will ensure your group a safe and successful trip.

Captain Carl has won numerous awards and been featured in several local, national and international publications, due to his well established success at capturing trophy class Red Snapper, King Mackerel, Ling, Shark, Tarpon, Trout, Redfish, Kingfish, and Blue Marlin. The pleasure and excitement of a successful fishing charter can be yours when you take advantage of Captain Carl's expertise and bring home a trophy of your own!

Freeport & Galveston Fishing Charter

The warm waters of Freeport are home to some of the world's most impressive fish populations and some of the most exciting charters available. After a lifetime of angling the Gulf, Freeport fishing guide Captain Carl uses his well-guarded log, which contains over 900 hot spots in the Gulf of Mexico, to bring you and your guests to some of the world's best fishing. Captain Carl is U.S. Coast Guard approved, with a 100 ton license, and his experience ensures your success. Seasoned anglers, amateurs and beginners alike, all benefit from his experience as a Tarpon, Snapper, and Shark fishing guide.
Galveston Fishing Charter

Name: Energofish Ltd.
Description:
Energofish Ltd. is one of the biggest fishing equipment manufacturer and distributor in East-Europe and Hungary. The company was founded in 1992 as a family business and it is still an independent, pure Hungarian enterprise. Name: Tan & King Co
Description:
Tan & King export high quality, fresh sashimi grade Yellow Fin Tuna and Live Lobster to wholesalers and distributors throughout Asia. 

Tan & King ethos is to always provide freshness of product, timely delivery and reliability of service. We pride ourselves in embracing sustainable practices and only source responsibly fished Lobster and Tuna. 

Based in Jakarta, we are linked to a vast network of suppliers in various fishing spots throughout the Moluccas and Papua, Indonesia. We work hand in hand with local fisherman communities to help empower them economically while also contributing value to the premium seafood supply chain in Asia.

Name: Federação das Pescas dos Açores
Description:
A Federação das Pescas dos Açores (FPA) foi fundada em 2005 e surge por vontade do movimento associativo do sector da pesca nos Açores.
A FPA agrupa as associações da pesca das 9 ilhas dos Açores e com todas as suas associadas mantem contactos permanentes sob a forma de reuniões locais, de ilha ou do arquipélago, auscultando os problemas e as necessidades da pesca e encaminhando os mesmos para análises técnicas ou estudos especializados, tendo em vista as estratégias a adoptar. Defender os interesses da pesca nos Açores, em Portugal Continental e no estrangeiro, salvaguardando sempre a componente social, ambiental e económica da actividade são os objectivos da FPA, na defesa de uma vida digna e de qualidade para todos os pescadores que desejam continuar a sua actividade. 
A FPA trabalha no sentido de alertar e empenhar o Governo Regional e da Republica na concretização de estratégias essenciais, defendendo uma política de pescas que respeite os códigos de conduta para uma pesca responsável e sustentável. 
A FPA assume a representação dos Açores junto da Comissão Europeia em Bruxelas, e a participação em todos os fóruns da pesca. A FPA está consciente de que estas responsabilidades só poderão ser alcançadas em plano de igualdade com os outros Estados Membros, se for capaz de garantir a constituição de Departamentos de apoio Técnico, Jurídico e Financeiro, e a participação e empenho de especialistas na área do ambiente, economia e sociologia da pesca. 
Como representante do associativismo, a FPA tem por direito próprio, o reconhecimento dos diversos Governos de Portugal, junto das instâncias europeias e o estatuto de Parceiro Social. 
Ao nível internacional a FPA está representada nos diferentes Conselhos Consultivos, em particular no das Regiões Ultraperiféricas.
Dos vários serviços técnicos prestados, a FPA colabora em ações para a valorização dos produtos da pesca e da comunidade piscatória, de sensibilização, educação e formação profissional, e na ajuda directa às empresas da pesca. A FPA cria mecanismos de aproximação aos vários atores da fileira da pesca - da investigação ao consumo.

Name: Pro Indo Aqua Fish Feed
Description:
As they say, everything worthwhile begins with a dream.
No one in maharashtra really looked at high tech Aquaculture. But in the  Shivsamarth Group, thinking  a few years ahead of the times is standard practice. Pro Indo aqua fish feed was born keeping the future and the immense possibilities of Aquaculture in mind.
The inception of “Indo Aqua Fish Feed” was the fructification of a dream to promote integrated development in the high growth Aquaculture sectors and to deliver the benefits of accessing global markets to India. Today we are living that dream.
To us this is a win-win situation whichever way we look at it. On one hand we are making strides into a sector that has a global market and beautiful connotations in addition to huge potential. On the other  hand we are creating huge opportunities, giving skilled occupation and improving the livelihood of thousands of farmers in Maharashtra  who would not have had this chance otherwise. Indo Aqua Fish feed lives up to the basic tenet of the Group – doing things that make business sense, but at the same time contributing to society in a larger way. 
Now We are preparing to live up to the Shiv Samarth Group  vision of being the best in whatever we do. This is just the beginning, our footprint is about to increase dramatically towards the globe.

• Every afternoon, the cosy corner of the Market Cafe is transformed into Manolo’s pizza and pasta bar, where our Italian chef takes great pride in preparing the finest cuisine. Book the private candlelit wine cellar for up to 12 guests, perfect for that special occasion.

• Our dedicated Japanese team at Market Sushi of sushi makers are on hand preparing the freshest and most flavoursome award winning sushi you'll savour in Auckland.

• Market Kitchen boasts the finest epicurean products from across the globe as well as local specialities including meats, cheeses and artisan breads. This truly is your one stop gateway to the pleasures of cooking and gastronomy.

Our commitment extends to sustainability and the conservation of the marine environment, while highlighting the significance of bottom fishing for coastal communities and the EU economy. We believe responsible fishing is a vital component of our cultural and social heritage.

Name: Eco Trawl AS
Description:
By introducing disruptive trawling technologies ECO TRAWL skal become a leader in Sustainable Ocean Harvesting.
 
Our vision is to develop an eco-friendly, intelligent trawling system that will reduce fuel consumption and CO and NOX emissions by 30-50% and at the same time prevent by-catch which is a great threat to the diversity of marine life as we know it today. 
Zero emission by fully electrical vessels will be the next step. 

Are you interested in environmental technology and future marine technology and want to make a difference? ECO Trawl is looking for core personnel for the development of the trawl system of the future. The ECO Trawl concept is based on autonomous underwater drones (AUD’s) that makes trawling more environmentally friendly and efficient.

Name: SFT Seafood
Description:
SFT Amberfish is guided by four principles: quality rather than quantity, originality, innovation and enthusiasm. From the very beginning, our company has taken the local traditions of Latvia as a basis and we strive to tell other countries about it. We are constantly looking for new solutions to improve our products. The end result is very important to us. And, furthermore, we make sure that our employees work in a comfortable environment for themselves and encourage their initiative to make the work process better and improve the final product.

Our mission is to save the traditions of fish consumption in Latvia and to popularize them throughout the rest of the world by offering our local fish products by the highest quality.

Basically, our fish processing company has 2 lines of products, including canned and frozen fish. Baltic sprats, smoked herring, salmon fillet and cod liver as a canned one. Fish bites, burgers and fingers as a line of frozen fish.

We export our production in 37 counties worldwide and glad to new potential cooperation!

Name: Oceanful
Description:
Introducing OCEANFUL: A Legacy of Ocean’s Bounty and Family Dedication 

Fish - Family - Faith: three words that anchor who we are and what we do. OCEANFUL is more than a business—it’s a heritage, passed down through generations, guided by the tides of the ocean and the values that bind us together.

As importers and exporters of premium shellfish and seafood, we’re driven by a commitment to quality over quantity, respecting the balance of nature and the rich, abundant waters of Mozambique. Every catch tells a story—of hard work, resilience, and a deep-rooted love for the ocean.

To us, each piece of seafood isn’t just a product; it’s a bridge connecting families, friends, and communities. We cherish the idea that our seafood is enjoyed around tables filled with laughter and love, bringing a taste of the ocean’s beauty to every meal.

Through every wave and challenge, we hold faith in our craft, our family, and the sea that sustains us. We’re proud to share this journey with you, one delicious bite at a time.

Name: Bahamas Fly Fishing Industry Association
Description: The Bahamas Fly Fishing Industry Association (BFFIA), founded on August 17, 2012, is a non-profit organization dedicated to conservation, education, economic empowerment, and community development. Representing a passionate network of guides, BFFIA advocates for sustainable practices, equitable industry benefits, and the preservation of Bahamian marine ecosystems. A key achievement was spearheading the Flats Fishing Legislation, enacted in 2017, which empowered Bahamian guides and prioritized grassroots conservation. Focused on training, advocacy, and global marketing, BFFIA strengthens local livelihoods while promoting The Bahamas as a premier fly-fishing destination. By blending tradition and innovation, the Association envisions a future where fly fishing drives economic prosperity and environmental stewardship for Bahamian communities.

Name: Raymond O'Neill & Son Fisheries Inc.
Description: Raymond O’Neill & Son Fisheries Ltd. was founded in 1983, starting as a small lobster pond located next to the family home. From there a demand for lobster products grew and soon the existing site used for the Company became too small. A parcel of land nearby was available for purchase and the vision of owning and operating a process plant for finished lobster products was born.

Name: Bay of Biscay Aquatics, S.L.
Description:
BoBAMAR es una empresa que desarrolla Tecnología Marina. Desde diseño y fabricación de cetáreas, viveros y acuarios aplicando las últimas tecnologías en filtración y parametrización del agua, a sensorica, soluciones en acuicultura, transporte,... 
Tras años de trabajo en campo abierto e investigación, BoBAMAR ha desarrollado un sistema de mantenimiento y  alimentación óptimo para crustáceos, garantizando su excelente desarrollo en cautividad y aportando así unos valores óptimos para su conservación.

Name: Norwegian Seafood Trust AS
Description:
Norwegian Seafood Trust skal sammen teknologiselskapene Atea og IBM tilby en sporingstjeneste som vil følge hele verdikjeden til fisken, fra egget klekker, fisken går i merden, slaktes, transporteres, foredles og selges. 
IBM leverer sporingsteknologien og Atea vil være leverandør og driftspartner av den tekniske løsningen. 
Norwegian Seafood trust ønsker å være bransjens talerør, slik at alle aktører i næringen kan bli en del av dette sporingsnettverket og være med å bygge og utvikle det.
Dette vil imøtekomme forbrukere, supermarkedkjeder og restaurantenes forventning om å vite mer om matens opprinnelse, innhold, kvalitet og reisen det har hatt.
Denne dokumentasjonen vil skape økt åpenhet og trygghet noe som vill styrke merkevaren norsk sjømat globalt og vil gi de norske aktørene bedre priser og handelsavtaler.
Vi ønsker trygg mat fra fjord til bord.

Name: Department of Fisheries
Description: DoF is under the administrative control of the Ministry of Fisheries and Livestock. It is headed by a Director General, who is assisted by four Directors (one reserve) and 2 Principal Scientific Officer (equivalent to Director). There are 1553 technical officers of different stairs and supporting staffs in the DoF. They render their services to achieve the mission and vision of then DoF. There are administrative set-ups at  division, district and Upazila (sub-district) levels headed by Deputy Director, District Fisheries Officer and Senior/Upazila Fisheries Officer respectively. Besides these, there are three fish inspection and quality control stations under DoF. Furthermore DoF also comprises of Marine Fisheries Station, Fisheries Training Academy, Fisheries Training and Extension Centers, and Fish Hatcheries.

At Majan National Fish LLC, we are passionate about delivering the freshest, highest-quality seafood from Oman’s rich marine waters to the world. With a commitment to excellence, sustainability, and innovation, we serve both local and global markets, ensuring every product meets international quality standards.

Our operations are built on three core pillars:

Quality First – Every product is sourced and handled with utmost care, ensuring premium freshness and quality from supplier to customer.

Sustainable Practices – We are committed to responsible sourcing by working only with fishers who meet our strict quality control and sustainability standards, upholding environmental stewardship across our supply chain.

Global Reach – Our distribution network ensures timely delivery to customers across diverse markets.

From the deep waters of the Arabian Sea to the plates of families and businesses worldwide, we take pride in being a trusted partner in the seafood industry.

 Our Products Include: Frozen Fish | Value-Added Seafood Products
 Markets We Serve: GCC | Asia | Europe | Africa

At Majan National Fish LLC, we don’t just sell seafood—we share the taste of Oman’s oceans with the world.

Name: Acuitec SL
Description:
Acuitec is a small company founded in 1989 in order to create technical solutions for the nursery, growth and health of aquatic organisms.

We provide advice and supplying several products such as: 
Tanks in fiberglass or PP / PE, with the possibility of custom-made 
- Sorters with high performance 
- Extremely accurate counters 
- Pumps for water and fish transfer as well 
- All kinds of products for water treatment : oxygenation, aeration, degassers, Bio-Blok, skimmers, biological filtration, mechanical filtration (drum, cartridge, sand filters ...), filters and sterilizers with ultraviolet, ozone. 
- Equipment for measuring and controlling several parameters such as: oxygen, dissolved gases, CO2, flow meters, RedOx potential, salinity, temperature, checkers, photometers, limnimetric rules 
- Nets, pots and traps 
- Scales 
- Transport of fish: from tanks isotherms to turnkey trucks 
- Feeding systems: clock feeders, pendulum feeders, trolleys, centralized systems, ship feeders, 
- Heaters and coolers 
- Inox or PE gates 
- Incubators: MacDonald jug, Weiss jug
- Tubes, valves and links 
- Clothing and boots: waders, gloves, boots, raincoats... 
- Fishing equipment: backpack, floor, on boats
- Equipment and stun tanks 
- Hydrobiology: environmental management equipment, sampling networks, marking and detection of fish 
- Eviscerators and filleting machines 
- Feeding 
- Vaccination material such as needles, automatic syringes, by immersion, personal protection 
- Hygiene and disinfection 
- Aquaponia 
- Garden ponds

Name: TriNav Fisheries Consultants Inc.
Description:
TriNav Fisheries Consultants Inc (TFC) is a professional and well established Atlantic Canadian fisheries business and economic consulting firm.  

Well known to the fishing industry throughout Atlantic and Northern Canada, TFC has developed a network of expertise with decades of combined experience.  

TFC offers a team of qualified professionals consisting of economists, seafood brokers, resource management consultants, seafood production experts, seafood sales and marketing, fisheries development specialists, marine biologists, and fisheries and marine policy specialists.

Name: Big Glory Bay
Description:
Big Glory Bay King Salmon are sustainably ocean-farmed in the remote and pristine cold coastal waters off Stewart Island/Rakiura, located at the very bottom of New Zealand. Our salmon is on the menu of some of the finest restaurants around the world and is admired for their consistently superior flavour and texture. Like a single vineyard fine wine, salmon this good is only grown and harvested in one place.

We don't just say that our Big Glory Bay King Salmon is "sustainably ocean farmed with care" - we mean it, and have the credentials to prove it. Our aquaculture practices are rigorously audited and certified each year by the highest authority in global aquaculture.

King Salmon from New Zealand has been rated 'Best Choice' by the Monterey Bay Aquarium Seafood Watch Programme.

L’UAPF considère que les différents types de pêche sont complémentaires et qu’il est nécessaire de conforter une représentation patronale solide dans le secteur de la pêche, financièrement indépendante et active, pour mieux promouvoir les intérêts des entreprises et défendre la légitimité de la pêche commerciale et sa rentabilité à long terme.

Enjoy seafood from Iceland

Name: FlyWater, inc.
Description:
FlyWater is THE  fishery development company for assessing, planning, designing, building, monitoring, and maintaining aquatic resources for recreational use. Our team of professionals consists of registered professional engineers, fishery biologists, wetland scientists, water quality specialists, construction managers, equipment operators, and anglers. We Get Your Drift.

Name: blueocean aquaculture association corp.
Description:
blueocean is a company founded by fishermen.
We are a company that strives to make sustainable and smart aquaculture.
We are operating the AI-fish-farmer service, which is an artificial intelligence-based aquaculture management solution, online.

Name: Marine Algae
Description:
Why Seaweed?
Sustainable Farming
Western farming techniques can transform the local industry from subsistence to profitable, sustainable farming. We are doing this through investment in the local community, in quality infrastructure and Quality Assurance practices.  Our challenge is to transform without social disruption. One only has to look at the industrialization of the western agricultural systems in the USA and Australia. Local communities will die as farms get more industrial and mechanized, with lower labour. Communities lose out as families migrate to the city. Local health, businesses, community services and police services are decimated. We are focused on sustainable growth – people, the environment and the society.
Functional Food
Many associate the Japanese as the culture that eats seaweed but the Celts in UK had at least 30% of their diet hundreds of years ago.  Seaweed is produced and consumed in many cultures.  Irish kelp is grown and processed as quick frozen, fresh spaghetti like product and sold on High Street store. Functional food is food that can be consumed as food, but it also improves health. Many research groups have shown reduction in blood pressure, the silent killer, reversal of obesity and related diseased including reversal of fatty liver, weight loss, reduction in body fat,
Plant Biostimulants
Seaweed can provide alternatives or complement fertilizer.  Extraction of liquid from seaweed includes plant biostimulants and crop yield increases of 30% are common. When used with artificial fertilizer they permit reduction of other fertilizers.

Name: Yomra Su Ürünleri
Description:
Firmamız 2007 yılından itibaren Su Ürünleri Sektöründe faaliyet göstermektedir. 2007 Yılında Trabzon Yomra İlçesi Derbent Burnu mevkiinde denizden 1 km açıkta 700Ton/Yıl kapasiteli off shore kafeslerde Alabalık ve Levrek yetiştirmeye başlamıştır.

Firmamız 2009 Yılında Gümüşhane İli Kürtün ve Torul barajlarında toplam’da 1.200 Ton/Yıl kapasiteli tesisleri satın alarak sektöre yatırım yapmıştır. Gümüşhane’de bulunan  tesislerde 250 gr ile 1.000 gr üzerinde somon adayları yetiştirilmekte olup, sonrasında canlı olarak deniz tesislerine sevk edilmektedir.

2013 Yılında Trabzon’un Yomra İlçesinde bulunan tesislerde kapasite artırımına gidilmiştir. Bu nedenle kafes çapları 30 metre olarak yeniden revize edilerek 1.750 Ton/Yıl üretim yapacak şekilde çalışmalar tamamlanmıştır.

2021 Yılında Trabzon/ Vakfıkebir ilçesinde  50 metre çaplı kafeslerde 950 Ton/Yıl kapasiteli projemize ilişkin yatırım tamamlanmış olup kapasite artırımı için çalışmalarımız devam etmektedir.

2017 Yılından itibaren özellikle yurt dışındaki müşterilerimizden Büyük Alabalık (2.000 gr-5.000gr) ürününe yoğun talep olması nedeniyle ürünlerimiz işlenerek (kafa ve içi alınarak) yurt dışına ihraç edilmektedir..

Şirketimizin kaliteli ve güvenilir hizmet anlayışı ile daima hedeflenen amaçlar doğrultusunda siz diğerleri müşterilerimize her zaman en mükemmel şekilde hizmet etmekten mutluluk duymaktadır.

Müşteri ihtiyaçlarını en doğru şekilde anlamak, en yeni malzeme ve mühendislik teknolojisini kullanmak, disiplinli ve titiz çalışmak, dayanıklılık, sürat ve kalite şirket kültürümüz arasında yer almaktadır.

Name: Smart Farm AS
Description:
Our solutions are a sustainable replacement of the traditional longlines and take all aspects of husbandry and harvesting underwater, at site, which substantially reduces labour costs and addresses safety, while it allows a harvest of 30 tons per hour! The system is suited for farming in both open waters and sheltered sites, and is designed for spat-collection and nursery of seed or for on-growing mussels.

The SmartUnits are installed in a global market with high variation in sites, growth rate, species, and manpower costs. They are assembled and towed to the site only once and may remain there throughout its life span (25 years+) which reduces transportation costs and pollution. If needed be, the SmartUnits are easily moved to shelter, or sank to the bottom for a passing storm. In spite of high local variations, analysis show that the savings are substantial with this new design.

Husbandry and harvesting is all done in the water which makes it easy to reduce the impact of fouling and predators. It also gives the efficiency to cope with fast marine changes. The capacity and productions of our machines are far beyond all current business scale within rope-cultured mussels.

Users of the Smart Farm solutions report better working conditions, increased safety for personnel and reduction of the manual labour which in its turn reduces risk of incidents. All work is machine operated with no heavy lifting and bent backs in addition, the systems produce minimal waste and its aesthetical design makes the farms less disruptive and visible than when using traditional buoys.

Name: Palingrokerij & Vishandel Dries van den Berg & Zn.
Description:
Palingrokerij Dries van den Berg, opgericht in 1978 is aanvankelijk begonnen als palingrokerij waar paling gerookt werd voor eigen markthandel. De paling die hier 's nachts werd gerookt, werd op markten in heel Nederland aan de man gebracht.

Als enige nog overgebleven palingrokerij van Harderwijk, zijn we trots deze lokale lekkernij dagelijks vers aan te bieden. Wij roken de paling nog boven een knisperend houtvuur. Paling roken op ambachtelijke wijze, met bijbehorend vakmanschap, de liefde voor het product en uiteraard de juiste soort zachte paling, kunnen wij onze klanten dagelijks een unieke kwaliteit vers gerookte paling bieden.

De kunst van het vak begint al bij het kopen van de levende paling. Om de beste kwaliteit te selecteren moet men jarenlang ervaring hebben. Door ons vakmanschap op palinggebied kunnen wij voor het roken, de magere van de vette paling onderscheiden. Ondanks de perfecte verwerking van de paling voor het roken, valt of staat de kwaliteit met het rookproces. Dus de volle perfectie ligt in de hand van de roker zelf, daarom doet Rookmeester Dries dit zelf. Gevoel, want dat is het roken; "Fingerspitzgefühl" zo zeggen de Duitsers, alleen daarmee bereiken wij die Superieure kwaliteit dagvers gerookte paling. Uit het water, in de rook, da's vers gerookte paling en zo hoort het ook!

Ook voor feesten
Heeft u een (bedrijfs)feest en wilt u eens echt iets origineels voor de gasten, dan bieden wij de mogelijkheid om bij u te komen palingroken op locatie. Wij hebben de beschikking over verschillende mobiele rookkasten waarin we de paling net zo lekker kunnen roken als bij ons in de rokerij. Deze zijn klein van formaat en kunnen opgesteld worden op alle mogelijke locaties.

Normandie Fraicheur Mer (NFM) développe un programme d'activités en faveur de la valorisation de la qualité et de la durabilité des produits de la pêche de Normandie et du développement de leurs marchés :
- NFM accompagne et forme les professionnels (sanitaire, traitement des produits...)
- NFM accompagne la mise en marché des produits (campagne de pêche, sanitaire, agréage en criée...)
- NFM développe et gère des démarches d’identification de la qualité des produits (Label Rouge, IGP…)
- NFM accompagne les démarches d’écolabellisation (bulot, homard, coquille, raie)
- NFM organise des actions de promotion des produits (coquillages, poissons bons plans normands...)
- NFM s'investit auprès des collectivités dans l'approvisionnement local des cantines scolaires...

Name: Midland Co.
Description:
Located in Central Iowa, Midland Co. is a land-based seafood company dedicated to raising sustainable, ethical, and delicious seafood. Using innovative Algae-Based RAS (recirculating aquaculture systems) technology, Midland Co. believes in being environmental stewards. Our shrimp are responsibly raised and are free of hormones, antibiotics, and chemicals. We are dedicated to quality; our products go from tank to table within 24 hours.

Midland’s technology simplifies RAS systems with a new, innovative technology– algae-based wastewater treatment. These impressive microorganisms capture nutrients and carbon from the air, leaving the water purified and oxygenated in a single one-step wastewater treatment system. The nutrient-dense algae are then recovered to be used as a new regenerative fertilizer for Iowa’s agricultural land. Pollutants are never discharged, making it the purest and simplest form of aquaculture existing today.

Name: Machli Tech (P) Limited

Our mission is to empower hatcheries, nurseries, and commercial farms with smart, scalable, and cost-effective technologies that improve productivity, ensure biosecurity, and support long-term sustainability.

Our flagship innovation, the Multi-Modal Recirculating Aquaculture System (MM-RAS), is a compact and energy-efficient water treatment unit that integrates solid filtration, biological filtration, protein skimming, degassing, and disinfection into a single, easy-to-operate system. Designed for flexibility, it can be deployed in a variety of environments—from backyard RAS setups to institutional hatcheries.

In addition to technology development, Machli Tech provides:
 Custom aquaculture infrastructure & farm installations
 IoT-enabled smart monitoring & automation systems
 Aquaculture equipment manufacturing & supply
 Disease diagnosis & treatment protocols
 Probiotic formulations & water quality enhancers
 Complete range of aquaculture consumables & essentials
Whether you're starting a new hatchery, upgrading to a recirculating system, or looking to improve water quality and fish health, Machli Tech offers customized solutions to match your scale and goals.

We work closely with MSMEs, institutions, government departments, and entrepreneurs to build resilient aquaculture systems that support food security, income generation, and environmental sustainability.

Get in touch to collaborate, partner, or learn more about how we can help power your aquaculture journey.

#Aquaculture #RAS #FishFarming #AquacultureEngineering #BlueTech #IoTAquaculture #FishHealth #SustainableFarming #MachliTech

Name: BuoyTech AS
Description:
Vi i BouyTech AS har, i samarbeid med Havforskningsinstituttet (HI) og fagruppen Fangst, utviklet et redskap som skal brukes for å forhindre tap av passive fiskeredskaper. Konseptet baserer seg på ny teknologi som benytter seg av en trykksyrt utløser som er festet til en hovedblåse samt fiskeredskapet som benyttes. Om hovedblåsen kuttes av eller forsvinner fra havoverflaten vil dette resultere i at trykkbøyen synker. Når trykkbøyen kommer under en viss dybde vil det atmosfæriske trykket i havet føre til at det frigjøres en line med en mindre bøye som umiddelbart vil stige til havoverflaten.

Redskapet skal være et forebyggende tiltak for tap av passive fiskeredskap samt gi brukeren muligheten til å umiddelbart finne tilbake til sine fiskeredskaper. Trykkbøyen vil være nyttig om det skulle forekomme uforutsigbare hendelser som kutting av hovedblåse eller at fiskeredskapet faller under en viss dybde grunnet for eksempel havstrømmer eller feilvurdering av dybde.

Name: SubFarm
Description:
The Current Challenges in Salmon Farming
•	There are few fjords remaining where salmon can be produced in a sustainable manner - SubFarm opens up new areas for fish farming worldwide.
•	Lice is a huge fish welfare problem and adds significant cost to the operation - SubFarm solves the challenge related to lice and toxic algae by submerging the farm.
•	Visual pollution is an increasing problem in densely populated areas and areas with high touristic value. SubFarm, with its minimal surface footprint, solves that challenge
•	Transportation of salmon worldwide has a huge environmental impact. SubFarm can solve that by setting up production in proximity to the large consumer markets.
•	Pressure is on for multi-use of the ocean space – SubFarm is well-suited to be located inside the perimeter of offshore wind farms.

Name: Brandywine Fisheries, LLC
Description:
A local fishing family  Fishing Oregon's Coast; Serving Oregon's communities the freshest Northwestern Pacific Seafood available, and we also serve clients throughout the United States as well.

Our Mission:

To bring the finest seafood to our customers by implementing standards that are far above the requirements of any regulatory system. Our tireless efforts to properly handle, care for, process, and deliver our products while they are truly fresh is a distinctive standard employed by our company.

Locally Owned & Operated:

The Brandywine fishing vessel has a long 35- year fishing history on the Oregon coast. This boat was hand-built, in Charleston, Oregon, and remains one of the core, independent boats in Charleston harbor. Our boat still utilizes an "ICE" fish-hold that keeps our fish fresh from the point of catch to the the time the boat docks. Not freezing our catch means we dock more often, and must employ various tactics that ensure we don't bruise the fish while on-board the boat. Additionally, this means we consistently have a fresher, higher-grade product, and take pride in our ablity to provide our customers with the finest "Sushi Grade" products around.

The owner of Brandywine Fisheries has been fishing this specific boat for the last 16- years, and brings with them, the long list of company standards established many years before they came along; providing you with a history of having the finest Northwest-Pacific Seafood on the market today.

Description:

Your safety is in our close partnership with our exclusive suppliers. This partnership gives our company a strong influence in the production methods and guarantees strict quality control.  

WHY WE SAY SUSTAINABLE
The philosophy of Arctic Salar is to source the best possible bi-products from the salmon filleting process, which have otherwise been destined for animal feed. It is then further processed in the highest hygienic and temperature-controlled environment and then quickly transformed into quality salmon ingredients for the ready meal industry.

This enables  us to get more food out of each fish. That is, in our minds, sustainable living.

QUALITY CONTROL
All our products are from HACCP approved plants. We also work closely with ASC and Global Gap certified products.    
                       
WORLDWIDE EXPORTER
We have years of experience in sales and exports incl. trucking, reefer containers and airfreight. Our markets include the EU, Asian markets and the Americas.

INNOVATION
We have our own R&D department, where we develop our own salmon products.  We have introduced our salmon burgers, sausages, paté and many other exciting products all from salmon ingredients.

CUSTOMIZED SOLUTIONS
We can design a product that fits every client’s needs, if in relation to specific packaging needs, salt and other ingredients, even with texture requirements, we have the machinery to produce it all according to the specs.                   

Our knowledge of the salmon industry is extensive, with many years in the business and the countless visits to factories around the world, there is no reason you cannot trust us in delivering the perfect product.

Name: Multi Level Door Aps
Description:
Welcome to MLD Aps: Bringing 21th century technology to the fishing industry.

Multi Level Door Aps is located in Esbjerg, Denmark and have several representatives around the world. 
Our products are developed by our experienced team of engineers in cooperation with skippers and experts from the subsea industry. Our doors are manufactured in Denmark with the highest standards of quality and with great attention to detail from the design, test and production stages.

We customize our trawl doors according to your needs and offer wide range of sizes and design solutions. We provide everything from traditional trawl doors, to adjustable trawl doors and all the way to the most advanced fishing systems available on the market. All our solutions are proven to make your trawl fishing operation to the next level, increasing ease of operation, crew safety, and profitability due to increased fuel-efficiency.

Such benefits are a direct effect of our highly cost-efficient door design, that allows you to make adjustments on our patented flap system. Such adjustments make MLD trawl doors into multiple doors in one. Changes to the door-size/spread are either adjusted through a manual control in our Multi-purpose door model (MPD), or by our remotely controlled Trawl Steering System (TSS). 
TSS allows you to make trawl adjustment even while fishing, offering the possibility to automatically adjust the trawl position according to the desired distance, depth and optimal spread.

Contact us and join the future of trawl fishing.

Name: Iceland Responsible Fisheries

The Iceland Responsible Fisheries Foundation (IRFF) owns and operates the brand of Iceland Responsible Fisheries. The IRF foundation was established to provide stakeholders in the value chain of Icelandic seafood to highlight Icelandic origin with the IRF logo of origin, and to promote responsible fisheries by running a certification programme.  The foundation operates on a cost basis, as a non-profit organisation.  

There are great benefits of joining the Iceland Responsible Fisheries programme. It provides access to marketing and promotional material, as well as various types of assistance in promoting Icelandic origin and responsible fisheries. Co-ordinated promotional efforts mean more effective marketing of Icelandic seafood and an improved image internationally.

Promote Iceland (Islandsstofa) is responsible for marketing and promotion of the IRF programme, and supporting the companies in the programme in their marketing. Promote Iceland operates a seafood advisory committee that sets the aims and reviews the marketing plan of the programme on a regular basis. The committee is comprised of people from the fishing companies, processors and marketing and sales companies, as well as a person from the Ministry of Fisheries and Agriculture.

Name: SADCMCSCC
Description: Illegal, unreported and unregulated (IUU) fishing is a global threat. It leads to unfair competition and global losses of between USD 10 and 23.5 billion annually, which is the equivalent of between 11 and 26 million tones of fish. Ending IUU fishing is target 14.4 of the global Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), evidence of its global reach. Declining fish stocks put the coastal, island and inland countries and their communities at risk, with small-scale fisheries being particularly vulnerable. The SADC MCSCC is a joint effort of member states to curb IUU fishing in the SADC region. Through the systematic sharing of information on licensed and flagged vessels in the region, including information for lakes bordered by several countries, the MCSCC will create a comprehensive database of vessels, their operators, and agents, accessible to all member states, that can support decision-making and enforcement. Together, we will combat IUU fishing, protect small-scale fisheries and secure livelihoods for millions of people living in the SADC region.

BIOGEARS is an innovative project funded by EASME, under the EMFF-01-2018 Blue Labs: Innovative Solutions for Maritime Challenges call that started in November 2019. 

The project is set to develop biobased gear solutions for the creation of an eco-friendly offshore aquaculture sector using a multitrophic approach and new biobased value chains. 

The project aims to provide the European aquaculture sector with innovative products and a value chain to challenge the existing gap of biobased ropes for offshore aquaculture, nowadays manufactured with 100% non-recyclable plastics. BIOGEARS will foster an eco-friendly aquaculture industry with the results of the project creating a biobased value chain under the EU Bioeconomy Strategy framework. BIOGEARS uses an Integrated Multi-Trophic Aquaculture (IMTA) approach by integrating seaweed with mussel production, which aims to increase aquaculture marketable products.

Name: Myre Fiskemottak
Description:
In the far north of Norway lie the islands of the Lofoten and Vesterålen archipelagos with their jagged peaks rising out of the roaring seas. Each winter, millions of spawning cod find their way here in order to breed. Over the centuries, this phenomenon has given rise to some of Norway’s most traditional fisheries and ways of catching and preserving fish.

The story of the stockfish is the story of these champion swimmers who come every year from the Barents Sea for their pilgrimage of love.
After having spent their lives in the cold and clean waters of the northern seas, the fish are caught and hung on the racks while still very fresh. Here they collect the warmth brought by the rays of the spring arctic sun and slowly dry in Lofoten’s salty sea winds. The result is a concentrated and unique flavour of the roaring northern seas, produced and refined by nature itself.

The company Myre Fiskemottak has established itself as a professional and humble user of the unique fish resources of this part of Norway.
With dignity and respect for the raw materials and history, the company strives each day to pack the beauty and purity of the north into its products. In terms of aesthetics and taste, this is an exceptional basis for distribution of world class seafood.

Name: Propescar - Cooperativa de Produtores da Pesca
Description:
Cooperativa de Produtores da Pesca de Angra dos Reis

A PROPESCAR – Cooperativa de Produtores da Pesca de Angra dos Reis, foi fundada em 27 de maio de 1967, por um grupo de 7 armadores, conhecidos como os Indomáveis sobre a coordenação do sr. Flávio.
Tendo como objetivo oferecer aos seus cooperados o transporte rodoviário do pescado até o Rio de Janeiro, que até então era levado pelas próprias embarcações, foi e continua sendo, em termos de cooperativa, referencia em todo o estado, onde ajudou de maneira determinante no crescimento de toda a frota pesqueira angrense, inclusive com embarcações de grande porte.
Em sua melhor fase, fez parte do programa Peixão da Economia, tendo peixarias em Brasília e em vários bairros do Rio de Janeiro, fábrica de gelo em Niterói e indústria de congelamento em Bonsucesso a IBRAC, tendo também em sua frota mais de 30 veículos. Nesse período fez parte da sua diretoria o sr. Manoel Jordão Sobrinho, o grande responsável pelo seu crescimento, onde culminou em 1984, com a conquista do espaço no cais dos Pescadores onde montou o seu terminal pesqueiro, onde novamente inovou trazendo para o setor, a produção de gelo em escama.
Teve também em sua estrutura açougue, farmácia, loja de equipamento para pesca e minimercado, com o objetivo de um melhor atendimento aos seus cooperados.
A partir de 1985, passou por período de crise, com baixa produção de pescado e a saída de vários de seus cooperados, que passaram a comercializar seu próprio pescado, que culminou na redução de toda sua frota de caminhões, a saída de Projeto Peixão da Economia e o encerramento de todas as suas atividades fora do município de Angra.

Name: Clean Catch
Description:
Clean Catch is a programme that champions collaborative working to help monitor and minimise the bycatch of sensitive marine species in UK fisheries, and to exchange knowledge globally. We bring together fishermen, the wider seafood industry, scientists, environmental NGOs, policymakers, regulators, technologists, and other key actors to achieve this. 

We will help the UK Government meet its ambitions to minimise and – where
possible – eliminate bycatch of sensitive marine species, as set out in the ecosystem objective of the Fisheries Act and elaborated in the UK Marine Wildlife Bycatch Mitigation Initiative (BMI). Our key objectives towards this are to: 

Work with fisheries in England to test ways to gather data on sensitive marine species and to mitigate bycatch, based on their effectiveness and practicality. 
Explore and work to overcome barriers to broader engagement of the fishing industry. 
Ensure equitable inclusion and representation of the people and groups who have a key role to play in bycatch monitoring and mitigation. 
Share our results widely, and foster national and international knowledge exchange with similar initiatives across the UK and beyond.  

We are funded and overseen by Defra, and led by a consortium team comprising Arribada International, Cefas, ZSL, MMO Consulting, and Mindfully Wired.

Find out more about us and our work at: https://www.cleancatchuk.com/

Email us at: secretariat@cleancatchuk.com

Name: FEDERATION DE PECHE 59
Description:
La Fédération du Nord pour la Pêche et la Protection du Milieu Aquatique (FDAAPPMA) est une association de type loi 1910, à but non lucratif, qui remplit des missions d’intérêt général et est agréée au titre de la protection de l’environnement.  

Actuellement, elle regroupe 84 associations de pêche dans le département et compte environ 28 728 adhérents. La Fédération est responsable de l’organisation de la pêche associative, elle s’investit dans la protection, la gestion et la restauration des milieux aquatiques et des populations piscicoles. Elle défend les intérêts des pêcheurs et associations et participe au développement du loisir pêche dans le département et en région.

Le département du Nord est riche en cours d’eau, milieux extrêmement diversifiés au regard de la topographie du département, s’étendant depuis la mer du Nord et remontant vers les contreforts des Ardennes. Le Nord est entouré par plusieurs départements au sud, l’Aisne et le Pas-de-Calais. Il est limitrophe avec la Belgique, et partage avec elle plusieurs grands districts hydrographiques tels l’Escaut, la Lys et la Sambre qui traversent le département du sud vers le nord. Il présente un linéaire de cours d’eau important, avec près de 4.500 km de cours d’eau, dont 185 km de rivières de première catégorie, ainsi que plus de 801 hectares d'étangs et 51 plans d'eau fédéraux. 

Le Nord regorge de sites de pêche très agréables, où l’on peut trouver carnassiers et poissons blancs mais aussi salmonidés, un éden de diversité pour les pêcheurs.
Ce patrimoine départemental remarquable nécessite d’être protégé et mis en valeur par et pour les pêcheurs, un des engagements principaux de la fédération.

- to offer the consumer a choice of quality, variety and freshness
- to provide our clients with customer service
- to build a brand equity in our products and by doing so, inviting the consumer to make Azzopardi Fisheries their brand of choice

For a nation surrounded by sea, we are remarkably nervous and unadventurous about fish. All fish and shellfish are remarkably good for you. Fish is high in protein, various vitamins which help maintain healthy nerve tissues, strong bones and teeth and a growing complexion, minerals such as zinc, iodine, iron and selenium and essential fatty acids such as omega 3 oil which play an important role in our development.

Any fresh fish or shellfish must smell of the sea, not of fish, and they should be firm and shiny with bright eyes.

Name: Hardingsmolt AS
Description:
Hardingsmolt i Tørvikbygd er eit settefiskanlegg som får inn rogn, klekker denne til yngel og sender smolten vidare når den er 200-400 gram. Laksen er då ferdig smoltifisert og går i brakkvatn (me pumpar opp sjøvatn) hjå oss. I dag sender me den oftast vidare til våre lukka merdar på Fitjar for neste vekstfase, men me kan la fisken vekse opp til ein kilo i landanlegget også. Våre lukka merdar på Koløy (Fitjar) er ein eigen avdeling i Hardingsmolt AS. Hovudvekta av tilsette er på settefiskanlegget i Tørvikbygd, men det er også sju tilsette ved avdelinga på Fitjar.

Anlegget i Tørvikbygd har røter tilbake til ein oppstart i 1986, men dagens organisasjon er frå 2006. Når fisken er klar for levering frå Tørvikbygd vert den frakta i røyr som går tvers under Fylkesveg 576 og ned til kaianlegget ved Solheim. Der kan brønnbåt leggje til og laksen vert flytta enten til Fitjar, Bømlo eller Austevoll. Avdelinga vår på Fitjar har vore drifta sidan me fekk grøn konsesjon i 2016. Avfall (fiskeslam) frå produksjonen vert samla og henta for levering til biogassanlegg.

Name: MatsyaPasha
Description:
MatsyaPasha is an initiative to tackle the colossal threat of ghost nets in oceans. Ghost nets are fishing nets that have been abandoned, lost, or discarded in the sea. These nets, often nearly invisible in the dim light, can be left tangled on a rocky reef or drifting in the open sea. They can entangle fish, dolphins, sea turtles, sharks, crocodiles, seabirds, crabs, and other creatures, delivering a painful death through suffocation or hunger.
MatsyaPasha, funded by US State Department and mentored by CPPR, will create a reliable database on ghost nets in India, and will also deliver technological solutions to tackle the same. We aim to eradicate ghost nets through the introduction of better-quality fishing nets and by spreading awareness about this hidden nightmare.

Name: FishSCORE 2030
Description:
Contributing to the UN Decade of Ocean Science.

FishSCORE2030 is an endorsed program of the UN Decade of Ocean Science for Sustainable Development. This program is building a global network of scientists, fishing sector members, practitioners, and policy experts that aims to co-develop approaches to sustain marine fisheries, protect ocean ecosystem health, and secure equitable benefits from fisheries in a changing ocean.

Program Goals:
- Build a global network to facilitate information exchange, foster learning, and advance approaches to achieve climate-resilient fisheries.
- Develop information and tools for assessing climate impacts, vulnerabilities, and capacities to enhance resilience in marine fishery systems.
- Apply frameworks and tools in fishery systems around the world to support climate adaptation, and use insights from these experiences to iteratively improve the tools and resources.
- Further the development of scientific foundations and implementation approaches needed to achieve healthy marine ecosystems, vibrant fisheries, and equitable benefits in the context of climate-driven changes in our world’s oceans.

Follow us to to receive periodic updates on climate resilient fisheries projects and implementation efforts, webinars, and opportunities to participate in workshops and working groups!

Name: Suomen Kalankasvattajaliitto ry
Description:
Suomen Kalankasvattajaliitto ry - Edunvalvontaa vuodesta 1964

Suomen Kalankasvattajaliitto on valtakunnallinen kalanviljelijöiden edunvalvontajärjestö. Liitto perustettiin vuonna 1964. Toimissaan liitto valvoo ja edistää kalanviljelyelinkeinon etua ja toimintaedellytyksiä koko kalatalouden osana ja luo edellytyksiä vesiviljelyn kestävälle kasvulle. Tehtävänä on seurata ja vaikuttaa kalankasvatusta koskevaan lainsäädäntöön, hallintoon ja markkinakehitykseen sekä puuttua alan toimintaympäristöä koskeviin epäkohtiin. Lisäksi liitto vaikuttaa muun muassa alaa kehittävään tutkimukseen ja koulutukseen sekä jakaa tietoa elinkeinosta.

Liiton toiminta

Edunvalvonnan tavoitteena on turvata kalankasvatukselle kilpailukykyiset toimintaedellytykset ja samalla varmistaa kotimaisen kalan tarjonta Suomen elintarviketuotannossa.

Jäsentoiminta

Liitto tarjoaa jäsenilleen koulutusta ja neuvontaa sekä tiedottaa tuottajille säännöllisesti alan tuotanto- ja markkinatilanteesta.
Yleinen edunvalvonta

Kalankasvattajaliitto edistää ja kehittää vesiviljelyn toimintaedellytyksiä, tekee alaa koskevia aloitteita ja esityksiä, antaa lausuntoja, toteuttaa vesiviljelyn tiedotusta, jäsenneuvontaa ja koulutustoimintaa.
Kalankasvattajaliitto valvoo jäsenkunnan etua sekä edistää elinkeinon ja viranomaisten välistä yhteistoimintaa. Kalankasvattajaliitto pyrkii sitouttamaan eri osapuolet toteuttamaan elinkeinoa koskevia ohjelmia ja linjauksia elinkeinon lähtökohdista.

Tutkimus ja hanketoiminta

Liitto on myös mukana kalanviljelyn ympäristön, laadun ja tuotantotekniikan tutkimus- ja kehittämishankkeissa.

Kansainvälinen vaikuttaminen

Kalankasvattajaliitto seuraa, vaikuttaa ja ottaa aktiivisesti kantaa Euroopan vesiviljelijöiden liiton (Federation of European Aquaculture Producers FEAP) ja Euroopan maataloustuottajien liiton (Copa Cogeca) välityksellä EU:n lainsäädännön ja muiden kansa

Name: Pelagic Strategies
Description:
Pelagic Strategies LLC is a fisheries research and policy consultancy that supports diverse organizations in their efforts to secure a sustainable future for our oceans, both ecologically and economically. Our goal is to ensure that our clients’ decisions related to marine fisheries conservation and management are grounded in the best available information. To achieve these objectives, we rely on our fisheries science and management expertise while leveraging our extensive and trusted network within the fisheries community that includes researchers, decision-makers, and a broad array of stakeholders. Our approach is collaborative, in which we seek to build consensus and identify shared priorities across user groups to help secure optimal outcomes for fisheries resources and those who depend on them.

While we are well-versed on a wide array of fisheries issues, our core expertise includes:

       ● Recreational fisheries research and policy
       ● Offshore wind development and fisheries interactions
       ● U.S. federal fisheries policy, including the Magnuson-Stevens Act
       ● U.S. east coast fisheries policy at the interstate commission and regional council       
          levels
       ● Highly migratory species, including international management
       ● Fishery stakeholder outreach and engagement

Specific services Pelagic Strategies offers include but are not limited to:

      ● Conduct and analyze surveys and structured interviews
      ● Plan events and facilitate meetings to ensure productive conversations and    
         outcomes
      ● Provide strategic planning guidance, coordination, and roadmaps
      ● Write grants and proposals
      ● Research and develop white papers, state of the science syntheses, and 
         landscape analyses
      ● Conduct collaborative fisheries research
      ● Communicate science and policy outcomes to diverse audiences

For more information, please email Willy Goldsmith at wgoldsmith@pelagicstrategies.com
