Name: West Coast Wild Scallops
Description:
West Coast Wild Scallops is a small family fishing business owned an operated by Joel and Melissa Collier out of Courtenay, BC. 

Joel Collier is a 4th generation fisherman from a long line of fishermen on his mother's side.  Joel took over the family business in 2014, fishing BC Spot Prawns and all 5 species of salmon.  In fishing, you are always looking out for way to diversify.  You never know what any given year may hold, and having options to fish something else during a bad year may save you.  This is why he got involved in the swimming scallop (also known as Pink and Spiny Scallop) fishery. 

Joel started fishing swimming scallops in 2017.  At this time, no one had been fishing them for several years.  With no established market, fish buyers were not interested in buying them.  Rather than admitting defeat, Joel and Melissa created West Coast Wild Scallops in order to market and sell their catch. 

Selling scallops is much harder than one would think.  They were relatively unknown and looked much different than what the average seafood consumer thinks when you hear "scallop".  While Joel learned and further developed the fishing method, Melissa took on marketing and sales.  

After years of hard work and pounding the payment, they have made some great relationships with retailers, wholesales and local consumers.  They plan to continue to build the fishery and their business and hope that one day, swimming scallops will be as well known and sought after as salmon and spot prawns.  

Want to know more?  Head t our website to learn about swimming scallops, the fishery,  and the history of Joel's fishing family.

Name: SalmoSolar
Description:
UNITECH Salmo Solar is a joint project between Bremnes Seashore AS, UNITECH Offshore AS, and partners. Salmo Solar opens a new area of fish farming in Norway and all over the world.

The Salmo Solar is made for significant wave heights up to 8 m and can harvest all the energy needed for large scale seafood production and more. In fact, the Salmo Solar is also an “Energy Station” for everyone focused on running on renewable energy and travels the ocean on or under the surface. The Design is based upon the best knowledge, technologies and experience from  the harsh environment of the Norwegian Coastline. The entire design is made of flexible materials well known within the maritime environment. The Salmo Solar contains all infrastructure needed for efficient fish farming, including feed systems, silos and control rooms. This makes each unit self-dependent with the ability to stay in open sea and operate from its own energy supply.

Salmo Solar is a cost efficient solution for large scale fish farming built upon the long traditions of the most successful fish farming industry in the world, Norwegian Salmon Farmers.

The entire system is made of a number of modules and can be customized for each location depending upon technology needed, energy systems, weather condition and more.

Patent pending.

The increase in CAGR at 30% every year shows the demand for fish and fish products. Name: Effing Seafoods
Description:
Many wonder what "Effing" is all about, and if I'm just being cheeky. In fact, there is a story behind it. Read on to see where it all began, both with me and with the name...

I've been surrounded by the ocean and seafood since birth. I grew up in a Commercial Fishing family on the coast of British Columbia and we're positive salt water runs through my veins.

What's the deal with Effing you ask?

Using the name "Effing" is fun. It draws attention wherever I go, but there is a story behind it, just like there is with everything Effing Seafoods brings in!

When I was shellfish farming, I was looking for a way to brand my oysters. They were grown in a small inlet called Effingham Inlet, Barkley Sound, just off the West Coast of Vancouver Island. Because of this, I dubbed them "Effing Oysters". It immediately began to draw attention from chefs, seafood buyers, foodies and the general public. I not only saw an impressive increase in sales, I also started being approached by many for online interviews and promotional videos. To this day, after being out of the industry for more then two years, I still get recognized as the Effing Oyster guy, and I'm carving out that same name in the Edmonton area too!

Name: Extreme Kayak Fishing with TJ
Description:
Specializing in light tackle, live bait and artificial, kayak fishing at key locations within the Rappahannock fisheries.  Smallmouth bass of all sizes are taken north of Fredericksburg, (an upriver fishing adventure).  From Route one to the city docks there are key feeding streams, holding giant striper and catfish certain times a year.  Largemouth and smallmouth bass are caught year-round.  Down where the Rappahannock enters the Chesapeake Bay, (down river adventure) the mud waters from heavy rain, give way to clear salty water that holds a variety of croaker, flounder, puppy drum, striper, bluefish, seabass, and spotted sea trout.  Sandy beaches hold pockets of bait for the cast net enthusiast. 

I do this every weekend as a hobby, I really enjoy the sport and adrenaline of going out into the water using your own bodies strength (no motors, just paddles) and catching a variety of fish, some worth eating, others catch and release, and then their is always the big one that got away...  I plan to start with small groups of 1-3 people and build from there. If the weather is right some wheres along the Rappahannock river, Saturday or Sunday each week, I will be there testing the waters with a positive attitude.  If taking a nice smallmouth at the top of cascading rapids  or croaker every cast, sound interesting, then stay tuned for videos and pictures as this project expands.

Regards, T. J.  Plummer

Name: Awan Biofloc Fish Farming
Description:
Awan Biofloc Fish Farming is a leading provider of sustainable and efficient fish farming solutions. We use biofloc technology to create a natural and healthy environment for fish to thrive, while also reducing water usage and environmental impact.

Biofloc is a dense suspension of microorganisms that are fed with fish waste and other organic matter. These microorganisms break down the waste and produce nutrients that the fish can absorb. This creates a closed-loop system where the fish waste is recycled to feed the fish, reducing the need for external inputs such as water and fertilizer.

Awan Biofloc Fish Farming offers a wide range of products and services to help fish farmers get started with biofloc technology. We provide biofloc fish tanks and systems, biofloc fish feed and additives, biofloc fish farming training and consulting, and biofloc fish harvesting and processing services.

We are committed to helping our customers achieve the highest possible returns from their biofloc fish farming operations. We offer a comprehensive range of products and services, as well as expert advice and support, to help our customers succeed.

Description:
After always having a passion for our oceans & marine life, and the wealth of knowledge that I obtained from over a decade in hospitality, I decided to start my own business venture into aquaculture and aquaponics.

Moncherry Fisheries is the first aquaculture, & aquaponics farm in Oudtshoorn South Africa. The aquaculture industry is a multi-billion dollar industry globally. As global wild stocks of fish are on the decline, it is essential that aquaculturists step up to the task of compensating for an ever growing global demand of fish. Moncherry Fisheries specializes in the farming and supply of the Nile Tilapia fish. The tilapia industry in South Africa is still in its infancy, in comparison to the rest of Africa and Asia where millions of tons are produced per year.

This is a new method of farming, and in particularly is favorable in areas of the world where water is scarce. In brief, aquaponics allows you to produce two products from one system, as the water is continuously recycled.

Name: Aqua North Sdn Bhd
Description:
Fish farming is a form of aquaculture in which fish are raised in enclosures to be sold as food. It is the fastest growing area of animal food production. Today, about half the fish consumed globally are raised in these artificial environments. Commonly farmed species include salmon, tuna, cod, trout, and halibut. These “aquafarms” can take the form of mesh cages submerged in natural bodies of water or concrete enclosures on land.


According to the United Nations Food and Agriculture Organization, roughly 32% of world fish stocks are overexploited, depleted or recovering and need of being urgently rebuilt. Fish farming is hailed by some as a solution to the overfishing problem. However, these farms are far from benign and can severely damage ecosystems by introducing diseases, pollutants, and invasive species. The damage caused by fish farms varies, depending on the type of fish, how it is raised and fed, the size of the production, and where the farm is located.
 
One significant issue is that—rather than easing the impact on wild populations—the farms often depend on wild fish species lower on the food chain, like anchovies, in order to feed the larger, carnivorous farmed species. It can take up to five pounds of smaller fish to produce one pound of a fish like salmon or sea bass. Overfishing of these smaller “forage” fish has repercussions throughout the ocean ecosystem.

As is the case with industrial animal farms on land, the fish are often housed in unnaturally crowded and cramped conditions with little room to move. Fish may suffer from lesions, fin damage, and other debilitating injuries. The overcrowded and stressful conditions promote disease and parasite outbreaks—such as sea lice—that farmers treat with pesticides and antibiotics. The use of antibiotics can create drug-resistant strains of diseases that can harm wildlife populations and even humans that eat the farmed fish.

Aqua North management and board bring together young entrepreneurs, experienced professionals with corporate backgrounds, inclusive & sustainable business development skills.

The company’s technical team blends local fish farm experiences with international standards in aquaculture, involving top-ranked consultants thanks to Aqua North’s ability to attract skilled and motivated individuals sharing the same vision.

Name: BRISTOL FISH PROJECT C.I.C.
Description:
Bristol Fish Project CIC is a community-supported aquaponics farm in Bristol. Aquaponics is the cultivation of fish and plants together in a constructed recirculating ecosystem utilising natural bacterial cycles to convert fish waste to plant nutrients. We think everyone should be able to access affordable, nutritious and good quality food and that urban aquaponic farming can contribute to wider urban sustainability by recycling urban waste and bringing people together!

2015 saw us receive a £50000 strategic grant from Bristol2015 as part of the European Green Capital. This enabled us to start work on a commercial scale system (The largest of its kind in the UK- Unit 1 Vale Lane in Bishopsworth, Bristol), which we are now building for a summer launch.

The project is set to become a 40,000L facility growing Eels as part of a conservation programme partnering with Bristol Water, watercress and wasabi. The project will also pioneer work on welfare in the context of community-scale aquaponics.

Name: Marine World
Description:
As Marine World our first concern is the health of your aquatic life. Our aquatic team takes extraordinary measures to ensure that all aquatic life receives the best possible care until they arrive safely to your home. We educate aquarium owners - whether novice, hobbyist or a seasoned enthusiast - on the proper care of the aquarium's inhabitants as well as how to provide the best possible aquarium habitat. Each specimen is visually inspected by us before it is selected for your aquarium. While in our care, every fish is offered the proper foods to meet its specific nutritional requirements. We also stand committed to excellent customer service and post sales support for all our customers.

People say a successful career is made when you do what you love to do. I'm not here to sell my proposition to you. I am just doing what I love to do the most. I hope you'll also share in this passion, soon.
It all started with a small aquarium in the year 2000 when I was 9. It was nothing short of a life-changing experience for me. The Turbo Snail was busy munching up the bad Algae on the glass of the aquarium; a Yellow Tang was busy grazing on one of the corals, a Sailfin chasing away competition, Percula Clowns sneaking up from their host Anemones! The aquarium had so much of color and life in it. Nothing stood still, and each one of the living beings went about their work, quietly and gently.

Name: FishMich.com
Description:
FishMich.com was started for the sole purpose of finding information on fishing Michigan lakes and rivers. Many locals vacation here and many tourists travel from out of state. FishMich.com is designed to be a one stop website for all of those people. We are trying to inform everyone of the great fishing opportunities in their chosen vacation spot. It is also for the standard fisherman that stays close to home. Whether you've fished a spot for many years or are looking for a new one, you can find it here. The listings in each county are designed to guide fishermen searching for bait and tackle, places to stay, boats to rent or guides to hire. It also allows these businesses a place to promote their Michigan products.

 Fish Mich.com is a user based website. We cannot physically fish every lake and river in Michigan, though we are trying. So, we are asking for your input. If you have any information on these lakes or rivers send it to us. If you have questions or can help anybody out on fishing reports, post in the forums. With help from the great fishing community of Michigan, this will become the largest informational fishing website in Michigan.

Name: Oasi Gargamelle
Description:
IT -------- All'Oasi Gargamelle(*), nel Parco nazionale del Gargano, seguiamo con cura le fasi utili a garantire la freschezza e la genuinità di prodotti del mare. Moleche, ostriche e vongole, sono allevate, controllate e confezionate per proporle a un mercato della ristorazione sempre più attento ai colori, ai profumi e ai sapori del mare. Ciò è possibile grazie a un valido team composto da tecnici qualificati e da attenti partner commerciali impegnati a soddisfare le richieste di clienti e consumatori.

EN --------  At the Gargamelle Oasis … 

- the mollusks and crustaceans are stress free within the 32 hectares park. The breeding water is compliant with EU regulations for class A on a microbiological level and thus the mollusks need not be sent to a purification center. 

- area pollution is minimal.  Gargamelle Oasis is within the Parco del Gargano, the Italian National Park with a very rich biodiversity. 
- transport and storage times are reduced to a minimum, as compared to the competition, since the breeding area is just a few meters away from the packaging center. 

- the seafood takes on unique flavors. 
Thanks to the use of breeding water with several different levels of salinity, the edi-ble portions take on distinct characteris-tics. We offer not only high quality products and health inspections for our mollusks, but also great care in packaging, person-alization, and attention to logistics. Our investment in these assets allows us to offer true partnerships with our cli-ents, both in Italy and abroad. 

- Food Safety and Quality: Monitoring provided by Asl-FG with lab work from the Experimental Zooprophy-lactic Institute of Apulia and Basilicata 

- Inspection: Health inspections per-formed with the HACCP method with veri-fication tests from authorized labs.

(*) "Gargamelle" è il nome ideato per indicare le moleche, ovvero i granchi molli del Gargano caratterizzati da un gusto raro e ricercato e utilizzati per impreziosire le fritture.

Name: Inland Fisheries Service
Description:
The Inland Fisheries Service (IFS) is a Tasmanian State Government body. We operate under the Inland Fisheries Act 1995 and are overseen by the Director of Inland Fisheries and the Inland Fisheries Advisory Council.

The IFS manages all fish and fisheries in inland waters. This is all waters on the inland side of the Seaward Limit, the boundary between inland and State (marine) waters. This includes lakes, rivers, estuaries, farm dams, registered private fisheries, ponds and aquariums.

We look after;
- Managing, protecting, and regulating inland fisheries
- Stocking of inland waters
- Creating, improving and maintaining access to inland waters; and;
- Researching and investigating about inland waters.

In doing all this we manage Tasmania’s recreational fisheries (trout, salmon and whitebait), commercial fisheries (fish farms, eel fishery and fish dealers), pest species and native fish.

Name: Crab Crib WA
Description:
The safe, sustainable and humane design of the Crab Crib is garnering Australia-wide attention for projected improvements for the industry, taking out top honours in the 2020 Good Design Awards, winning the Product Design Sport and Lifestyle category, which recognises outstanding design and innovation  

Features include wide and slippery strip plastic and surface that prevents the damage and loss of female eggs, which are stored in an abdominal sack and are at great risk of destruction from abrasive nylon rope nets and the associated knots. The slip also guarantees that juvenile and undersize species can be easily released without the prying or ripping of claws from the net thus increasing the chances of survival and ongoing sustainability of the species.

The net is light-weight and load bearing and even has the potential to be made from recycled plastic ocean waste. The solid componentary ensures longevity i.e.  no knot and rope tangles, movement or fraying, which reduces the chance it could be discarded as ocean waste.

In Australia, the widespread appeal of catching crabs for recreation, is well documented. To ensure that crabs have a home in Western Australia in the future, Perth-based inventor Kate Goldie is breaking ground with her new invention, Crab Crib, ensuring humane and environmental sustainability of one of the country’s favourite pastimes, as well as the commercial crabbing industry.

Name: Fortune Aquaculture Pvt Ltd
Description:
Fortune Fisheries has taken a plunge into this business after forecasting the tremendous growth opportunity in aquaculture. Started as a proprietary concern by the Promoter Shri. Rajesh Tarachand Bansod in 2016 as a Fish Trading Company, it grew itself successfully and became as one of the most prominent players in the business of ‘Cage Culture’ in Central India.

Fortune Fisheries in its early days started working as a Consultant firm for Corporative Fish-farming Societies and the government fishery department in Vidarbha Region. With the experience gathered while working with the fisherman community, government authorities, fish breeders, and wholesale traders, Fortune Fisheries ventured into the business of aquaculture. In no time Fortune Fisheries procured lease and control over freshwater bodies in Vidarbha Region by getting into various agreements and MOU’s with the Government of Maharashtra, Department of Fisheries and Corporative Fish-farming Societies.

In the year 2017 Shri. Bansod incorporated Fortune Aquaculture Private Limited for upscaling the proprietary business into a professionally run corporate enterprise. Since then we address both these entities collectively as ‘Fortune Aqua’.
 
We have lease and control of over 10,000+ hectare of water spread area in 4 strategically located reservoirs in Central India and 96 other water bodies each measuring between 2 – 7 hectare of water spread area. In addition to this, we have a state-of-the-art hatchery spread across 37 acres located near Itiadoh reservoir, Gondia district, Maharashtra which is just 160 kilometers from Nagpur, Maharashtra.

We have currently installed 2,000 cages out of which 1,102 are active and we can scale it up to 37,200 cages. The current installation has the capacity to give a yearly output of 11,000 Metric Ton Fish that form two crop cycles.

Name: Lake Farms and Fishing Lodge Limited
Description:
Lake Farms and Fishing Lodge Limited (LFFL) is a climate-smart aquaculture enterprise based in Mundulundulu Village on the shores of Lake Kariba in Siavonga District, Zambia. Our mission is to develop the fisheries industry in the Gwembe Valley, create dignified employment for women and youth, and promote sustainable fishing practices that protect natural ecosystems and local livelihoods.

Founded with a mission to revolutionize rural aquaculture, uplift underserved communities, and reduce ecological strain on natural fisheries, Lake Farms has grown into a beacon of sustainable blue economy development. The company uniquely combines environmental innovation, community engagement, and inclusive business practices to deliver lasting socio-economic and environmental impact.

We farm Nile tilapia and Australian red claw crayfish using floating cages, while partnering with over 500 small-scale fishers from surrounding cooperatives. Lake Farms purchases wild catch at fair prices and supplies solar freezers, solar lanterns, boats, traps, and life jackets to support ethical and safe fishing. We also empower women fish traders by selling farmed fish at reduced rates to promote food security, economic inclusion, and resilience.

To reduce post-harvest losses and improve market access, we are deploying solar-powered cold rooms, freezers, and refrigerated transport. These energy-efficient solutions help us lower emissions while boosting productivity and incomes for micro-entrepreneurs.

Our integrated approach advances the Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs), particularly:

SDG 2: Zero Hunger

SDG 5: Gender Equality

SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth

SDG 12: Responsible Consumption and Production

SDG 13: Climate Action

SDG 14: Life Below Water

Lake Farms is helping transform the fish value chain into one that is inclusive, sustainable, and climate-resilient—driving growth and improving livelihoods across Zambia’s lakeshore communities.

Name: EcoJubilee Aquaculture Conglomerate
Description:
At EcoJubilee Aquaculture Conglomerate, we are a leading consultation company specializing in fish culturing and offering high-quality fish supplements. Our team, led by Dr. Patricia, an expert in fish disease, brings over 15 years of experience in the aquaculture field.

We provide comprehensive consultation services to fish farmers who are facing challenges such as fish mortality and disease outbreaks. Our solutions are backed by extensive research, practical expertise, and proven treatments for various fish diseases. We offer personalized recommendations and strategies to enhance fish growth, improve coloring, and promote overall fish health.

As a trusted partner in the aquaculture industry, we are committed to sustainable fish culturing practices and helping farmers achieve optimal results. Our services are tailored to meet the unique needs of each farmer, ensuring the highest level of customer satisfaction.

In addition to our consultation services, we also offer a range of premium fish supplements that are scientifically formulated to enhance fish growth, boost immune systems, and optimize coloration. Our supplements are carefully crafted using high-quality ingredients and are designed to meet the nutritional requirements of different fish species.

At EcoJubilee Aquaculture Conglomerate, we combine expertise, practical experience, and a passion for fish culturing to empower farmers and promote successful aquaculture practices. Contact us today to discover how we can help you achieve your fish culturing goals.

Keywords: fish culturing, consultation services, fish supplements, fish mortality, fish disease, aquaculture, sustainable practices, fish growth, fish health, nutritional supplements

Name: WestHead Lobster Company
Description:
Our story is unique in many ways. Our company was birthed from a local fishermen's association in South West Nova Scotia, CANADA. Our main goal is to increase the trap to table process making your Nova Scotia Premium Lobster as fresh as the North Atlantic Ocean. 

Fishermen's Premium Atlantic Lobster is empowering our local harvesters so that they can virtually ship anywhere in the world, increase product quality to our valued customers and embrace long lasting relationships with our vital customers.

Fishermen's Premium has partnered with several local, traditional and sustainable fishing lobster harvesters who sell their wild caught, fresh lobster catches to us on a daily basis. FPAL’s purchasers take the time to personally meet each and every lobstermen when they arrive home to their wharves with their daily catch, to ensure that only the freshest caught, high quality lobsters are taken for processing. Once the lobster reaches the FPAL facility, it further goes through a strenuous quality assurance process, making sure that only the freshest, highest quality and most premium live lobster is distributed to our valued customers. The end result is nothing short of perfection each and every time! The trusted relationship between FPAL and the lobstermen promotes a sustainable lobster fishing industry and is closely tied to our communities.

Name: Open Ocean Trading
Description: Open Ocean Trading is a marketplace that allows buyers and sellers to trade commercially harvested and farmed seafood products in forward time. Name: OceanBox B.V.
Description: OceanBox assists the fishing industry in coping with the rapid environmental changes and the increasing demand for eco-friendly fishing practices. We acknowledge that the ongoing transitions in energy, food, and nature significantly affect fishing opportunities, especially for fishermen who understand that sustainability will eventually become a competitive advantage. Our goal is to support the industry in adapting to these challenges and help forward-thinking fishermen thrive in the face of these transformations. We believe that by applying new research to their own data, the industry can learn and adapt more effectively. Our platform enables fishing companies to be transparent about their operations and environmental impact while facilitating collaboration and innovation among teams, even without coding expertise. We strike a balance between businesses need (e.g., data control, cost-efficiency) with what science needs (e.g., data accuracy, transparency). With our extensive knowledge in cloud systems, IoT, fisheries data, AI, sustainability, and fisheries management, we are preparing to deliver our solution globally through strategic partnerships and customers leading by example.

Name: PIUS
Description:
Pielach Ursprung Saibling 
Unsere Fische, Eismeersaiblinge oder Arctic Char genannt, werden in einer kleinbäuerlich strukturierten Fischzuchtanlage am Fuße des Annabergs, mitten im Isbary Bioland, gezüchtet.



Reinstes Quellwasser - vom Pielach-Ursprung – fließt in die Zuchtbecken und bietet den Fischen eine unvergleichliche Lebensgrundlage. Gefüttert werden die Fische mit hochwertigstem BIO-Futter! Selbstverständlich verzichten wir auf jegliche chemische Manipulation (Antibiotika, andere Medikamente) bei der Aufzucht der Fische!

Der Eismeersaibling – Arctic Char – lebt normalerweise im Eismeer nördlich von Island. Ihm seine Lebensbedingungen im alpenländischen Raum zu bieten ist eine große Herausforderung an den Züchter. Wir sind stolz darauf, dass es mit unserer hervorragenden Wasserqualität gelingt! Manche Fachleute sagen, es sei der Fisch mit den meisten Omega3 Fettsäuren und daher der weltweit gesündeste Fisch.

Kenmare Select was started by award-winning chef, Rémy Benoit, in 1991. Born in France, Rémy worked in the industry for 40 years and joined Hilton International Hotels after completing a BA in Hotel Management from Glion in Switzerland. Name: Oceanpure Pty Ltd
Description:
The purpose of this page is to introduce to interested parties a unique Aquaculture project which has the capacity to becoming a highly profitable growth business.  Oceanpure Pty Ltd was formed to develop a sea urchin aquaculture industry in Australia with a goal to deliver high quality sea urchin products for export, and to the hotels, restaurants and kitchens of Australia. 

Stocks of quality wild sea urchins have been in decline for the last twenty years but demand, particularly in North and South East Asia, is strong and growing. In Australia, with the increased focus on fine dining there is a small but growing demand for high quality sea urchin roe. The current supply/demand mismatch has created an opportunity for the aquaculture of sea urchins in Australia.

The Tripneustes gratilla (T. gratilla), which under culture conditions can reach a size ready for  harvest in 6 - 8 months from weaning, as opposed to a minimum of 36 months for the temperate species. The target species is also native to Japan and is known for its excellent taste, colour and texture.  The growth rates and the stunning quality of this urchin make it the ideal candidate for aquaculture.

Name: HinterNoosa Hatchery
Description:
Hinternoosa Hatchery is a leader in the ethical breeding and conservation of two of Australia’s most endangered and iconic aquatic species: the Australian Lungfish and Mary River Cod. As an Australian government approved facility, we are entrusted with the conservation and sustainable management of these species, playing a vital role in restoring ecosystems and supporting long-term species survival.

With decades of expertise, HinterNoosa Hatchery has become a cornerstone in the preservation and management of Australia’s aquatic heritage. We have pioneered refined breeding techniques that ensure genetic diversity, helping to restore balance to ecosystems and reduce pressures on wild populations.

We specialise in breeding:
Australian Lungfish: A living fossil, this species represents exclusivity and a direct link to evolutionary history. Bred with care, each fish is part of a legacy millions of years in the making and is available exclusively to select ornamental fish wholesalers.
Mary River Cod: A critical apex predator, essential for restoring ecological balance. Our breeding programs focus on repopulating habitats where this species has become extinct and supporting conservation efforts across Australia.

Through our exclusive partnerships, we build long-term relationships with wholesalers and conservation groups, ensuring trust, quality, and shared values of sustainability.

Name: JETE Innovation
Description:
JETE Innovation - din partner innen rensefiskvelferd!

JETE Innovation er en nyetablert bedrift med et mål om å bidra til en bedre og blåere fremtid innen fiskeoppdrett ved å fokusere på fiskevelferd. Vi er et team med vidt forskjellig bakgrunn som jobber målrettet for å få våre innovative ideer ut av hodet og inn på markedet. Sammen har vi bakgrunn fra FoU, biokjemi, salgsledelse og IKT. 

Lakseoppdrett er en gigantindustri i Norge, nest størst etter olje og gass. Industriens største problem er lakselus, en parasitt som fester seg på laksen, gir infeksjoner og fører til død. Den absolutt beste avlusningsmetoden er bruk av rensefisk, som naturlig spiser lus av laksen. Ved bruk av rensefisk unngår vi medisinsk, kjemisk og mekanisk rensing som kan stresse oppdrettsfisken. Dessverre er rensefiskvelferden i dag relativt dårlig; rundt 30 % av rensefisken levert til laksemerdene dør innen kort tid. JETE Innovation ønsker å bedre velferden slik at rensefisken får et bedre og lengre liv og kan bidra mer effektivt i kampen mot den plagsomme lakselusen!

Vi  arbeider fortløpende med nye løsninger som kan hjelpe enhver oppdretters hverdag. For øyeblikket utvikler vi et system som skal redusere kronisk stress hos rensefisk, og dermed redusere dødelighet.  Vi ønsker å skape et kjent miljø for rensefisken for å øke trivsel og levetid.

Kontakt oss for mer informasjon på contact@jete.no, eller besøk oss på våre nettsider, www.jete.no. Mer informasjon kommer på et senere tidspunkt.

Description:
We are a start-up company engaged in freshwater fisheries, focusing on freshwater fish farming for consumption. The establishment of this company was the first step taken by the founders of Crayfisher for their interest in the aquatic fishery industry which continues to develop and become more modern in order to support local and international market demands in the future.

We believe that over time, the market demand for fish and food from the sea and fresh water will continue to increase along with the increasing human population in each year. In the future, we predict that the supply of seafood and freshwater fish will be dominated by livestock products.

Cultured fish will ensure the supply needed by consumers better without damaging marine and freshwater ecosystems from excessive hunting or fishing.

Moreover, the rapid increase of technological advances will support the fishery industry to produce more quantities with better quality.

Therefore, we are determined to become a fishery company that is able to produce a sufficient and quality supply of freshwater food with the use of technology.  As a company born from a country that is rich in marine and fresh water resources, of course this motivates us to manage resources better. We believe that the existing natural resources can compete to produce the best world-class freshwater food products.

Name: Charter Fishermans Association
Description:
Charter Fisherman's Association was formed by a group of Charter for Hire fishermen for the Charter for Hire industry and the millions of recreational fishermen who rely on the Industry across the country.

Our mission statement is: to ensure American public access to fishing, to engage and represent the charter for hire industry, and to ensure long-term sustainability of our industry. This mission is achieved through outreach, education and the development of realistic solutions within the framework of the Magnuson-Stevens Fishery Management Act, and the federal or state processes for managing and improving our fisheries.

Current fishing rules hurt anglers, fishing businesses, and our nation's fisheries by severely limiting fishing with short or even closed seasons, while promoting wasteful discards due to outdated management practices. Moreover, the rules also fail to manage the fishery effectively. CFA will work to meet the mandates set by congress through the promotion of fishery management practices that are beneficial to the American public, the fishery in general as well as the fishing industry.

Name: Delalande Pêche
Description:
La société Delalande, créée par Mr Alain Delalande en 1979 était d’abord spécialisée dans la vente de ligne montée pour la pêche au coup. 
Rapidement, les premières machines pour la réalisation de têtes plombées seront achetées et les premiers leurres souples, importés des États-Unis, arrivent sur le marché Français grâce à Delalande.

Dans les années suivantes, la partie « ligne montée » est vendue afin de se consacrer entièrement à la partie tête plombée et leurre souple, notamment avec l’achat d’une première machine pour fabriquer des leurres. L’élaboration de la matière Delalande est alors en cours, et les premiers leurres souples voient le jour.

C’est en 1995 que naît le célèbre Sandra , un leurre innovant à l’époque, abordable et toujours d’une efficacité redoutable aujourd’hui. Il fait partie aujourd’hui des leurres souples connus de toutes les générations de pêcheurs aux leurres, et est présent dans toutes les boîtes.

Aujourd'hui Delalande c'est toute la partie design et développement ainsi que la conception de ses leurres souples, alliant innovations, performances et technologies et surtout engament envers une pêche durable avec la nouvelle matière éco-responsable.

Name: Sonapesca FG

Hoy la Pesca Industrial tiene un gran desafío y visión, consolidar una industria pesquera moderna, sustentable, innovadora y comprometida con la seguridad alimentaria para asegurar que las futuras generaciones también accedan a recursos sanos y nutritivos. 
Desde la Sociedad Nacional de Pesca (SONAPESCA F.G.) –gremio que reúne a los principales actores de la pesca industrial del país– estamos trabajando de manera colaborativa para garantizar una actividad responsable, sostenible y alineada con los más altos estándares internacionales, a través de la adopción de tecnologías y prácticas que fortalezcan la eficiencia, la trazabilidad y la sustentabilidad en el cuidado de los recursos marinos y el océano. 

Asimismo, aportar al desarrollo económico y social de Chile, generando empleo de calidad y promoviendo una cadena productiva que abastece tanto al mercado nacional como al internacional.

Buscamos ser un referente técnico y gremial en la construcción de políticas públicas, la representación del sector frente a organismos nacionales e internacionales y la promoción de iniciativas que fortalezcan la legitimidad social de la pesca industrial. A través de la cooperación, buscamos que Chile sea reconocido como un líder global en la producción responsable de alimentos provenientes del mar.

Name: Fent Mar 9
Description:
Fent Mar 9, nace de la demanda de productos sanos, de calidad contrastable, estricto control sanitario y total trazabilidad de su origen.

Durante miles de años se han cultivado vegetales y se han criado animales para el consumo humano, la acuicultura es una evolución natural. En la actualidad a nadie se le ocurre intentar encontrar un pollo salvaje, simplemente por ya no existen. De forma similar la explotación sistemática de algunas especies marinas junto con la evidente contaminación de los mares, hace que la producción de langostinos en un ambiente totalmente controlado sea una clara apuesta de futuro.

El langostino es muy apreciado tanto por su sabor como su aporte nutricional, en todo el mundo. La gran diferencia entre un langostino cultivado y comercializado fresco y los importados congelados de países en desarrollo es la ausencia de desinfectantes y conservantes.

La sobre explotación pesquera hace que el producto salvaje y fresco llegue a nuestros mercados en menor cantidad y por ello con un coste prohibitivo.

Fent Mar 9 va a producir un langostino de alta calidad y con un sabor totalmente natural, sin ningún aditivo, conservante o medicamento añadido, cuando el producto se suministra fresco, recién pescado, no precisa ningún producto artificial.

Este proyecto es pionero en Cataluña y nace con una importante orientación a I+D en varias líneas, entre las que destaca la investigación y desarrollo comercial de varias especies de marisco autóctonas de nuestra costa mediterránea. 

El proyecto esta formado por un equipo profesional competente y un grupo de inversores iniciales, contamos con respaldo institucional y solo se precisan una parte del capital necesario.

Si crees en nuestro proyecto, si crees que ha llegado el momento de ofrecer al mercado alternativas a la sobre explotación pesquera y te preocupa la producción de alimentación sana y puedes colaborar económicamente, contacta con nosotros.

Name: Development of smart antifouling strategies towards energy-efficient fishing boats in Turkey
Description:
In Turkey, there are 13,000 artisanal fishing boats contributing to the income of at least 40,000 fishermen and their families. Typically, these fishing boats are of traditional design and inefficient in terms of fuel consumption. They may waste up to 44% of their fuel due to biofouling (organisms growing on boats), which also requires costly hull cleaning and antifouling procedures. Inadequate design and antifouling strategies aggravate the profitability and cause environmental problems such as increased Green-House Gas emissions and transportation of harmful non-indigenous species, while negatively affecting the expected growth in the fisheries sector as opposed to Turkey’s Vision 2023 targets for fisheries.
This project aims to develop smart antifouling strategies towards energy-efficient fishing boats to contribute to the economic development and welfare of the fishing community in Turkey. This will be achieved by rolling out our previous pilot work across Turkey, carrying out life-cycle assessment and life-cycle cost analysis, developing a framework and training modules for stakeholders, and organising outreach and stakeholder engagement activities. These activities will not only increase the household income in the fishing community, but also contribute to the research capacity building that provides a basis for further economic growth.

Name: Boat To Table Seafood LLC
Description:
Owner and Founder, Keith LeGrande, was born with fishing in his blood.  Most of his early childhood days were spent with a fishing pole in his hand learning the ropes from his older brother, father and grandfather.  Some kid’s may fill their piggy banks with a neighborhood lemonade stand, but not Keith LeGrande. His first entrepreneur venture was a summer crab business out of his Jon Boat behind his childhood home on the Elizabeth River.

After graduating from Hampden-Sydney College, Keith eventually landed in the logistics field.  On top of his “day job”, he got his captain’s license and co-founded LeGrande Slam Charters in Virginia Beach.  As a charter boat captain, Keith’s clients always wanted to know where they could buy the freshest seafood. For a beautiful, large city surrounded by water, the lack of fresh seafood options for our local VB community is astounding.  VB has some of the best fishing in the world, yet most of us are limited to purchasing seafood from grocery stores without truly knowing what we’re buying and where it came from. Combining his experience in both the Logistics and Fishing Industries, Keith decided to put on his permanent out of office and Boat to Table Seafood was born.  

As a husband and father to two young children, providing the freshest local seafood starts at home.  We look forward to filling your table with the very best our local waters have to offer.

Description:
Global seafood and oceans sectors face environmental and social challenges that threaten long-term business viability, oceans and people. Today, twenty years after the rise of the sustainable seafood movement, the sector has a tremendous opportunity to meet these challenges by developing a cadre of up-and-coming leaders from across the sectors in partnership with SOLI, the Seafood & Oceans Leadership Institute.  

SOLI will be hosting two pilot trainings in 2017 for a select group of participants in conjunction with the conferences below. The pilots will focus on building a network of up-and-coming leaders to solve critical cross-sector challenges together. Pilot participants will help inform and shape the full SOLI program launch in 2018. 

SOLI Training, Dublin, Ireland
October 3, 2017

SOLI Training, Qingdao, China
October 31, 2017

To register, please visit https://soliexperience.info/

Name: Oregon Tuna Classic
Description:
The Oregon Tuna Classic is the result of a few compassionate fishermen and one great idea:  Having discovered a way to funnel their passion in to giving back to the community, the group reorganized and in 2006 The Oregon Tuna Classic was registered with the IRS as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. A committee of all volunteers was established to secure sponsorships and to effectively manage future events.

Today, The Oregon Tuna Classic is a well-established charitable tournament on the West Coast. Since 2005, over 1,000,000 pounds of food has been donated to the Oregon Food Bank through the donation of tuna and food purchased from the cash donations. The OTC’s donations have helped the Oregon Food Bank purchase five pounds of food for every dollar donated.

The Oregon Tuna Classic will continue with one event in Garibaldi with Big Fish Friday and the Main Event on Saturday with dinner, raffles and awards Saturday evening. The events continue to draw teams from all over the northwest including Idaho and California.  We average around 60-70 teams per event and our tents are capable of handling 500-600 people.

The tournaments also bring much needed economic benefit to the communities visited by the armada of fishermen, volunteers and spectators. Local businesses in Garibaldi continue to see the benefits while also donating their time and services to the events.  Garibaldi City Manager John O’leary speculates the Oregon Tuna Classic might rival the annual Garibaldi days in generating business.

Description:
We offer the Best Fishing Charters in Puerto Vallarta!

Puerto Vallarta is known world wide for Epic Sportfishing!

Catch Marlin, Mahi Mahi, Yellowfin Tuna, Wahoo, Sailfish, and more!Fishing Puerto Vallarta is what We love and we are lucky enough to call this tropical paradise our back yard.  YOu do not have to nly for the big game fish mentioned above You can also go on our 4-6 hour Puerto Vallarta fishing charters and target smaller Jack Crevalle, Skip Jacks, Needlefish, Spanish Mackerel, Red snapper, Roosterfish and smaller mahi mahi all depending on season.  We offer perfect vessels for both fishing inside and outside of Vallarta's Banderas Bay where you will find the record braking game fish Puerto Vallarta is known for. Our experienced captains and crew's have the local knowledge for Puerto Vallarta fishing grounds needed for success. All of our gear is top notch Shimano, Izorline, Penn, Tiburon and of course We always have fresh line, flouro carbon leaders, Spectra, when your fishing in Puerto Vallarta for black marlin up to 1,200 pounds it will put all of these factors to the test, and We take pride knowing We can tackle any fish that comes our way. After the catch, there is a Puerto Vallarta fishing taxidermy service that can mount your prize. Or you can have your fresh catch frozen here in the Marina Vallarta if you would like to bring your fresh Puerto Vallarta fish home. Remember we are a proud member of the Billfish Sportfishing Foundation and we encourage catch and release of all Billfish when fishing in Puerto Vallarta waters. Check out our private fishing Charters

Name: DataIT Consult
Description:
Buoy Monitoring and Tracking
Data buoys have become a very important tool in oceanographic information gathering as well as fishing. The data provided by these fishing buoys are very vital to the fishing operations as well as marine environment protection. Buoys are the eyes and ears of fishing vessels and purse seiners. BenIT Consult takes the reserved pleasure of analyzing data from buoys, providing effective and efficient decision-making parameters for all sea-going vessels and maritime buoys in some of the most remote areas of the world. Fish Aggregating Devices (FAD) are also recoverable through effective tracking and monitoring and this helps in environmental protection. Management is across platforms i.e. all and any buoy manufacturer can be managed be it ZNIBAL, SATLINK, IRIS and MARINE INSTRUMENT.
Monitoring & Tracking Buoys for Optimized Fishing and Fuel Consumption
Optimize fishing operations by tracking the location of Fish Aggregating Devices reduced fishing duration.
Reduce operational cost (fuel consumption and transmission cost) by monitoring and deactivating inactive buoys as well as buoys on land.
Locate Buoy Position and Environmental Protection
Track buoys to obtain their immediate GPS location for FAD cleaning and repairs.
Enable buoy recovery as per transmission of last position 
Monitor Buoys Remotely for Efficient Reporting and Effective Decision Making
Flag out-of-the-ordinary events through exception-based reporting.


VMS(Vessel Monitoring  System) Data Analysis
A fishing vessel monitoring program for fisheries surveillance in which fishing trip data (positions and activity) is used as a key part to monitor vessels in territorial waters of a country or a sub division of a country (Exclusive Economic Zones). This can be used to improve the management and sustainability of the marine environment through ensuring proper fishing practices and the prevention of illegal fishing and hence protecting the livelihood of fishermen.
Fisheries Management
Monitor the activates/movement of VMS equipped vessels with respect to restricted fishing areas. A vessel may have license to fish, transit through or may not be allowed in the area.
Catch Reporting 
Reporting of catch locations, catch size and catch species all form a comprehensive catch report data base that can be used to effectively manage fishing activity and improve sustainability.
Fisheries Research and Analysis 
The combination of fishing data (catch data) and tracking data can aid in fishing operations. This brings a reduction in operational cost as historical data can be used to improve upon fishing.
Safety
VMS data can be used in search and rescue(SAR). If all else should fail the VMS is the best bet for search and rescue as they seem to have very short transmission intervals. VMS equipment may not float or start transmitting upon salt water detection. Global Maritime Distress Safety Systems. Emergency Position Indicating Radio Beacons (EPIRB)
Enforcement
VMS data in combination with logbook data scan be used to check IUU and other illegal fishing habits.

Name: Atholl Sporting
Description:
Atholl Sporting has access to some of the premier salmon beats in the UK including exclusive access to the world famous Stobhall beat on the Tay and we can secure access to many other beats and rivers beside.

We are particularly proud of our partners in Norway, Iceland and on the east coast of Canada with whom we can secure some of the finest international Atlantic Salmon fishing at fantastic prices.

In addition, we can offer advice to anglers on where and when to fish  in specific areas or times of year - our ethos is customer experience over company income.

By that we mean we would happily turn down or advise against booking particular fishing when the conditions or time of year are in our opinion unsuitable.

As anglers ourselves we know there is nothing worse than being given the wrong advice and having a wasted trip to an out of condition river simply because the agent does not fish and as a result does not understand the nuances of fishing.

In addition, Atholl Sporting act as the managing agent of salmon beats and fisheries and would be happy to discuss this part of the operation in more detail with riparian owners or their factors.

The operators of Atholl Sporting are husband and wife team Iain and Katrina Wood,.  

Iain was formerly chief executive officer of FishPal Ltd and has nearly eight years experience in the salmon letting business both as CEO of FishPal and also via FishPalâs subsidiary Tweed Salmon Fishings, which was letting agent for 15 beats on Tweed.

Both Iain and Katrina are keen salmon anglers who fish the length and breadth of the UK enthusiastically (and occasionally successfully), and know what drives anglers to book and they strive to provide anglers with the best fishing opportunities available.

Name: Fishingaround
Description:
FISHING AROUND è un’applicazione mobile, programmata per smartphone Android e Apple che permette di ricercare e dare informazioni dettagliate sia sulle riserve di pesca sia sulle offerte turistiche del territorio ad esse collegate.
L’obiettivo del progetto è generare sviluppo turistico, economico e sociale sul territorio legato agli itinerari di pesca, raggiungendo, tramite l’applicazione, in maniera semplice, diretta e gratuita, il maggior numero di pescatori e amanti delle attività sportive a contatto con la natura, ad oggi ne abbiamo raggiunti già circa 15000 !
FISHING AROUND vuole essere il punto di riferimento sia per chi vuole offrire e promuovere le proprie attività sia per il pescatore che organizza la sua gita con i compagni di pesca o per chi vuole organizzare la vacanza estiva con la famiglia.
FISHING AROUND è l'incontro fra la domanda e l’offerta nel mondo della pesca a livello internazionale,il partner commerciale per chiunque vuole far conoscere e sviluppare la propria attività, è una vetrina sul mondo della pesca.
PROMOZIONE TURISTICA IN FISHINGAROUND
Fishing Around offre la possibilità di avere tutte le acque in gestione, raggruppate in uno strumento di uso costante da parte dei pescatori, la possibilità di mandare comunicati tramite le notifiche push a tutti i pescatori in possesso dell'applicazione, tramite una descrizione dettagliata e con la geolocalizzazione per un più semplice raggiungimento del luogo di pesca. 
E' pertanto possibile promuovere e far conoscere le proprie riserve, descriverne i contenuti, il valore ambientale, in modo da fornire uno strumento utile al pescatore/turista che deciderà in base alle caratteristiche, di scegliere la località di pesca.
Un gruppo dinamico in forte espansione sempre alla ricerca di appassionati di pesca e della natura principalmente, con la filosofia che collaborare è meglio che competere.
Danilo Neri

Want to catch fish like the pros?  Fishing is a science and in order to catch fish over and over you need a system.  FISHTRAX is that system.  

     With FISHTRAX you don’t have to be a seasoned fisherman.  The Fishing Tips section will help guide you on what bait to use,  what that bait looks like, how to fish that bait and where to fish on a water source.

     Already have experience fishing?  Then use our tracking system to keep track of your past results and run reports that will let you analyze that data so that you have a plan of attack the next time you go out.

At Make Wooden Lures we believe that custom lures and massive fish are not just for elite fishermen with tons of money. We bring the awesome fish catching power of hand made wooden lures to anyone who is serious about catching bigger fish, more often.

It doesn’t matter whether you are new to lure making or have been making them for years. What you can learn from this website will transform your fishing and vastly improve your catches.

You’ll get to understand fish and fishing lures much better. You’ll learn how and when to fish different types of wooden lures. And best of all you’ll experience the raw fish pulling power that comes from owning a bunch of custom wooden lures.

Name: 大洋世家
Description:
浙江大洋世家股份有限公司，是著名的万向三农集团投资的农业产业化国家重点龙头企业。

公司注册资本2.7亿元，主营：远洋捕捞、水产品加工、进出口贸易和国内市场终端销售。公司拥有三大远洋捕捞船队：大型超低温金枪鱼延绳钓船18艘；大型金枪鱼围网船4组；大型鱿鱼钓船10艘。它们分别在太平洋、印度洋、西南大西洋海域作业。公司还拥有三个大型水产品冷链物流加工基地，一是宁波北仑保税区的超低温金枪鱼加工和物流基地，二是宁波奉化溪口的金枪鱼罐头和冷冻干燥食品加工基地，这两个基地年加工销售各类金枪鱼原料约10万吨；三是杭州萧山的水产品综合加工和国内终端销售配送基地。三个加工基地均实施HACCP、ISO体系等质量安全管理技术，构建全程可追溯体系，并取得欧美等国的注册认证。

公司自2011年底开始进行国内市场终端销售以来，发展迅速。已经在国内大中城市创建了高超海鲜专柜、品牌体验店、专营批发店、网上销售、餐饮连锁配送、商超连锁、终端餐饮直供等销售模式，立体营销网络逐步形成，品牌效应日益显现，销售总额和利润以每年一倍的速度增长。2013年底，公司与日本三菱商事株式会社合资成立了浙江大菱海洋食品有限公司，强强联手，优势互补，共同推动国内市场终端销售。

公司已经形成了“专业化经营、国际化运作、渔工贸结合、上下游贯通 ”的从深海远洋到千家万户餐桌的全产业链经营模式，2018年实现营业收入32.76亿元、进出口总额3.46亿美元，综合效益在国内同行业中名列前茅。公司将继续以远洋捕捞为基础，以水产品制造为核心，大力拓展国内市场终端销售，不断完善水产食品全产业链建设，为国内外消费者提供更多安全、安心、健康、美味的海洋食品。

Name: Hasco Fishing Company
Description:
Hasco Fishing Company is a fully licensed and sustainable fishing venture in Sierra Leone, committed to delivering high-quality seafood products and fostering responsible practices in the marine industry.

Vision: 
We envision a future where the fishing industry thrives, marine ecosystems flourish, and communities benefit from sustainable practices in Sierra Leone and beyond.

Mission: 
Our mission is to responsibly harness the abundant marine resources of Sierra Leone, providing premium seafood products to the global market while adhering to sustainable fishing practices and environmental stewardship.

Values:

Sustainability: Prioritizing long-term marine ecosystem health and resource management
Quality: Upholding the highest standards in seafood products and services
Integrity: Conducting business with transparency, honesty, and responsibility
Collaboration: Fostering strong partnerships and relationships for mutual growth
Innovation: Continuously improving our processes, technologies, and practices

Positioning: 
Hasco Fishing Company sets itself apart by combining local expertise, a global perspective, and a strong commitment to sustainability. We provide international partners with a reliable foothold in the West African fishing industry, ensuring responsible practices and premium seafood products.

Products/Services:

Commercial Fishing: Harnessing Sierra Leone's marine resources with sustainable fishing practices
Processing and Packaging: using state-of-the-art facilities to ensure the highest quality seafood products
Wholesale and Distribution: Supplying fresh and frozen seafood to local and international markets
Export Services: Seamlessly connecting Sierra Leone's marine resources with global customers
Customized Solutions: Catering to the unique needs of our partners in the global seafood market

Name: Navarre Kayak Fishing
Description:
Navarre Kayak Fishing started as Nick’s Guide Service and has developed into memories, friendships, and opportunities.

We changed the name to Navarre Kayak Fishing to provide better service to our local area, while providing the same one on one experience.  

At Navarre Kayak Fishing our approach is simple, catch fish!  We strive to put customers on fish of a lifetime, regardless of species.  From inshore to offshore our expectations are high and our work ethics even higher.

We provide quality gear and first hand experience, ensuring each client has everything needed to succeed.

Meet Your Guide

Nick grew up in a small town in Northeastern, Ohio.  His father taught him to respect the outdoors and introduced him to fishing and hunting.

After high school Nick joined the Air Force and served his country all over the world for six years.

Nick decided to forgo re-enlistment and continue his education.  He is currently working on his MBA.

Over the last several years, Nick has caught trophy fish all over Northwest, FL.  He has extensive knowledge of each species and the fishery, years of notes, and hours of mistakes.  He is constantly learning and focused on succeeding.

“Creating a business has always been a dream, creating a successful outdoor business will be my first true accomplishment.” – Nick

Name: Ibrahim Hosany Company Limited
Description:
noulamer est un nouveau concept gastronomique qui aidera certainement les fanatiques et autres amateurs de poisson et de fruit de mer frais. Le mot 'frais' qu'on connait aujourd'hui est utilisé a des fins commerciales mais malheureusement déchus de son vrai signification. Le ‘frais’ de noulamer est relatif aux pêches d’aujourd’hui que nous vous pêchons dans cette mer qui est la nôtre, Les Mauriciens. On assure La Pêche D’Aujourd’hui à trois heures de l’après-midi. Et on voudrait vous démontrer a quelle point la cuisine des Poissons Tropicaux de L'Océan Indien est en elle-même une nouvelle gastronomie a la fois débordant de saveurs vraiment très délicats et aussi imposante qu'innovant pour le palais.

noulamer vous propose une variété de poissons et de fruits de mer sont disponible à votre portée tous les jours, tant que le temps maritime nous le permet. Nos produits sont issue d’une chaîne de froid non interrompue ce qui assure un produit qui est exclusivement frais. Le transport, la manutention et le stockage de nos produits se font d’une manière très technique. Ainsi, la température idéale est l’atout indispensable qui pourvoit nos produits d’une fraîcheur unique. La preuve se justifie a l’arrivé des produits a Quatre-Bornes.

L'Ile Maurice et Ses Ressources Marines
Maurice, en forme longue la République de Maurice, en anglais Mauritius et Republic of Mauritius, est un État de l’océan Indien, situé au sud-est de l’Afrique à environ 870 km à l’est de Madagascar. Cette république d’une superficie de 2 040 km2 est composée de l’île Maurice qui représente 91 % de la superficie du pays avec 1 865 km2 de superficie ainsi que plusieurs petites îles et récifs dont Rodrigues et les archipels de Cargados Carajos et d’Agaléga. La capitale de Maurice est Port-Louis. L'île Maurice fait partie de l’archipel des Mascareignes, avec l'île sœur la Réunion à 170 km au sud-ouest et l'île Rodrigues 570 km a l'est.

Name: Fish List

Name: Big Fat Oysters Limited
Description:
Big Fat Oysters Limited is an oyster distribution company that ships the biggest, fattest and freshest oysters in the universe to the consumers doorstep anywhere in New Zealand. 

Our Oysters are grown in the clear waters of the Bay of Islands, New Zealand - they are grown for a minimum of 3 years before harvest, twice as long as usual, resulting in much larger oysters for the consumer.

We harvested strictly to season – June to December when they are at the peak of their condition.

Our Oysters are immediately opened in our onsite licensed processing plant then packed into convenient 200ml or 500ml tubs, to ensure maximum freshness and a premium product.

To retain their superb taste, all oysters are washed and packed in sea water from the same area in which they have been raised.

The tubs are then chilled down and packed in to chilli boxes with ice and transported by overnight courier.

--

PLEASE NOTE

Orders are dispatched at 7.30am on Monday, Tuesday, Wednesday and Thursday ONLY and the product will arrive at it's location the following day. Orders must be made one day prior to dispatch.

Customers with a rural delivery address may need to pick up oysters from their Courier depot.

** We fully pack our tubs with oysters so they are sold by volume and not numbers.
Our oysters vary in size, so accurate estimates of numbers per tub are not possible
but usually fall within the range – approx 10-12 oysters (200ml) & 24-30 oysters (500ml).
The oysters are very big.

Description:
Lakes Entrance is situated in the most strategic position of the very large South East trawl area of Australia, which stretches from the Victorian/South Australia border around to the Northern New South Wales and includes Tasmania.

Lakes Entrance Fishermen’s Co-Op provides a full-service unloading facility to the local fishing fleet. From there, fresh seafood is distributed to local shops and restaurants and further afield to the Melbourne Seafood Centre and Sydney Fish Market. 

At the Co-Op seafood is processed to then be sold at the onsite fresh seafood outlet called “Off The Wharf”, as well as supplying other outlets in the local region. 

The Co-operative has established itself as one of the most important voices in the Australian Fishing Industry and the largest (fleet and throughput) fishing co-operatives in Australia. Name: Norclean Technology AS
Description:
Vi har utviklet en metode som sørger for at oppdrettsanleggene sitter bom fast i sjøbunnen. Vi har utført omfattende tester og er trygge på at dette kan være til stor nytte for mange oppdrettsanlegg. Vi har utviklet en boreenhet, hvor boltene monteres ved hjelp av en arm montert på en fjernstyrt undervannsrobot (ROV). Metoden for å støpe fast boltene er også ny, og operasjonen utføres av en stor hydraulisk arbeids-ROV som vanligvis brukes offshore.

Den store undervannsroboten er utstyrt med armer og verktøy som brukes til kutting av vaier og kjetting. Ved hjelp av den nye metoden kan det nå bores og støpes i sjøbunn ned til 250 meter under vannet.

Vår WorkROV kan utføre mange typer undervannsarbeid.
Inspeksjon med rapport
Boring av anker bolter på dypt vann
Utlegg av kjetting og førtøyninger
Støping av innfesting for bolter
Kutting av vaier og kjetting
Utlegg av kabel
Fjerning av ødelagt kabel
opprydding av kjetting og fortøyninger etter oppdrett

Horisontal og vertikal boring
Den nye metoden går ut på å bore og feste bolter for fortøyninger på dypt vann, flere hundre meter under vannflaten. Anlegget vil dermed bli festet i fjell og stå helt fast, rustet til å tåle vindkast og storm. Nylig har vi utviklet en metode for horisontal boring. Dette testet vi ut sammen med Nexans, for festing av høyspent under vann.

Name: An Ocean Warrior
Description:
At An Ocean Warrior, we are passionate about making marine science and ocean conservation accessible to everyone and believe removing the barriers to communication between policymakers, regulators, fishermen, the fishing industry, scientists, marine energy, marine aquaculture and the general public allows for the development of practical solutions.

Utilising our expertise and skill set we empower people and projects with the marine knowledge they need. An Ocean Warrior consultancy provides specialist scientific services and actionable solutions that meet both the needs of the client as well as the ocean. We utilise a lens that considers the intricate web of the entire ecosystem over individual parts and are dedicated to preserving and promoting marine biodiversity alongside sustainable fisheries and ocean-conscious marine energy. Our approach harmonises the latest innovations with a wealth of expertise drawn from collaboration with scientific minds, marine conservationists and seasoned fishermen.

With a deep-rooted understanding of both the interconnectedness of marine life and the intricacies of the commercial fishing industry, we strive to implement forward-thinking strategies that safeguard the marine environment for current and future generations as well as bolster coastal communities.

We are a trusted source of objective advice and scientific support on marine conservation and commercial fisheries issues. An Ocean Warrior Consultancy provides expert support for UK fisheries, focusing on sustainable management and industry representation. Services include Fisheries Industry Representation, stakeholder liaison, conflict mitigation, EIA guidance, grant support, fisheries science, and marine ecosystem expertise. As a pioneer in the deep-sea fishing net industry of polyester (PET), our company has started research on polyester (PET) monofilament-woven polyester deep-sea fishing nets since 2016. Our company has invested a lot of money and finally developed and gathered in early 2017. Patented deep-sea fishing net automatic CNC knitting machine and patented. The polyester (PET) deep-sea fishing net produced by this machine is a double twisted hexagonal mesh woven from polyester (PET) monofilament. The Hebei Provincial Quality and Technical Supervision Bureau passed the sampling test and issued a certificate of conformity. Our company has all independent intellectual property rights. This product has all independent intellectual property rights.
 The polyester hexagonal net produced by the company can be applied to the protection of river dams such as marine aquaculture, deep sea cages, reservoir fences, slope protection and road protection. The pure polyester (PET) deep-water netting produced by our company is made of hexagonal shape which is smooth, semi-rigid, very strong and light, and is not easily woven by polyester (PET) monofilament. Net clothing has filled the gap in the industry and has become a pioneer in the industry of polyester hexagonal nets.
Hengshui Huarong New Energy Technology Co., Ltd. will keep pace with the international pace, improve the industry category, and constantly create innovation as the goal. Description:

Nossa missão é oferecer aos nossos clientes uma experiência única, trazendo os sabores frescos e autênticos do mar diretamente para suas mesas.
Como empresa comprometida com a qualidade, todos os nossos produtos são obtidos por meio de práticas de pesca responsáveis e sustentáveis. Nossa equipe de pescadores experientes e dedicados trabalha em estreita colaboração com as comunidades pesqueiras locais, garantindo a preservação dos recursos naturais e a manutenção de um equilíbrio ecológico saudável.
Aqui, a qualidade é a nossa prioridade. Selecionamos cuidadosamente os melhores exemplares de peixes, com destaque para atum e meca, que são conhecidos por sua carne saborosa e nutritiva. Nossos produtos são frescos, livres de conservantes e submetidos a rigorosos processos de controle de qualidade, garantindo que cada peça atenda aos mais altos padrões antes de chegar até você.
Nós acreditamos que a qualidade vai além do sabor dos nossos produtos. Também é sobre a qualidade de vida dos nossos pescadores, a preservação dos ecossistemas marinhos e a satisfação dos nossos clientes. Estamos comprometidos em criar um impacto positivo no mundo, enquanto proporcionamos uma experiência gastronômica excepcional.

Name: Department of Fisheries and Aquaculture, Akwa Ibom State University
Description:
The Department of Fisheries and Aquaculture at Akwa Ibom State University (AKSU) is dedicated to advancing sustainable fisheries, aquaculture development, and aquatic resource management through innovative education, applied research, and community-oriented programs.

Our mission is to build a new generation of professionals who are skilled, innovative, and committed to ensuring food security, environmental sustainability, and economic growth through the responsible use of aquatic resources. The department provides a dynamic learning environment that integrates theoretical knowledge with hands-on practical experience, equipping students with the technical expertise required to thrive in the rapidly evolving aquaculture industry.

We emphasize excellence in key areas such as fish farming, hatchery management, aquatic ecology, fish nutrition, biosecurity, and feed technology, while fostering research that addresses emerging challenges in aquaculture production, environmental protection, and resource conservation.

Through strong partnerships with government agencies, research institutions, and the private sector, the department drives innovation that supports the blue economy and enhances the livelihoods of fish farmers and coastal communities.

Our outreach and extension programs bridge the gap between science and practice, empowering local fish farmers with up-to-date information, sustainable farming techniques, and technological innovations that improve productivity and profitability.

At AKSU’s Department of Fisheries and Aquaculture, we believe that education, innovation, and collaboration are the keys to building a resilient and sustainable aquaculture sector that benefits both people and the planet.

Name: Gudan Farms
Description:
Gudan Farms is a registered agribusiness committed to transforming agriculture in Nigeria through sustainable practices and innovative technologies. Our focus is on aquaculture, producing high-quality catfish and tilapia using advanced techniques like aquaponics to promote resource efficiency and environmental sustainability. Our mission is to enhance food security, empower communities, and drive growth within the agricultural sector.

Products and Services

—Aquaculture: We specialize in the farming of catfish and tilapia, employing sustainable methods to produce premium fish for the local market.
—Value-Added Processing: We offer processed fish products, including dried and packaged catfish, catering to diverse consumer needs.
— Agricultural Consultancy: Our consultancy services assist other fish farmers with setting up and optimizing their fish farming operations.
— Agritech Solutions: We are developing a gamified investment platform that allows investors to participate in sustainable farming projects, track progress, and learn about modern agricultural practices.
— Retail of Farming Supplies: We operate a retail shop that provides fish farming equipment, feed, and other essential supplies.
— Future Expansion: As part of our growth strategy, we are actively working on developing a horticulture and poultry wing to diversify our offerings and further contribute to food security in the near future.

Gudan Farms aims to be a leader in the agricultural value chain, making a significant impact on food security and empowering the next generation of agripreneurs.

Description:
Today, the Company's workforce, consisting of recognized masters of their craft, carries out activities in the field of industrial fishing, processing and reproduction of aquatic biological resources at a high professional level, implements social programs and actively participates in the social and cultural life of the region.

The company is the second largest taxpayer, forming the budget of the Kuril urban district, steadily following the flagships of the region's fishing industry - JSC Gidrostroy and JSC Kurilskiy Rybak - and closely cooperates with true professionals in their field - SKIT companies "and" Apollo ".

Based on the results of activities for 2019, the Company paid 261.5 million rubles in tax payments to budgets of various levels and funds, for the period 2017 - 2019, more than 200 million rubles were invested in the development of the material and technical base of aquaculture and fishing, the creation of infrastructure facilities for the food cluster.

The development plans of the Company for 2020, including an investment project in the field of aquaculture (fish farming) aimed at the implementation of the Food Security Doctrine of the Russian Federation in 2020, and which provides for the Company to invest about 100 million rubles in the construction of a salmon fish hatchery that carries out pasture aquaculture using biotechnology of cage rearing of juvenile chum salmon of a unique population found in the Russian Federation exclusively in the lake systems of the southern Kuril Islands. Moreover, within the framework of the Investment Project, the Company intends to carry out, at its own expense and in close cooperation with SakhNIRO, a set of measures for the artificial reproduction of this population, to continue the protection of natural objects and aquatic biological resources of Iturup Island.

Name: Exmouth Wild Prawns
Description:
Exmouth Wild Prawns is family owned and operated prawn fishery based in Exmouth, Western Australia. The company was established in 1963 by Michael George Kailis and over the years has become recognised as one of the best managed sustainable fisheries in the world being rewarded with MSC certification. 

We are part of MG Kailis Seafood, a global seafood company, who also catches fish from the pristine waters of Australia's North-West and operates in the only hand-caught tropical rock lobster fishery in the Torres Strait. 

Exmouth Wild Prawns are lucky enough to be the sole operator and owner of all licenses in the Exmouth Gulf Fishery. This is unique and sets a culture among our fisherman because for us it isn’t about trying to catch more than the person before or after us, it is our pond, and we want to look after it. We are here to get the best outcome for this year, next year and the next ten years. 

This isn’t just a job for us, our fisherman are there for long-haul, they care about the environment and have a love for the ocean. We are lucky to work in an amazing environment that produces absolutely everything. Our focus on sustainability and respect for environment is why we can continue to come back and fish every year. 

#respectthewild #exmouthprawns

Name: OVAD Aqua Ventures
Description:
OVAD is an aquaculture firm based out of Bhubaneswar looking to revolutionize the seafood market by bettering variety, quality, freshness and pricing - while empowering fishermen and marginal farmers.

Odisha is a major producer of prime quality seafood, yet unfortunately most of it is exported and we rarely get "export" quality at our local vendors. With the burst of aquaculture thousands of fishermen and hundreds of villages across the coastline are facing more and more difficulty competing.

Our MPEDA certified farm, covering an area of over 70 acres sits right on the Bay of Bengal and is fed by the Kana Bansa river. We currently rotate our ponds across 3 crops and produce around 250MT/year; however our production capacity is a little over 750MT/year.

Our outreach program - iOnPoverty - empowers farmers with the information and resources they need to pursue aquaculture in a sustainable and less capital intensive fashion. We believe that with the right systems in place they can achieve a 40% increase in profits!

Name: PISCICULTURAIKIGAI
Description:
A IKIGAI PISCICULTURA SUSTENTÁVEL foi fundada pela bióloga Marise Tanaka Suzuki com o intuito de produzir alimentos de origem animal e vegetal em harmonia com o meio ambiente. 
Somos uma PISCICULTURA SUSTENTÁVEL especializada em TILÁPIA e por ter o FRIGORÍFICO PRÓRPIO, além de criar também abatemos os peixes e inovamos com os mais diversos cortes de tilápia. 
Somos a primeira Piscicultura do Estado do Tocantins devidamente regularizada para criar as tilápias.
O nosso real diferencial, está na sustentabilidade da nossa criação que se baseia em: 
- ECONOMIA DE ÁGUA: Sistema com recirculação de água (RAS), dessa forma utiliza um volume bem menor de água do que o sistema convencional. 
- FERTIIRRIGAÇÃO: Os resíduos sólidos são reaproveitados como fertilizantes para os hortifrutis (todos livres de agrotóxicos).
- ZERO IMPACTO AMBIENTAL: não temos efluentes liberados em rios, córregos ou lagos. Tudo é reaproveitado no nosso terreno.
Além disso, o sistema RAS permitem que os peixes não fiquem com gosto de barro e nem cheiro forte.
Atualmente também oferecemos CONSULTORIA e ASSESSORIA aos piscicultores e também PROJETAMOS e IMPLANTAMOS sistemas de piscicultura em todo o estado do Tocantins. Aceitamos esse desafio devido à nossa prática do dia a dia e na capacidade de conseguirmos solucionar nossos os problemas do sistema.
Fazemos TREINAMENTO das práticas em piscicultura na nossa própria empresa, assim não só falamos, mas mostramos aos nossos clientes que nossas práticas são validadas. 
O treinamento é dividido em 3 módulos: 
- A arte da piscicultura; 
- Lucratividade na ponta da caneta; 
- Seja mais, seja Sustentável!

Aos poucos, estamos nos projetando para nos tornar além de uma piscicultura robusta, um CENTRO EDUCACIONAL DE PISCICULTURA, atuando em toda a cadeia produtiva.

E então, o que achou de nossa empresa?
Siga a gente no Instagram e conheça a nossa parte comercial.

https://www.instagram.com/pisciculturaikigai/

Dans un esprit convivial, chaleureux et pédagogique on vous accueille, on vous conseille et on vous attend nombreux pour partager autour d’une même passion : la pêche.
Venez découvrir les secrets du plus grand lac naturel de France, le lac du Bourget, en compagnie de l’un de nos guides, agrées jeunesse et sport.
Partagez le savoir et l’expérience d’un guide fin connaisseur de son lac et partez à la rencontre des brochets, lavarets, ombles chevaliers et perches et initiez vous à de nouvelles techniques de pêche.

Name: SEAFOOD BAY
Description:
Nuestra empresa se dedica a la venta de camarones frescos y de alta calidad, directamente desde Ecuador, uno de los principales productores de camarones del mundo. Trabajamos con los mejores productores locales y seleccionamos cuidadosamente cada uno de los camarones que ofrecemos a nuestros clientes, asegurándonos de que cumplan con los estándares más exigentes de calidad y frescura.

Nuestros camarones son cultivados en estanques de agua salada, utilizando métodos sostenibles y respetuosos con el medio ambiente. Gracias a las condiciones climáticas únicas de Ecuador, nuestros camarones tienen un sabor y una textura excepcionales, que los hacen ideales para cualquier platillo o preparación.

Nos enorgullece ofrecer un producto de primera calidad y un servicio excepcional a nuestros clientes. Nuestro objetivo es superar sus expectativas en cada compra, brindándoles camarones frescos y deliciosos que les permitan disfrutar de una experiencia culinaria única. Pruebe nuestros camarones de Ecuador y descubra por qué son considerados entre los mejores del mundo!

Name: Guangdong Hinter group

Description: Consorcio Acuícola Exportador San Pedro del Titicaca es una iniciativa del Colectivo Andean Trout destinada a atender mercados del exportación.

Name: Fleet Fisheries, Inc.
Description: Fleet Fisheries is a wholesale seafood supplier that harvests scallops, lobster, crab, tuna and swordfish.
